item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 26953 Extension Set 1
item.DESCRIPTION:
Circuit extension on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Set with different tracks to extend your race track Package contents: 2 standard straight pieces, 2 lane change pieces, 4 corner pieces at 1 / 60 degrees and track locking mechanisms
Expand your race track You now know your old race track like the back of your hand and want something new? Then simply extend your circuit with the help of this extension set. This set features two standard straight sections, two lane change pieces and four 60° corners for new action. Special care must be taken when changing lanes. If two opponents drive through this chicane at the same time, they end up knocking each other out. Track locking mechanisms are also included in this set and ensure that the track sections remain securely connected to each other. The tracks are on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore complement the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 26953 Extension Set 1 for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20611 1/3 Straights (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Straight sections to extend your race track on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To expand your race track Package contents: 2 pieces, each 11.5 cm
Your race track needs a connection Between lane changes, corners and other stretches of track, you often need straight sections to make the connection. I'm sure this set will help you. It contains two 1/3 straight sections, each 115 mm long. The relatively short pieces are perfect for bridging short stretches and for not having to install too long straight sections between corners. The extensions are on a scale of 1:24 and can thus complement all race tracks on the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION. Expand your race track and aim for one goal only: To have the best race track among your friends at home and then enjoy some real racing fun in the most exciting races!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20611 1/3 Straights (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20612 1/4 Straights (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Pack of 2 1/4 straight sections on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION To expand your race track Package contents: 2 pieces, each 8.6 cm
Practical track parts for your Carrera race track These track elements are always there when there is a gap between the tracks due to corners, jumps or other race track features. With their 8.6 cm, they are a quarter of the length of a normal straight section and, as they come on a scale of 1:24, are suitable for the slot car tracks: Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and the Carrera EVOLUTION. This track set contains two of these 1/4 straight sections and should not be missing as a replacement accessory in your collection. The short track sections can be easily and simply added to the existing tracks of your Carrera race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20612 1/4 Straights (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20577 Curve 1/30° (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
6-section corner set, 30 degrees each DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION As an extension and fine-tuning for your race track Package contents: 6 pieces (each 30 degrees) = 180 degrees
A new corner for your race track If you have a Carrera race track on a scale of 1:24, this track element is just the thing for its extension. In the package there are six corner parts, each 30°. If you put them all together, you create a big corner totalling 180°. First tear along the long straight sections, pull off your driving skills in the looping section and take the jump with flying colours, before hanging on with your opponent in the corner. As a slot car professional, you certainly know exactly how much speed and tact you need to steer your vehicle through the corner. The cornered sections are the ideal complement to your Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 or Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20571 Curve 1/60° (3)
item.DESCRIPTION:
3-part set comprising corner track on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION Corner 1: 1 piece = 60 degrees Package contents: 3 pieces = 180 degrees
Ready for this corner? Your opponent is already preparing to reduce the speed in order to drive through the corner with grace. Now it’s your turn to do the same! Throttle your speed and accelerate at the right moment to resume the wild chase with your opponent. With this set you get three 60° corners, which together make a generous 180° corner. Here your slot car can get acquainted with centrifugal force. The track parts of the corner come on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore be ideally combined with the DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION race tracks. If you are looking for an extension for your race track, then these corner track sections are a good addition.

item.NAME: 85426 Engine Z10 18.000 U/min
item.DESCRIPTION:
Spare engine Z10 DIGITAL 124 18,000 rpm DIGITAL 124 As a replacement for your slot car
Safe is safe! The replacement motor for your DIGITAL 124 slot car If, after many kilometres on your Carrera race track, you notice that the performance of your slot car is deteriorating, a replacement engine can help. The engine has a maximum output of 18,000 rpm and is equipped with a 10-tooth sprocket.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Engine for cars Carrera Digital 124

item.NAME: 85201 Track supports set standard
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set: standard support set DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For fastening looping sections, bridges, steep corners, ski jumps and fly-overs
You can rely on it For the correct attachment of looping sections, bridges, steep corners, ski jumps or a fly-over, supports such as these are used. They give the elements better support, especially if you drive at high speed in your slot cars. The set contains six parts, including two short and two long supports and two feet for attachment to the floor. The shiny, black design ensures that the supports in the diorama that follows do their work discreetly in the background. An essential extension set if you want to build spectacular race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track supports set standard

item.NAME: 85202 Track supports set sharp corner
item.DESCRIPTION: 85202 Track supports set sharp corner
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track supports set sharp corner

item.NAME: 85203 Support props variabel
item.DESCRIPTION:
Support props for your Carrera race course DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION For fixing crossings and looping sections
For even more variety on your circuit! Some race tracks, such as the Suzuka Circuit, have bridges and tunnels that make the races even more exciting. With the support props you can now recreate this in true-to-original detail on your Carrera race track. By attaching them to the track sections, tunnels and crossings can be built, which on the one hand make the track more interesting and on the other hand allow a more space-saving construction.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Support props variabel

item.NAME: 85209 Clips for track screw connection
item.DESCRIPTION: 85209 Clips for track screw connection (30pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Clips for track screw connection

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 88104 Guide Keel (10pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION: Guide Keel for GO, GO+, D143 (10pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Guide Keel for GO, GO+, D143 (10pcs)

item.NAME: GO - 88107 Lap Timer Track
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera race track with mechanical lap counter GO!!!, GO!!! Plus Lap counter track Package contents: 1 piece
You need a new lap counter? This mechanical lap counter track is a perfect addition to your Carrera race track on a scale of 1:43 and is therefore suitable for the Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! Plus, as long as they have a voltage of 14.8V. With a lane spacing of 6 cm and a track width of 11.4 cm, the small track section is ideally suited to these Carrera series. The simple click system makes it easy to integrate the track element into your slot car track. Increase your driving fun and overall racing action with this lap counter track. In wild duels, you always have an eye on how often you have completely circumnavigated the track. And, of course, you can also use the counter to keep an eye on your opponent. A great incentive to deliver the very best performance.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lap counter track

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 88108 Supports set Looping
item.DESCRIPTION: Supports set Looping for GO!!!, GO+, D143
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Supports set Looping

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 88109 Track supports set Crossing
item.DESCRIPTION: Track supports set Crossing for GO!!!, GO+, D143
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track supports set Crossing

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 88111 Track connection clips (10pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION: Track connection clips (10pcs) for GO/GO+/D143
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track connection clips (10pcs)

item.NAME: EVO/D132 89200 Engine E200
item.DESCRIPTION:
Slot car engine E200 DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION To recharge your WIRELESS+ speed controller Package contents: 1 piece
The standard motor for your slot cars With the E200 engine, you always have a reliable spare part ready to give your slot car the power it needs. It can be used as a standard engine for all your Carrera EVOLUTION cars from 2003 onwards, and Carrera Digital 132 cars from 2007 onwards. To make sure that your car is compatible with this engine, you can take a look at the spare parts list for each Carrera series. In addition, you can recognise all vehicles that are designed for the E200 engine by a second holding magnet in front of the rear axle.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 89200 Engine E200 for EVO/D132

item.NAME: Extension set from Boffin 100 to Boffin 300
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set from Boffin 100 to Boffin 300
Build over 300 exciting projects with this classic kit! Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual to build exciting projects such as AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends.
Build over 300 exciting projects with this classic kit! Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual to build exciting projects such as AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. No tools required. Includes Projects 1-305 manuals (includes all of the Boffin 100 projects and 200 new ones).
Features:
Contains over 60 Snap-Together parts. Electrical components provide students ages 8+ with hands-on experience designing and building models of working electrical circuits. Snap-Together parts require no tools and ensure correct connections. Requires 4 "AA" batteries (not included) 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and at home. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension set from Boffin 100 to Boffin 300

item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set from Boffin 500 to Boffin 750
Our biggest and best Boffin kit! With Boffin extreme, future engineers can build over 750 projects including FM radios, digital voice recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells and other awesome circuitry.
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. No tools required.
Extreme Version - Contains over 80 parts to build over 750 projects. Includes everything from Boffin 500 plus projects in solar, electromagnetism, vibration switches, and 70 computer interfaced projects. Includes Projects 512-692 and CI-73 manuals.
Features:
Contains over 80 snap-together parts. Build over 750 exciting projects. Includes 70 computer interfaced projects and CI-73 manual Electrical components provide students ages 8+ with hands-on experience designing and building models of working electrical circuits. Snap-together parts require no tools and ensure correct connections. Requires 4 "AA" batteries (not included) 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension set from Boffin 500 to Boffin 750

item.DESCRIPTION:
Modern decoration for the race track! Buildings can be used as modular system offering numerous combinations and constructions, expandable as much as you like! Plastic construction kits easy to assemble, decoration stickers enclosed. Lower part with stairs and roof
Dimensions: 34 x 24 x 20 cm / 13.8 x 9.4 x 7.9 in. (width x height x depth)

item.DESCRIPTION:
Modern decoration for the race track! Buildings can be used as modular system offering numerous combinations and constructions, expandable as much as you like! Plastic construction kits easy to assemble, decoration stickers enclosed. 3 stories, incl. double garage
Dimensions: 29 x 35 x 23 cm / 11.4 x 13.8 x 9.1 in. (width x height x depth)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Press tower for Carrera Evolution, Digital 132 and Digital 124

Dimensions: 33 x 9 x 23 cm / 13.0 x 3.5 x 9.1 in. (width x height x depth)

item.NAME: 21105 VIP-floor
item.DESCRIPTION:
Modern decoration for the race track! Buildings can be used as modular system offering numerous combinations and constructions, expandable as much as you like! Plastic construction kits easy to assemble, decoration stickers enclosed. 1 top part VIP-floor
Dimensions: 20,5 x 11 x 22 cm / 8.1 x 4.3 x 8.7 in. (width x height x depth)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: VIP-floor for Carrera Evolution, Digital 132 a Digital 124

item.NAME: 21121 Victors' podium with set of figures
item.DESCRIPTION: Modern TIMPO® decoration for the race track! Extremely detailed and coloured figures. Revolving and movable parts of the body. 1 winner‘s tribune, 3 winners, 1 official
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Victors' podium with set of figures for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 a Digital 132

item.NAME: 21114 Set of figures -Pit Babes (5pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION: Modern decoration for the race track! Extremely detailed and coloured figures. Revolving and movable parts of the body. 3 leaning, 2 sitting
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Pit babes (5pcs)

item.NAME: 21124 Buildings - Control Tower
item.DESCRIPTION:
Control tower for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION Suitable as decoration for the race track
Everything in view on the race track The control tower perfectly extends your Carrera race track and keeps it safe and tidy. The decorative element measures 44.2 cm x 32.6 cm x 22 cm (width x height x depth) and makes racing on the Carrera track even more authentic. The tower’s balcony can be mounted alternately according to your own imagination. In addition, the Control Tower can be extended or combined with the Position Tower (article 30357) and the Pit Lane (article 21104). So you can redesign your race track again and again and bring variety to the track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Control Tower

item.NAME: 21127 Set of figures - spectators (5 pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION: Modern decoration for the race track! Extremely detailed and coloured figures. Revolving and movable parts of the body. 5 figures: 3 sitting, 2 standing
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Spectators for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and 132

item.NAME: 21128 Set of figures - Fans
item.DESCRIPTION:
For Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and Digital 132
Modern decoration for the race track! Extremely detailed and coloured figures. Revolving and movable parts of the body. 15 figures: 12 sitting, 3 standing
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Fans for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and Digital 132

item.NAME: 21129 Set of figures - Stands
item.DESCRIPTION:
Set of figures for the grandstand DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION Suitable for race track decoration
Loving decoration for your Carrera race track
What would an exciting car race be without cheering spectators? With this set of figures you add a great detail to your Carrera race track and create an even more authentic motor sport feeling. The set of figures for your grandstand consists of 20 seated figures and inspires all with an extremely detailed and colourful look. The visitors can be positioned or rotated as desired thanks to moving limbs. These decorative objects cleverly add that certain something to your Carrera race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Set of figures - Stands

item.NAME: 21130 Tyre Stacks
item.DESCRIPTION: 6 Stacks of tyres, 24 Brackets These stacks of tyres soak up every crash! Each of these 6 elements consists of three chains of tyres and can thus be used at any position.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Tyre Stacks for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and 132

item.NAME: 21131 Set of figures, mechanics, Carrera Crew
item.DESCRIPTION:
Mechanics figure set in Carrera design DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION Suitable as decoration for the race track
Without them, nothing runs smoothly: The mechanics At the Pit Stop, the mechanics ensure that tyres are changed, technical problems are repaired and the car is good to go again. It goes without saying that the mechanics will also be present on the Carrera race track! The Carrera mechanic crew consists of five figures in red outfits. In addition to the detailed workmanship, the modern figures also win you over with their different, adjustable or rotatable body parts. The mechanics cut an excellent figure and perfectly complement your Carrera race track. An authentic, lovingly designed race track is guaranteed with the mechanic's figure set! This means a pit stop can take place with mechanics, like in a real race.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Mechanics Carrera (5pcs)

item.NAME: 21133 Set of figures, mechanics, silver
item.DESCRIPTION:
Mechanics figure set in Carrera design DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION Suitable as decoration for the race track
Without them, nothing runs smoothly: The mechanics At the Pit Stop, the mechanics ensure that tyres are changed, technical problems are repaired and the car is good to go again. It goes without saying that the mechanics will also be present on the Carrera race track! The Carrera mechanic crew consists of five figures in red outfits. In addition to the detailed workmanship, the modern figures also win you over with their different, adjustable or rotatable body parts. The mechanics cut an excellent figure and perfectly complement your Carrera race track. An authentic, lovingly designed race track is guaranteed with the mechanic's figure set! This means a pit stop can take place with mechanics, like in a real race.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Mechanics Carrera (5pcs)

item.NAME: 800004 Battery DP 7,4V 1200mA tunning 27MHz/2.4GHz
item.DESCRIPTION:
Replacement battery for your remote-controlled vehicle Li-Io battery 7.4 V 1200 mAH Package contents: 1 piece
New power for your RC model After a certain number of charging cycles, the old battery must simply be replaced so that the vehicle can be used again at full capacity. This lithium-ion battery works with 7.4 V. When choosing the right charger you should pay attention to this voltage. The unit milliampere hours (mAH) represents the amount of charge that can flow through the device and the conductor within one hour. With this rechargeable battery that’s 1200 mA. The disposal of your old or broken Li-Ion batteries should not be done with your household waste, but in yellow boxes placed especially for it. You can find them in electrical or DIY stores. The disposal points provided by local waste disposal companies also offer professional disposal. New energy for your device!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 800004 Battery DP 7,4V 1200mA tunning 27MHz/2.4GHz

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30340 Speed Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Wired controller for DIGITAL 132/124 race tracks DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 To control your vehicle with precision Package contents: 1 piece
The speed controller – your tool for the perfect race Get off to an ideal start, drift spectacularly through the corners and always overtake your opponent in exactly the right lane – you can do all this with a little tact and your speed controller. As usual, you can use the upper button to fine-tune the speed of your slot car. The red button on the front allows you to change lanes on your DIGITAL race track. The controller is wired, so you don't need to worry about whether or not the batteries are fully charged. It always works. The spiral cable gives you enough freedom of movement and does not restrict you during races.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30340 Speed Controller

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30341 Single Lane Track Section for pit stop extension
item.DESCRIPTION:
Straight section to extend the Pit Stop Lane DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Package contents: 1 piece
Time for a pit stop? The tyres of your slot car have to be changed or the tank is empty? Then you should make a stop in the pit lane! With the single-lane straight section you can quickly and easily extend the Pit Stop Lane, i.e. the way to the pit. This means that several of your slot cars can drive into the pit at the same time, one behind the other. The extension on a scale of 1:24 is suitable for upgrading the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 race tracks. You can let your imagination and creativity run wild as you expand your race track. You are not bound to a specific limit and can easily adjust the Pit Lane to the length you want.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30341 Single Lane Track Section for pit stop extension

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132 - 30326 Transformer EU
item.DESCRIPTION: 30326 Transformer EU 14,8 V - 51,8 VA for Digital 132
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30326 Transformer EU

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30343 Lane Change Section, left
item.DESCRIPTION:
Lane change left as a sophisticated circuit element DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For expansion or digital upgrading Package contents: 1 piece (2 track parts)
Exciting lane changes and even more driving fun guaranteed With this lane change left, you can upgrade your Carrera race track and bring both excitement and variety to the racing day! The lane change on a scale of 1:24 consists of two track parts and can be assembled and attached to your Carrera race track in just a few simple steps. The lane change is suitable for the DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and the digitally upgraded EVOLUTION race track. At the push of a button, you can let your slot car change lanes and cut off your opponents. Will you be able to change lanes at the decisive moment and get all the way to the top?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30343 Lane Change Section, left

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30345 Lane Change Section, right
item.DESCRIPTION:
Digital lane change (right) for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For expansion or upgrading Package contents: 1 piece (2 track parts)
Exciting duels guaranteed Change lanes to cut off your opponents and get to the top? No problem with the Carrera lane change right! At the touch of a button you can change lanes and risk daring overtaking manoeuvres. Can you change lanes in time and drive ahead of your competitors? The lane change is suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and DIGITAL 132 race tracks. If you have digitally converted an EVOLUTION race track, you can also change lanes on this race track at the touch of a button. The track consists of two parts and can be easily integrated into your existing Carrera race track. You can let your creativity and imagination run wild as you build and design the race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30345 Lane Change Section, right

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30347 Double Lane Change Section
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension double lane change track on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Lane change for exciting overtaking manoeuvres Package contents: 1 piece (2 track parts)
Go on the chase A lane change in the race track creates completely new possibilities for you. On the digital Carrera race tracks it is possible to change lanes thanks to lane change sections. With a double lane change track both cars can even change lanes at the same time. However, they shouldn’t do this at the same time, otherwise an accident can quickly occur. When used tactically and cleverly, the lane change enables you to drive in the slipstream of your opponent or to force the competition to break. The double lane change track consists of two individual parts and comes on a scale of 1:24. It can be used to upgrade the analogue Carrera EVOLUTION race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30347 Double Lane Change Section

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132 - 30348 Speed Controller extension set
item.DESCRIPTION: For digital racing fun with 5 or 6 speed controllers.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30348 Speed Controller extension set

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30350 Digital Narrow Section, left
item.DESCRIPTION: 30350 Digital Narrow Section, left Contents: 4 pieces for Digital 132/124
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30350 Digital Narrow Section, left

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30351 Digital Narrow Section, right
item.DESCRIPTION: 30351 Digital Narrow Section, right Contents: 4 pieces for Digital 132/124
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30351 Digital Narrow Section, right

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20366 2 guide keels incl. 8 double grinders, from 2007
item.DESCRIPTION: Guide keel/Double sliding contact for the following cars: Exclusiv cars from2006 Evolution cars from 2007 all DIGITAL 124/32 cars Contents: 2x Guide keels 8 x Double sliding contacts
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20366 2 guide keels incl. 8 double grinders, from 2007 for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30352 Control Unit
item.DESCRIPTION:
Control Unit for slot car and race control on your DIGITAL 124/132 race track DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For controlling braking behaviour, tank capacity and speed (power) Package contents: 1x Control Unit, 1x end section left, 1x end section right
The heart of your DIGITAL race track With the Control Unit you can make all the necessary settings before the race and tune your slot car to get it just right for the action ahead! First of all, the speed controller is connected to the slot car. This is the basis for all further settings. You can also set a ghost car to drive around the track at the desired speed. You can use the function as a pace or safety car, for example, if there has been a crash on the track. Of course, you can also adjust your slot car using the Control Unit. This allows the speed and braking force to be adjusted in ten different stages. Depending on your level of skill and personal preference, the car can be adjusted to your driving style. In connection with the Pit Lane (2001011), you can also adjust the tank capacity of your slot car, making the race even more realistic.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30352 Control Unit

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30353 Driver Display
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera Driver Display with LED Display DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Shows the tank capacity, the number of pit stops (max. 10) and the current race position
Stay in control! With digital features, the racing action you will enjoy with your slot car race track will be further enhanced. The Driver Display is one of these cool accessories for the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and DIGITAL 132 that not only gives your race track a visual highlight, but also score points with its exciting functions. In conjunction with the Control Unit (30352) and the Pit Lane (30356), the LED Display shows you not only the current race position, but also the tank capacity, rpm and the number of pit stops. With this information, you now have much more leeway to incorporate tactical skill into your driving and to finish top of the podium when you cross the finish line. The Driver Display comes with an adapter on a scale of 1:24 and two connecting track sections.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30353 Driver Display

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30354 Startlight
item.DESCRIPTION:
Race track starting light arch with LED display and sound DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Display of the start sequence
On your marks, get set and go!!! The cars are ready, the startlights light up with the sound of the race track’s attention-grabbing tones and everyone knows that in just the blink of an eye the slot car competition will start. The tension just before the start of a race is indescribable. When does the start signal sound, and when is the right time to press the start button? The Startlight Feature makes sure that your adrenaline level will shoot even higher. The semi-circular structure is equipped with an LED display that simulates the start sequence. Together with the sound effects, this creates an authentic driving feeling on the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 race tracks. The Startlight Set comes with an adapter unit for race tracks on a scale of 1:24 and a total of four end pieces for left and right. The accessory only works in conjunction with the Control Unit (30352).
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30354 Startlight

item.NAME: 30356 Pit Lane - DIGITAL 132/124
item.DESCRIPTION:
Pit lane with different driving modes for true-to-original races DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For even more action on the race track Package contents: 1x lane change entry, 1x lane change exit, 1x standard straight section, 2x single lane straight section , 1x Pit Stop Adapter Unit with 2x end sections
Even a Carrera car has to make a pit stop That real racing feeling for your DIGITAL 124 or DIGITAL 132 race track! The Pit Lane adds an important racing element to your Carrera race track. The Pit Lane works in conjunction with the Control Unit (30352) or the Black Box (30344). However, the extended tank function is only available for use with the Control Unit!
The Pit Lane gives you three new ways to make your race on the track even more exciting, while also allowing you to add tactical elements. Automatic lap counting On the one hand, a lap count is integrated in the Pit Lane. Especially during longer races, you can quickly lose track of the laps you have driven. Thanks to the automatic counter, you can fully concentrate on your lap times. Lap counting can also be deactivated if needed. Refuelling the cars No matter in which racing series - the pit stop is always a special moment. Used tactically, it can decide you win or lose the race. It is the same on your Carrera race track! You can set the slot cars to have regular pit stops. If you don’t pull in for a pit stop, it slows down your slot car and the exit can be re-decided in a heart beat. You need the Driver Display (30353) to be able to read the fuel level in your tank. Deploying a Pace Car On the other hand, the Pit Lane also serves to let the race be led by a Pace Car. As in real races, you can bring the Pace Car onto the track after an accident to recover the vehicles that have gone off the track. The only thing to make sure is that the slot car has pace car electronics. If you want to use the tank function and a pace car at the same time, you will need two pit lanes.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30356 Pit Lane

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30357 Position Tower
item.DESCRIPTION:
Set position and lap indicators DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 LED indicator
Counting laps – made easy! It's easy to lose track of who's really ahead in fast-paced races. And with all the action, who has the time to remember the number of laps already made? The solution here is the Position Tower for your Carrera race track. So you always have control over your current race position when competing against other cars. This will allow you to fully concentrate on your driving performance. The Tower is not only practical, it also offers certain optical benefits. It adds even more authenticity to your driving experience and works as a cool feature for the track. The LED display shows the number of laps and the position of the leading car. The Position Tower comes with an Adapter Unit and, on a scale of 1:24, fits perfectly with the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 race track. Only works in conjunction with the Control Unit (30352).
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30357 Position Tower

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 -30360 Adapter Unit
item.DESCRIPTION:
Adapter Unit – connecting piece for digital accessories DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Connecting track for Driver Display 30353, Startlight 30354 and Position Tower 3035 Package contents: 1 piece (34.5 cm)
The connector for many accessories With the Adapter Unit you have various options to expand your race track to include cool accessories. In principle, this is a standard straight line for DIGITAL 124/132 race tracks (34.5 cm) with two connectors on each side. The Driver Display (20030353), the Position Tower (20030357) and the Startlight (20030354) can be connected to the connectors. Make sure that the Adapter Unit is inserted into the circuit in the correct direction. Making sure that it has been correctly installed in the direction of travel with the slot cars is possible thanks to an arrow located on the side. For that authentic racing feeling, it is of course also possible to attach outside curbs.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30360 Adapter Unit

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30355 Lap Counter
item.DESCRIPTION: Only in conjunction with Control Unit 30352! NEW! Direct connection to the Control Unit (no additional track required) NEW! Time measurement also in the Pit Lane (only in combination with Pit Lane 30356) NEW! Position indicator of the cars on the display NEW! Backlit display for better readability Display options for positions, fastest lap, total time, time difference to lead car Time measurement for up to 6 vehicles to an accuracy of 1/1000 sec. Training and race mode Race mode divided into lap and time races Lap races from 0 to 9999 laps possible Time race from 00:00'01'' to 99:59'59''
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30355 Lap Counter

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20365 Double grinder, 10 pcs, from 2007
item.DESCRIPTION:
10 double sliding contacts for racing cars DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION (from 2007) Connect your smartphone, tablet or PC to the Carrera Control Unit via Bluetooth. Package contents: 10 x sliding contacts
So that your slot cars can tear up the track as they wiz round What real racing drivers need are, of course, the double sliding contacts. One of the few wear parts in Carrera vehicles are the double sliding contacts. After countless laps, the double sliding contacts are worn out and the cars may slow down. Now is the time for some new double sliding contacts to keep up with your friends again. The set includes 10 double sliding contacts, which can be installed in all Exclusiv vehicles from 2006, EVOLUTION vehicles from 2007 and all DIGITAL 124/132 vehicles. You should always have a set of double sliding contacts ready in your own "Carrera workshop". Because a good driver is distinguished by good equipment – to always keep the car in a good condition!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: E20365 Double grinder, 10 pcs, from 2007 for VO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 26955 Extension Set 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
Track set with corners and standard straight sections DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION To expand your race track Package contents: 2 pieces – standard straight sections, 4 pieces – corners 1 / 30 degrees
For the expansion of your Carrera race track and even more driving fun Would you like to expand your Carrera DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 or EVOLUTION race track and add some variety to your races? With this great extension set you can extend your Carrera race track to include great new features without any hassle. The set includes two standard straight sections as well as four corners and the corresponding track locking mechanisms. The tracks on a scale of 1:24 can be easily assembled and attached to your existing race track. Create your own individual Carrera race track and discover new possibilities and track elements to make your track even more exciting and expand it.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 26955 Extension Set 2 for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 26956 Extension Set 3
item.DESCRIPTION:
Versatile Carrera extension set for race tracks on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION To extend and expand your race track Package contents: 4 pieces – standard straight sections, 2 pieces – track change, 2 pieces – narrow sections, 4 pieces corners 2/30 degrees, track locking mechanisms
Always bigger, always faster – this extension set makes it possible! In the course of time, you will also become fixated on making your Carrera race track more and more versatile and exciting. But what's the best way to do that? As a first step, we recommend the use of additional track components. These allow you to construct your track anew and extend it with additional elements. In this extension set you will find many different tracks that will support you in your "rapid Carrera race track” project. Four standard straight sections, two lane changes, two narrow section tracks and four cornered sections with 2/30°, as well as the matching track locking mechanisms come with this set to your home. All included track parts are on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore be used for the Carrera DIGITAL 124, the Carrera DIGITAL 132 and the Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 26956 Extension Set 3 for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132 26732 Digital decoder
item.DESCRIPTION:
Decoder to convert from EVOLUTION to DIGITAL To upgrade your analogue racing cars Package contents: 1 piece
To upgrade your EVOLUTION track to a DIGITAL race track You want to take the next step and digitally upgrade your EVOLUTION race track? This decision opens up many new possibilities for racing. More friends can also take part in your exciting races. With this digital decoder you can convert all EVOLUTION vehicles digitally. They can therefore be used for the DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and converted EVOLUTION race tracks. Only the F1 and KTM cars need a different decoder. In the spare parts list for your slot car you will find the right digital decoder for your model.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 26732 Digital decoder for EVO/D132

item.NAME: 26740 Digital Decoder Formel 1
item.DESCRIPTION: Digital decoder for all Evolution Formel 1 (from 2008) cars.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Digital decoder for cars (Formel 1) Carrera Evolution and Digital 132

item.NAME: 26743 Digital Decoder with flashing light function Digital Decoder with flashing light function
item.DESCRIPTION: 26743 Digital Decoder with flashing light function Digital Decoder with flashing light function for Evolution and Digital 132
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 26743 Digital Decoder with flashing light function Digital Decoder with flashing light function

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61612 High banked curve 4x 1/45°
item.DESCRIPTION:
Steep corner with 45° incline for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Exclusive track material Package contents: 4 pieces incl. supports (4x 1/45°)
Tearing up the corners with your slot cars The steep corner on a scale of 1:43 is the ideal addition to your Carrera race track. With the 45° inclined corner, you will be sure to bring plenty of driving fun and variety to your race track in no time at all, while also proving your driving skills with amazement. Drift spectacularly around the corners and show everyone what you and your favourite slot car can do. The package contains four tracks – including supports. In addition, the tracks have a length and width of 155 mm. The 1/45° steep corner is another great detail for your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!!! Plus or DIGITAL 143 race track and will make your races even more exciting and fun.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: High banked curve 4x 1/45°

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61604 Bridge set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension part – bridge for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For decorating the race track Package contents: 4 bridge parts with cross struts
Hitting new heights with the bridge set The beauty of the Carrera world is not only its exciting races, but also the lovingly designed diorama that characterise it. The model landscape around the race track is given a new lease of life with spectator stands, trees and meadows, lighting and various track accessories. If your race track is not just on one level, sooner or later you will surely need a bridge to connect your tracks. This bridge set consists of four bridge sections which together form a red suspension bridge. The shape and colour are reminiscent of one of the longest suspension bridges in the world: the Golden Gate Bridge in California. The bridge on a scale of 1:43 can be attached to race tracks of the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! PLUS.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Bridge set

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61641 Jump Ramp
item.DESCRIPTION:
2-part ski jump for tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! Plus, Carrera GO!!! Accessories for even more action on your race track Package contents: 2 pieces
Step on the gas and let your slot car fly! If wild chases on straights and in the corners are not enough for you, this ski jump will be a real pleasure for you. The jump consists of two parts, which are simply placed on the race track. Now, for you and your car it’s: Accelerate properly, aim for the target and drive at full speed to the first part of the jump. When you reach the top, your car will start to jump and should then land in the lane of the second jump section. Does your opponent also dare to do this manoeuvre or do they give it too little throttle out of fear and miss the connecting piece? Prove your courage and talent by increasing the gap between the jump in the next races. The ski jump is suitable for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Jump Ramp

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61642 3D Supports
item.DESCRIPTION:
Support system for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For a multi-layer expansion Package contents: 4 pairs of supports (when constructing over 2 levels)
The perfect support for your Carrera race track Do you want to extend your race track and lay the tracks on top of each other? With the practical support system, this is no problem at all! The four pairs of supports hold up the tracks and provide a spectacular construction across two levels. For the construction of two levels you need a total of 10 pieces of the 90° corners. These corners can be found in the track set with the article number 20061603. For the two-storey construction you will need five packs of the track set. The supports are available on a scale of 1:43 and transform your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!!! Plus or DIGITAL 143 race track into an unmistakable eye-catcher and something very special. With the support system and the matching tracks, you and your Carrera cars will go to new heights!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 3D Supports for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61510 Double sliding contact (10pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION: 61510 Double sliding contact (10pcs) for GO/GO+/D143
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Double sliding contact (10pcs)

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61616 Junction
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension part – intersection on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For more action on the race track Package contents: 1 piece
Cross the path of your opponents In the Carrera world there are numerous possibilities to build a race track. This lane switch also offers you a variety of other combinations. That is because the tracks can now cross paths. Once connected by this track section on a scale of 1:43, opponents now have the chance to go head-to-head and hurl each other off the track. Timing is everything here! Try to pass the lane switch undamaged or try to ram the opponents intentionally! Everything goes here. The track has a length of 342 mm and is 114 mm wide. It can be combined with Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Junction for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61611 Curve 1/45 (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – corner for Carrera race tracks on a scale 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To extend your race track Package contents: 4 pieces (track length: 161 mm)
Bring the action to your place! Every race track can be extended with action-packed accessories. This set contains four corners with 45° and 161 mm track length each. Due to the short length of the pieces, the radius of the corner becomes narrower and therefore more difficult to master. You must drive a little slower into the corner, in order to be able to master it safely. Or you can pull off amazing drifts. Then this thing is simply predestined for it. You can build either a large 180° corner, two 90° corners or an S-bend from the four add-on parts – just as you like it – and once you’ve mastered it, you will actually be superior to your opponent! Practice makes perfect – let's go! Practice on the different chicanes to be superior to your opponents. The extension set comes on a scale of 1:43 and is for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! PLUS.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Curve 4x 1/45° for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61644 Ice curve 1/90 (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Ice corner for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To extend and decorate your race track Package contents: 2 x ice corner 1/90°
A cool track element for real professionals The ice corner with an incline of 90° presents you and your slot car with a new challenge! On the ice track the Carrera cars have less grip and can fly off the track faster. With plenty of instinct and skill you can manoeuvre your slot car through the smooth ice corner. A little practice and you can even drift with ease. The pack contains two ice curves and supplements your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!!! Plus and DIGITAL 143 race track on a scale of 1:43. There are almost no limits to the expansion of your Carrera race track. How about after the ice curve, for example, maybe a seesaw or a narrow section? Get creative and make your very own Carrera race track. Do you want to stay cool and get your car safely across the difficult terrain?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Ice curve 2x 1/90° for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61603 Curve 1/90 (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
90° corners to extend the race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For more action on the race track Package contents: 2 pieces
The 90° corner – a special challenge If you want to drive through the 90° section undamaged, you should definitely reduce your speed beforehand. Otherwise, the race car will land safely outside the race track or in a net or on a tyre pile attached to the lane. The same applies to your slot car on your Carrera race track. Brake your car before the corner, hit the apex and then accelerate your car out of the corner. This set contains two 1/90° corners. Both the length and the width of the track is 228 mm and come on a scale of 1:43. You can use the pieces for the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and the Carrera GO!!! Plus. With these corners, you’ll be sure to bring action to every race.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Curve 2x 1/90° for GO!!!, G+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61617 Curve 2/45 (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension curve for the Carrera railways in scale 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To extend your race track Package contents: 4 pieces (track length: 242 mm)
Upgrade your race track With this extension set you can extend your race track to include a large 180° corner, an S-bend or two smaller 90° corners – just the way you like it. The set contains four tracks, each 242 mm long and 179 mm wide. All in all, you extend your race track by almost one metre. The individual pieces have an incline of 45° – no big challenge for your slot car. But when assembled into a 180° corner you should be careful not to fly out of the corner with your car! Don't underestimate the S-bend either! Practice driving the chicanes to stay one step ahead of your opponent in the next race. Where is the right braking point and when can you accelerate? The extension part comes on a scale of 1:43 and is therefore suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! Plus race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Curve 4x 2/45° for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/EVO - 71590 Elektronical Lap Counter
item.DESCRIPTION: GO/EVO - 71590 Elektronical Lap Counter for GO!!! and EVOLUTION Records exactly (1/100 sec.) the times Can be used with all current Carrera racing track product lines Adjustable width continuously to suit various track width For two lane operation Cars are recognized via infrared light barrier Time trials from 1 seconds to 99 min. Lap races from 1 to 999 laps Start phase with acoustic starting lights False start function Battery-operated, 4 batteries AA/LR6 (batteries not included)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical Lap Counter

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61614 Extension set 3
item.DESCRIPTION:
16 track sections for your DIGITAL 143 race track DIGITAL 143 To extend the race track Package contents: 8 straight sections 342 mm, 4 corners 1/45 degrees, 4 steep corners 1/45 degrees incl. supports
Fancy some new track highlights? Every committed Carrera fan cherishes and cares for their race track, which has been built with love and is constantly growing. To make it even better, bigger and more exciting, you can expand your Carrera DIGITAL 143 race track with new features and more track sections. With this extension set on a scale of 1:43 you get eight straight sections with a length of 342 mm, four 1/45° corners and four 1/45° steep corners. At the 45 degree incline corners, there are supports to give the steep corner the necessary stability. Use this set to re-design your race track and add new parts. Above all, the steep corner above the ground will give you and your vehicle a new driving feeling that keeps the fun factor alive and kicking.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension set 3 for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61601 Extension set 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
Exciting extension set for digital Carrera tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143 To upgrade and expand your race track Package contents: 4 straight sections at 342 mm, 2 straight sections at 114 mm, 2 lane changes, 1 narrow section, 2 fly-overs incl. supports
The perfect extension set for fast-paced races You want to upgrade your Carrera DIGITAL 143 race track and are still looking for the right elements to provide more action on the race track? This extension set is exactly the right thing for your project. In addition to four straight sections with a length of 342 mm and two straight sections with a length of 114 mm, this Carrera set also includes two lane changes and a narrow section. The special highlight are the two fly-over sections, which together with supports are keen to enhance your Carrera track with a whole new and exciting driving experience. With the fly-over sections it is now easy for you to manoeuvre your slot car through the next turn after a looping section. Speed is reduced a little and the vehicle remains in the lane. Be creative and use the extension set to create new tracks that challenge you and your opponents.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension set 2 for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61600 Extension set 1
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set with track sections on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! Plus, Carrera GO!!! To expand your race track Package contents: 2 corners 1 / 90 degrees, 2 lane changes, 2 straight sections, each 342 mm
Your rally circuit is already waiting for new track With this extension set you can extend your Carrera track to include two corners of 1/90 degrees, two lane change tracks and two straight sections with a length of 342 mm. Integrate a tension-increasing route section with the lane change, on which you and your opponent must prove your intuitive feeling for the correct time to cross over. You can also use the corners to showcase your talent for the right speed to power ratio. Only if you press the speed button again at the right moment will your slot car dash purposefully out of the corner and onto the next straight. The set is a great addition to the Carrera GO!!!, Carrera GO!!!! PLUS and the Carrera DIGITAL 143 – for all race tracks on a scale of 1:43.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension set 1 for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61643 Rally extension set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension parts – Rally for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For decorating and expanding the track Package contents: 2 pieces – rally corners 1 / 90°, 2 pieces – rally narrow sections and 2 transitional straight sections, each 342 mm
Bring your slot cars to the rally track One of the characteristics of a rally is that the track is not only on normal, paved roads but also on dirt roads and forest tracks. As a rule, rally participants do not drive in circles, but head from a starting point to a finishing point. In order to get a real rally feeling on your track, you can extend the race track with this rally extension set. Two 90° corners and two narrow track sections are connected to your normal race track with two transitional straight sections. The straight sections have a length of 342 mm. The rally extension set on a scale of 1:43 can be attached to the race tracks in the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! Plus.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Rally Extension set for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61609 Lane change section (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set lane change on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Set for changing tracks Package contents: 4 pieces (track length: 161 mm)
Variety for the race track Make sure your Carrera race track is exciting and varied by installing several lane changes. These extension tracks force the two opponents to change tracks. But be careful! Accidents often happen when racing paths cross. If both vehicles drive through the lane change at the same time, collision action is guaranteed. So you have to keep an eye on where your opponent is right now. Put your foot to the floor or slow things down just in time. The set contains two lane changes. You can assemble the parts directly behind each other for extra action. Both track sections have a length of 228 mm, a width of 114 mm and are on a scale of 1:43. They are suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! PLUS.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane change section for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 61613 Looping Set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension for the looping section on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Action feature for the race track Package contents: 8 x looping parts with supports
Ready for an exciting ride through the looping section? Do you want to give your race track that extra kick? Then this extension set might be just right for you. The set contains 8 track parts, which together form two looping sections: One for each lane. The corresponding supports, which should stabilise the looping section, are already included in the set. So the action-packed ride can start right away. The difficulty with looping is to pass through it at the right speed. If you are too slow, you simply fall off the track at the highest point. So step on the accelerator before hitting the looping! The extension set comes on a scale of 1:43 and is therefore suitable for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! Plus race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Looping set for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61610 Narrow section (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Narrow section as track element for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Exclusive track material for even more action Package contents: 2 pieces
Narrow sections ensure even more fun and action How could you make your Carrera race track even more exciting and action-packed than with smaller and larger chicanes? The narrow section is a perfect addition to the race track and challenges your skill and intuition. Can you win against your opponents and pass the narrow section perfectly and finish first? You get two narrow sections on a scale of 1:43, which you can integrate into your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!! Plus or DIGITAL 143 race track. The tracks have a length of 228 mm and a width of 114 mm. Are you ready to face the next challenge?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Narrow section for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61602 Straight 342mm (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Long straight section to extend your race track on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To extend your race track Package contents: 2 pieces, each 342 mm
Who's the fastest on the high-speed straight? Even seemingly boring straights can have their charm on the Carrera race track. On a long straight the slot cars can let their muscles flex in direct comparison. This is all about acceleration. Who will find the best acceleration point out of the corner and drive the fastest down the long straight? To make this fast-paced race last as long as possible, or as a connection between two chicanes, these standard straight section serve their purpose well. With its relatively long length of 342 mm per track part, you can extend a large piece of track with one component. Two of these tracks are included in the set. This leads to a total extension of your race track of 684 mm. The parts come on in scale of 1:43 and can be used for the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! Plus race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Straight 342mm for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61645 Curve 3/45 (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Curve extension set for Carrera tracks in scale 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Package contents: 4 pieces
Great expansion for your race track Without corners, a race track is only half as exciting. That's why you should equip your race track with as many corners as possible, so that your opponents fly out of the race quickly. This extension set contains four 30° corners with a length of 323 mm each. The tracks are 211 mm wide and have a scale of 1:43. If you build the track parts one after the other, you have a long 180° corner that extends your race track by a total of almost 1.3 metres. You can add these extension parts to the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! PLUS race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Curve 4x 3/45° for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61646 High banked curve 2/45 (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Steep corner 2/45° as a sophisticated track element for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For extending your race track on a scale of 1:43 Package contents: 4 pieces incl. supports
A must for every Carrera race track: The steep corner In order to make driving on your Carrera race track even more fun, a few tricky sections such as narrow sections, jumps and the like should not be missing. A steep corner is also indispensable for every race track. This not only makes a powerful visual impression, but also provides even more driving fun and variety. With the steep corner on a scale of 1:43 you can extend your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!! Plus or DIGITAL 143 race tracks perfectly. Not only does this result in a larger distance, but you can also prove your skills and finesse when driving with the slot car. You think you'll make it through the steep corner at full throttle? Find out where the right point for maximum speed is and pass your opponents with ease. The steep corner consists of four tracks, including supports. The tracks have a length of 226 mm and a width of 166 mm. Package contents: 4 pieces including supports.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: High banked curve 2/45° for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61647 Chicane
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension chicane on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To visually enhance your race track Package contents: 2 track parts, 2 tyre stacks, 2 tyre stack holders, 2 track connectors, 2 double track connectors
Sometimes you’re quite allowed to annoy your opponents... Caution is advised in this section! Due to the piles of tyres standing to the right and left of the track, the racers are forced to move into the middle of the roadway. With two slot cars driving through at the same time, this can sometimes lead to a collision. You should therefore always keep an eye on your opponents and consider the ideal time to pass through this chicane. The circuit section consists of two individual track parts, 458 mm long and 225 mm wide. In addition, the set contains two tyre stacks and the corresponding holders for them. Two track connectors and two double track connectors hold the two parts firmly together. The tracks come on a scale of 1:43 and can therefore be used with the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! Plus race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Chicane 2pcs for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61649 Hump Track/Bridge
item.DESCRIPTION:
Camel hump and crossing for race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! Plus, Carrera GO!!! For more action on your track Package contents: 2 convex track parts, 2 long concave track parts, 4 short concave track parts, 12 track connectors, 4 supports
Get great action features for your home With this accessory set you have several possibilities to add even more driving fun to your Carrera race track. You can build the track parts either as a bridge-like crossing or as a camel hump. A total of four short concave track parts, two long concave track parts and two convex track parts can be connected with twelve track clips. You can place the crossing on a straight section on your slot car race track. The four supports ensure that the body has sufficient support and that the cars underneath are not obstructed. Alternatively, you can build a fast camel hump from the individual parts and integrate it into your Carrera race track as an additional section. No matter which variant you choose, from now on you have to step on the gas, because the inclines require a little speed kick from you and your slot car. The camel hump / crossing with its tracks on a scale of 1:43 is suitable for the Carrera GO!!!!, the Carrera GO!!!! PLUS and the Carrera DIGITAL 143.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Hump Track/Bridge for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61651 Guardrail fence
item.DESCRIPTION:
Fences in grey and red for race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Fine-tuning for your race track Package contents: 10 fences (5 pieces in grey, 5 red)
If the corner becomes a little too much for you to handle... Corners are the perfect way to make things a little wilder. Too much throttle and the slot car flies out of its lane and lands next to the race track. It's annoying when you have to look for the car on the floor every time. To prevent this from happening again, you can simply attach this practical safety fence to the edge of the track. If the vehicle is thrown off track, it bounces off the fence and can be put back on the track in a fraction of a second. This set contains a total of 10 safety fences, which are suitable for race tracks on a scale of 1:43. The safety fences should not be attached to steep corner. Track parts not included.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Guardrail fence for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61655 Lane change curve 1/90 (2pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Track extension lane change corner on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Changing lanes in the corner Package contents: 2 pieces
This corner has it all Attention, in this chicane you have to pay twice as much attention: Not only does the corner run relatively tight, it also has a lane change at the apex, which the racers should be prepared for. If you drive too fast or at the same time with an opponent on the other lane when entering the corner, an accident is bound to happen. And to ensure that every racer gets back into their lane, the set also includes a second lane change corner. The tracks are 228 mm long and 228 mm wide each. At the edge of the track, sandy ground provides that real rally feeling. On a scale of 1:43 the tracks can be integrated into other race tracks on the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! Plus. All this means that exciting races are even more fun: experience that pure Carrera feeling!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane change curve for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61656 Straight 170mm (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension track – straight sections on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To extending your race track Package contents: 4 pieces
Long straights for high speed If you want to expand your race track bit by bit with many new corners, lane changes and other sections, you also need many straight sections to connect everything together. This set is a big help for you. It contains four tracks, each 171 mm long and 114 mm wide. In total, you can extend your race track by more than half a metre. The tracks come on a scale of 1:43 and can therefore be used for race tracks on the same scale. Whether it is the Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! or Carrera GO!!!! Plus: With this supplementary set you will bring even more racing fun to your home. Build a high-speed straight section for breathtaking acceleration or use the parts to create connections between the corners.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Straight 171mm for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61657 Single lane Curves/Straights Extension set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set with corners and straight sections DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Package contents: 8 single lane corners, 4 single lane straight sections
Go on, keep going Do you want to add more variety to your race track and expand your Carrera race track? Then you should have a closer look at this extension set! The set includes eight single lane corners and four single lane straight sections. The tracks have a length of 136 mm and a width of 10 mm. The track elements are suitable for the Carrera GO!!!, GO!!!! Plus and DIGITAL 143 race track. You can give free rein to your creativity and imagination as you develop the race track. The tracks can be easily plugged into each other, so you can rebuild your Carrera track as you like and create a completely new race track. Let yourself be inspired by the fascinating Carrera world and experience a realistic racing feeling in your own living room!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Single lane Curves/Straights Extension set for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61658 Straight 100mm/114mm (6pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Straight sections to extend your race track on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! To expand your race track Package contents: 3 x straight sections, 100 mm length, 3 x straight sections, 114 mm length
Expand your race track With this set you can expand your race track in great new ways. Of course, a good race track has many corners, lane changes and switches integrated into it. But the most important thing is the connection to it. And that's where the straight sections come in. With this set you get six tracks on a scale of 1:43, which can all be easily integrated. The tracks have different lengths so that you can vary the layout during assembly. Three pieces are 100 mm long and there are three more with a length of 114 mm. With this set, you can extend your Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! or Carrera GO!!! Plus race track by a total of 642 mm. So you experience pure racing fun with your friends!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Straights 100mm and 114mm for GO!!!, GO+, D143

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61659 See saw
item.DESCRIPTION:
Rocker as a cool action feature DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For more excitement on your race track Package contents: 1 x rocker per track
Action for your Carrera race track You want more fun at your home races? Expand your race track with the seesaw and you are guaranteed action-packed driving fun! Do you have what it takes to overcome the obstacle without an accident? Test how much speed you can use over the seesaw and show your opponents what you and your slot car can do. The track consists of one seesaw per track, so that you can go together with your opponent into the chicane and prove yourself every time. The action feature is perfect for upgrading your Carrera GO!!! race track. Of course, you can also use the track element for the Carrera GO!!! Plus and DIGITAL 143 race tracks. The seesaw is simply a really cool action element and challenges you and your friends again and again.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: See saw

item.NAME: 70460 Suitcase for car items scale 1:32, aluminium
item.DESCRIPTION:
Case for slot cars on a scale of 1:32 DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Ideal for storing or transporting slot cars Dimensions: 36.5 x 33.0 x 8.5 cm From 14 Years
The perfect storage option for your slot cars For many motor sport enthusiasts, Carrera slot cars are true collector's items. These must be guarded like a treasure. Transport or order - with these cases your car treasures will remain intact and protected. To keep the collection tidy and protect the vehicles from dust and loss, they can easily be stored in this Carrera vehicle case. A total of eight cars on a scale of 1:32 can be stored here in separate compartments. The case, measuring 36.5 x 33.0 x 8.5 cm, is made of aluminium, and is robust and stylishly decorated with the Carrera logo on the front. The transport case can be closed quickly and easily by means of snap locks, while a practical carrying handle rounds off the appearance. The individual compartments and the lid of the case are lined inside with shock-absorbing material to secure the slot cars in place.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Suitcase for 8 car items for Carrera Evolution and Digital 132

item.NAME: 70461 Suitcase for car items scale 1:24, aluminium
item.DESCRIPTION:
Storage case for vehicles on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124 Ideal for storing or transporting your slot cars Dimensions: 43.0 x 43.5 x 9.5 cm From 14 Years
Always kept in a safe place with the Carrera car case If you have built up a small collection of slot cars over the years, you will also find it very important to guard them like treasure. This vehicle suitcase accommodates a total of eight cars on a scale of 1:24 and can be arranged in the individual compartments. The ideal accessory for all racing enthusiasts. Measuring 43.0 x 43.5 x 9.5 cm, the transport case is very handy and can be carried easily with the handle. The appearance is also a real winner. The simple design is highlighted by the discreet aluminium housing with snap locks and the striking Carrera logo. Inside, the lids and compartments are lined with shock-absorbing material to provide the vehicles with the necessary protection.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Suitcase for 8 car items for Carrera Digital 124

item.DESCRIPTION: Guardrail mounts for EVOLUTION, Digital 132, Digital 124

item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 89881 EVO/D132 tyres Lamborghini Huracán LP
