item.NAME: 89552 EVO/D132 tyres Porsche GT3 RSR
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 89552 EVO/D132 tyres Porsche GT3 RSR

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20572 Curve 2/30° (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For a 4-lane extension Package contents: 6 pieces = 180 degrees (1 unit = 30 degrees)
A twisting challenge for your race track With this extension set you can add another corner into your race track. With Carrera you always have the possibility to extend the race tracks according to your ideas. For this you need different straight sections, lane changes and even corners. This is how you deliver real racing excitement again and again. This set contains six corner pieces. They each have an incline of 30°. Built together, these six parts form a large 180° corner. Of course, you can also install the track parts individually. Due to the 30° angle, the extension parts are also ideal for the 4-lane expansion of your race track. The scale of the corner is 1:24 and is therefore suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20573 Curve 3/30° (6pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION To extend your race track Package contents: 6 pieces = 180 degrees (1 unit = 30 degrees)
With this corner, the next race will be a real challenge A good Carrera race track includes straight sections, lane changes and, of course, corners. With this set you can expand your race track and extend it according to your wishes. It contains 6 corners, each one at 30°. Once assembled, you can integrate a long 180° corner into your race track. The track sections are also suitable for the 6-lane extension of the race track. The corner parts are built on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore be integrated into all tracks with the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera Evolution. Build your race track according to your ideas and surprise your opponents.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20573 Curve 3/30° (6pcs) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20578 Curve 4/15° (12pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – corner (4/15°) on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For an 8-lane extension Package contents: 12 pieces = 180 degrees (1 piece = 15 degrees)
Curvaceous racing fun for your race track With this extension set you bring further driving fun on to your race track. The set contains a total of twelve 15° corners, which – if you build them all one after the other – result in a long 180° corner. Since there are many small sections, you can be very flexible in terms of structure. Besides a big corner, you can also build chicanes or S-bends with the track parts. With supports you can also take your race track to another level. Just build the 180° corner above the rest of the track and enjoy a race on several levels. Since the angle of these corners is relatively small, these extension parts are also suitable for an 8-lane expansion. The scale of the set is 1:24.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20578 Curve 4/15° (12pcs) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20574 High Banked Curve 1/30° (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Steep corner for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION For even more action and excitement on the race track Package contents: 6 pieces (each 30 degrees) = 180 degrees, supports
Get ready for an incline! With this steep corner your Carrera race track is given an additional highlight. A total of six track parts, each with 30° and matching supports, together result in an incline corner of 180°. Your slot cars will feel the full power of the centrifugal force and should take this track passage at the right speed. Wild neck-and-neck races are particularly tense in this corner. The integration into your race track and the construction of the corner is very simple thanks to its simple handling. The track parts on a scale of 1:24 are compatible with the DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION race tracks. Whether your vehicle is also suitable for use on the steep corner is something you can find out from the spare parts list.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20574 High Banked Curve 1/30° (6) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20575 High Banked Curve 2/30° (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – steep corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For a 4-lane extension Package contents: 6 track parts, each 30°, 6 pieces = 180°, supports
In this section the slot cars lean heavily into the corner Out of the high speed straight and into this steep corner! The advantage of these corners is that you can drive through them at high speed without slipping off the track. The gradient makes the decisive difference here. The track section is held up by the supports included in the set. The steep corner consists of six track parts, each 30°. When assembled, they form a 180° corner, which must be passed through. The scale of the track is 1:24, making it suitable for all race tracks on the same scale. Whether it is on the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 or the Carrera EVOLUTION race track, with this steep turn you bring action into every race.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20575 High Banked Curve 2/30° (6) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20576 High Banked Curve 3/30° (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – steep corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Evolution For a 6-lane extension Package contents: 6 pieces = 180° (30° each)
Steep into the corner With this steep corner you will give your race track new momentum – in the truest sense of the word. Thanks to the raised construction, the slot cars can drive through the corner at a higher speed than in a flat corner. So you don't have to brake so hard in exciting races and can take the momentum through the corner to the next section. The set consists of six track parts, each with an angle of 30°. When assembled, this results in a long 180° corner, which racers then have to drive through. The supports needed to hold up the track are also included in the set. The track section is also suitable for the 6-lane extension of your race track. The steep corner comes on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore be mounted on race tracks with the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20576 High Banked Curve 3/30° (6) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20579 High Banked Curve 4/15° (12pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – steep corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Evolution For an 8-lane extension Package contents: 12 pieces = 180° (15° each)
Hit the corner at high speed Integrate a steep corner into your race track and bring action to your next race. Compared to "normal" corners, an elevated steep corner has the advantage that you can drive through it at higher speed without flying off the track. So you have to slow down less and can take the momentum for the next section with you. The set contains 12 track parts, each with an angle of 15°. Taken together, this results in a 180° corner, which is also suitable for the 8-lane extension of your Carrera race track. The track scale is 1:24, which means that the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks can be expanded with this set.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20579 High Banked Curve 4/15° (12pcs) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20551 Inside Shoulder Curve 1/60° (3), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Inner elements with curbs for 60° corners on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION Fine-tuning for your race track Package contents: 3 pieces
A must for every corner: Inside curb These inside curbs provide a realistic racing feeling on your Carrera race track and visually complement every corner with a cool feature. The three boundary elements and the two end sections in the package fit the 60° corners with a track scale of 1:24. Simply fit the inner parts of the corners to your designated corner and plug them into each other – and the track section is given a whole new look, reminiscent of a real race track with its authentic design. Even from a distance, the typical red and white markings draw the driver's attention to the start of the corner and reminds the driver to adjust the speed. For the Carrera race track, the inside curb and the end sections are great accessories.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20551 Inside Shoulder Curve 1/60° (3), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - Inside Shoulder for high banked curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Boundary elements for steep curve 1/30° DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Fine-tuning for your race track Package contents: 6 pieces
The ideal frame for steep corners A steep corner is a particularly tricky undertaking for the slot car. Here a driver has to prove their knack for the right speed and the right timing, so that you don't fly off the track due to excessive force. The red and white markings of the inside curbs indicate that this section of the route can be seen from a distance. So you know what to prepare for: As soon as the inside curbs with their eye-catching colours can be seen, you have to step on the accelerator to master the steep corner. The set contains six inside curbs for the 1/30° elements of a steep corner and two matching end sections. The track parts are compatible for race tracks on a scale of 1:24 and therefore perfect for the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Inside Shoulder for high banked curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20517 Lane Change Section (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Track element for changing lanes DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION To expand your race track Package contents: 1 piece (2 track parts, each 34.5 cm)
A special kind of lane change If you equip your Carrera race track with this lane change section, you will be able to switch driving lanes in a cool and casual way. The lane on the track element is S-shaped, so that it becomes a real eye-catcher when the Carrera slot cars change track. You can give free rein to your creativity when using the track element. Especially if you install several lane change tracks one behind the other, a cool track section is created in the blink of an eye, which is simply fun to drive through again and again. The lane change track on a scale of 1:24 consists of two parts, each with a length of 345 mm. You can use the lane change for your Carrera DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20517 Lane Change Section (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20567 Outside Shoulder for curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension parts – outside curbs for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For decorating and expanding the track Package contents: 6 pieces – outside curbs for 1/30° corner, 2 pieces – end sections
Breathtaking drifts are now possible You can extend your Carrera race track on a scale of 1:24 to include outside curbs. When it comes to looks, these curbs always look good. But they are especially useful if you want to drive on your Carrera DIGITAL 124 race track with the slot cars on a scale of 1:24. This is not a problem on the straights, but drifting in the corners has been very difficult so far as the cars have often slipped off the track. Thanks to the outside curbs, this no longer happens that easily. The set includes six attachments for 30° corners, each with two end sections. You have assembled the outside curb for a 180° corner. The curbs are suitable for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION on a scale of 1:24.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20567 Outside Shoulder for curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20561 Outside Shoulder for curve 1/60° (3), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Outside curb for corner 1/60 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Edge pieces for the race track Package contents: 3 pieces
For breathtaking drifts Drifting has to be learned. But all the skill in the world won't help, if you slip out of the corner because of a track that is too narrow while drifting. So that this doesn't happen again in the future, you can expand your race track now. This set contains three outside curbs for the 1/60° corners. In addition, there are two end sections that can be attached to the start and end straight sections of the corner and provide a visually appealing finish to the curbs. On a scale of 1:24, the edge pieces can be installed on race tracks of the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION. From now on, you don't have to hold yourself back when drifting in the corner. Give it your best shot and one thing above all: Full throttle!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20561 Outside Shoulder for curve 1/60° (3), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20562 Outside Shoulder for curve 2/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension parts – outside curb for corner 2/30° on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION In a red-white striped paint finish Package contents: 6 pieces
Drift safely through the corner: thanks to outside curbs It doesn't matter whether you just want to bring a little more visual racing feeling to your track or whether you want to ensure more safety when drifting with your slot cars on a scale of 1:24: With these outside curbs you can have a great extension for your race track. The extension set contains six curbs, each with 2 end sections. They are suitable for 2/30° corners and on a scale of 1:24. The typical red-white paint is found on the world’s race tracks just before, on and after a corner. Thanks to the colours, the curbs can already be seen from a distance by the drivers. The extensions can be used for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20562 Outside Shoulder for curve 2/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20563 Outside Shoulder for curve 3/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension set – outside curbs on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Accessories for your race track Package contents: 6 pieces
Worry-free, full power drifting! Sometimes with the large slot cars on a scale of 1:24 you may find that they slip off the road in the corners when drifting. That can weigh heavy on the nerves in exciting head-to-head races. To counteract this, you can extend your race tracks with this extension set. This set contains the outside curbs for the 3/30° corner. Altogether, there are six curbs which can be assembled to form a 180° corner. Two end sections complete the outside curb. The scale of 1:24 also indicates the scale of the race track on which they can be built. These outside curbs are therefore suitable for Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20563 Outside Shoulder for curve 3/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20568 Outside Shoulder for curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension parts – outside curbs on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Evolution Outside curb for corner 4/15° Package contents: 12 pieces
For better drifting If you've ever drifted with a slot car on a scale of 1:24 around a Carrera race track on a scale of 1:24, you'll have noticed quickly: With the relatively large cars, caution is advised when drifting in the corners. They slip off the track very quickly and end up in a ditch. To prevent this, you can extend your race track with outside curbs. The red and white highlighted additions not only look good, they are really very useful. This set contains 12 outside curbs on a scale of 1:24 for the 4/15° corner. There are also two end sections in the set. They round off the curbs with a look of sophistication. The outside curbs are suitable for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20568 Outside Shoulder for curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20564 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Decorative track element for safe drifting DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For decorating the track Package content: 6 pieces
For a more authentic racing feeling and better drifting Have you added a few banked turns to your Carrera track? Then the right outer edge should not be missing! The outer edge strips not only visually enhance your racetrack, but also ensure that your Carrera slot cars stay on track and can drift better into the banked curve. The set includes six edge strips on a scale of 1:24 and two end pieces. The parts can easily be attached to the banked curve. With the great accessories from Carrera you can create a very special Carrera track that will inspire you and your friends again and again and challenge you to exciting duels.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20564 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 1/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20565 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 2/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Curb for steep corners DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For decorating the race track Package contents: 6 pieces
Decorative components and protection for your slot cars If you extend your Carrera track to include the outside curbs, you not only give the track a more authentic look, but also make sure your slot cars don't fly off the track so quickly if you've overdone the accelerator a bit. The set consists of eight parts and can be easily attached to steep corners of 2/30°. On a scale of 1:24, the outside curbs are suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 or EVOLUTION race track. If you expand your race track with the outside curbs, this not only enhances your track visually, but also provides some extra grip for your slot cars in the corner. So you can drift better around the corners and pass them all at full speed.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20565 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 2/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20566 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 3/30° (6), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION: 20566 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 3/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20566 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 3/30° (6), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20580 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION: 20580 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20580 Outside Shoulder for high banked curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20560 Outside Shoulder for straight (6)
item.DESCRIPTION:
6-piece curb set for straight sections on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION To enhance your race track Package contents: 6 pieces
Track accessories for an authentic look What would your Carrera track be without the typical red-white boundary at the edge of the road? Exactly - only half as cool! Even though the curbs are often used for optical purposes, most track owners still attach great importance to these accessories. This 6-piece set is designed for the standard straight sections of all Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:24 and can easily be clipped into the slot car track. Nothing stands in the way of the perfect racing look! The curbs are a great help, especially on the straight sections after which a corner follows. This allows the driver to see from a distance that he will soon be able to either adapt his driving style or drift around the corner. The curb is a wonderful addition to your Carrera race track and keeps the vehicle on the track during action-packed manoeuvres.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20560 Outside Shoulder for straight (6) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20509 Standard Straights (4)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Set of 4 standard straight sections on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION To expand your race track Package contents: 4 pieces, each 34.5 cm
The classic expansion for your Carrera race track You should always have enough standard straight sections in reserve. They are the perfect elements to expand your Carrera race track and can be used in many ways. They pave the way for your vehicle to the next looping section – so you can really give it your all just before. The next corner, at a crossing or just before a hill – these are all ideal places for you and your car to give everything you have. Here you can really flex your full power and show your opponent just how fast you are. This set contains four straight sections, each with a length of 34.5 cm. Coming on a scale of 1:24, the standard straight sections are suitable for the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20509 Standard Straights (4) for EVO/D132/D124

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20587 Crossing (4)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Cool track element for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION For more variety on your race track Package contents: 1 piece (4 pieces – track parts, 8 pieces – supports)
Give your race track that certain something With this track section you bring variety and action to your race track! Put the pedal to the metal and let your slot cars race over the crossing at lightening speed. The bridge helps to create an even more exciting and authentic race track. There are almost no limits when constructing your race track. How about a lane change corner after the intersection or a chicane and narrow section? The track element consists of four track sections and eight track supports. Available on a scale of 1:24, the tracks are ideally suited to the Carrera DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and EVOLUTION race tracks. Just let your creativity run wild and create your very own individual Carrera race track that will captivate you and your friends every time!

item.NAME: EVO/D132/D124 - 20593 Inside Shoulder for curve 4/15° (12), end piece (2)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension parts – inside curb on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Evolution To visually enhance your race track Package contents: 12 pieces
Inside curbs round off your race track The clear advantage of outside curbs with race tracks on a scale of 1:24 can be quickly appreciated. They are designed to ensure that the large slot cars on a scale of 1:24 do not slip off the track when drifting into corners. However, if a visually appealing picture is also important to you at your race track, you should not do without the inside curbs. They complete the race track optically, but also functionally, because the slot cars otherwise bounce around when driving very slowly over the track edge. A very unpleasant driving sensation. The set contains a total of 12 inside curbs for the 4/15° corner. Two end sections are also included, which are attached to the following straight section. They come on a scale of 1:24 and can therefore be used for race tracks on the same scale.

item.NAME: 20763 D124 Digital decoder for EXC car
item.DESCRIPTION:
Digital decoder for converting analog EXCLUSIV cars to digital DIGITAL 124 cars
Update your Carrera EXCLUSIV cars to the latest technology. Do you have Carrera EXCLUSIV analog cars at home and would like to use them on a current Carrera Digital 124 racing track? With this decoder, no problem! Take advantage of digital technology and race with up to four vehicles simultaneously on the track. In addition, your DIGITAL 124 track also allows for exciting overtaking, pit stops, and possible connection to your smartphone or tablet – making every race a bit more realistic. Instructions on how to use the decoder can be found in the user manual. This decoder is suitable for all analog cars in the Carrera EXCLUSIV series, except for HotRod.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 20763 D124 Digital decoder for EXC car

item.NAME: PC Overclocked: A History of Violence
item.DESCRIPTION:
Klasická point & click adventura, jejímž hlavním hrdinou je vojenský psycholog David Mc Namara, který po odchodu z aktivní služby prožívá hodnì tìžké období. Trpí silnými cholerickými záchvaty a jeho manželství je v troskách. V této situaci je David povolán do New Yorku, aby si zde prohlédl pìt mladých žen a mužù, kteøí byli nalezeni køièící, totálnì zmatení a vystrašení na ulicích NY. David všechny své nové pacienty opatrnì vyslýchá, jednoho po druhém a postupnì se dopracuje k alarmujícímu zjištìní.
Hra je rozdìlena na dvì èásti. V té první budete v roli Davida vyšetøovat v souèasnosti a v té druhé naopak ovládat jednotlivé pacienty, s nimiž si prožijete jejich flashbacky a postupnì se tak dostanete na kloub všem záhadám co se po cestì objeví.
Hlavní rysy : - Klasická point & click adventura s neobvyklými prvky. - Napínavý pøíbìh odehrávající se ve zpìtné chronologii. - Vyzkoušejte si role jedineèných šesti postav. - Prozkoumejte 45 vysoce detailních a preciznì animovaných lokací. - Vysoce kvalitní dabing. - Od tvùrcù „Moment of Silence“.
Minimální konfigurace : Windows 2000, XP, Vista[32bit], procesor 1300MHz, pamì 256MB RAM, 1.50GB volno na disku, DVDROM

item.NAME: 3DS Bag

item.NAME: PC EXPERIENCE 112
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience112 je originální adventure titul, v němž musí hráč pomoci dívce jménem Lea Nichols z podivného vězení. Problém je v tom, že hráč nemá nad dívkou přímou kontrolu a musí se tedy starat o to, aby jí z cesty postupně a v pravý okamžik mizely překážky všeho druhu, které by ji mohly připravit o život. Lea navíc nejedná jako tupý stroj. Různé situace ji mohou přivodit pocit strachu, šoku, nebo leknutí, což má samozřejmě velký vliv na její reakce.
Hráč bude počínání dívky sledovat prostřednictvím systému kamer, přičemž k dispozici bude i možnost odposlechu, či termálního a nočního vidění. Hráč bude na dálku ovládat celou řadu přístrojů a zařízení, bude se nabourávat do bezpečnostních systémů, aby dívce otvíral dveře a dojde i na dálkové ovládání vozidel.
Pokud se bude hráči dařit a zajistí dívce bezpečný a co nejméně nervydrásající průběh útěku z vězení, tak mu dívka začne čím dál více důvěřovat. V opačném případě její důvěra v hráče klesne, což bude mít opět negativní vliv na její reakce a tím pádem se zmenší šance na její útěk z velmi podivného vězení.

item.NAME: PC O pejskovi a kočičce
item.DESCRIPTION: Moji nejmilejší kamarádi - pro každého z nás to byl pejsek nebo kočička, pokud jsme ještě byli menší než klika u dveří a nikdy nás nezklamali. Právě v této roztomilé hře si tyto chvilky můžete zopakovat, třeba se svými dětmi. Budete se starat o toho svého mazlíčka, uklízet pelíšky, krmit aby nebyli hladoví, chodit na procházky a samozřejmě cvičit. Naučit pejska aportovat a nebo kočičku skákat z překážky na překážku bude jistě pro vás i vaše děti velkou zábavou. Tak hurá dotoho.

item.NAME: PC The Show
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popis
Akční RTS zasazená do 21. století, kdy se Kalifornie odtrhne od zbytku USA a vytvoří totalitní stát, kde vládne diktátor Lou Baxter. Jeho vláda je hodně brutální a každý kdo se mu pokusí oponovat končí ve vězení, nebo rovnou na popravišti. Existuje pouze jedna cesta, jak z toho ven - zúčastnít se SHOW.
V této show musí vězni pobavit domácí publikum a soutěžit jako „Týmoví psanci“ proti týmu ze Show. Bojištěm je kolosální umělý ostrov s holografickým terénem 20 mil od pobřeží Kalifornie. Skupina demokratického východu infiltruje mezi ty nejlepší svého agenta Franka Harrise. V přestrojení za psance vstoupí do boje proti Baxterovi a jeho show týmu, aby tak ukončil vládu teroru.
Klíčové prvky
Taktické boje se stovkami jednotek 15 rozmanitých mechanizovaných jednotek 21 nezvyklých pěších jednotek Nespočet možných vylepšení a schopností jednotek 10 multiplayerových map pro hru až čtyř hráčů Realistické vlastnosti postav

item.NAME: PC Real crimes/unicorn killer
item.DESCRIPTION:
Pomozte začínající agentce FBI Jennifer a zkušenému detektivovi Alanovi dopadnout nechvalně proslulého vraha, který si sám říkal Jednorožec. Vystopujte a dopadněte nebezpečného pachatele, aby mohl být konečně předán spravedlnosti. Při své cestě navštívíte nejrůznější místa naší planety a prozkoumáte mnohá místa činu. Ponořte se do temného příběhu a ukažte, co dokážete!
Prožijte vzrušující příběh založený na skutečné události Hra typu hledání skrytých předmětů s logickými prvky Řada zábavných miniher, zpříjemňujících hraní 22 úrovní

item.NAME: PC Captain Morgane and the Golden Turtle
item.DESCRIPTION:
STAŇTE SE OPRAVDOVÝM PIRÁTEM Z KARIBIKU
Budete hrát jako Morgane Castillo, dcera proslulého piráta, která sleduje stopu legendárního pokladu Golden Turtle. Budete objevovat 5 různých ostrovů s více než 50ti krásně ilustrovanými lokacemi. Půjdete po stopách, které zanechal Buckleberry Tanner, slavný dobrodruh a musíte najít skryté nápovědy a najít poklad na Turtle Island ještě dřív, než ho objeví padouch Hilary Simpkins.
Během své cesty, budete muset najmout novou posádku, řešit nesčetné množství hádanek a mini her a rozvíjet své schopnosti jak přelstít nepřátele a stát se nejslavnějším pirátem v Karibiku!
Herní vlastnosti
Barvitá a přístupná Point-and-click adventura Hra využívá specifik ovládání Nintendo DS Fantastický děj nabízející až 12 + hodin hraní Otevřený svět na 5 různých a rozmanitých ostrovech s více než 50 lokacemi 40 unikátních postav 6 mini her a desítky hádanek Příběh oceněného spisovatele Steva Ince plné 1080p HD
Minimální systémové požadavky
Windows XP/Vista/Seven, Pentium 1.6 GHz, 512 MB RAM, 64 MB Graphic Card DirectX 9-compatible, zvuková karta DirectX 9-compatible, DirectX 9.oc nebo vyšší DVD-ROM-drive, cca 3 GB volného místa na hard disku
Doporučené systémové požadavky
Windows XP/Vista/Seven, Pentium 2 GHz, 512 MB RAM Windows XP, 1024 MB RAM Windows Vista/Seven, 128 MB Graphic Card DirectX 9-compatible, zvuková karta DirectX 9-compatible, DirectX 9.oc or higher,

item.NAME: 30362 Lane Change Curve left, in to out
item.DESCRIPTION:
Digital lane change corner for the Carrera race track DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For digital track changes and overtaking Package contents: 1x lane change corner – left, inside to outside (2 track parts)
Change lanes and overtake at the push of a button Your Carrera DIGITAL 124 and DIGITAL 132 race track will be extended to include an exciting track element with the lane change corner. If you have digitally upgraded a Carrera EVOLUTION race track, you can also change lanes on this Carrera lane at the touch of a button. The track on a scale of 1:24 consists of two parts and leads from the inner to the outer track. The lane change corner guarantees you and your friends exciting and nerve-racking duels and overtaking manoeuvres. Are you faster than your opponents and can change lanes in time to take first place? Show off your skills and leave everyone for dust!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane Change Curve left, in to out - for Carrera Digital 132 and Digital 124

item.NAME: 30363 Lane Change Curve left, out to in
item.DESCRIPTION:
Track extension lane change left corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION Digital lane changing and overtaking Package contents: 1x lane change corner – left, outside to inside (2 track parts)
Use the corner and overtake your opponent This left corner is made for overtaking and changing lanes! Use it to your advantage and overtake your opponent with precision skill in this corner. Your opponent is then forced to follow you until the next opportunity for overtaking presents itself. The track change corner consists of two track parts and offers the possibility to overtake from the outside to the inside lane. The tracks are on a scale of 1:24 and can be used for digital race tracks such as the Carrera DIGITAL 124, Carrera DIGITAL 132 and the digitally upgraded Carrera EVOLUTION. This extension set brings extra fun to your race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane Change Curve left, out to in - for Carrera Digital 124 and Digital 132

item.NAME: 30364 Lane Change Curve right, in to out
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension – lane change corner for the digital Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Digital lane changing and overtaking Package contents: 1x lane change curb – right, inside to outside (2 track parts)
Exciting overtaking manoeuvres in the corner With this extension set you can provide an extra kick for your race. With the lane change corner, the slot cars can switch to the other lane and continue their race there. If you then manage to put your car in front of the opponent's car, you will have an advantage because it can't get past you anymore. But be careful! A lane change can always lead to a crash. Choose the right time and gain an advantage in the fight for the title. The lane change corner consists of two track sections and is suitable for the digital race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 or the digitally retrofitted Carrera EVOLUTION on a scale of 1:24.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane Change Curve right, in to out - for Carrera Digital 132 and Digital 124

item.NAME: 30365 Lane Change Curve right, out to in
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension of lane change corner for digital race tracks on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Digital lane changing and overtaking Package contents: 1x lane change corner – right, outside to inside (2 track parts)
Drive the ideal racing line through the corner Upgrade your Carrera race track with this lane change corner. The right corner consists of two track parts on a scale of 1:24 inviting you to overtake. From the outer track you can easily switch to the inner track and overtake your opponent. Then he has no chance of passing you until the next lane change. You can use it to upgrade your digital race tracks on a scale of 1:24. Carrera DIGITAL 124, and Carrera DIGITAL 132 are the suitable race tracks for this extension set. The extension part provides action and certainly causes one or the other crash throughout. If you don't pay attention when changing lanes, you will drive directly into the opponent's lane or will have to follow him. Use this track with care so that you also stay ahead of the pack!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lane Change Curve right, out to in - for Carrera Digital 132 and Digital 124

item.NAME: PC Rochard
item.DESCRIPTION:
Skála je tvrdá. John Rochard je tvrdší.
Poznejte G-zvedák – svého nového nejlepšího přítele! S ním můžete libovolně měnit gravitaci, manipulovat s prostředím a vrhat obrovské bedny po nepřátelích. Prožijte úžasná dobrodružství astro-horníka Johna Rocharda a vydejte se na gravitaciberoucí cestu napříč sluneční soustavou! Rochard je cenami ověnčená plošinovka přinášející nespočet hodin neuvěřitelných gravitačních hrátek, řešení hádanek a čisté akce. Hra, podávaná v humorném kresleném stylu, vypráví napínavý příběh o zavrženíhodných padouších, slečně v nesnázích a tajemné civilizaci cizinců.
5 poctivých kapitol napěchovaných rychlou plošinovkovou akcí a ohromujícími hádankami založenými na gravitaci. Nádherně vypiplaná kreslená grafika plná humoru a osobitosti. Neuvěřitelné předměty schopné ovlivňovat gravitaci nebo popadnout, rozhoupat a odhodit objekty za účelem vyřešení hádanek nebo odstranění nepřátel. Pohodový soundtrack od Markuse „Captaina“ Kaarlonena z finských Poets of the Fall, mixující jižanský rock, blues a elektronickou hudbu inspirovanou osmdesátými lety. Jon St. John a jeho vpravdě legendární výkon při namlouvání postavy Johna Rocharda. Dosud nejpokročilejší využití enginu Unity v počítačových hrách. V krabičce najdete i plakát a herní soundtrack s jedenácti skladbami.

item.NAME: 89706 EVO/D132 tyres Ferrari 458/599XX
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 89706 EVO/D132 tyres Ferrari 458/599XX

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30367 Digital Extension Set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Track extension set for your Carrera race tracks DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For expanding your race track Package contents: 4 standard straight sections, 1 lane change (left), 1 double lane change, 1 lane change corner (right, from outside to inside)
Individual driving fun with the digital track extension set Something new in store for sure! Even if you are always working on improving your lap time with the familiar and beloved slot car circuit, you will eventually feel the need for more variety. And that's exactly what this digital track extension set is for. With four standard straight sections, a left lane change, a double lane change track, track locking mechanisms and a lane change corner, new track elements can be added to the Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 race tracks. The tracks come on a scale of 1:24 and are ideally suited to the two race tracks mentioned above. The lane changes ensure rapid switching action and give you the opportunity to overtake the opponent's car imaginatively, especially during chases. Meanwhile, the straight sections extend your driving fun and help to expand the circuit. Info: This digital extension set can be used for upgrading.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30367 Digital Extension Set

item.NAME: GO/GO+/D143 - 61661 Light and Sound looping set
item.DESCRIPTION:
LED looping set with light and sound DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! Plus, Carrera GO!!! For even more action and excitement Package contents: 8 looping sections, 3 straight sections á 114 mm
Cool action fun for your Carrera race track! A looping section adds an extra cool element to your Carrera race track. If it is also a model like this with additional functions, then nothing stands in the way of racing fun. The looping section is equipped with light and sound effects and thus creates an authentic racing environment. On each lane, every vehicle has its own looping section, which is a few centimetres apart and next to each other. This not only provides an extravagant look, it also enhances the effects. As soon as the slot cars enter the looping section, the LED lights on the edge flash and engine noises sound. What fun! The set contains three straight sections with 114 mm length and eight looping sections. The Light and Sound Looping Set on a scale of 1:43 is suitable for Carrera GO!!!, Carrera GO!!! PLUS and Carrera DIGITAL 143.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Light and sound looping set

item.NAME: 89823 EVO/D143/D132/D124 Battery for speed controller/Wireless
item.DESCRIPTION:
Replacement battery for WIRELESS+ speed controller DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, EVOLUTION, DIGITAL 143 To recharge your WIRELESS+ speed controller Package contents: 1 piece
The official spare part for the WIRELESS+ speed controller With this replacement battery you can get your WIRELESS+ speed controller back on track. The LiPo battery is intended exclusively for the Carrera WIRELESS+ speed controllers used on the Carrera Digital 124, Carrera Digital 132, Carrera Digital 143 and Carrera EVOLUTION race tracks. Should it become necessary to replace the old battery, this product will provide you with a great power source for your 2.4 GHz controller, which will provide up to eight hours of continuous play when fully charged. Gentle handling for the lithium polymer battery In order to achieve a long service life for the LiPo battery, you should charge it regularly. A complete battery discharge due to prolonged use of the WIRELESS+ speed controller should be avoided. To replace the battery, simply unscrew the battery compartment of the controller and disconnect the old battery from the connector. Then connect the new battery to the socket and you're ready to go again.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Battery for speed controller fo Digital 143, Digital 132, Digital 124, Evolution

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 10114 Wireless Charging Station single
item.DESCRIPTION: Experience the joys of wireless racetrack fun for Carrera DIGITAL 124 and Carrera DIGITAL 132 with the new 2.4 GHz WIRELESS+ set-up. Carrera Real Racing: 2.4 GHz WIRELESS+ radio controlled technology Race for up to 6 drivers Ultra-light, wireless speed controller Recharger with direct connection to the Carrera circuit Operating range up to 15m Uninterrupted and frequency independent due to frequency hopping 8 hours of non-stop operation Battery powered with Lithium Polymer power pack Contents: 1 2.4 GHz WIRELESS+ Single charging station

item.NAME: amiibo Smash Sheik 23
item.DESCRIPTION:
Dotkni se, sleduj a připoj se do hry!
Objevujte nový způsob interakce s vaší oblíbenou Nintendo postavičkou. Když se dotknete figurkou NFC dotykového bodu na ovladači Wii U GamePadu při hraní hry, tak se přenesou do hry data, které můžete využít mnoha způsoby. Při hraní se data ve vaší figurce budou updatovat – tak pokračujte dále ve hře a vytvořte si své unikátní amiibo! První set figurek je pro hru Smash Bros. for Wii U.
Sleduj amiibo a jejich vylepšení v boji
Ve hře Super Smash Bros. for Wii U můžete přenést data ze své figurky amiibo přímo do hry a následně s ní bojovat. Postupně při boji bude vaše amiibo zdokonaleno o další dovednosti a herní atributy – jako je vetší síla a nové pohyby. Můžete si také přidat své vlastní upravené pohyby!
Připoj se do spousty her!
Figurky amiibo můžete využít v mnoha různých hrách – a jakým stylem můžou být použity záleží na hře! Pravidelně jsou vydávány nové postavičky z mnoha různých herních titulů.
Momentálně podporují amiibo figurky tyto hry:
Wii U:
Super Smash Bros. for Wii U Mario Party 10 Mario Kart 8 Captain Toad: Treasure Tracker Yoshi's Woolly World Hyrule Warriors Splatoon Kirby and the Rainbow Curse
Nintendo 3DS
Super Smash Bros. for Nintendo 3DS Ace Combat: Assasult Horizon Legacy + Code Name: S.T.E.A.M. Xenoblade Chronicles 3D
Kompatibilita s konzolemi New Nintendo 3DS a Nintendo 3DS/2DS
Figurky amiibo lze použít i při hraní na kapesních konzolích! New Nintendo 3DS obsahuje vestavěnou technologii NFC, která umožní připojit figurku amiibo do hry jednoduše přiložením ke spodnímu dotykovému displeji. Pro použití s Nintendem 3DS a 2DS bude možné dokoupit speciální příslušenství, které je plánováno na rok 2015.

item.DESCRIPTION: Car for Carrera GO!!! and GO!!! Plus (64031) - Chevrolet Camaro Sheriff
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Car for Carrera GO!!! and GO!!! Plus

item.NAME: DIGITAL 132/124 - 30368 Single Lane Adapter Unit
item.DESCRIPTION:
Adapter Unit for adding digital features in connection with the Pit Lane DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 For Driver Display 30353, Startlight 30345, Position Tower 30357 and 2.4 GHz WIRELESS+ charging cradles Package contents: 34.5 cm connecting track section, single lane
Connection option for accessories in connection with the Pit Lane This single lane Adapter Unit has three connectors for digital accessories. So you can connect the Drive Display (30353), the Startlight (30345) and the Position Tower (30357). These features can also be attached to the two-lane Adapter Unit (20030360). But in combination with the Pit Lane (20030356) you need the single lane Adapter Unit. When connecting, it is important that the Adapter Unit is mounted in the correct direction due to polarity. For this purpose, a lateral arrow is attached, which must point in the direction of travel for the slot cars.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30368 Single Lane Adapter Unit

item.NAME: 30369 Carrera AppConnect - DIGITAL 132/124
item.DESCRIPTION:
App Connect – Connection between your DIGITAL race track and smartphone/tablet DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 Connect your smartphone, tablet, or PC to the Carrera Control Unit via Bluetooth Package contents: Carrera App Connect
Every bit of data always available on your smartphone or tablet With the Carrera App Connect, you have all data at a glance! Want to track your lap times in the race? How many tenths of a second are you off by on the car in front of you? How long did the race take? You can find all the information you need in real time on your smartphone thanks to AppConnect in combination with the app. Of course, drivers can also be preset and given names, meaning that all your friends have their own profile in the app. The connection is very straightforward thanks to Bluetooth. It's easy to adjust the vehicle settings Not only is all the data clearly arranged, the settings can also be made with ease. Whether it’s the fuel tank’s capacity, the car’s braking characteristics or speed – all configurations can be changed via the app. You can also choose different race modes, whether it’s the number of laps or a set time – here you will find a number of different options.
IMPORTANT INFORMATION ON COMPATIBILITY! Device compatibility iPhone 4S or higher and iPad 3 or higher Android devices: Bluetooth® LE availability is required
Via the following link you will find a list of all devices that meet the technical requirements for a Bluetooth connection for the Carrera Race App: www.bluetooth.com Software compatibility Android 4.3 or higher | iOS 7.0 or higher
PLEASE NOTE: For the Carrera App Connect, a connection between the PC unit/lap counter and the Control Unit is required. This means that the Carrera lap counter cannot be used at the same time. For more information please click here! Licenses: The Bluetooth® word mark and logos are registered trademarks owned by Bluetooth SIG, Inc. and any use of such marks by Stadlbauer Marketing + Vertrieb GmbH is under license. Other trademarks and trade names are those of their respective owners. Apple, the Apple logo, iPhone, and iPod touch are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered in the U.S. and other countries. App Store is a service mark of Apple Inc. Android is a trademark of Google Inc.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 30369 Carrera AppConnect

item.NAME: Boffin II LIGHT
item.DESCRIPTION:
Watch and be amazed at what your music can do with the new Boffin LIGHT. Connect your iPhone® or other device and enjoy your music as the lights change to the beat. The strobe light with spinning patterns will amaze you with its visual effects. Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build over 175 exciting projects. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics.
Features:
Contains over 55 Snap-Together parts. Build over 175 exciting projects. Color organ controlled by iPhone® or other device, voice or finger. Enjoy your music as the lights change to the beat. Snap-together parts require no tools and ensure correct connections. Requires 4 "AA" batteries (not included) Clear and concise illustrated manual included and available online. 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical kit with 175 projects and 55 parts focused on LIGHT

item.NAME: Boffin II MOTION
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experiment with gears ratios using various gears and pulleys. Experiments include: Color changing lighted fan, air "fountain", motion detector and so much more! Fun projects let kids learn while they play!
Boffin Motion contains over 50 parts and over 165 projects to complete -- all projects focused on concepts of motion and physics. Experiment with gears ratios using various gears and pulleys. Experiments include: Color changing lighted fan, air "fountain", motion detector and so much more! Fun projects let kids learn while they play! With its easy-to-follow instructions, Boffin gives your child a hands-on education to discover how electrical circuits -- like those found in everyday devices kids are familiar with -- function and operate. They'll also gain valuable lessons in building and following instructions. The project manual includes large color illustrations and simple directions for each project.
Features:
Over 50 parts and over 165 project to complete -- all motion and physics focused. Experiment with gears ratios using various gears and pulleys. Gain valuable lessons in assembly and following instructions. Project manual includes large color illustrations and simple directions for projects. 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical kit with 165 projects and 50 parts focused on MOTION

item.NAME: PC Grey Goo
item.DESCRIPTION: Grey Goo nabídne zavedené herní mechaniky s moderním designem a možnostmi. Vycházet bude z nejlepších aspektů budovatelských strategií, které budou obohaceny o velení jednotek a totální válku v novém universu s velkými roboty. Velké zaměření má být kladeno na taktické možnosti, které byly k vidění v klasických RTS hrách.

item.NAME: WiiU Star Fox Zero
item.DESCRIPTION:
Star Fox Zero is the latest installment in the Star Fox series for Wii U. Fox, Falco, Peppy and Slippy return as Team Star Fox, a group of mercenaries.
Dual screen for enhanced experience
In this version, you'll use the TV screen for piloting the ship, while the Wii U GamePad enables precise targeting of enemies through the cockpit view. Two displays allow showing much more on the TV, making All-range mode gameplay a completely new intense experience.
New gaming options
Arwings can transform into walking robots called Walkers New drone-like Gyrowing Popular Landmaster with new flying form
Key features
Created in collaboration with PlatinumGames Return of favorite characters (Fox McCloud, Slippy, Peppy, Falco) Special sound technology for realistic communication Intuitive dual-stick control for acrobatic maneuvers Option to replay missions with different vehicles
Explore exotic planets, complete additional missions and try all new improved vehicles in this exciting space shooter.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Aerial shooter for Wii U console

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario - Boo
item.DESCRIPTION:
Přilož, propoj, sbírej!
Vezměte vaše oblíbené Nintendo hrdiny do ruky a zažijte zcela nový způsob hraní vašich oblíbených her pro zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS a konzole Wii U díky amiibo, sběratelským figurkám a kartičkám obsahujícím speciální čipy pro čtení a zápis dat! Jak to celé funguje? Stačí přiložit vaše amiibo k NFC čtečí ploše zabudované do Wii U GamePadu nebo spodní obrazovky vašeho New Nintendo 3DS či New Nintendo 3DS XL (pro starší zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS lze zakoupit samostatnou NFC čtečku) a pak už jenom sledovat, co se na vašich obrazovkách začne dít.
Připoj se do spousty her!
V kompatibilních titulech umí amiibo dělat hotové divy. Někde přidávají speciální kostýmy či vybavení a jinde zase celé herní módy! Ve hrách jako je Super Smash Bros. pro Wii U a Nintendo 3DS dokonce kompatibilní amiibo figurky můžete vytrénovat v ultimátní bojovníky, kteří si budou pamatovat způsob hry svých oponentů a dokonce pro vás sbírat nové herní předměty. Seznam podporovaných titulů se neustále rozrůstá pro nová i dříve vydaná amiibo a mezi podporované tituly tak kupříkladu dále patří takové skvosty jako je Mario Kart 8, Yoshi's Woolly World, Splatoon, Hyrule Warriors a Hyrule Warriors Legends, The Legends of Zelda: Twilight Princess HD či Super Mario Maker.

item.NAME: 4D Puzzle - Budapest
item.DESCRIPTION:
Discover the famous places and buildings of Budapest!
Build a map / scale model of Budapest, including all its historical and contemporary buildings, and discover how the metropolis has changed over the years. It is up to you to compile what Budapest looked like during the reign of the Jagiellonians under the Habsburg rule or in the period between the world wars. The individual layers are stacked on top of each other, and the fourth dimension is time.
4D PUZZLE:
1. The first puzzle / layer - history from hundreds of years ago (London - 1666, Paris - 1736, New York - 1700, USA - 1783, Prague 1892, Budapest 1884).
2. The second puzzle / layer - the present (what cities and states look like in the 21st century). The second puzzle is placed on the first layer, it has cutouts for natural phenomena (rivers, mountains). It is made of soft foam (1 cm high) so that buildings can be inserted into it.
3. Third puzzle / layer - addition of monuments and buildings (Prague from 870, Rome from 497 BC, London - 1078, Paris - 1345, New York - 1812, USA - 1450 + natural phenomena thousands of years old, Budapest from year 14th century). It is laid on the second layer.
4. Fourth dimension / layer - time. You can see how cities have evolved over time. Build London in the 12th century or what Rome looked like before our era. Go chronologically and add the buildings as they were actually built.
Highly detailed city maps - streets, parks, islands, roads, railways. You are building a model of a given city, state.
Package contents: 1. parts for the first, historical layer 2. parts for the second, current layer. 3. monuments and buildings for the third layer 4. poster of historical events and list of monuments and buildings
Total: 1,265 parts Dimensions when folded: 61 x 41 x 3 (high) cm
Educational toy - get to know and find out: How did cities and states evolve and develop? How has architecture evolved over hundreds of years? What historical events took place in the place (London 1666 The Great Fire that destroyed a substantial part of the city)?
What is unique? 3 puzzles in 1 that entertain and educate. At the same time, it's up to you how the final puzzle will look like.
What is the 4 dimension? Albert Einstein has already said that the fourth dimension is time. Build cities the way they looked in each century, what buildings and architecture were up to date at the time.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 4D Puzzle - Budapest

item.NAME: Boffin I 100
item.DESCRIPTION:
Boffin allows for hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Build lamp, fan, alarm, siren and other, totally 100 projects
Electrical components provide students ages 8+ with hands-on experience designing and building models of working electrical circuits. Snap-together parts require no tools and ensure correct connections Includes 30 parts, and instructions for over 100 projects Requires 2 "AA" batteries (sold separately) 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical kit with 100 projects and 30 parts

item.NAME: WiiU Mario Tennis: Ultra Smash
item.DESCRIPTION:
Mario Tennis pojawi się na Wii U
Razem z przyjaciółmi zagraj w multiplayerową grę Mario Tennis: Ultra Smash na Wii U! Zabawna i dynamiczna akcja, która jest typowa dla tej gry została dopełniona o nową technikę, którą możecie zaskoczyć współgraczy – serw Jumpshot, który wyśle piłeczkę na drugi koniec kortu. Do klasycznej gry w tenisa dodaj odrobinę nowości Mega Battles i przy pomocy Mega Mushroom zyskaj przewagę nad przeciwnikiem. Zapisz się w historii Mario Tenis w grze jeden na jednego lub w parach przeciwko rodzinie, przyjaciołom lub komputerowi używając podstawowych i nowych postaci.
NOWOŚCI W GRZE:
Zagraj z przyjaciółmi w nową grę Mario Tennis: Ultra Smash na Wii U. Zagraj przeciwko rodzinie i przyjaciołom w trybie multiplayer. Zaproś przyjaciół i rodzinę do pojedynku jeden na jeden lub w parach grając ulubionymi postaciami z Mushroom Kingdom. Steruj każdym ruchem swojej postaci i pokonaj przeciwnika dzięki idelanej czasowej kontroli i podstępnych technik gry. Nowa opcja w grze- Jumpshot pozwoli na mega silne uderzenia. W Mega Battles możesz użyć Mega Mushroom i dzięki tomu zystak "wielką" przewagę nad przeciwnikiem. Nowe postacie po raz pierwszy zagrają w Mario Tennis

item.NAME: Boffin II GAMES
item.DESCRIPTION:
Boffin Games is fun like an arcade while supporting a vigorous STEM curriculum! Learn the basics of electricity, engineering and circuitry while having fun completing over 200 amazing projects!
Boffin Games is an exciting introduction to problem-solving, following directions, and the satisfaction of a job well done. It's fun like an Arcade while supporting a vigorous STEM curriculum. Boffin uses building pieces with snaps to assemble different electronic circuits on a simple "rows and columns" base grid that function like the printed circuit board found in most electronic products. Each component is easily identifiable by a different color and functional purpose. Learn the basics of electricity, engineering, and circuitry with full color, curriculum rich, easy-to-follow instructions.
Features:
30 Snap Modules included to complete more than 200 projects. Enjoy completing projects using a programmable Word Fan, Dual LED Display, and a pre-programmed Micro-Controller. Clear and concise Illustrated Manual includes explanations for different Snap Modules and concepts needed to build Arcade projects. 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical kit with 203 projects and 35 parts focused on Arcades

item.NAME: WiiU Star Fox Guard (Download card only)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Grippy Toad, zakladatel Drahých kovů Corneria s.r.o., a Slippy Toad z legendárního týmu Star Fox potřebují vaši pomoc s obranou svého vzkvétajícího podniku! Stačí jen, abyste po očku hlídali tucet obrazovek a přitom odstřelovali ze střeleckých věží vybavených kamerami vlny útočících robotů! Rychle! Poklepejte na Wii U™ GamePadu na příslušnou kameru, abyste měli dobrý výhled na vstupy, a provrtejte ty pochodující, valící se roboty kulkami od hlavy až k patě! Ale až si začnete myslet, že vám to jde jako po másle, nezapomeňte si dávat pozor na roboty, kteří mají štíty, používají kouřové bomby, nebo vám dokonce kradou kamery. Dokončete mise, zvyšte svou úroveň, odemkněte více misí a získejte přístup ke speciálním kamerám, které vám pomohou při obraně každé budovy. A pak si sestavte vlastní vlny útočících robotů a vyzvěte (nebo terorizujte) s nimi své kamarády!
Sledujte obrazovky a zároveň zběsile odstřelujte hordy útočících robotů Braňte své zařízení před Androssovými zlými (ale roztomilými) vojsky Vytvořte si vlastní vlny nepřátel a sdílejte je se svými kamarády Zvyšujte svou úroveň a odemkněte tak další mise a speciální kamery

item.NAME: Mercedes R/C Fire Truck
item.DESCRIPTION:
Mercedes-Benz remote control fire truck. Drives forward, backward, left, right. The fire truck is functional, you can pour water into it and spray at a distance of several meters.
The car also includes a retractable ladder, which you control via a walkie-talkie and rotates 360 ° (up, down, right, left). The car has sound (horn and siren) and light signals when starting, reversing and standard driving. The sound can be muted via the radio.
Scale: 1/20 Size: 40cm Age: 6+ Frequency: 2.4GHz
DEMO program - after pressing the DEMO button on the radio, the car will start automatically and show all its functions.
Auto power off function - after 60 seconds, the car will turn itself off to save battery power. Car batteries: 4x 1.5V AA - not included Battery walkie-talkie: 2x 1.5V AA - not included
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Mercedes R/C Fire Truck

item.NAME: amiibo Kirby - Kirby
item.DESCRIPTION:
Přilož, propoj, sbírej!
Vezměte vaše oblíbené Nintendo hrdiny do ruky a zažijte zcela nový způsob hraní vašich oblíbených her pro zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS a konzole Wii U díky amiibo, sběratelským figurkám a kartičkám obsahujícím speciální čipy pro čtení a zápis dat! Jak to celé funguje? Stačí přiložit vaše amiibo k NFC čtečí ploše zabudované do Wii U GamePadu nebo spodní obrazovky vašeho New Nintendo 3DS či New Nintendo 3DS XL (pro starší zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS lze zakoupit samostatnou NFC čtečku) a pak už jenom sledovat, co se na vašich obrazovkách začne dít.
Připoj se do spousty her!
V kompatibilních titulech umí amiibo dělat hotové divy. Někde přidávají speciální kostýmy či vybavení a jinde zase celé herní módy! Ve hrách jako je Super Smash Bros. pro Wii U a Nintendo 3DS dokonce kompatibilní amiibo figurky můžete vytrénovat v ultimátní bojovníky, kteří si budou pamatovat způsob hry svých oponentů a dokonce pro vás sbírat nové herní předměty. Seznam podporovaných titulů se neustále rozrůstá pro nová i dříve vydaná amiibo a mezi podporované tituly tak kupříkladu dále patří takové skvosty jako je Mario Kart 8, Yoshi's Woolly World, Splatoon, Hyrule Warriors a Hyrule Warriors Legends, The Legends of Zelda: Twilight Princess HD či Super Mario Maker.

item.NAME: ZMODO 720P Wifi Mini NVR+4xIP CAM+1TB HDD
item.DESCRIPTION:
Zmodo Mini NVR systém je unikátní a kompletní řešení vše v jednom, díky němuž můžete nahrávat a vzdáleně sledovat vše, co děje v okolí vašeho domova a důležitých prostor. Díky bezdrátové technologii je určen všem, kteří chtějí chránit svůj domov a nechtějí řešit instalaci kabelů po domě.
Klíčové benefity: Snadné nastavení během několika minut. Zobrazování a ovládání na dálku pomocí bezplatné aplikace a webové stránky. Předinstalovaný 1 TB pevný disk 24/7 nepřetržitý záznam až po dobu 50 dní Oznámení o události na chytrý telefon, když je detekován pohyb. Výstup HDMI pro snadné připojení k monitoru nebo televizi
P2P protokol bez nutnosti mít veřejnou IP adresu:
ZMODO NVR server podporuje P2P protokol (peer-to-peer architektura), což v praxi znamená, že nemusíte složitě nastavovat porty na routeru a znát veřejnou IP adresu.
Tento set je dodáván s předinstalovaným 1TB pevným diskem.
Čtyřkanálový NVR all-in-one systém umožňuje připojit a nastavit až 4 venkovní 720P WiFi kamery během několika minut. Nemusíte být odborníkem na počítačích nebo sítích, nastavení je velmi jednoduché. Obraz i nahrávky na disku můžete sledovat na připojeném monitoru nebo na mobilních zařízeních pomocí aplikace MeShare.
Možnosti sledování kamer:
1. Přes mobilní aplikaci MeShare ( Android, iOS). Při prvním zapnutí aplikace je třeba nastavit přihlašovací údaje (email+heslo). V lokální síti aplikace automaticky nainstaluje systém včetně IP kamer.
2. Aplikace Zviewer pro windows. Doporučujeme používat v lokální síti
3. Cloudová služba www.meshare.com je určená pro sledování kamer na internetu z počítačů. Po přihlášení ( email+heslo) uvidíte seznam svých zařízení a můžete sledovat online video z kamer.
Vysoké rozlišení 720P
720P rozlišení poskytuje více pixelů (1280x720 pixelů), což se promítá do vyššího rozlišení obrazu s úžasnými detaily a vynikající rozeznámím detailů. Zachycuje širší, nezkreslený, digitální obraz, který poskytuje přesný poměr stran a podrobnější video
Denní i noční monitorovaní s IR-Cut přepínačem
Každá IP kamera je dodávána s infra ledkami a je schopen pracovat na vzdálenost až 15m ve tmě, a dokonce i úplné tmě. Poskytuje tedy ochranu ve dne iv noci. IR-cut filtr zajišťuje extrémně čisté HD zobrazení a záznam za všech světelných podmínek.
Odolný proti povětrnostním vlivům pro vnitřní i venkovní použití
Kamery jsou uzavřeny v kovovém šasi a jsou odolné proti vodě i povětrnostním vlivům.Kamera je konstruována tak, aby byla zcela chráněna před prachem a deštěm.
Detekce pohybu s upozorněním na mobilní aplikaci
Detekci pohybu je možné zapnout nebo vypnout pro libovolnou kameru a lze nastavit i plocha pohybu pro větší přesnost. NVR posílá upozornění na mobilní aplikace se sekvencí snímků, když dojde k detekci nenadálého pohybu. Budete tedy v klidu, systém zachytí všechny zásadní události.

item.NAME: 85467 D124 tyres Ford GT40 MK
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 85467 D124 tyres Ford GT40 MK

item.NAME: 20613 Hairpin Curve
item.DESCRIPTION:
Hairpin corner on a scale of 1:24 DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION A great extension option for your course
A very close thing! You're enjoying a daring head-to-head race with your opponent? Then take care, because the next turn could be dangerous! This hairpin corner is a cool addition to your Carrera track on a scale of 1:24, ensuring wild duels that can only be won with the right timing and flair. But there can be no doubt that you are a master of motor sport and will show the other drivers just who will come out ahead on this corner – you know you will be first! The set includes two 3/4 standard straight track sections, two curbs for standard straight track sections and three corner sections to form the hairpin. There are also three outside curbs and three inside curbs with tyre stacks for the 1/60° corner and four end sections. The extension is the ideal addition to your DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Hairpin Curve for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and 132

item.NAME: 30370 Multistart Lane
item.DESCRIPTION: Lap counting for multi-lane tracks (4-8 lanes).
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lap counting for Carrera Digital 124 and 132

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Zelda (The Wind Waker)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Přilož, propoj, sbírej!
Vezměte vaše oblíbené Nintendo hrdiny do ruky a zažijte zcela nový způsob hraní vašich oblíbených her pro zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS a konzole Wii U díky amiibo, sběratelským figurkám a kartičkám obsahujícím speciální čipy pro čtení a zápis dat! Jak to celé funguje? Stačí přiložit vaše amiibo k NFC čtečí ploše zabudované do Wii U GamePadu nebo spodní obrazovky vašeho New Nintendo 3DS či New Nintendo 3DS XL (pro starší zařízení z rodiny Nintendo 3DS lze zakoupit samostatnou NFC čtečku) a pak už jenom sledovat, co se na vašich obrazovkách začne dít.
Připoj se do spousty her!
V kompatibilních titulech umí amiibo dělat hotové divy. Někde přidávají speciální kostýmy či vybavení a jinde zase celé herní módy! Ve hrách jako je Super Smash Bros. pro Wii U a Nintendo 3DS dokonce kompatibilní amiibo figurky můžete vytrénovat v ultimátní bojovníky, kteří si budou pamatovat způsob hry svých oponentů a dokonce pro vás sbírat nové herní předměty. Seznam podporovaných titulů se neustále rozrůstá pro nová i dříve vydaná amiibo a mezi podporované tituly tak kupříkladu dále patří takové skvosty jako je Mario Kart 8, Yoshi's Woolly World, Splatoon, Hyrule Warriors a Hyrule Warriors Legends, The Legends of Zelda: Twilight Princess HD či Super Mario Maker.

item.NAME: UMAX Tablet Case 8
item.DESCRIPTION:
Universal case for 8" tablets
Suitable for tablets:
VisionBook 8Qa 3G VisionBook 8A Plus
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Universal case for 8" tablets

item.NAME: Boffin II 3D
item.DESCRIPTION:
Boffin 3D... take Boffin into a new dimension! New Boffin modules allow you to build your circuits horizontally, vertically and upside down, creating 150 stellar projects!
Boffin 3D uses building blocks with snaps to build the different electrical and electronic circuits in the projects. Each block has a function: there are switch blocks, light blocks, battery blocks, different length wire blocks, etc. These blocks are different colors and have different numbers on them so that you can easily identify them. Build over 150 projects or combine with other sets to build even more unique structures.
Exciting Light Effects 3-Color Light Tunnel, Mirrors & Reflecting Circuits Magnet & Magnetic Switch Projector with 6 Images Includes vertical stabilizer, base grid stabilizer & base grid support 3 AA batteries required but not included 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects such as FM radios, digital voice, recorders, AM radios, burglar alarms, doorbells, and much more! You can even play electronic games with your friends. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and creating with Boffin. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Electronical kit with 159 projects and 60 parts focused on 3D

item.NAME: 85509 Carrera Guardrail 20m Digital 124/132/Evolution
item.DESCRIPTION:
Crash barrier – can be cut to the desired size DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132, Carrera EVOLUTION To enhance your race track Length: 20 m
The ideal limitation for corners Crash barriers are mainly found in winding sections of the Carrera race track. When it comes to hard-fought corners, it will be necessary to replace these with new ones over the course of time. But maybe you just want a new look for your crash barriers. For whatever reason: With this 20-metre roll you always have enough tape for the crash barriers at the ready. The material is flexible, easy to work with and can be cut to the desired length. The accessories are visually convincing with the typical Carrera design – the logo and colours can be assigned to the cult brand at first glance. The safety barrier is suitable for slot car race tracks on a scale of 1:24 and therefore ideal for the DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132 and Carrera EVOLUTION. Crash barrier holder, end sections and connecting pieces are not included.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Guardrail for Carrera Evolution, Digital 124 and 132

item.NAME: Joy-Con Pair Neon Red/Neon Blue
item.DESCRIPTION:
Nová dimenze ovládání
Všestranné ovladače Joy-Con nabídnou množství překvapivých herních zážitků. Dva ovladače Joy-Con je možné používat každý v jedné ruce či dohromady jako jeden herní ovladač za pomoci Joy-Con gripu. Je také možné je připojit na konzoli v rámci handheld módu nebo se podělit s kamarádem a v podporovaných titulech si tak užít multiplayerovou zábavu pro dva. Každý Joy-Con má vlastní plnou sadu tlačítek a může být tedy používán jako samostatný ovladač a zároveň je vybaven akcelerometrem a gyroskopickým pohybovým senzorem, což umožňuje nezávislé pravé a levé pohybové ovládání.
Levý Joy-Con dále obsahuje Capture tlačítko, které hráčům umožní jedním kliknutím pořizovat okamžité screenshoty jejich hraní a dělit se o ně s přáteli prostřednictvím sociálních sítí. Pravý Joy-Con zase obsahuje NFC bod pro interakci s amiibo figurkami stejně jako IR pohybovou kameru schopnou detekovat vzdálenost, tvary a pohyb blízkých objektů v pro tyto funkce speciálně navržených hrách. Například tato funkce dokáže určit, jak daleko je hráčova ruka a jaký formuje tvar.
Ovladače Joy-Con dále představují pokročilou funkci HD rumble, která v kompatibilních hrách umožní hráčům pocítit daleko realističtější vibrační odezvu než kdy dřív. Tento efekt je natolik detailní, že hráči mohou například cítit vibrace jednotlivých kostek ledu uvnitř sklenice, kterou bude zrovna Joy-Con simulovat. Díky funkci HD rumble budou moct hráči pocítit novou úroveň realističnosti, nedosažitelné za pomoci pouhého zraku a sluchu!
K jedné konzoli Nintendo Switch je možné skrze Bluetooth bezdrátově připojit až osm ovladačů. Může přitom jít o libovolnou kombinaci ovladačů Joy-Con a dalších ovladačů jako je například Nintendo Switch Pro Controller.
Ovladače Joy-Con mohou na jedno nabití vydržet fungovat až 20 hodin a nabíjejí se opětovným připojením ke konzoli Nintendo Switch, případně jejich napojením na Nintendo Switch Charging Grip příslušenství.

item.NAME: Joy-Con Strap Neon Blue
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popruh na ruku, který lze přidělat k ovladačům Joy-Con pro zajištění většího komfortu a bezpečnosti při hraní.
Přepnětě na novou generaci konzolového hraní
Nintendo Switch je průlomová domácí herní konzole. Je ji totiž nejen možné připojit doma k televizi, ale taktéž okamžitě transformovat na handheld s 6.2 palcovou obrazovkou. Poprvé v historii si tak hráči mohou užívat plnohodnotný konzolový zážitek kdykoliv a kdekoliv! Obrazovka má kapacitní dotykový displej využitelný v podporovaných hrách. Výdrž baterie se může pohybovat v rozmezí až šesti hodin v závislosti na dané hře a podmínkách, ve kterých je konzole používána. Mimo dokovací stanici je pak možné konzoli nabíjet také za pomoci standardního USB konektoru typu C!

item.NAME: Joy-Con Strap Neon Red
item.DESCRIPTION:
