item.NAME: R/C Helicopter Carrera 501040X Red Bull Cobra
item.DESCRIPTION:
Renowned RC show helicopter in Red Bull design
Carrera RC Helicopter
In a powerful Red Bull design
Length: 26 cm
From 12 years
A helicopter legend
The TAH-1F is considered one of the first real combat helicopters. Until the middle of the 60's only normal transport helicopters were known, which were armed where necessary. But the US-American manufacturer Bell Helikopter changed everything with this model. In the distinctive Red Bull paint finish, the helicopter is now a popular flying companion for the Flying Bulls and is sure to attract attention at air shows. The copy is also a popular sidekick in films and on TV. This helicopter is just pure fun!
A combat helicopter in small scale
Of course, nobody can do anything with such a legendary flying object in original size in the home. But in the RC version it is exactly the right model for helicopter fans who are enthusiastic about flying. This RC helicopter is delivered ready to run and can rack up a flight time of up to 5 minutes. The charging time is approx. 60 minutes. With the original Red Bull license, this aircraft is in now way inferior to its role model. In addition, the helicopter scores big points with its high-quality, coaxial rotor control and gyro system, which ensures a stable flight attitude. You can also rely on the Automatic Flight Altitude Assistant in any situation, which makes it easy to use with its Auto Take Off and Landing functions. Thanks to the 2.4 GHz radio technology, up to 16 flight acrobats can fly simultaneously and move at this frequency without interference. In all other cases, the anti-collision function intervenes. The Cobra TAH-1F with built-in rechargeable LiPo battery comes to you with an ergonomic 3-channel controller, USB charging cable and batteries.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: R/C Helicopter Carrera 501040X Red Bull Cobra

item.NAME: SWITCH Master Detective Archives: RAIN CODE
item.DESCRIPTION:
Ukončete nadvládu záhad v tomto lucidně-noirovém detektivním dobrodružství!
Kanai Ward – město deště – je opředeno mnohými nevyřešenými záhadami. Prozkoumejte ho v 3D prostředí a najděte cesty k rozlousknutí případů.
Řešte případy společně se zkušenými detektivy
Yuma a Shinigami jsou zkušenými detektivy patřící pod Světovou organizaci detektivů, skupinu řešící různé případy.
Každý ze zkušených detektivů má svou nadpřirozenou schopnost, které jsou známé jako forenzní silné stránky. Díky těmto schopnostem jsou schopni shromažďovat fakta a sbírat důkazy, které by normální detektiv neměl šanci najít. Díky schopnosti přestrojení můžete napodobovat lidská těla i hlasy. Se zvukovou schopností budete detekovat tlukot srdce. Rozpoznávání vám zase pomůže se svědectvími na místech činu. Za správných podmínek lze tyto schopnost sdílet s Yumou. Zvykněte si ně, během případů je jistě oceníte.
Korporace Amaterasu
Amaterasu Corporation je mega korporace ovládající Kanai Ward. Vidí Světovou organizaci detektivů jako svého nepřítele. Jsou hluboce spjati s nevyřešenými případy a využívají svého obrovského vlivu k tomu, aby si vymýšleli fakta nebo aby je naopak zamlčovali ve chvílích, kdy se jim to hodí. Vytvářejí obstrukce k zabránění toho, aby pravda vyšla najevo.
Nová záhada na obzoru: Tajemný labyrint
V průběhu vyšetřování se zjeví nová oblast vedoucí k pravdě – Tajemný labyrint. Uvnitř něho na vás čekají různé výzvy a pasti. Prozkoumejte samotné nitro případu skrz toto neustále se měnící bludiště. Fantomové záhad se vás pokusí zastavit před odhalením pravdy. Vyhýbejte se jim a řešte rozpory v jejich tvrzení díky čepeli řešení!
Master Detective Archives: RAIN CODE vyjde na Nintendo Switch 30. června.

item.NAME: Carrera 182022 GMC Hummer EV (1:18)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera RC Hummer Offroad Mighty Hummer on the horizon 29.6 cm long 8 years and up
Top licence with Carrera RC
Broad, broader Hummer: This electric pick-up truck is a Carrera RC shooting star. The legendary US pick-up encourages gasps and gazes wherever it rumbles. The Carrera RC model gives fans the quality they expect and a great-looking paintjob packed onto a length of around 29.6 cm. Thanks to the original Ford repro license the top outdoor pro is a major eye-catcher for spectators and drivers of all ages, demonstrating amazing power under the hood at speeds of up to 25km/h.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera 182022 GMC Hummer EV (1:18)

item.NAME: Super Mario™ X Rocker 2.1 Pedestal Gaming Chair - Mario Edition - Royal Blue
item.DESCRIPTION:
Officially Licensed Super Mario™ Product - In partnership with Nintendo® of Europe, each of our Super Mario Bros™ licensed gaming chairs are tested and engineered to the highest possible standard and carries iconic artwork so that Nintendo fans can enjoy gaming in ultimate comfort and style. 2.1 Stereo Speakers & Subwoofer - Feel every beat and boom with 2 speakers and backrest mounted subwoofer whilst playing your favourite games, movies and music with crystal clear stereo sound. X-Cool Foam Interior - Stay cool in the heat of the action with X-Cool thermal regulating foam that absorbs temperature while seated and releases when you stand up. Compact & Foldable - Built into a compact and foldable frame that is ready to play when you are. Pedestal Mounted - Keep yourself elevated and ready for action. Mounted on a pedestal drum base, making this chair perfect for growing teens and even adults.
Jump into action and be the envy of your friends with the new Officially Licensed X Rocker 2.1 Pedestal Gaming Chair featuring iconic artwork from the Nintendo® Super Mario Bros™ Series. The perfect compact gaming chair for younger gamers, teens and the serious Nintendo fan!
Awesome sound is offered with our stereo audio headrest mounted speaker system enhancing your game play, music and movie experience. Feel the added 'boom' with the backrest mounted subwoofer offering immersive audio depth.
For use with the universal headphone 3.5mm jack on your favourite gaming consoles, mobile device or tablet for awesome 2.1 audio. Features deep foam padding for enriched comfort, and a soft faux leather wipe-clean finish with sturdy pedestal base for enhanced durability.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Super Mario™ X Rocker 2.1 Pedestal Gaming Chair - Mario Edition - Royal Blue

item.NAME: Boffin IV Coding - 1 (Auto)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control the Car using your smartphone or tablet. Boffin is taking the next generation into the world of coding! Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control the Car using your smartphone or tablet.
Learn the basics of coding, then code your own patterns of lights, sounds and moving parts.
Features:
Learn about circuitry, electronics, and much more! Illustrated, easy-to-use, full-color project manual explains electrical and coding concepts and includes exciting coding challenges! 5 Control Outputs – Control up to 5 circuit paths together or independently to create different circuits and projects. Featuring the Boffin Bluetooth powered coding module and free downloadable Boffin App for hours of coding fun Develop STEM electronics building and coding skills using this coding educational toy for kids Requires Apple or Android smart phone or tablet for coding process (sold separately) Ages 8+
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control the Car using your smartphone or tablet.

item.NAME: Joy-Con Pair Pastel Pink/Yellow
item.DESCRIPTION:
Nová dimenze ovládání
Všestranné ovladače Joy-Con nabídnou množství překvapivých herních zážitků. Dva Joy-Con ovladače je možné používat každý v jedné ruce či dohromady jako jeden herní ovladač za pomoci Joy-Con gripu. Je také možné je připojit na konzoli v rámci handheld módu nebo se podělit s kamarádem a v podporovaných titulech si tak užít multiplayerovou zábavu pro dva. Každý Joy-Con má vlastní plnou sadu tlačítek a může být tedy používán jako samostatný ovladač a zároveň je vybaven akcelerometrem a gyroskopickým pohybovým senzorem, což umožňuje nezávislé pravé a levé pohybové ovládání.
Levý Joy-Con dále obsahuje Capture tlačítko, které hráčům umožní jedním kliknutím pořizovat okamžité screenshoty jejich hraní a dělit se o ně s přáteli prostřednictvím sociálních sítí. Pravý Joy-Con zase obsahuje NFC bod pro interakci s amiibo figurkami stejně jako IR pohybovou kameru schopnou detekovat vzdálenost, tvary a pohyb blízkých objektů v pro tyto funkce speciálně navržených hrách. Například tato funkce dokáže určit, jak daleko je hráčova ruka a jaký formuje tvar.
Ovladače Joy-Con dále představují pokročilou funkci HD rumble, která v kompatibilních hrách umožní hráčům pocítit daleko realističtější vibrační odezvu než kdy dřív. Tento efekt je natolik detailní, že hráči mohou například cítit vibrace jednotlivých kostek ledu uvnitř sklenice, kterou bude zrovna Joy-Con simulovat. Díky funkci HD rumble budou moct hráči pocítit novou úroveň realističnosti, nedosažitelné za pomoci pouhého zraku a sluchu!

item.NAME: Joy-Con Pair Pastel Purple/Green
item.DESCRIPTION:
A New Dimension of Control
The versatile Joy-Con controllers offer numerous surprising gaming experiences. Two Joy-Con controllers can be used individually in each hand or together as one gaming controller using the Joy-Con grip. They can also be attached to the console in handheld mode or shared with a friend to enjoy two-player multiplayer fun in supported titles. Each Joy-Con has its own full set of buttons and can therefore be used as an independent controller, while also being equipped with an accelerometer and gyroscopic motion sensor, enabling independent right and left motion controls.
The Left Joy-Con also features a Capture button, allowing players to take instant screenshots of their gameplay with a single click and share them with friends via social networks. The Right Joy-Con includes an NFC point for interaction with amiibo figures as well as an IR motion camera capable of detecting distance, shapes, and movement of nearby objects in games specially designed for these features. For example, this function can determine how far away a player's hand is and what shape it's forming.
The Joy-Con controllers also feature advanced HD rumble functionality, which allows players to feel far more realistic vibration feedback than ever before in compatible games. This effect is so detailed that players can, for example, feel the vibrations of individual ice cubes inside a glass that the Joy-Con is simulating. Thanks to HD rumble, players will be able to experience a new level of realism, unachievable through sight and sound alone!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Joy-Con Pair Pastel Purple/Green

item.NAME: SWITCH Wireless HORIPAD (Legend of Zelda)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popis produktu
Vydejte se s Linkem na nová herní dobrodružství! Nový bezdrátový HORIPAD s motivem The Legend of Zelda™ pro Nintendo Switch™. Vestavěná dobíjecí lithium-iontová baterie a bezdrátová technologie Bluetooth vám poskytnou svobodu díky dosahu 10 metrů a více než 15-ti hodinové výdrži baterie. Lehký, ale pevný, svižný a citlivý Wireless HORIPAD je vybaven akcelerometrem a gyroskopem pro plné ovládání pohybu. Nabíjecí kabel USB-C je součástí balení.
Oficiálně licencováno společností Nintendo®.
Vlastnosti produktu
- Bezdrátový ovladač Bluetooth s dosahem 10 m - Dobíjecí baterie s 15 hodinami hraní na jedno nabití - Lehký a ergonomický - Akcelerometr a gyroskop pro plné ovládání pohybu

item.NAME: SWITCH Fae Farm
item.DESCRIPTION:
Magický domov na vás čeká!
Vydejte se vstříc pohádkovému životu vašich snů ve hře Fae Farm, RPG simulátoru farmaření pro 1 až 4 hráče. Budujte, upravujte a zvelebujte váš společný statek a využijte kouzel k prozkoumání kouzelného ostrova Azoria! Seznámíte se s novými přáteli, objevíte zdejší magii fae a vydáte se navštívit tajemné říše. Ve chvílích, kdy se budou měnit roční období, budete muset využít všeho, co jste se doposud naučili a obnovit tak okolní svět.
Upravujte svoji magickou farmu až s třemi dalšími hráči v lokálním či online multiplayeru! Sdílejte mezi sebou postup, předměty i to, jak pečovat o plodiny, a prozkoumávejte pospolu okolní prostředí.
Vneste kouzlo do všeho, co děláte – ať už farmaříte, bojujete s nepřáteli či se pohybujete v divočině plné víl.
Seznamujte se s obyvateli městečka, budujte přátelství a zjistěte o místních více skrz plnění úkolů.
Cestujte skrz dungeony, ruiny v celé řadě malebných oblastí a odhalte tajemství, které Azoria skrývá.
Vytvořte si svoji vlastní postavu a upravujte si ji díky novým oblečkům a dekoracím pro vaši farmu. Čím více útulnější vaše farma bude, tím více odměn si odemknete.

item.NAME: SWITCH Pikmin 1 + 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
Fyzická verze obsahující hry Pikmin 1 a Pikmin 2 vyjde 22. září pro Nintendo Switch.
Pikmin 1
Nouzové přistání, neznámá planeta a zvláštní, avšak vzrušující objev čeká na kapitána Olimara! S pomocí drobných rostlinných stvoření, kterým se říká Pikmini, znovu postavte jeho vesmírnou loď a prozkoumejte tento zarostlý svět v HD verzi GameCube klasiky.
Pikmin 2
Práce kapitána nikdy nekončí! Vraťte se na zvláštní planetu a vydejte se najít vzácný poklad. Používejte schopnosti Pikminů, usnadněte si práci s novým pomocníkem a užijte si HD verzi této klasiky z konzole Nintendo GameCube.

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Ganondorf (Tears of the Kingdom)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience the latest adventure in The Legend of Zelda series with our new Ganondorf amiibo. This detailed figure is the perfect accessory for all fans of the legendary game. Ganondorf, the cruel ruler of darkness, returns to the world of Zelda, ready to fight by your side.
This figure is not only a great collector's piece, but also opens up new possibilities in the Nintendo Switch game The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. Just attach the amiibo to the Joy-Con controller and Ganondorf will come to life right in the game. Each day, you can scan the amiibo to earn bonuses and upgrades to help you fight the forces of darkness.
The product is also compatible with Wii U, New Nintendo 3DS and New Nintendo 3DS XL. With the Ganondorf amiibo, your adventure in Tears of the Kingdom will become an even more thrilling and unique experience.
A collectible Ganondorf figure from The Legend of Zelda that will immerse you even more in the world of the game. Opens up new possibilities in The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom on Nintendo Switch. Ability to earn daily bonuses and upgrades by scanning amiibo. Compatible with Nintendo Switch, WiiU, New Nintendo 3DS and New Nintendo 3DS XL. The perfect gift for any fan of The Legend of Zelda.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Get great gaming accessories with amiibo™ accessories and compatible games

item.NAME: SWITCH Detective Pikachu Returns
item.DESCRIPTION:
Zpátky na stopě zločinu
Detective Pikachu Returns dorazí exkluzivně na Nintendo Switch 6. října!
Vítá vás Ryme City
Ryme City je místo, kde lidé a Pokémoni žijí bok po boku. V tomto rušném městečku pobývá drsně mluvící, avšak zároveň milý Pikachu, který o sobě tvrdí, že je zkušený detektiv (a také miluje dobrou kávu).
Ve dvou se to lépe táhne
Pikachu spolupracuje se svým parťákem – mladíkem jménem Tim Goodman. Společně se musí postavit sérii záhadných nehod, které sužují toto městečko.
Zahajte vyšetřování
Pevně věříme, že se těšíte na dobrodružství plné tajemství, jež čeká na Tima a jeho upovídaného parťáka Pikachu. Jedná se o sehraný tým, za něhož si zahrajete jen ve světě Pokémonů!

item.NAME: SWITCH Super Mario Bros. Wonder
item.DESCRIPTION:
Vstupte do světa zázraků v Super Mario Bros. Wonder pro Nintendo Switch!
Tradiční z boku viděná Mario hratelnost se promění s přidáním zázračných květin (Wonder Flowers)! Tyto herní předměty spustí dosud neviděné momenty, které musíte vidět na vlastní oči, abyste jim uvěřili. Čekají na vás oživlé trubky či ostnaté míče způsobující spoušť všude okolo vás. Ty nejvíc neočekávané okamžiky se však jmenují Wonder Effects.
Vybírejte z hrdinských postav světa Super Mario i power-upů
Na výběr dostanete ze známých postav jako Mario, Luigi, Peach, Daisy, Yoshi či Toad. Maria můžete přeměnit do jeho sloní podoby a poradit si s nepřáteli díky novému power-upu!
Sdílejte zázraky s přáteli a dalšími Mario fanoušky
Sezvěte až tři další hráče ke své Nintendo Switch konzoli a zažijte společně speciální Wonder Effects momenty. Spolupracujte jako tým a pomozte si s ostatními hráči dosáhnout konce úrovní.

item.NAME: SWITCH Super Mario RPG
item.DESCRIPTION:
Dreams come true - Super Mario RPG is coming to Nintendo Switch!
Join a remarkable group of heroes to save Star Road while stopping the troublesome Smithy gang. This colourful RPG has received improved graphics and cinematics to add even more charm to this unexpected alliance between Mario, Bowser, Peach and other original characters Mallow and Gene! Enter this world of eccentric sidekicks and unconventional enemies in an RPG that everyone will enjoy.
Jump into the colorful world and give your attacks some of that extra power! Explore the vibrant environments with your party and head towards your next objective. Along the way, you'll encounter monsters that you'll need to conquer in turn-based battles together as a party of three to progress further through the game. Pressing a button at the right time will grant you extra damage or give you more protection against attacks.
Super Mario RPG arrives on Nintendo Switch on November 17.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH WarioWare: Move It!
item.DESCRIPTION:
Move with WarioWare: Move It! for Nintendo Switch Switch. Grab a pair of Joy-Con controllers to gently shake, dance, wiggle and do other miscellaneous shenanigans in over 200 fast-paced mini-games that take just seconds each time.
A second player can take on another pair of Joy-Con controllers and join in on treasure hunts or fun minigames with sheep. Laughter erupts in the local Party mode, where board games await - but with rules determined by Wario himself.
WarioWare: Move It! arrives on Nintendo Switch on November 3.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Fashion Dreamer
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enter a virtual world full of your fashion imagination, where coordination and communication play a major role. A new life as an influencer awaits you!
Create new clothes and get likes!
The virtual space is teeming with muses - fashion fans - who are always looking for new inspiration. Dazzle them with your latest pieces and if you catch their eye, you'll get their likes. Collect more and more likes and become an iconic fashion influencer!
Send likes and get new items!
Have you spotted a muse with impeccable taste? Let her know! Giving a like will allow you to use their fashion pieces not only for yourself, but also when recommending outfits to other muses.
Start your own brand with your own items!
You can have a blast designing new outfits and accessories! Customize over 1400 collectibles with your favorite styles and colors, and sew your own unique style for yourself. Your creations are the foundation of your brand, so recommend them to other muses and conquer the fashion world with them!
Communicate with muses from all over the world online!
When you connect to the internet, other players' muses will appear in your world and you can wear their original outfits. Before you know it, your own designs could become an international hit!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH HORIPAD Turbo (Black)

item.NAME: SWITCH Split Pad Pro Attach. Set(Eevee Evolutions)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popis produktu
Je libo hrát v handheld módu s lepším úchopem nebo spíše na televizi s pohodlným ovladačem v ruce? Díky novince od HORI speciální ovladač Split Pad Pro zvládne hravě obojí. Ovladač rozložte a nahraďte jím joy cony na Vaší konzoli Nintendo Switch a hrajte v handheld módu na cestách, nebo doma připojte konzoli Nintendo Swtich k vaší televizi a složte si herní controller, se kterým projdete každý level z pohodlí vašeho gauče. Split Pad Compact (Eevee Evolutions) je vybaven poloprůhledným horním krytem a krásnou grafikou Eevee s oblíbenými Eevee Evolutions. Je vybaven robustními analogovými páčkami, přesným D-padem a ramenními tlačítky navrženými pro pohodlí a přesnost i během dlouhých herních seancí. Mezi pokročilé funkce Split Pad Compact patří přiřaditelné zadní triggery a funkce Turbo. Nástavec Split Pad obsahuje konektor pro sluchátka a ovládání zvuku. Ideální pro akční tituly s vysokým tempem, hloubavé dobrodružné hry a mnoho dalších žánrů. Se sadou nástavců Split Pad Compact můžete hrát, jak chcete!
Klíčové prvky
Nástavec umožňuje hráči hrát v ručním (handheld) režimu nebo lze zařízení použít jako drátový ovladač, když je připojeno k nástavci. Ergonomický úchop, tlačítka, spouště, analogové páčky a D-Pad Nástavec Split Pad Attachment obsahuje vstup mikrofonu pro herní zvuk a funkci hlasového chatu a Split Pad Compact obsahuje přiřaditelné zadní spouštěče a funkci Turbo Prodává se jako sada v jednom balení (Split Pad Pro a nástavec)
(Neobsahuje funkce Motion Controls, HD Rumble, NFC ani infračervenou kameru.)
Oficiálně licencováno společností Nintendo® & Pokémon Company International.

item.NAME: SWITCH Split Pad Compact (PAC-MAN)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popis produktu!
Split Pad Compact poskytuje v režimu Handheld zážitek podobný profesionálnímu ovladači. Je vybaven pohodlnými a snadno použitelnými analogovými páčkami, D-padem a ramenními tlačítky. Mezi pokročilé funkce patří přiřaditelné zadní triggery, funkce Turbo a další. Skvěle se hodí pro širokou škálu titulů pro Nintendo Switch™. Ergonomický design Split Padu Compact vám dokonale padne do ruky pro větší pohodlí a ovládání. Užijte si nový herní zážitek s podložkou Split Pad Compact! (Neobsahuje funkce Motion Controls, HD Rumble, NFC ani infračervenou kameru.) Oficiálně licencováno společnostmi Nintendo® a Bandai Namco.
Zážitek z ovladače plné velikosti v režimu Handheld Obsahuje ergonomické rukojeti vybavené zadními spouštěmi, funkcí turbo a D-padem. Retro a barevný design PAC-MAN Kompatibilní s Nintendo Switch™ a Nintendo Switch™ - OLED model Oficiálně licencováno společnostmi Nintendo® a Bandai Namco

item.NAME: SWITCH Split Pad Pro Attach. Set(Lavender)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Popis produktu

Je vybaven robustními analogovými páčkami, přesným D-padem a ramenními tlačítky navrženými pro pohodlí a přesnost i během dlouhých herních seancí. Mezi pokročilé funkce Split Pad Compact patří přiřaditelné zadní triggery a funkce Turbo. Nástavec Split Pad obsahuje konektor pro sluchátka a ovládání zvuku. Ideální pro akční tituly s vysokým tempem, hloubavé dobrodružné hry a mnoho dalších žánrů. Se sadou nástavců Split Pad Compact můžete hrát, jak chcete!
Klíčové prvky
Nástavec umožňuje hráči hrát v ručním (handheld) režimu nebo lze zařízení použít jako drátový ovladač, když je připojeno k nástavci. Ergonomický úchop, tlačítka, spouště, analogové páčky a D-Pad Levandulový design Nástavec Split Pad Attachment obsahuje vstup mikrofonu pro herní zvuk a funkci hlasového chatu a Split Pad Compact obsahuje přiřaditelné zadní spouštěče a funkci Turbo Prodává se jako sada v jednom balení (Split Pad Pro a nástavec)
(Neobsahuje funkce Motion Controls, HD Rumble, NFC ani infračervenou kameru.)
Oficiálně licencováno společností Nintendo®

item.NAME: PS5 EA SPORTS WRC 2023
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product description
Build your dream car in the biggest rally game yet in EA SPORTS™ WRC. Look forward to the all-new official video game of the FIA World Rally Championship, developed for the first time by the award-winning team behind the DiRT Rally series. Design and drive your dream rally car in the debut Builder mode, complete and conquer recent races with real-world highlights and nostalgic memories in Moments mode, or tame the elements in mud, snow and tarmac in pursuit of the perfect ride.
CREATE YOUR OWN CAR
Design and drive your dream rally car with the debut of Builder mode.
SEND NEWS HEADLINES
In Moments mode, race and beat recent events, recall notable real-world moments and reminisce nostalgically.
DYNAMIC CONTROL SYSTEM
Studio Codemasters has improved its renowned multi-surface control model for WRC. Adapt it to your skill level and try it out on deteriorating surfaces.
Beautifully immersive experience
Enjoy euphoric moments as you battle the elements on dirt, snow and asphalt in pursuit of the perfect ride.
AUTHENTICITY
Pilot WRC, WRC2 and Junior WRC cars with drivers, teams and co-drivers from the 2023 season, drawing on over 25 years of rally gaming heritage.
TRAVEL THROUGH WRC HISTORY
Take a ride behind the wheel of epic WRC cars and journey through rally history with a range of 70 authentically recreated historic vehicles.
Around the World
Fight in 17 current and former WRC locations from Monte Carlo onwards and Portugal to Kenya and Japan with over 200 stages on release day.
A COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Career, championship, time trial, cross-platform multiplayer mode, rally regularity, detailed sticker editor and more.
EA SPORTS™ WRC - Free Rally Pass - Free Season 1
Get XP in-game to unlock a variety of items to customize your driver, as well as prints for use in the new sticker editor.
EA SPORTS™ WRC - VIP Rally Pass - Season 1
Take your Rally Pass to the next level with this season's VIP Pass! With a VIP Rally Pass subscription, you'll get access to an additional 3 helmets, 3 racing overalls, 3 sets of gloves, 3 hats and 3 stickers for the Ford Puma Rally1 HYBRID, Hyundai i20 N Rally1 HYBRID and Toyota GR Yaris Rally1 HYBRID.
EA RACENET CLUBS
EA Racenet is a companion feature where WRC players can connect, compare and improve their gaming experience, via the web or mobile devices (iOS and Android). Create, connect, manage and run WRC clubs and compete in community championships and stages grouped into events where points are awarded to the fastest.
Pre-order* EA SPORTS WRC and get 3-day priority access, all 5 seasons with VIP Rally Passes and a 3× team apparel package.
Pre-order today
Legal Information
This promotional offer expires upon the release of EA SPORTS™ WRC. Code expires November 1, 2024. Valid only for new purchases of WRC on the EA app (ea.com/ea-app) or at participating retailers. For retail pre-orders, contact the retailer for distribution details and pick-up date and time. For digital pre-orders, content will be provided automatically. If you do not log in and pick up items during subsequent Rally Pass seasons, then items for that season will be forfeited: S1: 31 October - 19 December, S2: 19 December - 13 February, S3: 13 February - 9 April, S4: 9 April - 4 June and S5: 4 June - 30 July. Rally Pass items are only available in the game for the above season periods. Access to certain items is conditional on gaining a specific level of in-game experience. This offer has no monetary value and cannot be substituted, exchanged or sold for money, goods or services. Unless expressly permitted by EA, this offer cannot be combined with any other offer or subscription card applicable to the relevant content. Customer is responsible for payment of applicable taxes. Not applicable where prohibited, restricted or taxable by law. Playing and access to online features and pre-order content may require an internet connection, an EA account, acceptance of the EA User Agreement (terms.ea.com/cs), installation of the EA app (ea.com/ea-app), registration of a one-time product code and an account on the applicable platform. Product code registration is limited to 1 EA account and is only valid for the duration of online feature availability. EA's Privacy and Cookie Policy (privacy.ea.com/en) applies. You agree that any personal information collected during your use of EA's services will be transferred to the United States as further explained in the Privacy and Cookie Policy. Access to online features may be conditional upon being 16 years of age. Age restrictions may vary, for more information visit o.ea.com/ea/child-access-en. Mandatory content updates may download automatically, require additional space on your storage device, increase broadband charges and may be subject to additional purchase. EA may discontinue providing online features upon 30 days' notice at ea.com/cs-cz/service-updates. For more information on final products as they become available, please visit ea.com/cs-cz/legal.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Racing game for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: Boffin IV Coding - 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control the kit using your smartphone or tablet. Boffin is taking the next generation into the world of coding! Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control projects using your smartphone or tablet.
Learn the basics of coding, then code your own patterns of lights, sounds and moving parts.
Features:
Learn about circuitry, electronics, and much more! Illustrated, easy-to-use, full-color project manual explains electrical and coding concepts and includes exciting coding challenges! 5 Control Outputs – Control up to 5 circuit paths together or independently to create different circuits and projects. Featuring the Boffin Bluetooth powered coding module and free downloadable Boffin App for hours of coding fun Develop STEM electronics building and coding skills using this coding educational toy for kids Requires Apple or Android smart phone or tablet for coding process (sold separately) Ages 8+
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Build your project, download the Boffin App, and control the Car using your smartphone or tablet.

item.NAME: SWITCH Another Code: Recollection
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience the complete story of Ashley Mizuki Robbins through two adventures with Another Code: Recollection for Nintendo Switch!
This collection includes two fully enhanced Another Code games originally released on Nintendo DS and Nintendo Wii. They now offer revamped visuals, 3D environments ready for you to start exploring, dubbing, new puzzles, cutscenes, music and more! Both games also include optional hints and navigation systems to help newcomers.
Another Code: Two Memories
After receiving a letter from the father she thought had died, 13-year-old Ashley - all alone - sets out for Blood Edward Island with one goal: to find her dad. Not long after arriving, however, she meets the mysterious Ghost D and discovers a castle full of puzzles and mysteries waiting to be solved.
Another Code: Journey into Lost Memories
In this sequel set two years after the events of the original, you and Ashley travel to Lake Juliet and help her discover what really happened to her mother.
Another Code Recollection will be released on January 19, 2024 on Nintendo Switch.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Luigi's Mansion 2 HD
item.DESCRIPTION:
It's time to clean the house!
Join the fearful hero Luigi during his spooky quest in Luigi's Mansion 2 HD for Nintendo Switch.
In this graphically enhanced adventure, you set out to visit haunted locations in Evershade Valley, a place teeming with troublesome ghosts. Luckily, Luigi has the right equipment to deal with them, from Strolbulb to stun enemies and his trusty Poltergust, which drains spirits and objects and interacts with his surroundings.
Luigi's paranormal escapades take him to all sorts of places, including a former research laboratory, a ruined watch factory, and a snow-covered mine.
Up to four players can team up to take on the ScareScraper challenge. This is a haunted building full of ghosts and challenges that you won't find in the main story. Bring in your ghost hunter lieutenants and conquer terrifying towers in local and online co-op.
An internet connection is required. In order to use the Online Services, you must create a Nintendo Account and accept the appropriate arrangements. The Nintendo Account Privacy Policy is enforced. Some online services may not be available in all countries.
Local co-op requires one console and one copy of the game per player.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch Game

item.NAME: SWITCH Mario vs. Donkey Kong
item.DESCRIPTION:
Toys are coming back to town!
An old rivalry with a date of origin on the Game Bay Advance console will see its return in Mario vs. Donkey Kong for Nintendo Switch. Now and with improved graphics, you'll be solving puzzles of all kinds as well as testing your platforming skills. The goal will be one - to save all the Mini-Marios!
Take back all the Mini-Maria from Donkey Kong!
Donkey Kong wants to retrieve a new and highly sought after Mini-Maria toy, however they have already been dismantled to the last piece. Because of this, he breaks into the factory where these toys are made and steals many of them. So Mario has to step in and get all the Mini-Maria back.
Your brain gets a workout while solving puzzles and platforming
There are levels full of puzzles awaiting Mario. Proceed one by one and get the keys needed to unlock the door behind which they Mini-Marios are.
Explore your surroundings carefully, using your wits to find out the best route and show who's under the hat and can best overcome the platforming obstacles. Stolen toys will thank you!
It's better for two
Give the controller to another player and enjoy playing in local co-op. The help of another partner will undoubtedly help you through the toughest levels!
Mario vs. Donkey Kong arrives on Nintendo Switch on February 16.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door
item.DESCRIPTION: The Nintendo GameCube classic Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door returns to Nintendo Switch with improved graphics! Join Mario and his friends in an RPG adventure and discover the legendary ancient treasure of the Thousand-Year Door. Will Mario be able to complete his paper mission, or will he collapse under the pressure?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch Game

item.NAME: SWITCH Princess Peach: Showtime!
item.DESCRIPTION:
The stage is set! Princess Peach: Showtime! is coming to Nintendo Switch.
Princess Peach in the spotlight!
Princess Peach and her friends arrive at the Sparkle Theater for a show when Grape and the Sour Bunch suddenly appear, taking all the attention for themselves. A perfect show turns into a tragedy, and it's left to Peach to save both the show and the situation.
Stella introduces herself
Use the power of the ribbon that Peach has been given by Stella's guardian to confront the villains and save the performers!
Subversive Transformations
By transforming, Peach gains new abilities. She can become a swordswoman to defend herself against bad guys or a detective, where she will investigate clues and convict criminals. With more stolen shows to save, you'll discover that many more Peach transformations are hiding behind the curtain, including a pastry chef and a kung fu master!
Princess Peach: Showtime!!! will launch on Nintendo Switch on March 22, 2024.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.DESCRIPTION:
Officially licensed GameSir G7 controller for XBOX & PC with Hall effect
World's first Xbox controller with Hall effect pads Works with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One and Windows 10/11 consoles Precision-tuned analogue triggers with Hall effect Paint your own unique customized controller with the interchangeable faceplate suitable for painting Quick rear button latches to disable unwanted inputs Sensitive membrane buttons Quick switching of controller profiles on the fly Wired connection with detachable 3m USB-C cable, Plug and Play Unlimited customization via GameSir Nexus software

item.NAME: PC Farming Vehicle Control System
item.DESCRIPTION:
Introducing the HORI farm vehicle control system for Windows 11/10!
Developed in collaboration with GIANTS Software GmbH, creators of the Farming Simulator series, to provide a realistic experience of controlling specialized vehicles and equipment. The HORI farm vehicle control system features a large 35cm diameter rubberised steering wheel, based on real vehicles, with a turn signal lever and rotary knob for realistic simulation and control. Also included is a full-size three foot pedal unit and a control panel unit with a total of 76 buttons, eliminating the need for a keyboard or other peripherals. The control panel unit features a rotary axis joystick and separate throttle level for ultimate control in Farming Simulator. Hall effect sensors on the steering wheel, pedals, control lever and paddles ensure long-lasting durability and accuracy. The steering wheel and control panel can be easily mounted to the table for stability, and you can customize the sensitivity, button layout and other settings using the companion app.
Features:
Collaboration with the creators of the Farming Simulator series: GIANTS Software GmbH
Multi-function control lever with rotary axis and throttle pedal for perfect control of agricultural machinery.
The 34 cm diameter rubberised steering wheel with rotary knob is set at an angle of 40° and can rotate 900°.
Magnetic Hall effect sensors in steering wheel, pedals, control lever and throttle for durability and accuracy
Control the action in Farming Simulator without the need for a keyboard with a total of 76 buttons and customize layouts and other settings with the companion app
Specialised controls for the Farming Simulator series
Developed in collaboration with the creators of the Farming Simulator series, GIANTS Software GmbH, to provide a realistic experience of operating specialized vehicles.
Realistic steering wheel unit specially designed
Realistic large 34cm diameter wheel with a rubberised handle set at 40° and the ability to rotate 900°. Control the lights and turn signals with the turn signal lever. Designed for smooth and natural control of tractors and other specialized vehicles. Wheel, pedals and levers use extremely durable Hall sensors for high-precision control.
Single control panel for enhanced control
Multi-function control lever with rotation axis.
The control lever supports forward, backward, left, right, and rotation movements, allowing various in-game operations such as fine manipulation of the crane arm. The on-board throttle lever allows you to set a fixed speed without depressing the accelerator pedal for smooth harvesting.
76 Operational Buttons
21 on the front of the wheel, 55 buttons on the control panel unit. This controller set supports a wide range of game actions for Farming Simulator, allowing you to play without the need for a mouse and keyboard or other additional devices.
Three Pedal Configuration
The three-pedal configuration, which includes an accelerator, brake and clutch, allows for an authentic driving experience on all farm machinery such as tractors and combines. Magnetic Hall effect sensors are used to ensure accuracy and extreme durability.
Attachable Spinner Wheel
Includes removable spinner wheel. This allows the wheel to be used with one hand while controlling other functions at the same time.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Farming Simulator Unit for PC

item.NAME: PC HOTAS Flight Control System & Mount
item.DESCRIPTION:
In partnership with Gaijin Entertainment, developer of War Thunder, we are pleased to announce the new HORI HOTAS flight control system and mount for PC - including bonus DLC with three limited edition fighter aircraft and more! Choose your preferred gaming style with a dedicated steel tabletop mount that lets you position the controls authentically like a real fighter jet. Experience an authentic flight simulation with over 200 configurable controls and a dual throttle feature with rudder that allows independent control of twin-engine machines. The joystick features dual-stage triggers for controlling advanced weapon systems and highly durable Hall-effect sensors for precision. Use the companion app to adjust analog sensitivity, button mapping, dead zones, LED indicator brightness and more. HORI HOTAS Flight Control System & Mount is a high-end flight simulation system that will take you to the skies!
Features:
Includes limited edition War Thunder
Precision joystick with dual triggers and Hall effect sensors
Double throttle with adjustable resistance can be locked together or separated to control twin-engine aircraft
Control all aircraft functions using the fully featured control panel with metal switches
Fully adjustable steel tabletop mount for immersive cockpit simulation
Simulate a real cockpit layout
Sturdy steel mounting brackets are included to customize cockpit layout and component height. By placing the joystick to the right or in front of you, you can simulate a variety of realistic cockpit layouts.
Two-stage trigger
The two-stage trigger allows players to control two separate guns with one trigger. For example, a partial press to fire machine guns and a full press to fire rockets or another weapon.
Precision Joystick
The joystick uses non-contact Hall-effect sensors that allow for precise 16-bit control while being very durable. Use the free companion app to adjust dead zones, sensitivity settings, and more.
Nearly 200 functions
You can set 61 button functions and 9 analog axes for each of the 3 modes.
Control various functions such as radar, landing gear, flaps and air brakes, just like in a real aircraft. You can assign modes using the companion app.
Double throttle with lateral axis control
Independently controlled split throttle designed to simulate the operation of twin-engine aircraft.
Selectable yaw control styles
The joystick has a pivot axis and the throttle stick has a rudder, allowing independent Z-axis control. Depending on your playing style, you can choose to control the side axis of the aircraft with the joystick or the throttle stick.
Simulate a real cockpit layout
The joystick and throttle stick can be securely mounted to the table using the included study steel brackets. With four adjustable height levels, you can easily customize the layout and position to your preference.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Aircraft control unit

item.NAME: PC 7-Speed Racing Shifter
item.DESCRIPTION:
Start your engines! It's time to shift gears with HORI's 7-speed racing shifter for PC. Compatible with most Windows 11/10 racing steering wheels via USB (see the HORI website for compatibility information), or connected directly to the HORI Force Feedback Racing Wheel DLX for use on your gaming console. Our precision 7-speed transmission is designed to prevent shifting errors and easily switch between standard H-shift and sequential shift modes for the most realistic driving experience. The chassis is designed to be mounted in a natural position under the edge of your desk or race stand to simulate a real driving experience. Swap the included shift lever for a real vehicle shift lever and adjust shift resistance on the fly with the dedicated dial to customize the look and feel of your driving setup.
Features:
Two shift modes: standard H-pattern and sequential
Interchangeable shift knob compatible with commercially available knobs (size M8 or larger)
Compatible with HORI Force Feedback and other PC racing steering wheels via USB
Highly accurate and durable magnetic sensor
Easy on-the-fly adjustment of shifting resistance using a special wheel
Race shift lever with 7 speeds + reverse with precise and highly durable Hall effect sensor
Switches between standard H-pattern and sequential shift mode on the fly
Precision 7-speed transmission designed to prevent shifting errors
Easy to dial in resistance and shift feel. Shift lever can be replaced with real shift knobs (M8 size)
Low mount design provides a realistic car layout experience
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: 7-speed HORI racing shifter for PC

item.NAME: amiibo Smash Sora
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get ready for a magical adventure with the Smash Sora amiibo and unlock a world where courage is key. Open the door to countless stories and battles in the world of Super Smash Bros. with this highly detailed amiibo figure that embodies Sora, the main character from the Kingdom Hearts series. Sora, who has the power of the Keyblade, will team up with Donald and Goofy on a journey across many Disney worlds to stop the Heartless invasion and restore peace.
Amiibo Smash Sora isn't just a stylish collectible, it's the key to expanding your gaming horizons. Attach the figure to your Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controller and watch Sora come to life in-game. Your fighter can learn, grow, and save levels and customization directly to the chip at the bottom of the figure. Take Sora with you and show your friends how you've perfected your hero!
Interactive Adventure: Attach the Smash Sora amiibo to the controller and transfer its power directly into your Super Smash Bros. Ultimate. Learning Fighter: Your amiibo figure saves all levels and customization, allowing Sora to become stronger with each fight. Collectible Gem: The detailed design of the figure makes the Smash Sora amiibo not only a gaming accessory, but also a valuable collectible. Game Strategy on a New Level: Use Sora to analyze and improve your battle tactics thanks to his ability to learn from your play style. Friendly Companion: The Sora Smash amiibo brings a piece of heart and courage to your game world, always with a friendly smile.
Discover how the Smash Sora amiibo brings not only fun and strategy, but also charm and friendship to your gaming life. Get swept away in a story where every battle is a step towards greater courage and strength. Amiibo Smash Sora releases February 16, 2024, your adventure will never end!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Get great gaming accessories with amiibo™ accessories and compatible games.

item.NAME: PS5/PS4/PC Fighting Stick Alpha Tekken 8 edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Introducing HORI's Fighting Stick α (Tekken 8 Edition) for PlayStation®5! The tournament Fighting Stick α features a Street Fighter™ 6 themed chassis that can be opened for easy customization and maintenance. It also includes brand new Tekken 8 artwork and a download link for 18 additional swappable images of the game's starting roster.
The Fighting Stick α is equipped with:
the legendary HAYABUSA joystick from HORI, HAYABUSA matte high-speed buttons, fully functional touchpad, tournament lock 3m cable, as well as on-board audio and microphone controls so you can focus on the fight.
Take your fighting skills to the next level and create four custom profiles through the companion app. You can easily switch between profiles on the fly using the function button. Play like a pro with HORI's Fighting Stick α (Tekken 8 Edition). Officially licensed by Sony and Bandai Namco.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Arcade controller for Playstation 5/ Playstation 4 and PC

item.NAME: U33
item.DESCRIPTION:
U33 - part (control panel) to connect the kit with Boffin In the application, go to the main menu (CONTROL - PROGRAMMING - MANUALS). Click on CONTROL and the control panel (OP) will appear.
The U33 driver has 5 outputs (D1, D2, D3, D4 and A) and these are controlled using the Boffin app. Outputs D1-D2 and D3-D4 are paired to each control the motor in both directions and can be used to set one of two output voltage levels, called H (higher - 5V) and L (lower - 3V). Output A is low power and cannot control most motors.
You can control the U33 driver via the Boffin app on your bluetooth device in two ways:
Control Panel (real-time remote control) Boffin app PROGRAMMING (simple graphical control)
U33 controllers:
(+) - battery power output GND - return power to batteries D1 - motor connection output, connected to D2, higher and lower level D2 - motor connection output, connected to D1, higher and lower level A - connection output for low current use, 4V output level D3 - motor connection output, connected to D4, higher and lower level D4 - motor connection output, connected to D3, higher and lower level
In the files tab of the Boffin IV Coding manual
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: U33 - part to connect the kit with Boffin application

item.NAME: GameSir G8 Galileo mobile contr iPhone15 & Android
item.DESCRIPTION:
Discover endless gaming possibilities with the GameSir G8 Galileo, a revolutionary gamepad that goes beyond traditional mobile control. Have you ever longed for your mobile gaming to reach the level of a console experience? With the GameSir G8 Galileo, that dream becomes a reality. Designed for your iPhone 15 and Android, this gamepad embodies the latest technology and ergonomic design that takes your gameplay to new heights.
Enjoy uninterrupted action with pass-through charging that ensures your gaming is never interrupted by lack of power. An expandable bridge and ample back space ensure universal compatibility with a variety of devices, while interchangeable magnetic faceplates make it easy to personalize and swap to suit your style.
With two programmable buttons on the back and multiple customization options via the GameSir app (with exclusive Android support), you hold unlimited potential to enhance your gaming arsenal.
Don't get left behind, join the mobile gaming revolution and pre-order the GameSir G8 Galileo today!
Unsurpassed Control Precision: With console-sized sticks and buttons, you get precise control that catapults you to the top of the leaderboards and lets you dominate every fight. Infinite Play Without Interruption: With pass-through charging, you can play without worrying about running out of battery, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite game. Universal Compatibility: An expandable bridge and ample back space ensure the GameSir G8 Galileo fits like a glove to your device, whether it's an iPhone 15 or any Android phone. Reliability and Longevity: GameSir™ Hall Tech with full Hall Effect sensors ensures your controls remain precise and reliable after thousands of hours of play. Maximum Customization: With two programmable buttons on the back and interchangeable magnetic faceplates, plus exclusive settings via the GameSir App, your G8 Galileo will look and function exactly how you want it to.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Controller for mobile games with USB-C connector
item.TECHSPECS: Compatible Models: iPhone 15 series and Android Connection: Built-in wired Type-C to your phone Compatible Phone Size(without phone case): 110-185 mm in length 13 mm or below in depth Phone camera depth ≤ 5mm 3.5mm Audio Jack: Yes Hall Effect Sticks: Yes Analog Triggers: Yes, Hall Effect magnetic sensors ABXY Buttons: Membrane, 5 million-click lifespan Back Buttons: Yes, 2 Back Buttons Pass-through Charging: Yes(*Not all phones are supported) Customization Software: Yes, GameSir App(*Exclusive Android System Support)

item.NAME: Carrera D132 30038 Pole to Podium
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera D132 30038 Pole to Podium, 270x185cm, 7,6m Wireless controllers
DTM for the living room
DTM racing really comes into its own with the new Carrera DIGITAL 132 ‘Pole to Podium set’ featuring the Ferrari 296 GT3, driven for the Swiss Emil Frey Racing team in the 2023 season by Jack Aitken and Thierry Vermeulen. Across the grid stands the Porsche 911 GT3 R ‘Manthey EMA, No.91’ DTM 2023 for a thrilling battle around the 7.6-metre/24.93 ft. circuit. Porsche’s contract driver Dennis Olsen and works driver Thomas Preining drove these two 911s for Meuspath Racing. There’s plenty of racing action on the Carrera racetrack. The high-speed straights provide great chances to put the pedal to the metal, while the bends and double points require a keen instinct and steady steering. The WIRELESS 2.0 controller handset gives drivers complete freedom of movement around the track during the race.

Carrera D132 30042 NASCAR, 305 x 170cm, 7,3m, wireless controllers
The ultimate NASCAR racing experience
The Carrera DIGITAL 132 ‘NASCAR’ set invites Carrera fans to explore the thrills and high drama of the Stock Car Racing Series. The set contains two stunning NASCAR Camaro NextGen ZL1 automobiles driven by the Hendrick Motorsports team. Fans stage their own races at home with NASCAR Camaro NextGen ZL1 ‘Hendrick Motorsports, Chase Elliott, No.9’, the rising star of NASCAR racing. Elliott duels with NASCAR Camaro NextGen ZL1 ‘Hendrick Motorsports, Alex Bowman, No.48’. The set offers a hands-on recreation of the amazing intensity experienced in the famous US racing series. Challenge friends and family to shoot around the bends and speed along the 7.3-metre/23.95 ft. race track with their Camaros.

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63047 DC Batweels 2.4
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera FIRST 2.4m long with Batwheels BAM and Redbird cars, for children from 3 years old, battery operated, includes straights, corners, propellers for more fun driving, controllers and Batman-themed decorations.
Track length: 2.4 m Dimensions after assembly: 93 x 45cm
Batwheels of Gotham are taking the Carrera FIRST series by storm! The Carrera FIRST "Batwheels - Time for Action" set is the ultimate gaming car racing set for junior adventure lovers ages 3 and up! Batman's car jumps into action in the Batwheels series. "Bam" stands for Batmobile. Gotham's entire super-powered team of superhero support vehicles fights crime. Bat and his buddy Redbird, Robin's car, will also join the action at the Carrera FIRST race track. The two small 1:50 scale supercars race on a bright blue 2.4 meter track in the Batwheels Time for Action set. The propellers guarantee additional fun while playing. Carrera FIRST is the perfect gift to ensure that budding racing drivers enjoy countless hours of excitement.
Package contents:
1x Batwheels car - BAM 1x car Batwheels - Redbird straight lines Batwheels 2x propellers for more fun driving around 1x power part 2x speed controller Supports, guides, instructions Includes batteries (4x C)
FIRST - the first car track for children aged 3 and up
track scale 1:50 car scale 1:50 analogue car track system battery-operated track (4x C batteries) drive time up to 6 hours all cars have contact brushes for better track grip all cars have magnet the clamp system makes the track easy to assemble and disassemble precise and stable track design, including height-adjustable supports detailed, pad-printed cars original Disney-Pixar Cars, Paw Patrol, Mickey Mouse, Nintendo, Peppa Pig licenses high quality workmanship sets include power part, 2x speed controller, 2x car, mantinels, track clutches, Czech instructions suitable for children from 3 years old
CARRERA means race in Spanish and we can guarantee you one thing. As soon as you unpack the box with the Carrera logo, your racing blood will start to run at top speed, no matter what track or car you're racing. This feeling has been experienced by thousands of fans since 1963, when the Carrera brand saw its first race track. Over the following forty-plus years, Carrera has worked its way to the very top of the field in race tracks, cars and accessories. Today it offers top quality products that are designed not only for children but also for adults for whom car racing has become a hobby for life.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera FIRST - 63047 Batwheels Time for Action, 93x45cm, 2.4m

Racing fun with Spidey and friends. Young Peter Parker (Spidey for short) is already a popular superhero, but in the children's series "Spidey and his super friends" he quickly realises that it's even easier to help people with friends by your side. The track is decorated with numerous decorative elements that create a real Spidey atmosphere in your room.

item.NAME: FIRST 65030 Batwheels BAM
item.DESCRIPTION:
We present to you the amazing FIRST 65030 Batwheels BAM, a must-have car for every car racing enthusiast and Batman fan! This precision crafted 1:50 scale car is ready to take to the track and give you an unforgettable racing experience.
With the Batwheels BAM car, you'll be the star of any race track. Its aerodynamic design, inspired by the iconic Batmobile, not only looks great, but also provides excellent grip and cornering stability. Dual contact brushes ensure reliable power and a smooth, uninterrupted ride, while the magnet allows for better traction and faster cornering. The guide rail then keeps your car on track every time.
Whether you're a novice racer or a seasoned driver, the FIRST 65030 Batwheels BAM car will give you the performance and excitement you're looking for. With this car, you can engage in thrilling duels with friends or simply have fun honing your skills on the track. Quality workmanship and durable materials ensure that the Batwheels BAM will be your reliable companion for many races to come.
Don't hesitate and get your FIRST 65030 Batwheels BAM car today! Experience the thrill of speed, the joy of victory and become a true master of the race track.
Iconic Batmobile-inspired design that will thrill any Batman fan Double contact brushes for reliable power and a smooth ride Magnet for better grip and faster cornering Guidance bar to keep the car on track Precision craftsmanship and durable materials for long-lasting fun
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FIRST 1:50 track car (65030)

item.NAME: FIRST 65031 Batwheels Redbird
item.DESCRIPTION:
The FIRST 65031 Batwheels Redbird car is ready to liven up your races on the racetrack and bring a new level of excitement and fun to them! Inspired by the legendary Batmobile, this meticulously crafted 1:50 scale car brings you a unique opportunity to experience a thrilling adventure right in your living room.
Batwheels Redbird features cutting-edge technology to ensure a smooth and fast ride around the track. The dual contact brushes ensure a stable and uninterrupted power transfer, while the magnet provides exceptional grip on the track, allowing you to power through corners at high speeds without fear of derailment. Thanks to the precision guide rail, the car stays firmly on the track and you can enjoy maximum control over its movement.
This model is not only powerful, but also stunning. The detailed design and fidelity to the original Batmobile make it a real gem in your collection. Whether you're an avid collector or just looking for a way to spice up your car racing, the Batwheels Redbird is the perfect choice.
Don't hesitate to get this amazing car today! With Batwheels Redbird you will experience thrilling duels, adrenaline-pumping races and unbridled fun. Let yourself be taken into the world of Batman and become part of his adventures. This model is the perfect gift for every fan of the Dark Knight and car racing enthusiast.
Precision crafted in 1:50 scale with attention to detail and faithfulness to the original Batmobile Double contact brushes for stable and uninterrupted power transfer Magnet for exceptional track grip and fast cornering Guide bar for maximum control and track holding Visually stunning design to liven up your racing and enhance your collection
Order now and get ready for unforgettable racing with Batwheels Redbird!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FIRST 1:50 track car (65031)

item.NAME: FIRST 65032 Spidey
item.DESCRIPTION:
The FIRST 65032 Spidey car - the perfect addition to your car track that turns every ride into an unforgettable experience! This amazing 1:50 scale car is inspired by the legendary Spider-Man and brings his iconic style right to your home.
Spidey Car is designed with performance and precision in mind. Dual contact brushes ensure reliable and uninterrupted power, so you can count on a smooth ride with no unexpected interruptions. A magnet located in the car provides additional grip to the track, allowing you to negotiate corners and obstacles with complete confidence. And thanks to the guide rail, the Spidey Auto will always stay on track, no matter how challenging the track you choose.
But that's not all! The FIRST 65032 Spidey Car boasts not only great driving characteristics, but also a stunning design. Vibrant colours and intricate details faithfully capture the look of Spider-Man's iconic costume. With this car in your collection, you'll become the unmissable king of any car racing track.
Whether you're an avid collector or looking for an exciting way to liven up your racing, FIRST 65032 Spidey Car is the perfect choice. Get yours today and experience an unforgettable combination of performance, style and fun!
Iconic Spider-Man-inspired design for a unique look on the racetrack Dual contact brushes ensure reliable and uninterrupted power Magnet for extra grip and confidence in corners and obstacles Guidance bar keeps the car always on the right track Precise workmanship and vibrant colours for a stunning visual experience
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FIRST 1:50 track car (65032)

item.NAME: FIRST 65033 Spin
item.DESCRIPTION:
The FIRST 65033 Spin, the perfect addition to your 1:50 scale car track. This car is designed with an emphasis on performance and style to give you an exciting experience every time you drive.
With dual contact brushes, the Auto FIRST 65033 Spin provides reliable and uninterrupted power, allowing you to fully focus on the race and achieve the best results. The magnet integrated into the car provides additional grip to the track, so you can take on the sharpest corners and fastest straights without fear of losing control.
A precisely designed guide rail ensures that the FIRST 65033 Spin stays firmly on the track, allowing you to experience a realistic driving experience. Whether you're a budding track enthusiast or a seasoned racer, this car will give you the exceptional performance and reliability you need to achieve victory.
Don't hesitate to get your FIRST 65033 Spin car today and take your car racing experience to a whole new level. With this car, you'll be ready to face challenges and become a champion on your track!
Dual contact brushes for reliable and uninterrupted power Integrated magnet for better grip and cornering control Precision-designed guide rail for a realistic driving feel Compatible with FIRST 1:50 scale car tracks High quality workmanship and durability for long-lasting fun
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FIRST 1:50 track car (65033)

item.NAME: 10122 Wireless Signal Receiver 2.0 D132/D124
item.DESCRIPTION:
Receiver for WIRELESS 2.0 Controller DIGITAL 132 and DIGITAL 124
DIGITAL 124, DIGITAL 132
For hassle-free wireless driving fun
Package contents: 1x 2.4 GHz WIRELESS 2.0 receiver
The link between your Carrera race track and the WIRELESS 2.0 speed controllers
The WIRELESS 2.0 receiver is required so that the WIRELESS 2.0 controllers are connected to the car. One WIRELESS 2.0 receiver for all cars is sufficient. This means that up to six cars can be connected. The receiver can be used for DIGITAL 132 or DIGITAL 124 race tracks. Simply press the SET button on the receiver, then press the connection button on top of the controller and the WIRELESS+ controller is connected to the track. The same procedure is used for the other controllers. With the WIRELESS 2.0 controllers in conjunction with the WIRELESS 2.0 receiver, you can experience exciting races in DTM, GT3 or another exciting racing series on your very own Carrera race track.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Receiver for WIRELESS 2.0 Controller DIGITAL 132 and DIGITAL 124

item.NAME: PS5 EA SPORTS WRC 2023
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product description
Build your dream car in the biggest rally game yet in EA SPORTS™ WRC. Look forward to the all-new official video game of the FIA World Rally Championship, developed for the first time by the award-winning team behind the DiRT Rally series. Design and drive your dream rally car in the debut Builder mode, complete and conquer recent races with real-world highlights and nostalgic memories in Moments mode, or tame the elements in mud, snow and tarmac in pursuit of the perfect ride.
CREATE YOUR OWN CAR
Design and drive your dream rally car with the debut of Builder mode.
SEND NEWS HEADLINES
In Moments mode, race and beat recent events, recall notable real-world moments and reminisce nostalgically.
DYNAMIC CONTROL SYSTEM
Studio Codemasters has improved its renowned multi-surface control model for WRC. Adapt it to your skill level and try it out on deteriorating surfaces.
Beautifully immersive experience
Enjoy euphoric moments as you battle the elements on dirt, snow and asphalt in pursuit of the perfect ride.
AUTHENTICITY
Pilot WRC, WRC2 and Junior WRC cars with drivers, teams and co-drivers from the 2023 season, drawing on over 25 years of rally gaming heritage.
TRAVEL THROUGH WRC HISTORY
Take a ride behind the wheel of epic WRC cars and journey through rally history with a range of 70 authentically recreated historic vehicles.
Around the World
Fight in 17 current and former WRC locations from Monte Carlo onwards and Portugal to Kenya and Japan with over 200 stages on release day.
A COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Career, championship, time trial, cross-platform multiplayer mode, rally regularity, detailed sticker editor and more.
EA SPORTS™ WRC - Free Rally Pass - Free Season 1
Get XP in-game to unlock a variety of items to customize your driver, as well as prints for use in the new sticker editor.
EA SPORTS™ WRC - VIP Rally Pass - Season 1
Take your Rally Pass to the next level with this season's VIP Pass! With a VIP Rally Pass subscription, you'll get access to an additional 3 helmets, 3 racing overalls, 3 sets of gloves, 3 hats and 3 stickers for the Ford Puma Rally1 HYBRID, Hyundai i20 N Rally1 HYBRID and Toyota GR Yaris Rally1 HYBRID.
EA RACENET CLUBS
EA Racenet is a companion feature where WRC players can connect, compare and improve their gaming experience, via the web or mobile devices (iOS and Android). Create, connect, manage and run WRC clubs and compete in community championships and stages grouped into events where points are awarded to the fastest.
Pre-order* EA SPORTS WRC and get 3-day priority access, all 5 seasons with VIP Rally Passes and a 3× team apparel package.
Pre-order today
Legal Information
This promotional offer expires upon the release of EA SPORTS™ WRC. Code expires November 1, 2024. Valid only for new purchases of WRC on the EA app (ea.com/ea-app) or at participating retailers. For retail pre-orders, contact the retailer for distribution details and pick-up date and time. For digital pre-orders, content will be provided automatically. If you do not log in and pick up items during subsequent Rally Pass seasons, then items for that season will be forfeited: S1: 31 October - 19 December, S2: 19 December - 13 February, S3: 13 February - 9 April, S4: 9 April - 4 June and S5: 4 June - 30 July. Rally Pass items are only available in the game for the above season periods. Access to certain items is conditional on gaining a specific level of in-game experience. This offer has no monetary value and cannot be substituted, exchanged or sold for money, goods or services. Unless expressly permitted by EA, this offer cannot be combined with any other offer or subscription card applicable to the relevant content. Customer is responsible for payment of applicable taxes. Not applicable where prohibited, restricted or taxable by law. Playing and access to online features and pre-order content may require an internet connection, an EA account, acceptance of the EA User Agreement (terms.ea.com/cs), installation of the EA app (ea.com/ea-app), registration of a one-time product code and an account on the applicable platform. Product code registration is limited to 1 EA account and is only valid for the duration of online feature availability. EA's Privacy and Cookie Policy (privacy.ea.com/en) applies. You agree that any personal information collected during your use of EA's services will be transferred to the United States as further explained in the Privacy and Cookie Policy. Access to online features may be conditional upon being 16 years of age. Age restrictions may vary, for more information visit o.ea.com/ea/child-access-en. Mandatory content updates may download automatically, require additional space on your storage device, increase broadband charges and may be subject to additional purchase. EA may discontinue providing online features upon 30 days' notice at ea.com/cs-cz/service-updates. For more information on final products as they become available, please visit ea.com/cs-cz/legal.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Racing game for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: UMAX U-Band P1 PRO Black
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Meet the U-Band P1 PRO sports watch, which impresses with its imaginative design, great features, and large color display visible in sunlight. Durable construction, IP68 water resistance, built-in GPS, pedometer, and heart rate sensor make this model not only perfect for everyday wear but also a great companion for various types of sports.
24-hour heart rate monitoring U-Band P1 PRO measures heart rate at small intervals 24 hours a day using a photoelectric sensor combined with sophisticated and accurate algorithm, providing accurate continuous heart rate data to give you information about your heart rate range throughout the day and during exercise.
Single sports activity and GPS The band also offers time-limited specific activity measurement (choice of 17 sports) such as exercise, running, cycling, swimming, badminton, basketball, and more. Thanks to built-in GPS, you can track your route including maps during sports activities in the phone app.
Daily activity measurement Wherever you are, the built-in sensor records steps, distance, activity time, and calories burned. If you set up the sedentary reminder function, the band will alert you in time with its vibrations.
Automatic sleep quality measurement U-Band P1 PRO automatically recognizes your sleep state, including sleep stages and time spent awake. After synchronizing data with the mobile app, users can check the online graph showing sleep trends and set a silent alarm that gently wakes you up to a new day.
Phone app notifications In the app, you can set which notifications you want to receive on the band and also choose the vibration type for individual notifications.
Incoming call notification When receiving a call, U-Band P1 PRO will silently vibrate and display the caller's name or number if the phone is within range of the band (up to 6-10 meters). You won't miss any important calls.
Remote photography Users can control their smartphone to take photos by pressing a button on the band or turning their wrist.
Water-resistant U-Band P1 PRO is a water-resistant band (ATM50) and can be used while swimming, showering, etc.
Simple and clear app in English The app for data synchronization with the band is very clear and easy to use. It offers all activity overviews during days, weeks, and months. Users can set daily step and sleep goals, set inactivity periods after which the band will alert them with vibration. Setting alarms for specific times is also useful. The automatic band firmware update function is included.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Discounted used goods - Waterproof smart watch with GPS, heart rate monitoring and large color display

item.NAME: Carry Case for Nintendo Switch Lite Animal Cr.Ed.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Ochraňte svou Nintendo Switch Lite konzoli s tímto designovým pouzdrem se vzory ze hry Animal Crossing: New Horizons a folií na display. Toto pouzdro vaši konzoli ochrání kdykoliv a kdekoliv, a vy si tak budete moci užít bezstarostného hraní vašich oblíbených her.
Věnováno handheld hraní
Konzole pro hráče na cestách.
Nintendo Switch Lite je kompaktním, lehčím přírůstkem do rodiny Nintendo Switch se zabudovaným ovládáním.
Nintendo Switch Lite podporuje všechen Nintendo Switch software, který je možné hrát v handheld módu. Skvělá volba pro ty, kteří mají spoustu příležitostí k hraní venku a také pro kohokoli, kdo si rád užije online nebo lokální bezdrátový multiplayer s kamarády či rodinou a již vlastní vlajkovou loď konzoli Nintendo Switch.
Jako jednoúčelové herní handheld zařízení, Nintendo Switch Lite nepodporuje připojení k TV.

item.NAME: R/C car Red Bull Racing (1:18)
item.DESCRIPTION: R/C car Red Bull Racing (1:18) 1, 3*AA batteries for car & 2*AA batteries for controller are excluded. 2, Function: Forward, Reverse, Turn left, Turn right. 3, Features: Authentic car styling with injection moulded body, independent suspension system. 4, With one set DIY label for the car body Size 31cm
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: R/C car Red Bull Racing (1:18)

item.NAME: SWITCH Fashion Dreamer
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enter a virtual world full of your fashion imagination, where coordination and communication play a major role. A new life as an influencer awaits you!
Create new clothes and get likes!
The virtual space is teeming with muses - fashion fans - who are always looking for new inspiration. Dazzle them with your latest pieces and if you catch their eye, you'll get their likes. Collect more and more likes and become an iconic fashion influencer!
Send likes and get new items!
Have you spotted a muse with impeccable taste? Let her know! Giving a like will allow you to use their fashion pieces not only for yourself, but also when recommending outfits to other muses.
Start your own brand with your own items!
You can have a blast designing new outfits and accessories! Customize over 1400 collectibles with your favorite styles and colors, and sew your own unique style for yourself. Your creations are the foundation of your brand, so recommend them to other muses and conquer the fashion world with them!
Communicate with muses from all over the world online!
When you connect to the internet, other players' muses will appear in your world and you can wear their original outfits. Before you know it, your own designs could become an international hit!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: R/C car Ferrari 499P Le Mans (1:14)
item.DESCRIPTION: Ferrari 499P, scale 1/14, remote control 1.5*AA batteries for car & 2*AA batteries for controller are excluded. 2, Function: Forward, Reverse, Turn left, Turn right, Headlight & Rear light, Doors opened by hand 3, Two speed can be switched A, ≥7Km/H - ≤9Km/h B, ≥9Km/H - ≤11Km/h 4, Features: Authentic car styling with injection moulded body, independent suspension system. Size 35cm
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Ferrari 499P, scale 1/14, remote control

item.NAME: LEGO® Friends 41734 Sea Rescue Boat
item.DESCRIPTION:
The ocean is full of garbage. Catch it with the catamaran's nets and recycle it to keep the water beautifully clean. The LEGO® Friends 41734 Marine Rescue Boat set will delight all lovers of nature and especially ocean life. Board the catamaran and help Nova and Aliya clean up the shores of Heartlake. The lifeboat also functions as a science lab, but is now on a clean-up mission. Catch trash in the nets and recycle it. In the submarine, dive to the bottom to collect other debris. The ocean will be beautifully clear again.
The LEGO® Friends building sets are the best toys for kids, where they encourage exploration and interest with the help of 5 girls from the town of Heartlake.
LEGO® Friends provides a place for girly secrets, endless friendships and great fun in the town of Heartlake, entertaining all little ladies. Five inseparable friends live in Heartlake Town and together they can take little builders to nature, school, sports and culture. LEGO® Friends is full of imagination-stirring details. It's a world of endless opportunities to inspire free play.
Features:
Opens the gateway to a purely girly world new adventures in the town of Heartlake high quality material and precision individual pieces building with pieces trains patience, by building children develop fine motor skills develops creativity and encourages imagination practices fine motor skills LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards
Package contents:
Bones to build the model of the rescue ship submarine 4 minifigures - Aliya, Nova, Gunnar, Marco 2 dolphins other accessories instructions
Material: plastic
Age: 7+
Dimensions: 20 x 33 x 18 cm
Number of pieces: 717pcs
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Thanks to the LEGO® rescue ship, you will learn more about life in the ocean. The kit is ideal for nature lovers.

item.NAME: LEGO® Friends 41744 Sports Center
item.DESCRIPTION:
The sports centre is well equipped. The playground can be adapted to different sports by simply changing the goals and nets. Play football with others. When you get tired of it, you can convert the field into a basketball court or tennis court by simply changing the goals and nets. Of course there is a scoreboard and a place to put the balls away.
LEGO® Friends sets are the ultimate toys for kids, where they encourage exploration and interests with the help of 5 girls from the town of Heartlake.
LEGO® Friends provides a place for girly secrets, endless friendships and great fun in the town of Heartlake, entertaining all little ladies. It's a world of endless opportunities to inspire free play.

bones to build the model of the sports centre court 4 minifigures - Hanna, Niko, Ivana, Leo other accessories instructions
Material: plastic
