Dimensions: 20 x 27 x 17 cm
Number of pieces: 832pcs
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: All sports fans will love this LEGO® set. Try football, gym and climbing.

item.NAME: LEGO Super Mario 71424 Donkey Kong's Treehouse - Expansion Set
item.DESCRIPTION:
With the Donkey Kong's Treehouse expansion set, you can build a colorful jungle level and play out various stories. The treehouse offers plenty of authentic details, such as a buildable TV, radio, and secret hideout. Try to find the secret hideout! Jump on Donkey Kong's back and stomp and smash things. Shake the banana off the palm tree and give it to Donkey Kong, he'll surely enjoy it. Then visit Cranky Kong, maybe you'll get a few coins from him. You can also play the Konga drums or relax in the hammock. There's plenty of fun waiting for you.
Thanks to the intuitive Instructions PLUS in the free LEGO® Super Mario™ app, building will be even more fun. It includes digital tools for viewing, inspirational tips, and also serves as a safe platform for sharing ideas.
LEGO® Super Mario™ sets bring the beloved Nintendo® character into the real world. They are great gifts for kids to play with alone or in a group. The modular starter set, expansion sets, and outfits allow for creating custom levels and offer kids many ways to create amazing gaming challenges.
Features:
free LEGO® Super Mario™ app available allows for creating amazing gaming challenges high-quality material and precision of individual pieces building with bricks trains patience, fosters fine motor skills development fosters creativity and encourages imagination fine motor skills practice LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards Package contents:
building bricks 2 figures - Donkey Kong and Cranky Kong accessories instructions Material: plastic
Age: 8+
Dimensions: 46 x 19 x 17 cm
Number of pieces: 555 pcs
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Join the Donkey Konga group and collect coins in the jungle. Explore his treehouse.

item.NAME: LEGO® DUPLO® 10412 Animal Train
item.DESCRIPTION:
The LEGO® train with 4 cute animals will teach children to recognise colours and build according to the model or their own imagination. The rooster figure has a movable neck, so children will have lots of fun and develop their motor skills. Children will easily learn different colours with the LEGO® train. They can match the animals to the same coloured carriages. Little builders will enjoy the buildable lamb, cow, horse and rooster with a moving neck for even more fun.
Thanks to the bright colours, children will love this LEGO® building set. The large LEGO® DUPLO® bricks make it easy to hold and manipulate, so building will be amazing fun.
LEGO® DUPLO ® is an endless source of creative fun for all young children from 1.5 to 3 years old. The bricks are specially designed to fit perfectly in little hands and to be absolutely safe at the same time, so they are easy to grasp, place and reassemble without limiting their creativity. The set can easily be combined with other LEGO® DUPLO ® sets for even more creative fun.
Features:
fun creative LEGO® game high quality material and precision individual pieces that fit small children's hands building with pieces trains patience, builds children's fine motor skills, develops creativity and encourages imagination LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards
Package contents:
Train 4 animal figures accessories instructions
Material: plastic
Dimensions:17 x 43 x 6 cm
Age:1.5+
Number of pieces: 19pcs
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: The LEGO® train with 4 cute animals will teach children to recognise colours and build according to the model or their own imagination.

item.NAME: Carrera Hybrid 50001 Speedway to Hell
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera Hybrid 6.09 m long track with Porsche 911 cars includes straights, corners
Track length: 6.09m Dimensions after assembly: 250 x 172cm
The new Carrera - Hybrid range offers the perfect combination of gaming and racing fun. Artificial intelligence support allows for a realistic driving experience in a variety of driving modes. Controlled via an app. Driving and overtaking on and off the track. Races for up to 16 racers. Car setup using AI. 1/50th scale cars. Online racing. Unlock different difficulty levels.
Package contents: 2x Porsche 911 GT3 car Straight lines, corners
Carrera Hybrid - allows 16 cars to drive on and off the track and overtake each other
Car scale 1:50 up to 16 drivers can drive on this track at the same time up to 30 drivers can race online Control via the Carrera app overtaking on the straights and corners as well as off the track individual setup of each car using AI the app design is based on the cockpit of real racing cars wide track, true to life engine sounds different difficulty levels easy to disassemble and assemble high quality workmanship suitable for all from 12 years
CARRERA means race in Spanish and we can guarantee you one thing. As soon as you unpack the box with the Carrera logo, your racing blood will be pumping at top speed, no matter what track or car you're racing. Thousands of fans have experienced this feeling since 1963, when the Carrera brand saw its first race track. Over the next forty-plus years, Carrera has worked its way to the top of the leading edge in racetracks, cars and accessories. Today, they offer the highest quality products that are designed not only for children, but also for adults for whom car racing has become a hobby for life.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Revolutionary car track offers races for 16 players, smart controls and off-track driving on a vast area.

⚠️ Use only with compatible Carrera Hybrid tracks ⚠️ Clean the track with a damp cloth and a drop of detergent before use ⚠️ Do not expose parts to excessive mechanical stress ⚠️ Do not use excessive force when assembling the track ⚠️ Keep connecting elements clean for proper function ⚠️ Regularly check the condition of individual parts ♻️ At end of life, dispose of in an environmentally friendly manner

item.NAME: Pull and Speed Red Bull Racing RB19 "M.Verstappen"
item.DESCRIPTION:
Pull and Speed Red Bull Racing RB19 "M. Verstappen"
Experience the thrill of speed with the licensed pull-back car Pull and Speed from manufacturer Carrera - Red Bull Max Verstappen Formula. This detailed car is perfect for all fans of Formula 1 and Max Verstappen.
Key Features
Pull-back mechanism: Press, pull, and go! Carrera Pull & Speed pull-back cars are lightning fast and provide lots of fun for both kids and adults. Quality construction: The car is made with a plastic chassis and has durable paintwork that withstands long-term use. Free running forward: Once released, the car continues to move forward thanks to its free-running mechanism. Attractive packaging: Each vehicle is packaged in an attractive window box with a header and euro hole for easy display.
Why choose this model?
This officially licensed product is a great gift for young and older fans and collectors of racing vehicles. The authentic design and highly detailed vehicles in 1:43 scale guarantee great fun on flat surfaces. Recommended for children aged 3 and up. Red Bull® Marks are licensed by Red Bull GmbH/Austria.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Pull-back car Pull and Speed - Red Bull Max Verstappen Formula in 1/43 scale, size 11cm

item.NAME: amiibo Smash Sora
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get ready for a magical adventure with the Smash Sora amiibo and unlock a world where courage is key. Open the door to countless stories and battles in the world of Super Smash Bros. with this highly detailed amiibo figure that embodies Sora, the main character from the Kingdom Hearts series. Sora, who has the power of the Keyblade, will team up with Donald and Goofy on a journey across many Disney worlds to stop the Heartless invasion and restore peace.
Amiibo Smash Sora isn't just a stylish collectible, it's the key to expanding your gaming horizons. Attach the figure to your Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controller and watch Sora come to life in-game. Your fighter can learn, grow, and save levels and customization directly to the chip at the bottom of the figure. Take Sora with you and show your friends how you've perfected your hero!
Interactive Adventure: Attach the Smash Sora amiibo to the controller and transfer its power directly into your Super Smash Bros. Ultimate. Learning Fighter: Your amiibo figure saves all levels and customization, allowing Sora to become stronger with each fight. Collectible Gem: The detailed design of the figure makes the Smash Sora amiibo not only a gaming accessory, but also a valuable collectible. Game Strategy on a New Level: Use Sora to analyze and improve your battle tactics thanks to his ability to learn from your play style. Friendly Companion: The Sora Smash amiibo brings a piece of heart and courage to your game world, always with a friendly smile.
Discover how the Smash Sora amiibo brings not only fun and strategy, but also charm and friendship to your gaming life. Get swept away in a story where every battle is a step towards greater courage and strength. Amiibo Smash Sora releases February 16, 2024, your adventure will never end!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Get great gaming accessories with amiibo™ accessories and compatible games.

item.NAME: Rescue bear
item.DESCRIPTION:
RESCUE BEAR aspires to teach kids how to take care of others. The product concept comes from the photo below taken by Nima Sarikhani, who warned us the harm of global warming to polar bears.
Interactive bear plush with electronic functions.
Pet bear for sounds, moving eyes, and glowing nose.
Colour of light represents different emotions.
Use a “magical ice cube” (included) to “cooldown” bear
RESCUE BEAR is an electronic plush. It will move its eyes and nose with light and sound effects. Includes a magic ice-cube for interactive activities.
•Age: 5+
•Batteries: 3 x AA
•
•Soft Plush
•Interactive Ice Cube
•Lights and Sounds effects
Play with RESCUE BEAR by touching its head. RESCUE BEAR will respond by moving its eyes and nose with light and sound effects.
Use an ice cube accessory included to gently rub RESCUE BEAR’s head.
The ice cube will light up and “cool down” the bear.
RESCUE BEAR will experience different emotions. Each emotion corresponds to different colour lights:
•Too hot (red)
•Cool and happy (blue)
Sleeping (green)
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: RESCUE BEAR aspires to teach kids how to take care of others

item.NAME: SWITCH Endless Ocean Luminous
item.DESCRIPTION:
Dive in and explore the mysterious underwater world
Take a deep breath and dive into the Veiled Sea, a previously unexplored area where you'll discover something new on every dive. You'll encounter more than 500 species of marine life and learn everything you need to know about them. Some are even thought to be extinct or mythical!
What will you encounter on your underwater adventure?
Head out with up to 30 other players to explore this underwater world together.
Dive in groups of up to 30 other players with a Nintendo Switch Online subscription. Gesture to greet other divers and share everything you come across.
Dive beneath the sea in Endless Ocean Luminous on May 2 on Nintendo Switch.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Super Monkey Ball Banana Rumble
item.DESCRIPTION:
AiAi and his friends meet in the Super Monkey Ball Banana Rumble! Up to 16 players will face off in online matches with one goal in mind - to capture the Top Banana title for themselves! For the best results in four-player co-op, you can also head into a carefully crafted story mode called Adventure Mode.
Head to the online multiplayer for up to 16 players or the local version, which can be experienced by 4 players at a time. Gather three more buddies and enjoy a pre-prepared story mode where AiAi and his crew go in search of 7 mysterious artifacts rumored to be the key to finding the legendary banana. More than 200 levels await you! Show your style! Customize your character with over 300 different items. Experience thrilling gameplay that everyone will enjoy, on the other hand, only the best players will fully master it. Use the new Spin Dash move that lets you out-sprint other players or create a shortcut.
Super Monkey Ball Banana Rumble will release on June 25 on Nintendo Switch.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: PC HOTAS Flight Control System & Mount
item.DESCRIPTION:
In partnership with Gaijin Entertainment, developer of War Thunder, we are pleased to announce the new HORI HOTAS flight control system and mount for PC - including bonus DLC with three limited edition fighter aircraft and more! Choose your preferred gaming style with a dedicated steel tabletop mount that lets you position the controls authentically like a real fighter jet. Experience an authentic flight simulation with over 200 configurable controls and a dual throttle feature with rudder that allows independent control of twin-engine machines. The joystick features dual-stage triggers for controlling advanced weapon systems and highly durable Hall-effect sensors for precision. Use the companion app to adjust analog sensitivity, button mapping, dead zones, LED indicator brightness and more. HORI HOTAS Flight Control System & Mount is a high-end flight simulation system that will take you to the skies!
Features:
Includes limited edition War Thunder
Precision joystick with dual triggers and Hall effect sensors
Double throttle with adjustable resistance can be locked together or separated to control twin-engine aircraft
Control all aircraft functions using the fully featured control panel with metal switches
Fully adjustable steel tabletop mount for immersive cockpit simulation
Simulate a real cockpit layout
Sturdy steel mounting brackets are included to customize cockpit layout and component height. By placing the joystick to the right or in front of you, you can simulate a variety of realistic cockpit layouts.
Two-stage trigger
The two-stage trigger allows players to control two separate guns with one trigger. For example, a partial press to fire machine guns and a full press to fire rockets or another weapon.
Precision Joystick
The joystick uses non-contact Hall-effect sensors that allow for precise 16-bit control while being very durable. Use the free companion app to adjust dead zones, sensitivity settings, and more.
Nearly 200 functions
You can set 61 button functions and 9 analog axes for each of the 3 modes.
Control various functions such as radar, landing gear, flaps and air brakes, just like in a real aircraft. You can assign modes using the companion app.
Double throttle with lateral axis control
Independently controlled split throttle designed to simulate the operation of twin-engine aircraft.
Selectable yaw control styles
The joystick has a pivot axis and the throttle stick has a rudder, allowing independent Z-axis control. Depending on your playing style, you can choose to control the side axis of the aircraft with the joystick or the throttle stick.
Simulate a real cockpit layout
The joystick and throttle stick can be securely mounted to the table using the included study steel brackets. With four adjustable height levels, you can easily customize the layout and position to your preference.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Aircraft control unit

item.NAME: R/C Carrera PROFI 102012 Crawler
item.DESCRIPTION:
Remote-controlled power off-road vehicle from Carrera RC in scale 1:10
Digital proportional control for 360° stepless and precise driving pleasure
Interference-free 2.4 GHz radio technology with a range of up to 60m and 16 vehicles at the same time
Neon green extra-large pneumatic tires with strong tread
All-wheel drive for powerful driving pleasure
Splash-proof on wet surfaces
Oil pressure shock absorbers for perfect road holding on any surface
Power Drive for powerful off-road power transmission of up to 8 km/h
For professional off-roaders aged 14 and over
READY TO RUN: The remote-controlled crawler is immediately ready to drive - unpack and get started!
ROBUST and durable: body made of special plastic
HIGH-QUALITY EQUIPMENT: Full-suspension chassis and pneumatic tires
HIGH-TECH battery technology thanks to long-lasting rechargeable LiFePo4 AKKU
LONG runtime of up to 15 min
A great gift for teenagers, men, women and off-road adventurers
Experience unbridled off-road driving fun with the remote-controlled power off-road vehicle from Carrera RC! On a scale of 1:10, it offers you precise driving pleasure thanks to the digitally proportional control. The neon green extra-large pneumatic tires with strong tread and the all-wheel drive guarantee powerful and splash-proof driving pleasure on any surface. Thanks to oil-filled shock absorbers, you can enjoy perfect road holding, while the Power Drive with up to 8 km/h off-road ensures strong power transmission. This robust and durable vehicle is ideal for professional off-roaders aged 14 and over and comes as a READY TO RUN model, ready for immediate use. Treat yourself or surprise someone with a gift that will delight youngsters, men, women and off-road adventurers alike. There's power under the hood here!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Remote-controlled power off-road vehicle from Carrera RC in scale 1:10

item.NAME: Nerf Blasting car 240020 (1:20) 2.4GHz
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera RC meets Nerf! Drive and shoot with the famous Nerf Soft Darts and Carrera RC in the Carrera RC Nerf Blasting Car! Drivers aged 6 and up mount the blaster cartridge with 10 original Nerf darts included - either on their controller or the 17,5cm long vehicle - to face all kind of new challenges. There´s also a target included, so take careful aim and hit the bullseye from the car. The task is even harder with a target mounted on the vehicle whizzing around the room. The Nerf licensed car accelerates up to 7km/h and steers in all directions on special wheels on trips around playrooms and bedrooms.
Nerf Blasting car 240020 (1:20) 2.4GHz Ready to run
Uses 2.4 GHz technology
Full Function
LED LIGHT
Automatic off
Up to 7 km/h
Driving time: 20 min
Charging time: 50 min
Turnator / Action
6+
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nerf Blasting car 240020 (1:20) 2.4GHz

item.NAME: Carrera Advent calendar 160150 R/C Offroad
item.DESCRIPTION:
Ready to Run Up to 16 players at a time batteries included (4x AAA + 2x AAA) dimensions (W/D/H) - 56.5 cm x 7.5 cm x 37 cm Breeding: from 12 years Length: 23.5 cm speed: up to 12 km/h
Carrera RC Advent Calendar with 2.4GHz RC Vehicle Complete your 1:18 scale buggie in just 24 days! In the Carrera RC advent calendar, 24 different components are waiting for you to assemble a complete remote-controlled vehicle. The calendar size is about 56.5 cm x 7.5 cm x 37 cm (width/depth/height) and with the trendy packaging it is also visually a real eye-catcher. As soon as the car is fully assembled, the nimble speedster in the cool two-color design in red and black reaches up to 12 km/ h and you can start driving thanks to the Ready to Run function. Among other things, batteries and the practical one-hand controller for the 23.5 cm-long vehicle are also included in the calendar. The buggie has full driving and steering function and is suitable from 12 years.
attention! Not suitable for children under 3 years of age. Risk of choking due to swallowable small parts. Store packaging as it contains important information. Please pay attention to and read the internal operating instructions!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera Advent calendar 160150 R/C Offroad

item.NAME: R/C car Carrera 200984P Luigi (1/20)
item.DESCRIPTION:
- Carrera RC Mario Pipe Kart - Carrera RC Action - Join Mario in the Pipe Kart for red-hot racing - Length approx. 21 cm - Age 6 and upwards
Glide to victory with Mario and the extra-light Pipe Kart
Mario puts his foot to the floor for every home-circuit Mushroom Cup challenge in his Carrera RC Mario Kart™ Pipe Kart! The extra-light tube kart is a classic feature of the Mario Kart™ 8 and Mario Kart™ 8 Deluxe video games, and now guarantees plenty of off-screen real-world racing thrills. The Carrera RC Kart is still robust enough to resist attacks by the greatly-feared blue shell. This Kart lets you turn heads while you race with friends to secure a place at the top of the podium.
Mario Kart™ Action at home
The original Nintendo reproduction license ensures this lovingly-crafted hero is the spitting image of his digital alter ego. Mario earns his place at the top of the podium at top speeds of up to 9 km/h against up to 15 other drivers. Enjoy up to 30 minutes of searing race action before it's time to use the USB cable included in the box to fully recharge the 3.2 V 320 mAh LiFePo4 battery in just 50 minutes. Full function control technology makes Mario easy to drive for enthusiasts aged 6 and up. Race with Mario and place the Mushroom Cup in your trophy cabinet!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: R/C car Carrera 200984P Luigi (1/20)

item.NAME: CAT Advent calendar 85970
item.DESCRIPTION:
Tension builds for construction site fans
Waiting for Christmas is tough, especially for children, but time passes quickly with the CAT Micro Advent Calender, and every day there´s a highlight to light up children´s faces with miniature-format reproductions of all the most commom construction site vehicles behind the doors. The Advent calendar reveals five different construction site vehicles with the well-known CAT livery at lenghts 6,6cm. Things never get boring as there are lots of accessories included to play with as you design your own construction site at home: Construction site accessories and signs, CAT stickers, a key ring and the well-known non-stick Motion Sand, guarantee tons of playtime fun.
CAT DieCast

item.NAME: Fleg Devil III remote control helicopter
item.DESCRIPTION:
Three-channel helicopter (flies up/down, forward/backward, rotation around its own axis) remote control with integrated GYROSCOPE, which helps to increase stability when flying.
Thanks to the GYROSCOPE, the helicopter can stay in position and it is easier and faster to learn to fly in the desired direction. The helicopter is charged via USB cable.
Possibility to fly multiple helicopters at the same time, in case of different frequency. Radio range 25-30m.
The helicopter is made of high quality material that increases the durability of the model, it glows during flight and has a coaxial arrangement of the rotors that increases stability.
Flight time: 10min Charge time: 50-60min
Package contents: 1x helicopter (3.7V 1100 mAh Li-Poly battery included) 1x radio (3x AAA batteries not included) 1x charger, propellers, USB cable
Three Channel Helicopter with Gyroscope Helicopter is suitable for flying at home and outdoors Frequency 2.4 GHz Recharging via USB cable Multiple models can be flown at once Suitable for children 14 years and older Highly durable material Balancing during flight Helicopter size 35 cm
Altitude hold function - helicopter stays in the air
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Three-channel remote control helicopter (flies up/down, forward/backward, rotation around its own axis) with integrated GYROSCOPE, which helps to increase stability when flying

item.NAME: GameSir Nova Lite Multiplat.controller Sp. Purple
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir Nova Lite is equipped with Hall Effect sticks to ensure long controller life. Say goodbye to lever drift. With analog triggers, 20Hz Turbo function and 2 motors in the grips, Nova Lite is committed to satisfying gamers' demands with a super affordable price and you also have the option to choose between Space Purple, Stellar White, Blush Pink, Gold Yellow, Mint Green, Sky Blue color combinations.
Key Features:
GameSir™ Hall Effect anti-drift levers, designed for accuracy and performance, even provide greater consistency and smoothness to maximize your performance with specially optimized algorithms. Three-mode connectivity: Enjoy unparalleled flexibility with three connectivity options - Bluetooth, Wireless Dongle and USB-C. Switch effortlessly between devices and enjoy a seamless gaming experience. Multi-platform compatibility: GameSir Nova Lite is compatible with PC, Steam, Switch, iOS and Android devices, providing the smoothest and most seamless gaming experience with less latency. Enjoy true cross-platform gaming with this versatile controller. Turbo function for faster response: Nova Lite features a 20Hz Turbo function with customizable buttons, including A/B/X/Y/LB/LT/RB/RT. Players can easily activate or deactivate the Turbo function by pressing the M button, providing a convenient way to enhance gameplay. Relax your fingers and fully immerse yourself in the gaming experience. Multi-function M button for convenient control:Use the multi-function M button to smoothly adjust various settings, from vibration intensity, ABXY layout to dead zone levers.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: GameSir Nova Lite Multiplatform controller PP
item.TECHSPECS: Supported Platforms: PC, Steam, Android, iOS, Switch Connectivity: Bluetooth, wireless dongle, wired Battery: 600mAh 6-Axis Gyroscope: No ABXY Buttons: Diaphragm Hall Effect Sticks: Yes Analog Triggers: Yes Rumble Motors: Yes, one motor in each grip Wireless Dongle: Yes Colour: Space Purple Product Size: 155*104*61mm

item.NAME: 71603 Rainbow Looping set GO
item.DESCRIPTION:
Extension for the looping section on a scale of 1:43 Compatible with DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! Action feature for the race track Package contents: 8 x looping parts with supports Ready for an exciting ride through the looping section?
Do you want to give your race track that extra kick? Then this extension set might be just right for you. The set contains 8 track parts, which together form two looping sections: One for each lane. The corresponding supports, which should stabilize the looping section, are already included in the set. So the action-packed ride can start right away. The difficulty with looping is to pass through it at the right speed. If you are too slow, you simply fall off the track at the highest point. So step on the accelerator before hitting the looping! The extension set comes on a scale of 1:43 and is therefore suitable for the race tracks Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!! Plus race tracks.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Extension for the looping section on a scale of 1:43

Product Description:
GameSir Nova offers an unrestricted gaming experience due to its cross-platform adaptability, making it the perfect cross-platform gaming controller for your Switch, PC, iOS, and Android devices. Experience immersive gameplay with personalized GameSir™ Hall Effect sticks, lighting effects, and dual controllers that conquer your games with style and precision. Nova also offers two color options for you: Retro White and Neon Teal.

1. Designed for the accuracy and performance of anti-drift sticks, GameSir™ Hall Effect anti-drift sticks even provide more consistency and smoothness to maximize your performance thanks to specially optimized algorithms. 2. 2 Stylish RGB Rings: Customize your gaming experience with personalized and diverse lighting effects that offer a spectrum of color and saturation. Customize the look of your controller to match the gaming atmosphere and immerse yourself in a unique and enhanced gaming experience. 3. Tri-Mode Connectivity: Enjoy unparalleled flexibility with three connectivity options – Bluetooth, Wireless Dongle and USB-C. Effortlessly switch between devices for a seamless gaming experience. 4. Enjoy true cross-platform gaming with this versatile controller. 5. Dual Different Motors: Dual drives in the handles for strong and gentle vibration. Experience real, accurate feedback of bumps, shots, and driving over bumpy surfaces. 6. Motion controls for immersive gameplay: Tilt, shake, or rotate the controller to immerse yourself in your favorite games with interactive motion controls 7. 2 Rear Programmable Buttons: Enhance your game with 2 rear macro buttons. Assign them to a single button or set of buttons, which even allows you to perform complex combined movements with ease. 8. Tactile yet dimmed buttons: The tactile buttons are specially tuned for quick and comfortable button presses. item.DESCRIPTION:
With our special XONE Gears of War 4 bundle, you get not only the game itself, but also a unique experience that puts you right in the middle of the action.
Gears of War 4 is an action game that takes you into a post-apocalyptic world full of danger and challenge. You become part of an elite team of warriors who must face the threat of ruthless enemies and protect humanity from extinction. With our XONE Gears of War 4 bundle, you'll have the chance to experience this epic story for yourself.
We'll include a paper card with a code to download the full version of the game. No waiting, no complications - just enter the code and get straight into the action.
Gears of War 4 offers:
Intense action gameplay with sophisticated graphics and realistic effects An immersive story that pulls you into a post-apocalyptic world The ability to play in co-op mode with friends or compete in multiplayer Exclusive content and bonuses only available with our XONE Gears of War 4 bundle Convenient download of the full game using the bundled code
Don't miss this unique opportunity to be part of the legendary world of Gears of War. Order your XONE Gears of War 4 today and get ready for an unforgettable adventure that will immerse you from the very first moment. Be ready to fight for the survival of humanity and prove that you are a true hero in a post-apocalyptic world!

item.NAME: HORI Force Feedback Truck Control System for PC
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get behind the wheel of your own large rig with the HORI Force Feedback Truck Control System for PC. With a full-size steering wheel created to match those you'll find on real trucks! The dual Force Feedback motor brings unparalleled realism to weight, wheel feel when cornering, and navigating a variety of road surfaces.
Other onboard controls include left and right sticks for controlling the headlights and brakes. Robust, metal pedals with non-contact magnetic sensors provide incredible precision and extreme durability. Enjoy the open road with HORI's Force Feedback Truck Control System!
Developed in cooperation with the Czech company SCS Software Includes a Steam download key for "Euro Truck Simulator 2" and "American Truck Simulator" Full-size 15.8 inch / 40 cm faux leather steering wheel with 1800 degree rotation In-game 34-key H-Pattern shifter with a button bar and integrated Shift Know buttons that allow the shift range divider to set high/low gear up to 18 gears A total of 103 controls including 2 analog sticks and a companion app for customizing the controls and different input sensitivities
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: HORI Force Feedback Truck Control System for PC windows 10/11

item.NAME: Carrera D124 23639 Super Showdown
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera D124 23639 Super Showdown, 8m, 358 x 189cm
Super Showdown: Ferrari vs Audi in the Ultimate GT3 Duel The Carrera DIGITAL 124 set "Super Showdown" brings thrilling GT3 racing straight into your living room. Two iconic machines take to the starting line: The Ferrari 296 GT3 "AF Corse, No.21" impresses with its powerful V6 hybrid engine and cutting-edge racing technology, while the Audi R8 LMS GT3 Evo II "Land Motorsport, No.23" wins fans over with its ferocious V10 engine and aerodynamic optimisation. Both vehicles feature realistic front and rear lights, as well as a brake light function, making the racing experience even more authentic. Thanks to the CONTROL UNIT and WIRELESS 2.0 hand controllers, racing fans enjoy maximum freedom of movement and precise control. Double switches and challenging corners create intense racing action and adrenaline rushes on the high-speed straights.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera D124 23639 Super Showdown, 8m, 358 x 189cm

item.NAME: LEGO® Friends 42626 Adventure Camp Water Sports
item.DESCRIPTION:
Liann, meanwhile, is enjoying a rest and painting a picture in the staging area. What other activities will you and your friends enjoy? You can have a nice meal or go fishing. But you have to watch out for the bear, he also likes to fish. An adventure camp with water sports offers so much. You definitely have to try all the activities. You can enjoy kayaking, fishing, raft building, frog throwing and table tennis. Of course, there are lots of great accessories too.
The LEGO® Friends sets are the best toys for younger children, encouraging exploration and interests with the help of the 5 girls of Heartlake.
LEGO® Friends provides a place for girly secrets, endless friendships and great fun in the town of Heartlake, entertaining all little girls. It's a world of endless opportunities to inspire free play.

item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Liann, Autumn and Zac like to attend a water sports camp. They get to try so many water activities there! Will you join them? Autumn and Zac put on their helmets and life jackets and get ready for an amazing kayak ride. What a ride!

item.NAME: GameSir Kaleid Flux Xbox Wired Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Key features:
1. GameSir™ Hall Effect Capture Sticks: With GameSir™ Hall Effect Capture Sticks, GameSir™ Kaleid Flux delivers reliable and durable stick performance for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One X|S, Windows 10/11 and Steam.
2. Precision-tuned analog Hall Effect triggers are designed to ensure consistent distance that always matches the same depth. Whether you're accelerating or braking while racing, you can count on the natural feel of how much depth you need to squeeze, thanks to the best-in-class consistent smoothness and precision these triggers offer.
3. Four different motors: A total of four drives for realistic and gentle vibrations. 2 in the handles and 2 in the triggers. Experience real, accurate feedback of landings, shots, and rolling over bumps.
4. Fully Software Customizable: GameSir Nexus software brings even more customization and fun to the Kaleid Flux controller. Create controller profiles by mapping buttons, fine-tuning sticks and triggers, configuring vibrations, lighting effects, and more. Experience exclusive impulse triggers for all games. Save up to 3 profiles and use any preference for each game. The software also allows you to update the firmware for your controller.
5. Quickly switch to "Hair trigger" mode: For FPS and action game players, there's even a quick switch to "Hair trigger" mode by holding down the M + LT / RT buttons for 2 seconds. Whether you need precise linear control or maximum responsiveness, the Kaleid Flux controller will give you the competitive edge you need.
6. Customize Your Gaming Experience: Show off your talents with the GameSir Kaleid Flux controller. It features 4 ultra-personalized lighting effects that perfectly tune the brightness to suit different gaming environments. Change at any time according to your mood and style.
7.Easier. Faster. Fire.: Easier operation with 2 macro rear buttons to map to a single button. Act faster with the optional turbo function for the main buttons.
8. Comfort. Control. Compete: Featuring a laser texture design on the grips and triggers, this controller ensures a secure hold on your palms during fast-paced actions. The textured surface not only provides all-day comfort, but also prevents sweating or slipping, so you'll be in control of the entire game.
9. Versatile: Works with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One X|S, Windows 10/11, and Steam, GameSir Kaleid Flux delivers the smoothest and most immersive gaming experience with less latency and no worries about battery drain.
Delivery includes:
GameSir-Kaleid Flux*1 3m USB-C Cable *1 Instruction Manual *1 Thank You Card/After-sales Service Card *1 GameSir sticker *1 Certificate *1 1 month free Xbox Game Pass Ultimate Card *1
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: GameSir Kaleid Flux is a backlit Xbox controller with advanced features, a transparent body, and customizable lighting effects.
item.TECHSPECS: Supported platforms: Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, Windows 10/11, and Steam Connection: Wired, 3m detachable USB-C cable 3.5mm audio jack: Yes Microphone mute function: Yes Hall effect levers: Yes, magnetic Hall effect sensors Analog triggers: Yes, magnetic Hall effect sensors Rumble Motors: Yes, 4 in total, one in each grip and trigger ABXY Buttons: Diaphragm Rear buttons: Yes, 2 Customization Software: Yes, GameSir Nexus Battery: No Product Size: 156*107*60mm/6.14*4.21*2.36 in Net Weight: 213 g / 0.47 lb Package Size: 160 * 118 * 84mm / 6.30 * 4.65 * 3.31 inch Gross Weight: 393 g / 0.87 lb Carton size (30pcs/carton): 505*442*265mm/19.88*17.40*10.43 inch Carton weight (30pcs/carton): 14.73kg/32.47lbs

item.DESCRIPTION:
Paisley brushes Juno's dog while Nova washes Pickle. See the bubbles on his snout? Once you've bathed the dogs, load the equipment into the mobile salon and head to the next customer. You can look forward to a buildable vehicle with a dog salon, a swimming pool and lots of accessories like shampoo, a brush, a fire hydrant and more. You're in for a great time.
LEGO® Friends building sets are the best toys for younger children, encouraging exploration and interests with the help of 5 girls from the town of Heartlake.

item.NAME: LEGO® City 60422 Seaside Harbor with Cargo Ship
item.DESCRIPTION:
A seafood restaurant awaits you in the town. You'll definitely enjoy the crab specialty. Afterwards, have an ice cream as a reward and relax on the beach. Watch the fishermen trying to catch a catch or the paddleboard enthusiasts. The harbour town is perfect for both technology and hiking enthusiasts. A boat arrives in the harbour and waits to unload. Use the crane to take out all the containers and relax after work.
The LEGO® City series sets are inspired by city life, offering realistic replicas and machines along with fun characters that inspire imaginative play. Kids can explore their favourite land, air and sea vehicles and develop physical skills and confidence as they build and play.

a kit for all creative children is inspired by real life high quality material and precision of individual pieces building with parts trains patience, by building children develop fine motor skills develops creativity and encourages imagination LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards

item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: The LEGO® harbour town will thrill technology and tourism enthusiasts alike. It offers a crane, a restaurant and a beach. Once you've unloaded the containers from the ship using the crane, head out to explore the town. Grab a bite to eat and relax under an umbrella.

item.NAME: LEGO Star Wars 75375 Millenium Falcon
item.DESCRIPTION:
The world's most famous spaceship will make you happy not only during building and playing, but also at the exhibition. Thanks to the special base, it can be placed at a dynamic angle as if in flight. Every Star Wars fan must have this impressive piece at home. The LEGO® Star Wars™ line is celebrating 25 years! Celebrate this anniversary by building the legendary Millennium Falcon as you remember it from Star Wars: A New Hope. The spaceship is equipped with a cockpit, satellite dish and cannons and will impress with its detailed craftsmanship.
LEGO® Star Wars™ is great fun for young and old fans of this immortal saga. In no time at all, you'll be transported to the legendary world of Star Wars, where you can fight against the Dark Side of the Force. A lot of action and adventure awaits you!
Open the gates to a galaxy full of creative adventures for your kids. Fans will love the authentic elements that encourage creative play.
The LEGO® Group has been making replicas of iconic battleships, vehicles, locations and characters from the Star Wars™ world since 1999. This line, featuring a wide variety of fun building sets, will amaze fans of all ages.
Features:
A kit designed for all Star Wars fans loads of action and adventure great fun for kids and adults high quality material and precision of each piece building with pieces trains patience, by building children develop fine motor skills LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards
Package contents:
Millenium Falcon build kits base with information label instruction manual
Material: plastic
Age: 18+
Number of pieces: 921pcs
Dimensions: 13 x 24 x 19 cm
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Celebrate the 25th anniversary of LEGO® Star Wars™ by building this epic spaceship you know from Star Wars: A New Hope. The awesome Millennium Falcon can be displayed on a special pedestal, and at a dynamic angle just like in flight.

item.NAME: LEGO® Harry Potter™ 76439 Ollivanders™ & Madam Malkin's Robes
item.DESCRIPTION:
Need to replenish your magic equipment? There's nothing easier than going shopping on the famous Cross Street, where you can find everything. Both Ollivander's shop and Madame Malkin's shop can be linked or combined with other models from the LEGO Harry Potter Cross Street range. Ollivander's shop is where you can get the best wand. The selection is really wide. Madame Malkin can help you with the cloak, hat and other accessories. You'll also meet other students, Harry Potter and Padma Patil.
Little witches and wizards will love reenacting classic scenes from the Harry Potter film series and making up their own magical adventures. If you're looking for a special gift, then LEGO® Harry Potter™ sets are the right choice. Because they capture memorable scenes from the films through favourite characters and creatures, they'll transport your kids to a world of magic. With LEGO® Harry Potter™ you can cast spells, fly on a broomstick or prepare a variety of magical potions.
LEGO® Harry Potter™ is inspired by the series of books and films about the young wizard Harry Potter. Let yourself be drawn into the mysterious world of witchcraft and magic and help Harry and his friends fight their enemies.
Features:
Inspired by the Harry Potter series of books and films. a world full of action and adventure bringing the thrilling action from the film series to real life! Favourite characters and creatures, cool locations and fabulous features and accessories open the gateway to the magical world of Harry Potter for children develops creativity and encourages imagination a book for all creative children building with pieces trains patience, by building children develop fine motor skills
LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards, high quality materials and precision of individual pieces
ObsPackaging:
Bones to build the model of Ollivander's shop and Madame Malkin's shop 6 minifigures: Harry Potter, Garrick Ollivander, Madame Malkin, Padma Patil, a student of magic and a witch accessories instructions
Material: plastic
Age: 8+
Dimensions: 19 x 12 x 11 cm
Number of pieces: 744pcs
Country of origin: EU
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Go shopping in the famous Cross Street and get all the necessary magical accessories. You'll be accompanied by other students. Ollivander's shop offers boxes of wands, and Madame Malkin's shop has a variety of cloaks and hats.

item.NAME: LEGO® Friends 42603 Stargazing Camping Vehicle
item.DESCRIPTION:
After you and Nova and Aliyah have seen all the constellations that are currently visible in the night sky, get into the tent on the roof of the car. Tonight is really beautiful! You can enjoy a 4×4 vehicle with a camper and self-folding tent, a collapsible telescope, and lots of extras like cups, cookies, dog treats, binoculars, flashlight, tablet, and pictures of planets and stars. You're in for a great time.

Nova and Aliya take to the field in their 4×4. They're looking for the perfect place to stargaze. Join them. They've brought along Nova's dog Pickle. They use a telescope to identify the constellations while enjoying some biscuits.

item.NAME: LEGO® City 60419 Police Prison Island
item.DESCRIPTION:
Take to the control tower to watch all the action and follow the police helicopter. It seems this prison is not as safe as thought. Do you hear that sound? Is that digging? The prison on the cliff offers a range of features and functions. There is a control room, a lobby, a rest room for officers, a yard with a secret escape hatch, a dog kennel, cells with beds and an escape tunnel that leads to an abandoned mine. In addition, the laundry room contains tools for prisoner escape.
The LEGO® City series sets are inspired by city life, offering realistic replicas and machines along with fun characters that inspire imaginative play. Kids can explore their favourite land, air and sea vehicles and develop physical skills and confidence as they build and play.

item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Tensions run high on Prison Island as LEGO City's most wanted criminals plan one of the biggest escapes in history. New inmates arrive on a police speedboat, while other prisoners boldly go about their escape plans.

item.NAME: LEGO® Star Wars™ 75372 Clone Trooper™ & Battle
item.DESCRIPTION:
Target super battle droids from a defensive position and grab shields that let you fight up close. Who will win the battle of the Clone Wars in the end? That will be up to you and you alone. You can look forward to a speeder bike with ejectors for 2 clone troopers and a buildable STAP speeder vehicle designed for a battle droid. There is also a tri-droid with 3 ejectors and a defensive station with ejector. Great action and fun awaits you!
LEGO® Star Wars™ is great fun for young and old fans of this immortal saga. In no time at all, you'll be transported to the legendary world of Star Wars, where you can fight against the Dark Side of the Force. A lot of action and adventure awaits you!

item.DESCRIPTION:
You can also look forward to a stereo and a cube in the form of a book to encourage you to recite the alphabet and read the letters. Make up a creative story using the letters. You'll learn so much! For example, recognise letters and colours, improve your speaking and practise your fine motor skills. Plus, you'll have lots of fun!
LEGO® DUPLO ® is an endless source of creative fun for all young children from 1.5 to 3 years old. The bricks are specially designed to fit perfectly in little hands and to be absolutely safe at the same time, so they are easy to grasp, place and reassemble without limiting their creativity. The set can easily be combined with other LEGO® DUPLO® sets for even more creative fun.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch Lite Hyrule Edition + 12M NSO + EP
item.DESCRIPTION:
Nintendo Switch Lite Hyrule Edition: Your Gateway to the Legendary World of Zelda!
This special edition of The Legend of Zelda-style Nintendo Switch Lite will be released on September 26th!
Enjoy access to a range of classics from The Legend of Zelda series with a one-year individual subscription to the Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack.
Get ready for an epic adventure that fits in your pocket!
Introducing the Nintendo Switch Lite Hyrule Edition - a limited edition that will turn your gaming experience into a legend. Inspired by the iconic The Legend of Zelda series, this exclusive console isn't just a gaming device. It's the key to endless adventures that you can always have with you.
Why is the Nintendo Switch Lite Hyrule Edition an irresistible choice?
Exclusive Design: Immerse yourself in the world of Zelda with a unique console look that pays homage to the legendary series. Portability: The compact size allows you to play anywhere, anytime - at home, on the go, in the park, or during a break from work. Performance in a small package: Experience a full-fledged gaming experience without compromise, despite its smaller size. Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack Annual Subscription: Get access to a vast library of classic Zelda games and many other titles. Join a community of millions of players around the world.
Don't hesitate - this legendary edition will be available from September 26th!
The number of pieces is limited. Secure your piece of history and become part of the legend today. Order your Nintendo Switch Lite Hyrule Edition and get ready for life-changing adventures!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch Lite Console

item.NAME: SWITCH Donkey Kong Country Returns HD
item.DESCRIPTION:
Stomp, bash, and barrel roll through Donkey Kong Island in this 2D platforming adventure
Help Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong reclaim their precious banana hoard from the villainous Tiki Tak tribe in Donkey Kong Country Returns HD for Nintendo Switch! Stomp enemies, blast through barrels, ride rockets and mine carts (and even rhino Rambi) across 80 levels in nine worlds.
Play the game as it was originally designed for Nintendo Wii, or lower the difficulty and gain extra hearts and other goodies to make your adventure a bit easier. The entire title has been graphically enhanced to HD for Nintendo Switch and includes additional levels from the Nintendo 3DS version!
Team up with a friend and play through the entire game as Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong.
Pass a Joy-Con controller to a friend and take on the Tiki Tak tribe as Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong in local two-player co-op. Blast enemies with Diddy's Peanut Popgun, hover with his Barrel Jet, or slam baddies to the ground with DK's Ground Pound (or barrel roll over them). Work together and reclaim bananas by the bunch!
Donkey Kong Country Returns HD lands on Nintendo Switch on January 16, 2025.
Multiplayer requires one compatible controller per player. Additional controllers (sold separately) may be required.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Mario & Luigi: Brothership
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get ready for an island adventure starring Mario and Luigi!
The brothers are back for a brand new adventure on the high seas! Join Mario and Luigi on the island of Shipshape, which is made up partly of boats, and travel the vast world of Concordia. Launch yourself from the cannon of the Shipshape and find your way through islands that range from tropical rainforests to bustling cities. There's plenty of exploring to be done!
On the way, you'll meet new friends like Connie and Snoutlet (who is definitely not a pig) as well as familiar faces from the Mushroom Kingdom - Peach and Bowser. They will all help you on your journey!
To succeed, you'll have to rely on Mario and Luigi's brotherly bond. Use the powerful so-called Bros. Attacks in dynamic turn-based battles. You'll need every advantage this "brotherhood" provides to save the day!
Mario Bros. will show up on Nintendo Switch on November 7 in Mario & Luigi: Brotherhood.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Super Mario Party Jamboree
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enjoy the latest Mario Party jamboree style featuring seven board games and over 110 mini-games!
Get ready for the biggest Super Mario Party yet in Super Mario Party Jamboree for Nintendo Switch. This jamboree is packed with over 110 minigames - from running to carousels to motion-controlled miniature golf, enjoy the most minigames in Mario Party history!
With seven board games in total, you'll go downstream in Goomba Lagoon, search for stars in Rainbow Galleria, or revisit classics familiar from past installments like Western Land and Mario's Rainbow Castle.
Participate in Koopathlon, an online rivalry that will offer up to 20 players competing for the first time ever. Collect the highest scores in mini-games like the fast lane change. The higher your score in each round, the faster you'll reach the finish line. Koopathlon is just one of several add-on modes - every Mario Party player will find their favourite!
Super Mario Party Jamboree will release on Nintendo Switch on October 17, 2024.
Movement-controlled minigames require Joy-Con controllers and are not available for online play. Motion-controlled minigames are also not available for the Nintendo Switch Lite console or the Pro Controller, but minigames using button controls can still be played with this console and this accessory.
Multiplayer requires one compatible controller for each player. Additional controllers (sold separately) may be required.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH The Legend of Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom
item.DESCRIPTION:
Use the wisdom of Princess Zelda to save the kingdom of Hyrule in The Legend of Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom for Nintendo Switch.
The inhabitants of Hyrule are carried away by the strange rifts that have appeared, and since a swordsman is among the missing, he lies on Princess Zelda to save her kingdom.
Team up with the mysterious Fairy Tri and learn how to use the power of her staff to create echoes or imitations of things you find around you. You can then create these echoes whenever you want to solve puzzles and defeat opponents.
Create echoes as blocks of water to reach high ground, build bridges out of old beds, throw rocks at enemies, or try to find your own creative combination of echoes and do things your way. You can even create echoes of monsters that will fight side by side with you!
The Legend of Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom arrives on Nintendo Switch on September 26, 2024.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: PS5/PS4/PC RWA: Racing Wheel Apex Wireless
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI brings top-quality construction, customization options, and authentic racing simulation with the APEX wireless racing wheel. This wheel offers all the features and quality of a full-fledged racing wheel at an affordable price.
With a massive 270-degree rotation range, fully programmable functions, and compatibility with PS5, PS4, and PC, this wheel is the perfect choice for all racing enthusiasts. It securely attaches to your desk or racing wheel stand using robust clamps.
Wireless wheel operation with a range of up to 10 m and battery life of up to 10 hours (may vary depending on conditions) Charging time: approx. 3 hours Pedals are connected to the wheel via cable Adjustable steering sensitivity and dead zone Programmable buttons and multifunctional D-pad Companion app with custom settings Compatible with PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Windows 11/10 PC Compatible with HORI 7-Speed Racing Shifter for PC, which connects directly to PC via USB Option to switch between 270° and 180° rotation angle while driving Durable full-size pedals Package includes a 2m USB charging cable and USB-A dongle for wireless connection Officially licensed by Sony Dimensions: 325 x 295 x 295 mm Weight: 3.26 kg
This racing wheel offers the perfect combination of quality, functionality, and price. With wireless wheel connectivity, cable-connected pedals, and adjustable sensitivity, it's the ideal choice for anyone who wants to experience a real driving feel in their favorite racing games. Compatibility with the HORI 7-Speed Racing Shifter for PC adds another level of realism. With an official Sony license, you're assured of quality and compatibility.
Don't hesitate and pre-order your HORI Wireless Racing Wheel APEX today! Be ready for unforgettable racing experiences with this top-notch wheel. Put on your racing gloves and get ready for the start - we expect the product on November 29, 2024.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: APEX wireless racing wheel

item.NAME: PC HORI Fighting Commander OCTA SF 6 Cammy Ed.
item.DESCRIPTION: Wired tournament fighting controller for fighting games and other games on Windows 10/11 with Street Fighter 6 Cammy skin High-quality components for precision and durability; including microswitch buttons Six-button layout; precision D-Pad; Analog slide pad for in-game navigation Left short-throw analog stick with 8-way gate to increase accuracy and execution speed Officially licensed by Capcom
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Wired controller for Windows PC designed specifically for fighting games

item.NAME: GameSir G8+ Galileo Bluetooth Mobile Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Key features:
1. Console controller stage: Console-sized sticks and buttons for exceptional comfort
Enhance your mobile gaming experience with console-sized GameSir G8 Galileo sticks and buttons that provide unparalleled comfort for extended gaming sessions. It's like having a console controller in the palm of your hand, offering unparalleled control of every game you play. Whether you're navigating treacherous terrain or capturing precise shots, the G8 Galileo will ensure professional precision and maximum comfort.
2. Accurate and Durable: Elevate Your Game with GameSir™ Hall Technology
GameSir Hall-effect pickup levers provide 360° seamless precision control, offering the precision and durability that mobile gamers demand. You can get an enhanced gaming experience in a variety of games. Anti-friction slip rings provide super-smooth lever control, reducing wear and extending service life. Precision-tuned analog triggers with Hall effect technology offer unparalleled fluidity and responsiveness, giving you a competitive edge in any game. For FPS and action gamers, there's even a quick switch to Hair Trigger mode by holding down the M+LT/RT buttons. Whether you need precise linear control or maximum response, the G8 driver will give you the competitive edge you need.
3. Universal compatibility: Extendable controller and ample space on the back
Purposely designed for universal compatibility, the GameSir G8+ features a retractable bridge and enough rear space to be compatible with a wide range of phone models ranging in length from 110-215 mm / 4.33-8.46 inches. This controller stands out for being ultimately compatible with Switch and tablets, allowing you to play on all the devices you desire.
4. Replaceable magnetic components
Upgrade your GameSir G8+ to match your unique style with interchangeable components - magnetic bezel, lever caps and front button covers. By changing components, gamers can customize their preferred and favorite gameplay style, including joysticks with different heights, changing the layout of the front buttons, and customizing the appearance of the controller.
5. Realistic vibration: asymmetric motors
The G8+ controller features dual motors that provide both powerful and subtle vibrations, improving tactile feedback for an immersive gaming experience. With asymmetrical motors in the triggers, gamers can feel the precise feedback of shots and impacts, bringing realism to every moment.
6. Motion control: Built-in 6-axis gyroscope
The G8+ controller, which supports gyroscope function in Switch devices, allows one-touch wake-up and offers high compatibility with Switch. Enjoy improved motion-sensing controls that make gameplay more accurate and immersive.
7. Button Design: E-sport level providing comfortable haptic feedback
With membrane buttons with adjustable layout and customizable values, the G8+ Galileo allows gamers to customize control settings to suit their preferences. Equipped with a touch switch, D-pad, and LB and RB buttons, the controller provides a tactile yet muted feel that ensures every press is clear and responsive. The G8+ Galileo Wireless Controller also supports the Turbo function and includes two macro buttons on the back with a remapping function.
8. Express your individuality: laser-etched textured handles and buttons made of high-density fluorescent ink
Our laser-etched textured handles ensure a secure and comfortable grip, while the high-density fluorescent ink buttons add a vibrant, engaging touch to your gaming experience. It's not just about gaming; It's about expressing yourself and being different.
9. Software Customization: Customize the controller to your needs
By downloading the GameSir app, gamers can perform firmware updates, adjust stick and trigger dead zones, adjust vibration intensity, and test buttons, among other things. Some features can also be accessed using hot-key combinations, ensuring seamless editing.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Versatile gamepad for mobile gaming, Switch and computers
item.TECHSPECS:
Compatible Platforms: Switch, iOS, Android, tablet, and PC
Connectivity: Bluetooth for mobile devices, Wired and Wireless Dongle for PC
Length of compatible devices: 110-215mm / 4.33-8.46in
Battery: 1000mAh in total. 500mAh on each side
Hall Effect Levers: Yes, GameSir™
Analog Triggers: Yes, Hall Effect Magnetic Sensors

item.NAME: GameSir G7-SE Wired Controller for XBOX & PC Blue
item.DESCRIPTION: Anti-Drift Hall-Effect Sticks: Using non-contact magnetic sensors to ensure that the sticks never wear out during their lifetime, the GameSir G7 SE prevents stick drift and ensures reliable and durable stick performance for Xbox and PC gaming. Precision-tuned Hall-effect analog triggers: With precision-tuned Hall-effect triggers for a consistent and smooth pull, prepare for the race with confidence and enjoy a seamless gaming experience like never before. 2 Rear Quick Latch Buttons: Toggle the quick latches to enable or disable the rear buttons. Seamlessly adapt your playstyle across different games. Magnetic replaceable front cover: Make gaming more meaningful. A paintwork-friendly magnetic front cover allows you to easily customize and change the look of G7 SE for an even more engaging experience. Fully software customizable: Fully customize your gaming experience with GameSir Nexus software. Map buttons, improve the diagonal of the D-pad, adjust stick and trigger zones, configure vibrations, etc. Experience exclusive impulse triggers for all games. Quickly switch profiles on the fly: Quickly switch profiles on the fly for different games with simple button combinations. Versatile: GameSir G7 SE works with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, and Windows 10/11 to deliver the smoothest, most immersive gaming experience with less latency and no worries about running out of battery.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: special. Safe. Peak. Special magnetic front cover, which is gentle on painting. Secure quick latches. Excellent anti-drift levers with Hall effect. All on the special GameSir G7 SE – for the first time, Hall Effect sticks are brought to the Xbox controller

item.NAME: GameSir Nova Lite Multiplat.controller Blush Pink
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir Nova Lite is equipped with Hall Effect sticks to ensure long controller life. Say goodbye to lever drift. With analog triggers, 20Hz Turbo function and 2 motors in the grips, Nova Lite is committed to satisfying gamers' demands with a super affordable price and you also have the option to choose between Space Purple, Stellar White, Blush Pink, Gold Yellow, Mint Green, Sky Blue color combinations.
Key Features:
GameSir™ Hall Effect anti-drift levers, designed for accuracy and performance, even provide greater consistency and smoothness to maximize your performance with specially optimized algorithms. Three-mode connectivity: Enjoy unparalleled flexibility with three connectivity options - Bluetooth, Wireless Dongle and USB-C. Switch effortlessly between devices and enjoy a seamless gaming experience. Multi-platform compatibility: GameSir Nova Lite is compatible with PC, Steam, Switch, iOS and Android devices, providing the smoothest and most seamless gaming experience with less latency. Enjoy true cross-platform gaming with this versatile controller. Turbo function for faster response: Nova Lite features a 20Hz Turbo function with customizable buttons, including A/B/X/Y/LB/LT/RB/RT. Players can easily activate or deactivate the Turbo function by pressing the M button, providing a convenient way to enhance gameplay. Relax your fingers and fully immerse yourself in the gaming experience. Multi-function M button for convenient control:Use the multi-function M button to smoothly adjust various settings, from vibration intensity, ABXY layout to dead zone levers.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Versatile game controller with Hall Effect anti-drift levers
item.TECHSPECS: Platforms supported: PC, Steam, Android, iOS, Switch Connectivity: Bluetooth, wireless dongle, wired Battery: 600mAh 6-axis gyroscope: No ABXY Buttons: Membrane Hall effect sticks: Yes Analog triggers: Yes Rumble Motors: Yes, one motor in each grip Wireless dongle: Yes Color: Light Coral Product size: 155*104*61mm

item.NAME: GameSir X2s Bluetooth Mobile Gaming Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience gaming freedom with the GameSir X2s Bluetooth controller! Its wireless connection ensures that the orientation of your device will not be limited by the location of the port. With advanced sticks and triggers with Hall Effect technology, this controller guarantees maximum precision and precision, preventing stick drift and extending the life of the buttons. Immerse yourself in AAA games anytime, anywhere and enjoy a console-like gaming experience with GameSir X2s Bluetooth.
Key features:
1. Multi-platform compatibility: Works with iOS phones, Android, and PCs
GameSir X2s Bluetooth is designed to work seamlessly with iPhone, Android devices, and PCs, ensuring universal compatibility across a wide range of devices. Improved compatibility with camera modules allows it to be used with phones from 110 mm to 168 mm in length, with no width limitations.
2. Accurate and Durable: Elevate Your Game with GameSir™ Hall Technology
GameSir Hall effect pickup sticks provide 360° seamless precision control with the precision and durability mobile gamers demand. Get an enhanced gaming experience in a variety of games. Anti-friction slip rings provide super-smooth lever control, reducing wear and extending service life. Precision-tuned analog triggers with Hall effect technology offer unparalleled fluidity and response, giving you an edge in any game. For FPS and action gamers, there is a quick switch to Hair Trigger mode by holding down the M+LT/RT buttons.
3. Exclusive Turbo Feature: Leave no room for opponents to escape
The X2s Bluetooth allows you to easily activate the Turbo function for faster firing without latency. To make the adjustment, press the Capture + A/B/X/Y/LB/RB/LT/RT buttons. The front buttons and D-pad utilise a tactile switch and silicone design for a tactile yet subdued feel.
4. Take Screenshots: Share Your Achievements with the World
Easily share your winning gaming moments with the X2s' simple Bluetooth capture function, which lets you take screenshots in PC and Android mode at the touch of a button.
5. Fully customizable software: GameSir app enhances the GameSir X2s Bluetooth controller
(*Exclusive Android Support) The GameSir app takes the customization and entertainment of the GameSir X2s Bluetooth controller to a new level. Create personalized controller profiles by setting stick and trigger dead zones, changing A/B, X/Y layouts, and switching between analog or Hair mode. You can even easily set the dead zone to 0 via the GameSir app.
6. Comfortable Design: Ergonomic shape for comfort and aesthetics
The X2s Bluetooth features a rubberized design on the back of the handles, providing an exclusive soft and comfortable feel. The two-tone design is not only inspired by the Nintendo 2DS, but also satisfies your unique aesthetic requirements.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Compact Bluetooth controller for iOS, Android and PC
item.TECHSPECS: Compatible Platform: iOS, Android phones and PC connection: Bluetooth Hall effect levers: Yes Triggers with Hall effect: Yes Face buttons: Tactile Switch D-pad: Touch switch battery: Yes, 500mAh Compatible phone length: Length between 110-168 mm / 4.3-4.6 inch Product size: 177.9 * 84.36 * 37.53 mm / 7.00 * 3.32 * 1.48 inch Product Net Weight: 167 g / 0.37 lbs Package Size: 190 * 89 * 43mm / 7.48 * 3.50 * 1.69 inch Package Gross Weight: 233 g / 0.51 lbs

item.NAME: SWITCH REYNATIS - Deluxe Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
REYNATIS is a brand new action RPG set in the meticulously reconstructed streets of Tokyo's Shibuya district. In a world where fantasy meets reality, the people of Shibuya fear magic and the power it holds, forcing wizards to hide their inhuman abilities or face oppression.
Freedom vs. Order:(Freedom vs. Order) Wizard Marin and Officer Sari stand on opposite sides of a conflict that will shake the world to its core. Experience a gripping story that explores oppression, clashing ideals, and the price of freedom. City of Secrets: Walk the streets of Shibuya and choose to stay hidden and talk to civilians, shop and accept assignments, or reveal your true self and master your inhuman abilities. Your journey will also take you to the alternate world of Another, a fantasy land full of wild monsters and secrets waiting to be discovered. Might & Magic: Switch freely between evasive maneuvers in Suppressed mode and using magic to deal explosive damage in Liberated mode. Each of the 6 different playable characters has its own unique abilities, from summoning to aerial attacks.
Deluxe Edition includes:
- REYNATIS
- Digital Soundtrack
- Mini Art Book
Dubbing option: Japanese - Language format (in game text): English
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action RPG for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: Filament ABS, brown, 5m
item.DESCRIPTION:
ABS filament, brown, 15m is a high-quality printing filament made of ABS polymer in brown color, ideal for 3D printing.
This printing filament is an excellent choice for producing first functional samples before mass production, visual and functional prototypes, tool manufacturing, and objects for everyday use. It excels in detail accuracy, matte surface, and high layer cohesion. Moreover, it's easy to process, allowing for post-print modifications of printed objects.
Material: ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) Color: Brown Filament length: 15 m Weight: 45 g Recommended printing temperature: 220-240 °C Recommended print bed temperature: 80-100 °C
This filament is suitable for a wide range of applications but is not intended for medical purposes. With this ABS filament, you'll achieve high-quality prints with smooth surfaces and excellent structural integrity.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Brown ABS filament 15m

item.NAME: Filament ABS, blue, 5m
item.DESCRIPTION:
ABS filament, blue, 5m is a high-quality printing filament made of ABS polymer in blue color, ideal for 3D printing.
This printing filament is an excellent choice for producing first functional samples before mass production, visual and functional prototypes, tool manufacturing, and objects for everyday use. It excels in detail accuracy, matte surface, and high layer cohesion. Moreover, it's easy to process, allowing for post-print modifications of printed objects.
Material: ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) Color: Blue Filament length: 5 m Weight: 15 g Recommended printing temperature: 220-240 °C Recommended print bed temperature: 80-100 °C
This filament is suitable for a wide range of applications but is not intended for medical purposes. With this ABS filament, you'll achieve high-quality prints with smooth surfaces and excellent structural integrity.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Blue ABS filament 5m

item.NAME: Filament PLA, skin, 5m
item.DESCRIPTION:
PLA filament, skin color, 15m is a high-quality printing filament made of PLA polymer in skin color, ideal for eco-friendly and detailed 3D printing.
This printing filament excels in easy processing on 3D printers, high print quality even with demanding details, and excellent layering of the printed object. PLA is made from natural raw materials and is biodegradable through composting, making it an eco-friendly choice for 3D printing.
Material: PLA (Polylactic Acid) Color: Skin Filament length: 15 m Weight: 45 g Recommended printing temperature: 190-210 °C Recommended print bed temperature: 60-65 °C
This filament is suitable for a wide range of applications, from prototyping to final products. With this PLA filament, you'll achieve high-quality prints with smooth surfaces and excellent detail accuracy, all while being environmentally conscious.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Skin-colored PLA filament 15m for eco-friendly 3D printing

item.NAME: SWITCH Ys X: Nordics - Deluxe Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Embark on an adventure on the high seas full of action and exploration! Experience the dangers of Obelia Bay through the eyes of Adol Christin and his unexpected ally, the pirate Karja Balta, as they help save the bay's inhabitants from mysterious immortal monsters known as Griegr.
Two heroes, one story: Young adventurer Adol and Norman pirate Karja must work together to determine the fate of Obelia Bay and its inhabitants, bound by unexpected circumstances. Cross Action System: Switch between controlling Adol and Karja independently or together. Combine their unique strengths to overcome enemies and build up your vengeance gauge to unleash devastating attacks. Power of Mana: Utilize unique Mana abilities to overcome challenges. Grapple and glide through dungeons, destroy obstacles, create new platforms, and uncover treasures and critical points. Sailor's Delight: The sailboat known as Sandras will take your exploration to a new level. Ocean travel, naval battles, and discovering uncharted islands are all possible with this seaworthy vessel.
Deluxe Edition includes:
Xs X: Nordics game Digital soundtrack Mini Art-book
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Another installment from the successful YS series
item.TECHSPECS: Voice-over options: English and Japanese - Language format (in-game text): English and French

item.NAME: GameSir G7 HE Wired Controller for XBOX & PC Black
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get the Xbox gaming advantage that the GameSir G7 HE brings. With Hall Effect levers and triggers, this controller delivers exceptional durability and precise control. The front E-Sport buttons with micro switches provide comfort and satisfying feedback that makes every press different and clear. Experience realistic and subtle vibrations with four Rumble motors that let you feel every bump and dive deep into your game. Two color options, white and black, are also available.
Key Features:
Universal Compatibility: Compatible with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One X|S, Windows 10/11 and Steam. G7 HE allows players to seamlessly switch between different platforms and games. GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks: GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks provide a durable lifespan of up to 5 million cycles, precise and responsive feedback, plus wear-resistant rings for drift-proof performance. Magnetic Hall Effect Triggers: Utilizing precision-tuned technology from the G7 HE driver, Hall Effect analog triggers provide consistent travel and depth. Whether you're accelerating or braking in racing games, these triggers provide reliable, smooth and precise control. For FPS and action games requiring responsive feedback, players can also switch the trigger mode to "Hair trigger" by holding down the M+LT/RT buttons for 2 seconds. Front buttons with 3 million press life: The front buttons feature a tactile but padded micro switch and can reach a lifetime of up to 3 million presses. Each stroke provides responsive and clickable feedback with a crisp e-sport feel that enhances gaming fun. Hyperrealistic Rumble Motors: Two distinct Rumble Motors in the grips for strong and subtle vibrations. Two asymmetrical motors inside the triggers bring feedback to your fingertips. Experience precise feedback on drops, shots and impacts. Magnetic interchangeable faceplate: Customize your unique Xbox controller and stand out instantly. The magnetic feature ensures the faceplate can be swapped out for another, enhancing the immersive gaming experience. The paintable front panel allows gamers to paint and customize the G7 HE without having to disassemble the controller. Enjoy expressing yourself through customization. 3.5mm headphone jack and microphone mute button: The 3.5mm audio jack makes it easy to connect a headset for immersive sound and clear communication. Independent mute button provides instant microphone muting for privacy and convenience during online interactions. 2 Adjustable Rear Buttons: Widely support remapping functionality for nearly every button on the controller, adding additional control options to your gaming experience.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: GameSir G7 HE for Xbox offers precise control with Hall Effect technology, E-sport buttons, realistic vibrations and universal compatibility for the ultimate gaming experience.
item.TECHSPECS: Supported platforms: Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One X|S, Steam and Windows 10/11 Connectivity: wired, 3m detachable USB-C cable 3.5mm audio jack: Yes Microphone Mute Button: Yes Yes, ABXY Analog triggers: yes, magnetic sensors with Hall effect Hall effect levers: Yes, GameSir™ Rumble Motors: Yes, 4 total, in each handle and trigger Rear Buttons: Yes, 2 remappable rear buttons Customization Software: Yes, GameSir Nexus Battery: No Color: Black

item.NAME: Boffin Board Game
item.DESCRIPTION:
Boffin Board Game
The Boffin electronic kit introduces the Board Game, an exciting and fun challenge for 1-4 players. The duration of one game ranges between 10-25 minutes, and your goal is singular – to assemble a functional electrical circuit so that you are the first to light up your light and celebrate victory!
Game Play:
At the beginning, each player chooses the color of the light they will try to illuminate. Then, you draw your first task card and start building a path from Boffin components towards the batteries. The game gives you freedom in strategy – you can play offensively and focus on completing your circuit as quickly as possible, or choose a defensive tactic and hinder your opponents a little (or a lot!). Cleverly use special cards that allow you to, for example, skip a player's turn, move already placed Boffin parts, and other tactical maneuvers. Remember, the winner lights up first!
Package Contents:
Main game board Necessary Boffin components for the game Playing cards with instructions and tasks Detailed manual with component placement and game rules
Advantages:
Combinability: Components can be combined with all Boffin I, II, III, IV kits, expanding the possibilities of play and creativity. Clarity: Color coding of components ensures easy orientation and quick assembly. Simplicity: The intuitive system allows for easy assembly and disassembly of projects. Strategy and Fun: The game promotes logical thinking, strategic planning, and offers great fun for the whole family or friends.
Additional Information:
Required batteries: 2x AA (not included in the package) Suitable for children from 8 years old
Get ready for exciting duels to see who can light up their light the fastest, and enjoy the unique combination of an electronic construction kit and a strategic board game!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Strategic Boffin Board Game for 1-4 players, where the first one to successfully light up the light wins!

item.NAME: PS5/PS4/PS3 Fighting Stick Mini
item.DESCRIPTION:
Huge fun in a compact and convenient package! The HORI Fighting Stick Mini for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4 features a full 8-button layout and a proper microswitch activated joystick, yet is small enough to be easily stored and transported (product is approximately 8" x 6"). Despite its small size, the Fighting Stick Mini is surprisingly comfortable with plenty of room to rest your wrists and the rubberized feet firmly grip smooth surfaces for stability. Perfect for fighting games, arcade games and much more! (Does not include touch pad). Officially licensed by Sony.
Officially licensed by Sony Compact and practical, ideal as a controller for beginners Compatible with PS5/PS4 and Windows PC Microswitch-activated lever and classic 8-button layout Cable connection for better response (3 m)
