item.NAME: Spare propellers A for plane B-17 (GF7204)
item.DESCRIPTION:
These replacement propellers are specially designed for the B-17 remote control model (GF7204) to ensure optimal performance and stability of your model during flight.
Perfect compatibility with the B-17 (GF7204) Made of lightweight material Optimized for maximum efficiency and flight stability Reduces vibration for smoother flight Easy to install and replace, allowing you to get back to flying quickly
Propellers are a key part of any RC aircraft. They affect not only the performance and speed, but also the stability and maneuverability of the model.
To extend the life of propellers we recommend:
Check that the propellers are properly attached before each flight Always check the propellers for damage after impact or landing Avoid extreme temperatures Check their condition regularly and replace them immediately if damaged
With these replacement propellers, you'll ensure your B-17 is always ready to fly at optimum performance. Whether you need replacements for worn propellers or want to have a supply for unexpected situations, these propellers are a must-have for every B-17 (GF7204) owner.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Spare propellers A for B-17 (GF7204)

item.NAME: GameSir Tarantula PRO Bundle ed.
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir Tarantula Pro: The revolutionary game controller for demanding gamers
GameSir Tarantula Pro reacts with lightning speed, just like a tarantula hunting its prey. With innovative design and advanced features, this controller is ready to take your gaming experience to a whole new level.
Innovative design and technology
Extra buttons on the front arranged in three lines RGB light strip and coloured front buttons for a distinctive look New Mag-ResTM TMR Sticks combining the benefits of a potentiometer and Hall effect
Versatile connectivity and compatibility
Three connection modes: Bluetooth, 2.4GHz wireless and wired Compatibility with Switch, PC, iOS, Android and Steam Smooth gaming experience with minimal latency across platforms
Precise controls for professional performance
GameSir Mag-ResTM TMR sticks for precise performance and low power consumption Hall Effect analogue triggers with quick switch to Hair Trigger mode HD Rumble for realistic haptic feedback
Advanced Features for Nintendo Switch
Built-in 6-axis gyroscope for precise motion control NFC function to work with Nintendo devices One-touch wake-up capability for Switch
Customisation for every player
9 mappable buttons for a personalized gaming style Adjustable RGB lighting including saturation, animation speed and colors Gear wheel mechanism to change the layout of the front buttons between different gaming platforms Back button latch for convenient control and prevention of unwanted input Ability to remap buttons on the fly using key combinations
These enhancements allow gamers to fully customize the controller to their gaming habits and preferences, ensuring an optimal gaming experience across platforms.
Software Support and Updates
GameSir Connect app for firmware updates Dead zone editing for levers and triggers Adjust vibration intensity and test buttons Access some functions using key combinations on the fly
GameSir Tarantula Pro is more than just a controller - it's a comprehensive gaming tool designed for maximum performance, comfort and customizability. Whether you're a casual gamer or a seasoned pro, this controller gives you the precision, responsiveness and style you need to achieve gaming excellence. Get ready for a new era of gaming with the GameSir Tarantula Pro!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game controller for PC, Switch, iOS and Android.
item.TECHSPECS:
Technical Specifications:
Compatibility: PC, Switch, iOS, Android and Steam Connectivity: Wired, Bluetooth, 2.4GHz wireless dongle Battery: 1200mAh Wands: GameSir Mag-ResTM TMR sticks Triggers: Hall effect with microswitch capability 6-axis gyroscope: Yes Motors: HD Rumble for realistic feedback ABXY Buttons: Membrane Back buttons: Yes, 2 programmable buttons Mappable buttons: 9 buttons in total RGB lighting: Yes, customizable NFC function: yes, for Nintendo devices Customization Software: Yes, GameSir Connect app Firmware update option: Yes
Package includes:
GameSir Tarantula Pro Controller x1 1m Type-C cable x1 Manual x1 Thank you card with after-sales service information x1 GameSir sticker x1 Certificate x1 Wireless receiver x1 Charging Station (Bundle Edition only) x1
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
Connection Instructions
Connecting to Windows
Cable connection
Use the included USB-C cable to connect the controller to your computer. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit continuously.
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 2, 3 and 4 start flashing, then release the buttons. Open the list of Bluetooth devices on your computer, find the device named "Wireless Controller" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is solid.
Connecting via receiver
Plug the receiver into the USB port of the device; the receiver indicator will flash. Press and hold the buttons on the remote for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 1, 2, 4 and 5 start flashing, then release the buttons and wait for the remote to connect to the receiver. Connection is successful when the indicators on both the controller and the receiver are lit continuously.
Connecting to Nintendo Switch
Bluetooth connection
From the Switch main menu, go to Controllers - Change grip/sequence and wait on this screen. Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the channel indicators start flashing horizontally, then release the buttons and wait for the connection. Connection is successful when the channel indicator lights up continuously.
Connecting to an Android device
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the channel 1 and 5 indicators start flashing, then release the button. Open the Bluetooth device list on your phone, find the device named "GameSir-Tarantula Pro" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit solid.
Connecting to an iOS device
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the buttons on the controller for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 2, 3 and 4 start flashing, then release the buttons. Open the Bluetooth device list on your phone, find the device named "DUOLSHOK 4 Wireless Controller" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit solid.
Note: You can change the color of the Home indicator in the phone settings: Settings - General - Game Controller.
* If the connection is not successful, press and hold the controller pairing button for 2 seconds to re-enter pairing mode.

item.NAME: GameSir Wireless Dongle Reciever for Nova
item.DESCRIPTION:
The GameSir Wireless Dongle Receiver for Nova is a specially designed wireless adapter for GameSir's Nova series controllers. This dongle complements the three-mode connectivity of Nova controllers, which includes Bluetooth, wired USB-C connection, and this wireless adapter. With the Nova Dongle, you'll get wireless connectivity for easy, smooth, and carefree use of your gaming devices across various platforms.
Experience seamless connectivity and reliable performance with this wireless adapter that will take your gaming experience to a new level. The dongle supports low latency, which is ideal for utilizing the advanced features of the Nova controller, such as Hall Effect anti-drift joysticks, analog triggers, and Turbo function. It's compatible with PC, Steam, Switch, and other devices, allowing you to flexibly switch between different gaming systems.
Add this adapter to your tech accessory kit to ensure you're prepared for all your gaming needs. This dongle is designed to perfectly complement your gaming setup and maximize your gaming performance across various devices.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Wireless dongle receiver for NOVA controllers

item.NAME: GameSir Cyclone 2 Bundle White
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience unrivaled precision and high performance with GameSir Cyclone 2. This cutting-edge multi-platform controller is equipped with brand new Mag-ResTM TMR sticks and Hall Effect analog triggers, ensuring exceptional accuracy and durability. With customizable RGB lighting, e-sports grade buttons, and immersive vibrations, it delivers a premium gaming experience on SWITCH, PC, Android, and iOS devices. Master every challenge stylishly and precisely with Cyclone 2, your wireless controller for all your gaming needs.
Key Features
Three-mode connection: Exceptional versatility with wired, Bluetooth, and 2.4GHz wireless connectivity options. Adapt to various gaming environments and ensure optimal experience. Multi-platform compatibility: Works with Switch, PC, iOS, and Android devices. GameSir Cyclone 2 provides a smooth and perfect gaming experience with minimal latency. Precise and durable GameSir Mag-ResTM TMR sticks: Combine the precise performance and low power consumption of traditional potentiometer sticks with the high durability of Hall Effect sticks, ensuring higher and more stable response. Hall Effect analog triggers: Offer unrivaled smoothness and response. Option to quickly switch to Hair Trigger mode for FPS and action games. Motion control: Built-in 6-axis gyroscope supports gyroscope function on SWITCH devices. Enjoy enhanced motion-sensing control for more precise and immersive gameplay. Realistic and subtle vibrations: Two asymmetric Rumble motors provide immersive and realistic vibration feedback. E-sports grade buttons: Front microswitch buttons with a lifespan of up to 5 million presses. Tactile D-pad switch for a better gaming experience. Quick profile switching on the fly: Simple button combinations for switching between different game styles and games. Customizable RGB light effect: Adjust and customize light effects through software for a truly unique gaming experience. Practical charging dock: The package includes a charging dock for convenient charging and neat storage of the controller when not in use.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Precise multi-platform Cyclone 2 controller with advanced features and charging dock

item.NAME: PS5 Lempo
item.DESCRIPTION:
Immerse yourself in the dark world of Finnish mythology
Lempo is a psychological horror game inspired by Finnish mythology that takes you to Metsänpeitto - a mystical forest whose name can be translated as "forest cover" or "forest veil". In mythology, Metsänpeitto represents a magical phenomenon where a person gets lost in the forest and cannot find their way out, as if the forest were covered by an invisible veil.
Key features:
Atmospheric exploration: Explore the treacherous Metsänpeitto forest with the help of a lighter and flashlight. Each step can reveal new secrets or dangers in this magically veiled world. Deep mythology: Immerse yourself in a dark fantasy world inspired by Finnish mythology, where reality loses its meaning and the forest holds you in its invisible embrace. Psychological horror: Face unspeakable horrors and beings that transcend the boundaries of your imagination as you try to break the spell of Metsänpeitto. Ingenious puzzles: Solve complex puzzles and uncover the secrets of Metsänpeitto to find your way through the magical veil and return home. Immersive experience: Enjoy impressive visual and sound atmosphere that draws you into the game and enhances the feeling of being lost in a magical forest.
As Paul, you find yourself in Metsänpeitto, a mystical realm maintained by the energy of souls, where reality mingles with myths. This world is no place for mortals, and every moment spent here may cost you more than just time. Watch for souls that may guide you, but be careful - not everything in this world is as it seems, and the forest veil can be treacherous.
Lempo offers a unique gaming experience where survival depends on your wit and ability to solve puzzles. Don't expect classic combat - your best ally will be your mind and instinct. Use a compass to navigate, explore every corner of this strange world, and uncover its secrets to break the spell of Metsänpeitto.
Can you escape the magical veil of Metsänpeitto with your mind and body intact? Or will you become another soul trapped in this dark, mystical forest?
Prepare for an unforgettable adventure in Lempo, exclusively for PlayStation 5. Immerse yourself in the dark world of Finnish mythology, overcome the magical veil of Metsänpeitto, and test the limits of your courage and wit.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Psychological horror game for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: SWITCH Spellcaster University
item.DESCRIPTION:
Welcome to the world of Spellcaster University, where you become the headmaster of a prestigious magical academy. This unique simulation game takes you into a fantastic world full of magic, challenges, and endless possibilities, now available on Nintendo Switch!
Key Features:
Build your own magical academy: Use the original system of magical card decks to create a unique university with each playthrough. Diversity of magical disciplines: Specialize in dark magic, nature spells, alchemy, or combat arts - the choice is yours! Student and staff management: Care for your students' well-being, hire quality teachers, and maintain discipline. Interact with the fantasy world: Negotiate with kings, face threats from dark forces, and form alliances with various factions. Progressive campaign: Face growing challenges, discover new locations, and strengthen your school throughout the game. Portable magic: Take advantage of the Nintendo Switch to play anywhere, anytime.
Unique Game Mechanics:
Spellcaster University offers an innovative approach to school building using a card deck system. Every decision will influence the direction of your academy:
Arcane Deck: Unlock mysterious artifacts and rooms that defy reality. Light Deck: Focus on caring for students and teachers. Nature Deck: Bring magical creatures into the school. Alchemy Deck: Increase mana and potion production. Shadow Deck: Teach students true discipline.
Rich and Living World:
The game offers a deep and interactive world:
React to events and make important decisions affecting the future of your school. Upgrade classrooms with unique artifacts. Customize school rules to fit your leadership style. Face threats ranging from orc raids to school inspections. Use the Switch's touch screen for intuitive control and quick decision-making.
Spellcaster University on Nintendo Switch offers hours of fun and strategic gameplay, whether you're at home or on the go. Each game is a unique adventure where your decisions shape the future of magical education. Are you ready to become a legendary headmaster of a wizarding university, wherever you are?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Strategy for Nintendo Switch. Magical simulation at your fingertips!

item.NAME: PS4 Romancing SaGa: Minstrel Song Remastered Int.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Romancing SaGa -Minstrel Song- International returns in a stunning remastered edition with new gameplay elements and quality of life features! Get ready for an even deeper story and more thrilling adventure!
Epic Story
The gods created man, and man created stories. The primordial creator Marda gave birth to the land of Mardias. In ancient times, this land was shaken by a mighty battle when Elore, the king of gods, fought against three malicious deities: Death, Saruin, and Schirach.
After a long and protracted battle, Death and Schirach were sealed and rendered powerless, while the last deity, Saruin, was also imprisoned thanks to the power of the Fatestones and the noble sacrifice of the hero Mirsa.
Now, 1000 years have passed since this titanic battle. The Fatestones are scattered across the world, and the evil gods are coming back to life. Eight heroes set out on their own journeys, as if guided by the hand of fate. What stories will these adventurers weave across the vast tapestry of Mardias? Only you can decide!
Key Features:
Enhanced HD Graphics: Enjoy the classic game in a new, sharper form. Free Scenario: Choose one of eight protagonists and create your own story. Iconic Game Mechanics: Enjoy the Glimmer and Combo systems typical for the SaGa series. New Features: Minimaps, high-speed mode, and New Game+ for a better gaming experience. Enhanced Bosses: Prepare for more challenging battles with upgraded bosses. New Localization: For the first time in the series' history, you can play the game in English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish. New Heroes: Schiele, Marina, Monica, and Flammar are now available as playable characters.
Pre-order now and be ready for an epic adventure in a remastered classic of the JRPG genre! Expected release date: 31.3.2025
Whether you're a fan of the original or new to the SaGa series, Romancing SaGa: Minstrel Song Remastered International offers an unforgettable gaming experience full of nostalgia and new surprises.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Adventure RPG for PlayStation 4

item.NAME: PS5 Spellcaster University
item.DESCRIPTION:
Welcome to the world of Spellcaster University, where you become the headmaster of a prestigious magical academy. This unique simulation game takes you into a fantastic world full of magic, challenges, and endless possibilities.
Key Features:
Build your own magical academy: Use the original system of magical card decks to create a unique university with each playthrough. Diversity of magical disciplines: Specialize in dark magic, nature spells, alchemy, or combat arts - the choice is yours! Student and staff management: Care for your students' well-being, hire quality teachers, and maintain discipline. Interact with the fantasy world: Negotiate with kings, face threats from dark forces, and form alliances with various factions. Progressive campaign: Face growing challenges, discover new locations, and strengthen your school throughout the game.
Unique Game Mechanics:
Spellcaster University offers an innovative approach to school building using a card deck system. Each decision will influence the direction of your academy:
Arcane Deck: Unlock mysterious artifacts and rooms that defy reality. Light Deck: Focus on caring for students and teachers. Nature Deck: Bring magical creatures into the school. Alchemy Deck: Increase the production of mana and potions. Shadow Deck: Teach students true discipline.
Rich and Vibrant World:
The game offers a deep and interactive world:
React to events and make important decisions affecting the future of your school. Upgrade classrooms with unique artifacts. Customize school rules to fit your leadership style. Face threats ranging from orc raids to school inspections.
Spellcaster University on PS5 offers hours of fun and strategic gameplay. Each game is a unique adventure where your decisions shape the future of magical education. Are you ready to become a legendary headmaster of a wizarding university?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Strategy game for PlayStation 5. Become the headmaster of a wizarding school!

item.NAME: SWITCH Elrentaros Wanderings
item.DESCRIPTION:
Elrentaros Wanderings: An Adventure Between Two Worlds
Welcome to Elrentaros, a mysterious inland city far from the capital of Melvania. As a visitor, you meet colorful local residents and try to help them. However, your adventure takes an unexpected turn when you are surrounded by a strange light and wake up in another realm. Is this new world real? Uncover the secrets of both worlds and save Elrentaros from impending danger!
Key Features:
Choose your main hero: Select a male or female character and form deep connections with the inhabitants of Elrentaros. Converse, listen to their problems, and come to their aid. Bond with ten partners: Deepen friendships by giving gifts and unlock combat "alliances". They might invite you home for dinner or visit your tent for a chat. Build your arsenal: Combine weapons and armor obtained through alliances and dungeon raids into arsenal "builds". Face increasingly challenging dungeons! Repeatedly challenge dungeons: Return to cleared dungeons at higher "challenge levels" for better equipment. Search for your perfect build! Travel between intertwining worlds: Uncover the mystery of your journeys between realms and save Elrentaros with the help of new friends!
Immerse yourself in the world of Elrentaros Wanderings:
Pre-order Elrentaros Wanderings today and be ready for an epic adventure coming soon exclusively to Nintendo Switch. Become part of this unique story and save two interconnected worlds!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action RPG for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Romancing SaGa: Minstrel Song Remastered I.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Romancing SaGa -Minstrel Song- International returns in a stunning remastered edition with new gameplay elements and quality of life features! Get ready for an even deeper story and more exciting adventure!
The Nintendo Switch version allows you to play in handheld mode, which you'll appreciate when playing on the go, and offers touch control options.
Epic Story
Gods created man, and man created stories. The primordial creator Marda gave birth to the land of Mardias. In ancient times, this land was shaken by a mighty battle when Elore, the king of gods, fought against three treacherous deities: Death, Saruin, and Schirach.
After a long and protracted battle, Death and Schirach were sealed and rendered powerless, while the last deity, Saruin, was also imprisoned thanks to the power of the Fate Stones and the noble sacrifice of the hero Mirsa.
Now, 1000 years have passed since this titanic battle. The Fate Stones are scattered across the world, and the evil gods are coming back to life. Eight heroes set out on their own journey, as if guided by the hand of fate. What stories will these adventurers weave across the vast tapestry of Mardias? Only you can decide!
Key Features:
Enhanced HD graphics: Enjoy the classic game in a new, sharper form. Free scenario: Choose one of eight protagonists and create your own story. Iconic game mechanics: Enjoy the Glimmer and Combo systems typical for the SaGa series. New features: Minimaps, high-speed mode, and New Game+ for a better gaming experience. Improved bosses: Prepare for more challenging battles with enhanced bosses. New localization: For the first time in the series' history, you can play the game in English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish. New heroes: Schiele, Marina, Monica, and Flammar are now available as playable characters.
Pre-order now and be ready for an epic adventure in the remastered classic of the JRPG genre! Expected release date: 31.3.2025
Whether you're a fan of the original or new to the SaGa series, Romancing SaGa: Minstrel Song Remastered International offers an unforgettable gaming experience full of nostalgia and new surprises. With the Nintendo Switch version, you can enjoy this epic adventure anywhere and anytime.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Adventure RPG for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: XONE/XSX Broken Sword - Shadow of the Templars: R.
item.DESCRIPTION:
The legendary adventure "Broken Sword: Shadow of the Templars" returns in a completely remastered version. This game, originally released in 1996, became an instant classic and won the hearts of millions of players worldwide.
Now comes the Reforged edition, which promises to be the definitive version of this beloved game, optimized for Xbox One and Xbox Series X platforms.
The game throws American tourist George Stobbart and French journalist Nico Collard into a mysterious journey full of intrigue and danger. This remastered version will take you from the atmospheric streets of Paris to the mysterious mountains of Syria, the sun-drenched coast of Spain, and many other fascinating places.
Key features:
Completely reworked graphics in 4K resolution for the new generation of Xbox consoles Digitally enhanced original dialogue recordings with improved sound quality Improved sound and music by world-renowned composer Barrington Pheloung Intuitive controls optimized for Xbox controllers Ability to instantly switch between original and remastered graphics throughout the game Improved user interface with the option of subtle hints for puzzles Preservation of the original story and puzzles without added content Full language support including dubbing for English, French, Spanish, Italian, and German Czech subtitles are available for the full gaming experience
Immerse yourself in a world of international conspiracy theories, ancient secrets, and dangerous adventures. Uncover the secrets of the Templars in this timeless classic, now in a beautiful new coat on your Xbox.
We expect the game on March 31, 2025. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure!
Whether you're a fan of the original game or a new player, Broken Sword - Shadow of the Templars: Reforged offers a unique gaming experience that combines nostalgia with modern gaming elements, optimized for your Xbox console.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Adventure for Xbox One and Series X|S

item.NAME: Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo
item.DESCRIPTION:
Wake up to the world of games!
Awakening
Choose a game, a scene from it, set the time and let Alarmo take care of the rest! The next morning you'll wake up at a specific time to the sounds and music from that game.
No more tossing and turning
Alarmo has a motion sensor that responds to movement. It will play sounds if you stretch your arms or continue to roll over. The alarm will quiet down if you get up from bed.
Motion sensing features only work when Alarmo is not in Button mode.
Getting out of bed
Once you get up from bed, the alarm will stop playing music without you having to touch it.
Make waking up fun
Choose from 35 different alarms selected from five Nintendo games. Each alarm has a unique sound, visual appearance and creates a different feeling when waking up. The screen appearance also changes according to the chosen game.
Customize your alarm and let it track how you sleep
Check your night records, how much time you spent in bed, how much you moved during sleep, or find out how long it took you to actually get out of bed.
Software update requires internet connection.
Turn on sounds for faster falling asleep that will help you calm down using relaxing music and sounds. These will start playing when you go to bed at the set time.
Choose between Firm mode, where the alarm gradually increases while you're in bed, or Gentle mode. This offers more consistent waking up. If you prefer how a classic alarm works, then choose Button mode.
Note: Alarmo does not include AC adapter, it must be purchased separately.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo

item.NAME: SWITCH Berserk Boy
item.DESCRIPTION:
BERSERK BOY is a high-speed action platformer with Metroidvania elements that will captivate you with vivid and stylish pixel art. Transform into various forms and master the power of lightning, fire, ice, air, and earth to save the planet!
In the distant future, a mad scientist and his army of darkness are trying to enslave humanity. Hope lies with the Resistance and a newcomer named Kei, who transforms into BERSERK BOY thanks to the mysterious energy of the Orb. Stand up to the diabolical Dr. Genos and his minions before it's too late!
GO BERSERK! Master speed and skills, chain combos, and unleash devastating special attacks. Upgrade your abilities and become an unstoppable force! Extensive world of New Hope City full of hidden missions, alternative paths, and collectibles. Jump, sprint, smash, and slide through diverse levels! Retro gameplay in a modern coat with neat and stylish platforming action. Inspired by genre classics, it offers challenges for achieving high scores and fast times. Music by Sonic Mania composer Tee Lopes, also known for soundtracks to TMNT, Streets of Rage 4, and Metal Slug Tactics. Enjoy energetic music while saving the world!
Expected release date: 01.04.2024
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action retro platformer for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Tough Pouch - City Pop Peach
item.DESCRIPTION:
Travel in style with the slim HORI Tough Pouch (City Pop Peach Edition) for Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch (OLED model). This lightweight yet durable case offers excellent protection for your device.
Key features:
Compact and durable case for Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch (OLED model) Slim and lightweight design with emphasis on protection Attached handle for easy carrying Cute Super Mario star zipper pulls Fully covered interior design for better protection Game card holder with capacity for up to 10 games Unique design with Princess Peach artwork inside and out Officially licensed by Nintendo
This stylish HORI Tough Pouch is the perfect choice for Princess Peach fans and gamers who want to protect their Nintendo Switch with elegance. Ideal for traveling and carrying your gaming system wherever you go!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Officially licensed HORI tough case with Princess Peach theme for Nintendo Switch and Switch OLED.

item.NAME: PS5/PS4/PC Taiko No Tatsujin Drum Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enhance your Taiko no Tatsujin gaming experience with this officially licensed drum controller from Hori for PlayStation®5, PlayStation®4, and Windows 11/10. This wired controller is specially designed to maximize your gaming experiences in Taiko no Tatsujin Rhythm Festival and Taiko no Tatsujin Drum Session!
Key Features:
Accurate replica of the arcade Taiko drum controller Pressure-sensitive pad accurately detects the placement of each hit on the drum and rim Stable stand with storage space for drumsticks Built-in buttons and D-pad for easy menu navigation Compatible with PlayStation®5, PlayStation®4, and Windows 11/10 Designed for Taiko no Tatsujin Rhythm Festival and Drum Session! games Ability to navigate menus and select songs using buttons on the board or drum hits
Package Contents:
1x wired Taiko drum controller 1x drum controller stand 2x Taiko no Tatsujin designed drumsticks
This controller offers an authentic arcade experience thanks to its high-quality construction and realistic controls. It's ideal for fans of the Taiko no Tatsujin series and rhythm game players. Get ready for exciting drumming in your living room!
Note: Taiko no Tatsujin game software is sold separately. The controller is not compatible with The Drum Master! game. Officially licensed by Sony and Bandai Namco.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Official wired drum controller by Hori for Taiko no Tatsujin, compatible with PlayStation®5, PlayStation®4, and Windows 11/10.

item.NAME: PC Mechanical Gaming Keyboard EDGE 201
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, the goods are functional and undamaged
HORI has a 30-year tradition in the market of creating high-end gaming peripherals.
We used all our previous experience and created a new line of high-end PC accessories. Our new gaming mechanical keyboard features our own mechanical switches and sets the world trends in quality and innovation.
Patented HORI microswitches
They enable a 25% faster response. Thanks to the Anti-Ghosting technology of the keyboard, all keys can be activated simultaneously, and user profiles can be switched on the fly. The keyboard is made of ultra-thin alloy construction, making it one of the narrowest in the world. The keyboard has a removable wrist rest.
Cutting Edge Gaming software
Thanks to the HORI gaming software, you can not only fully customize the LED backlight, but also, for example, turn off the 'Caps Lock', 'Num Lock', and 'Windows' buttons.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Discounted goods damaged packaging - HORI Mechanical Keyboard

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario - Donkey Kong
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, the goods are functional and undamaged
Enhance your gaming experiences with the legendary king of the jungle!
About Donkey Kong Character
This king of the jungle is known for his immense strength, absentmindedness, and above all, his crazy love for bananas. His adventures usually begin when someone steals his supplies. As his massive figure suggests, Donkey Kong is truly strong, but he'll surprise you with his speed too! His characteristic red tie is adorned with his initials DK.
Amiibo Figure Features
Unlocks special content in compatible games Allows you to train and improve your own version of the character Collectible piece with detailed craftsmanship
Compatibility
You can use the figure on the following devices:
Nintendo Switch - by placing it on the NFC point on the right Joy-Con or Pro Controller (sold separately) Wii U - by placing it on the NFC point on the Wii U GamePad New Nintendo 3DS/3DS XL/2DS XL - by placing it on the NFC area on the bottom screen Nintendo 3DS/3DS XL/2DS - using the NFC Reader/Writer accessory (sold separately)
Expand your amiibo collection with the legendary Donkey Kong and discover new possibilities in your favorite Nintendo games! For the current list of compatible games, visit the official Nintendo amiibo website.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Discounted goods damaged packaging - amiibo figure

item.NAME: SWITCH Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Fight for survival and explore vast territories of an alien world in Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch. This graphically enhanced version of the epic RPG will offer additional content including new story fragments.
Here We Build Our Own Future
The year is 2054. Earth was destroyed during an intergalactic war between two alien races, and humanity is on the brink of extinction. A small number of survivors flee aboard the USS White Whale, but crash-land on the vast and inhospitable planet Mira. Now it's up to you, as a member of BLADE, to save humanity from complete extinction.
Mira Welcomes You
Mira is a vast alien world filled with wide oceans, grassy plains, high mountains, exotic jungles, and other locations, each with its own secrets to discover. But beware, you'll also find threats that must be faced. During your journey, you'll not only move across the planet's surface and explore many large areas but also watch as local ecosystems come to life. You'll encounter numerous unknown, gargantuan beasts, with whom you'll have to fight for valuable resources.
Armed and Ready for Action
In the sophisticated combat system, you can choose between extensive options of special attacks, abilities, and classes. Once you prove you can be part of BLADE, you'll get to pilot and customize your own mech called Skell. It can fly or transform into a vehicle, which will help you both in traveling and enhance your combat capabilities.
The New Los Angeles Community Needs You
During reconstruction, you'll meet various people from New Los Angeles (NLA), with whom you'll gradually build relationships as members of your party. This will subsequently help you unlock new quests and obtain rare rewards. Join a selected military organization within BLADE and set out to conquer even more missions – or team up with up to 31 other players and venture into the online world to complete Squad Tasks, Online Missions, or extra challenging Global Nemesis Battles!
Xenoblade Chronicles X Definitive Edition releases March 20, 2025, on Nintendo Switch.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action RPG for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, the goods are functional and undamaged You can claim warranty within 2 years of purchase.
Play your beloved RPG for the first time anywhere, anytime
The High King of Skyrim has been assassinated. The Alliance wants to reclaim the throne for themselves. In the midst of this conflict, a far more dangerous, ancient evil is awakened. The dragons, long lost in the world of the Elder Scrolls, have returned to Tamriel. The future of Skyrim, and the Empire itself, hangs in the balance. So they await the previously destined Dragonborn, Dragonborn, a hero born with the power of the voice, and the only one who can stop the dragons.
Skyrim reintroduces an open world epic fantasy world. The game takes the gameplay and technology of the virtual world to new heights. Play as any type of character you can imagine. You can do whatever you want. The legendary freedom of choice, storytelling and adventure of The Elder Scrolls world has never been so great.
Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells and abilities. A new character system lets you play how you want. Your abilities improve based on what you do. Fight ancient dragons like you've never seen before. As a Dragonborn, uncover their secrets and gain their power for yourself.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: RPG game on Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Snipperclips Plus: Cut it out, together!
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, the goods are functional and undamaged You can claim warranty within 2 years of purchase.
Maximum fun - just the way you cut it!
Help Snip and Clip, paper friends, complete various logic challenges in this action-packed puzzle game. Enlist the help of your family or friends and work together to solve the problems. Cut each other into crazy shapes and unleash your imagination and creativity. Sometimes Snip will have to cut Clip to a point so he can pop balloons, other times Clip will have to cut Snip to prevent a firefly from flying away. Other times, you will have to very carefully clip both of them to safely transport the bird eggs to the nest.
In multiplayer, you can not only cooperate but also compete in Blitz mode. Can you score more goals in hockey, shoot more baskets in basketball, or simply cut through your enemies faster?
The expanded version of the original "bite-sized" puzzle game includes more than 30 new levels, new challenges and new features... and it's out physically for the first time ever!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: logical social game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Pokémon Brilliant Diamond
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is unpacked, the goods are functional and undamaged You can claim warranty within 2 years of purchase.
Head to the Sinnoh region in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond!
Adventures in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond take you to the Sinnoh region. Boasting a rich natural landscape and Mount Coronet at its centre, Sinnoh is a region of many historical myths. During your journey, you'll visit many diverse parts of the Sinnoh region as you strive to become a Pokémon League champion.
The original story has been faithfully reworked, as has the scale of distances between cities and roads. Players of the original game can revisit familiar places and relive moments they've already experienced. For those venturing into Sinnoh for the first time, many new encounters and surprises await.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: WiiU Star Fox Zero
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Star Fox Zero is the latest installment in the Star Fox series for Wii U. Fox, Falco, Peppy and Slippy return as Team Star Fox, a group of mercenaries.
Dual screen for enhanced experience
In this version, you'll use the TV screen for piloting the ship, while the Wii U GamePad enables precise targeting of enemies through the cockpit view. Two displays allow showing much more on the TV, making All-range mode gameplay a completely new intense experience.
New gaming options
Arwings can transform into walking robots called Walkers New drone-like Gyrowing Popular Landmaster with new flying form
Key features
Created in collaboration with PlatinumGames Return of favorite characters (Fox McCloud, Slippy, Peppy, Falco) Special sound technology for realistic communication Intuitive dual-stick control for acrobatic maneuvers Option to replay missions with different vehicles
Explore exotic planets, complete additional missions and try all new improved vehicles in this exciting space shooter.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Aerial shooter for Wii U console

item.NAME: PS5 Dungeon Drafters
item.DESCRIPTION:
"As long as you have cards, power is in your hands!" - Turn-based RPG • Card Game • Dungeon Crawler • Roguelite
Dungeon Drafters combines a turn-based dungeon crawler with a card-based roguelite system. As a young adventurer, you'll set out to explore ancient ruins, armed only with a deck of magic cards and the determination to rid the world of evil and forbidden cards.
Sophisticated card system - Build a unique deck from over a hundred magical cards. Shatter the ground with earthquakes, throw fireballs, and summon powerful allies. 6 unique heroes and dungeons - Each character has their own starting deck and playstyle. Explore six expansive dungeons, each with its own challenges. Strategic choice - Delve deeper into the dungeon for greater rewards, or return to town to secure your acquired loot. Adventurers' town - Rest between expeditions, obtain new cards from boosters, complete NPC quests, or enjoy fishing minigames.
At the core of the game is a sophisticated deck-building system that will satisfy both players looking for the strongest combinations, experimenters eager to discover new strategies, and collectors striving for a complete collection.
Fight in tactical battles, execute devastating spell combinations, and gradually upgrade your deck. Rescue lost adventurers, collect rare cards and treasures. With each run, you'll become stronger until you create the perfect deck capable of banishing evil from the world once and for all.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Turn-based RPG for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: SWITCH New Pokémon Snap
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Say cheese! Discover the natural wonders of the Lental region in New Pokémon Snap, releasing April 30th exclusively on Nintendo Switch.
Explore wild scenery of an unknown island and capture Pokémon in their natural habitat!
Seek and photograph Pokémon in their natural environment in New Pokémon Snap, available exclusively for Nintendo Switch. As you get closer to wild Pokémon and observe them, you'll discover things you never knew before - like how they behave and express themselves. You might see them protecting their territory, playing, or lurking in remote places.
Explore the mysterious Illumina phenomenon!
In New Pokémon Snap, you'll travel across the archipelago in the Lental region. Some of the local Pokémon and even the vegetation emit a strange glow. Explore dense jungles and vast deserts, investigating these Pokémon alongside Professor Mirror. Your observations and photography of wild Pokémon can help research the Illumina phenomenon. You can create your own Pokémon Photodex from the photos you take!
This new title brings you the gaming experience of the 1999 Pokémon Snap that was released on Nintendo 64. Now you can discover unknown islands and various Pokémon on Nintendo Switch.
New Pokémon Snap arrives on Nintendo Switch on April 30th.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Used goods.
Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Stray
item.DESCRIPTION:
SWITCH Stray - Cat Adventure in a Cybernetic World
Immerse yourself in a unique adventure where you become a stray cat in a mysterious cybernetic city. Stray, which won several prestigious awards including "Best Independent Game" at The Game Awards 2022, brings an unforgettable gaming experience.
Unique Perspective: Explore the world from a cat's view with authentic feline abilities like jumping, meowing, and scratching Atmospheric Environment: Discover neon-lit streets of a cybernetic city full of mysteries Story and Friendship: Collaborate with drone B-12 and uncover the secrets of a long-forgotten city Diverse Gameplay: Combination of stealth, exploration, puzzle-solving, and action sequences
Explore a fascinating dystopian city inhabited by robots, where every corner hides new secrets. From high-rise buildings to dark underground corridors, each location offers unique challenges and opportunities for discovery.
Special Switch Edition includes:
Full version of the award-winning game 6 exclusive full-color postcards All released updates
The game was created with love at BlueTwelve Studio by a team of passionate developers and their feline "consultants". It has won the hearts of players worldwide thanks to its unique atmosphere and original concept.
*The game won "Best Independent Game" at The Game Awards 2022 and "Best Debut" at BAFTA Games Awards 2023.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action Adventure for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: SWITCH Pokémon Sword
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
A new generation of Pokémon comes to Nintendo Switch
Begin your Pokémon trainer adventure by choosing one of three new Pokémon partners: Grookey, Scorbunny, or Sobble. The Galar region awaits, where you need to stop the troublemakers from Team Yell and uncover the mystery behind the legendary Pokémon Zacian and Zamazenta! Explore the Wild Area – a vast landscape where you can freely control the camera. Connect locally or online with three other players in new multiplayer Max Raid battles, where players together face huge super-powerful Pokémon known as Dynamax Pokémon.
Certain Pokémon can achieve Gigantamax form and gain new appearances and powerful G-Max abilities. But the fun doesn't end with perfecting battle skills – visit shops in town and choose new clothes or get a new hairstyle. Be exactly the trainer you want to be. During your adventure, you'll meet not only completely new Pokémon but also familiar ones in new Galarian forms! To make leveling up your Pokémon easier, assign them to complete Poké Jobs. For fun, there's the Pokémon Camp where you can play with your Pokémon!
Catch Pokémon, trade them, and battle with them on your adventure in the Galar region Choose from three new Pokémon partners and meet brand new Pokémon Uncover the mystery of legendary Pokémon Zacian and Zamazenta! Players can freely control the camera in the vast Wild Area Team up with other trainers in Max Raid battles! Battle against wild Dynamax Pokémon in Max Raid battles and try to catch them!
Poké Ball Plus
Take advantage of the Poké Ball Plus controller features (sold separately). Take your Pokémon for a walk in the real world! If you spend enough time with your favorite Pokémon, something amazing will happen!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Used goods.
RPG Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario - 3 set
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Touch, Watch and Join the Game!
Discover a new way to interact with your favorite Nintendo character. When you touch the figure to the NFC touchpoint on the Wii U GamePad controller, Joy-Con, bottom of New Nintendo 3DS and New Nintendo 3DS XL handhelds, or special device for older Nintendo 3DS family portable consoles while playing, data will transfer into the game that you can use in many ways. While playing some games, data in your figure will continue to be written, allowing you to create truly unique amiibo figures.
Join numerous games!
amiibo figures can be used in many different games – and how they can be used depends on the game! New characters from various game titles are regularly released. A complete list of compatible amiibo figures for Nintendo titles can be found at nintendo.com/amiibo/compatibility.
Compatibility with New Nintendo 3DS and Nintendo 3DS/2DS consoles
amiibo figures can also be used when playing on handheld consoles! New Nintendo 3DS includes built-in NFC technology that allows you to connect an amiibo figure to the game simply by placing it on the lower touch screen. For use with Nintendo 3DS and 2DS, special accessories can be purchased separately.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Super Mario Series amiibo Figure Set

item.NAME: Joy-Con Pair Pastel Purple/Green
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
A New Dimension of Control
The versatile Joy-Con controllers offer numerous surprising gaming experiences. Two Joy-Con controllers can be used individually in each hand or together as one gaming controller using the Joy-Con grip. They can also be attached to the console in handheld mode or shared with a friend to enjoy two-player multiplayer fun in supported titles. Each Joy-Con has its own full set of buttons and can therefore be used as an independent controller, while also being equipped with an accelerometer and gyroscopic motion sensor, enabling independent right and left motion controls.
The Left Joy-Con also features a Capture button, allowing players to take instant screenshots of their gameplay with a single click and share them with friends via social networks. The Right Joy-Con includes an NFC point for interaction with amiibo figures as well as an IR motion camera capable of detecting distance, shapes, and movement of nearby objects in games specially designed for these features. For example, this function can determine how far away a player's hand is and what shape it's forming.
The Joy-Con controllers also feature advanced HD rumble functionality, which allows players to feel far more realistic vibration feedback than ever before in compatible games. This effect is so detailed that players can, for example, feel the vibrations of individual ice cubes inside a glass that the Joy-Con is simulating. Thanks to HD rumble, players will be able to experience a new level of realism, unachievable through sight and sound alone!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Joy-Con Pair Pastel Purple/Green

item.NAME: Wireless HORIPAD Pro for Steam (Midnight Black)
item.DESCRIPTION:
The Wireless HORIPAD Pro for Steam is a professional gaming controller specially designed for the Steam™ platform on Windows 11/10 and Steam Deck™. Quickly access the Steam menu while gaming using three dedicated buttons - invaluable especially in Big Picture mode! This premium rechargeable controller offers flexible connectivity - wirelessly via Bluetooth with up to 12 hours of battery life, or using the included USB cable.
For PCs without Bluetooth connectivity, a USB-A Bluetooth receiver is included in the package. In wired mode, it also functions as a standard XInput controller for Windows. The controller features advanced functions such as precise gyroscopic sensors for motion control, two fully programmable back buttons for quick access to frequently used functions, and two macro buttons for more complex gaming combinations. Innovative capacitive analog sticks allow you to assign special functions activated by touch alone.
Note: To maintain affordability and focus on precise control, it does not include the following features: vibration motors, trackpad, headphone jack.
Professional wireless controller optimized for the Steam ecosystem Flexible connectivity - Bluetooth or USB cable Advanced features including gyroscopic sensors and programmable buttons Compact design with built-in rechargeable battery Compatible with Steam™ and Steam Deck™ including XInput support
Specifications:
Package dimensions: 16 x 15 x 7.7 cm Package weight: 348 g Planned release date: January 31, 2025
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Officially licensed HORIPAD controller for STEAM.

item.NAME: PS5 Predator: Hunting Grounds
item.DESCRIPTION:
Predator: Hunting Grounds is an intense asymmetric multiplayer shooter from developers IllFonic. The game offers a unique gaming experience set in the environment of the legendary Predator film series.
Play as Predator or Fireteam member
- As Predator, use advanced alien technology and hunting abilities
- As a Fireteam member, complete tactical missions and try to survive
Sophisticated "Predkour" movement system allowing Predator to move quickly through the treetops Extensive weapons arsenal including iconic predator tools Diverse game maps set in dangerous jungles
New content and improvements for PS5:
Enhanced graphics and visual effects Faster loading thanks to SSD DualSense controller haptic feedback support Enhanced sound and spatial audio
Exclusive bonus content:
10 unique Predator skins including classic movie versions Special lenticular card Premium case with unique design
Game modes:
Hunt (4v1) - Main game mode Clash (4v4) - Team battle of Predators versus Fireteam Private Match - Option for private games with friends
The game offers regular updates and new content, including additional maps, skins, and game modes. Thanks to PS5 improvements, it provides the best possible hunting experience in the Predator universe.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FPS for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63057 Paw Patrol
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera FIRST - 63057 Paw Patrol, 2,9m, 114x88cm
PAW Patrol - On the Double FIRST Set with an exclusive PAW Patrol license Battery-poweredAge 3 years and up
Ready to help! Now you can join up with Chase and Rubble on their latest missions with the new Carrera FIRST 'PAW Patrol - On the Double' set, and always be first at the scene. Wherever they go, you can assist the cute pups, Chase in his blue police car and Rubble in his yellow bulldozer, whether rescuing cats from trees or freeing trains from wreckage - anything can happen! Be a true hero and bring these PAW Patrol favourites to life on your bedroom floor.
Thrilling rides around the Carrera racing circuit Set off on exciting adventures around the 2.9-metre (3.5-m) Carrera FIRST racing circuit with your favourite canine heroes from the PAW Patrol series. The bright blue, figure-of-eight, battery-powered car racing circuit is ideal for action away from home, being easily assembled and dismantled whenever required. The narrow section, bends and flip elements ensure kids enjoy even more gaming thrills.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera FIRST - 63057 Paw Patrol, 2,9m, 114x88cm

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63054 Bluey 2,4
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera FIRST - 63054 Bluey, 93x45cm, 2,4m With the new Carrera FIRST set "Bluey and Bingo Race", the youngest racers can dive straight into the fun world of the TV series Bluey and experience an exciting race between Bluey and her little sister Bingo. On the 2.4-meter track, the young drivers guide the two vehicles lively over the colorful blue tracks, zooming through tight corners and exciting sections – just like in the series, when Bluey and Bingo compete in imaginative games. A fun spinning top adds extra playtime fun and makes every race an exciting adventure. With the detailed decorative elements from the series, an authentic atmosphere is created, immersing the kids right into the action. The battery-operated set offers hours of fun – ready for endless adventures with the Heeler family!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera FIRST - 63054 Bluey, 93x45cm, 2,4m

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63055 Bluey 2,9
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera FIRST - 63055 Bluey 2,9m, 114 x 88cm The Carrera FIRST set "Let's Go" for toddlers aged 3 and up ensures the timely delivery of dinner – thanks to Heeler pup Bluey from the TV series of the same name and her younger sister Bingo, who zoom around the 2.9-meter track in no time. With decorative elements that reflect the setting of the series, the kids will immerse themselves in the world of the Heeler family while playing. Long straights, tricky curves, and a fun flip element provide endless playtime fun. The ergonomic controllers, specially designed for little hands, and the battery-operated track, which is easy to set up and take down, ensure hours of entertainment and continue to delight young racing fans again and again.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera FIRST - 63055 Bluey 2,9m, 114 x 88cm

item.NAME: 63056 PAW PATROL - On the Track
item.DESCRIPTION:
Children's race track set with Chase and Marshall from PAW Patrol Carrera FIRST Spinning top for extra fun 2.4 metres From 3 years Your friends and helpers with four paws - now also on your race track! The brave PAW Patrol members are celebrated heroes in the children's series. Whether people are in need, problems have to be solved or just help is required in everyday matters – the dogs are always there with their equipment. Each PAW Patrol member not only has his own special character, but also his own means of transport – that calls for a race! Now the only question is: which of the cute dogs will be the winner? The friendly dog team will prove itself in any case and you will have so much fun with these canine friends.
Who's faster on the scene when the going gets tough? In this Carrera FIRST PAW Patrol - On the Track Set the clumsy Dalmatian Marshall – with his fire truck – and the sporty shepherd dog Chase – with his police car – compete against each other. The two slot cars on a scale of 1:50 offer a thrilling duel on the 2.4-metre-long race track and race past the typical PAW Patrol track decoration – just really cool! On the circuit, each puppy kart has to pass through a spinning top once per lap. This provides an additional fun factor. Thanks to the PAW Patrol license, the Carrera FIRST set has a great design that immerses every little racer in the world of the brave dog teams. The set includes two child-friendly speed controllers. Type C batteries are required to control the cars.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track lenght: 2.4 meters, dimensions when assembled: 93x45cm

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63058 Paw Patrol
item.DESCRIPTION:
PAW Patrol race track with Chase and Marshall vehicles Carrera FIRST With light, sound and music 3.5 metres From 3 years
Always on the scene when someone needs help The helpful dogs of the PAW Patrol are true heroes who are led through many adventures by their kind and generous trainer. Every small dog in the series has its own means of transport and thus also other tasks, talents and abilities. Together the four-legged friends are an unbeatable team that takes on every challenge and makes the world of humans and other animals a better place.
Full throttle to the scene of the action! On this 3.5-metre-long race track, in this Carrera FIRST PAW Patrol - Race 'N' Rescue Set the lovable but somewhat scatter-brained Dalmatian Marshall in a fire truck competes against his friend Chase. Chase is a German shepherd dog, who likes to have the rudder in his hand and hits the start line with his police car. What's it like in this race? Can Marshall give his buddy as good as he gets and be the first PAW Patrol member to show up at the scene? Interactive game functions with light, sound and music increase the fun involved as do the brilliant spinning tops, which every kart on a scale of 1:50 has to cross once during a lap. Thanks to the appealing PAW Patrol licence, the design is entirely in keeping with the spirit of the courageous dog team. The speed controllers are specially designed for children's hands. Type C batteries are required to control the vehicles via the connecting track. Batteries are not included in the set.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Track lenght: 3.5 meters, dimensions when assembled: 115x115cm

item.NAME: Carrera FIRST - 63059 Paw Patrol
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera FIRST - 63059 Paw Patrol, Track lenght: 2.4 m, dimensions when assembled: 93x45cm
PAW Patrol Set with exclusive PAW Patrol license Battery powered Age 3 years and up Exciting adventures with canine heroes Woof, woof! Each of the popular four-legged heroes of the PAW Patrol series has his own means of transport, tasks, talents and skills. Enjoy fantastic adventures with these canine stars in the new Carrera FIRST 'PAW Patrol – Ready for Action' set! Police dog Chase in his blue police car joins repair specialist Rocky in the green recycling truck to share all kinds of new experiences with you. Get together with these four-legged heroes and guarantee law and order in your bedroom motordrome. Who can reach the scene first? There's no limit to the adventures enjoyed by dog enthusiasts aged 3 and up around this 2.4-metre racing circuit. The thrilling spiral track section has to be navigated once every lap by each 1:50-scale kart to ensure no end of action on bedroom racetracks. The control handsets are especially designed to suit small hands and the battery-powered set is ideal for taking the action with you. The missions for Chase and Rocky to accomplish on this sky-blue figure-of-eight track are entirely in your hands.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera FIRST - 63059 Paw Patrol, Track lenght: 2.4 m, dimensions when assembled: 93x45cm

item.NAME: Carrera D132 30045 Full Throttle
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera D132 30045 Full Throttle, 8,, 305 x 190cm Full Throttle and Thrills at Every Corner With the Carrera DIGITAL 132 set "Full Throttle", racing fans dive straight into the world of motorsport. The thrilling duels begin with two legendary machines: The Porsche 911 GT3 R "Lionspeed GP, No.24" impresses with its exceptional agility and performance, while the Lamborghini Huracán GT3 Evo 2 "Abt-Sportsline, No.27" wins fans over with its striking design and impressive speed. Both vehicles are faithfully replicated in 1:32 scale and bring true racetrack excitement into the living room with front, rear, and brake lights. With innovative features such as Ghost and Safety Car, strategic elements are introduced into the race, creating intense racing action and thrilling overtaking manoeuvres. The Fullspeed mode lets fans truly feel the adrenaline on the high-speed straights. This is top-tier racing action at its finest.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera D132 30045 Full Throttle, 8,, 305 x 190cm

item.NAME: Carrera D132 30046 Pole Position
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera D132 30046 Pole Position, 5,7m, 245 x 110cm
The Race for the Top Spot Begins. With the Carrera DIGITAL 132 set "Pole Position", the thrilling racing adventure can begin! The BMW M4 GT3 "Ram Racing, No.15", driven by British pilot John Ferguson and Swiss driver Raffaele Marciello in the GT Series, goes head-to-head with the driver team of Philipp Eng from Austria and Tom Blomqvist from the UK, at the wheel of the BMW M4 GT3 "ROWE Racing, No.99". As the most powerful model in the 4 Series from BMW, it is always a contender for the top spot. On the long straights, the performance is especially noticeable, while in the tight corners of the 5.7-meter track, the drivers' finely tuned skills with the hand controller are crucial to defend the pole position. Up to six drivers can race simultaneously, battling for a spot on the podium – adrenaline-filled moments guaranteed!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera D132 30046 Pole Position, 5,7m, 245 x 110cm

item.NAME: Carrera D132 30047 Victory Circuit
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera D132 30047 Victory Circuit On to the Victory Lap – The Ultimate GT3 Showdown! In the Carrera DIGITAL 132 set "Victory Circuit", the McLaren 720S GT3 "Dörr Motorsport, No.85" and the Audi R8 LMS GT3 "Abt Sportsline, Kelvin v.d. Linde, No.3", exclusively available in this set, engage in a thrilling battle to see who will emerge victorious. In the 2024 DTM season, the McLaren 720S GT3 from Dörr Motorsport proved why the car is renowned for its remarkable speed and excellent handling. The Audi R8 LMS GT3 Evo II from Abt Sportsline, driven by the experienced drivers of the Kempten-based team, also showcased its excellence on the track. On the 7.3-meter track, the GT3 icons race through fast straights, sharp corners, and tight passages. Every moment feels like you're behind the wheel, fighting for victory. The set brings the adrenaline rush of DTM racing straight into your living room – intense motorsport filled with passion and top speed.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera D132 30047 Victory Circuit, 7,3m, 305 x 170cma

item.NAME: Carrera D132 30048 Race of the Champions
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera D132 30048 Race of the Champions, 7,3m, 305 x 170cm
Experience the Formula 1 duels between Verstappen and Pérez up close With the Carrera DIGITAL 132 "Race of the Champions" set, fans can experience the thrilling racing moments between Max Verstappen and Sergio Perez from the 2024 Formula 1 season right in their own home. On the 7.3-meter-long track, the detailed Red Bull Racing RB20 "M. Verstappen, No.1" and "S. Perez, No.11" go head-to-head in action-packed duels. Thanks to the WIRELESS 2.0 controllers, racers enjoy maximum freedom and precise control. Up to 6 drivers can compete simultaneously for a spot on the podium – guaranteeing adrenaline-charged moments. The thrill of fighting for every second on the track and the excitement of a real Formula 1 race become tangible – without sitting in a cockpit. A must-have for all Formula 1 fans who want to experience the rivalry between Verstappen and Perez up close.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera D132 30048 Race of the Champions, 7,3m, 305 x 170cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62596 DTM Speed Giants
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera GO 62596 DTM Speed Giants, 8,9m, 220x98cm DTM Action Without Limits! With the Carrera GO!!! set "DTM Speed Giants", the racetrack becomes the stage for thrilling duels. On an 8.9-meter track featuring 2 loops, steep curves, and a spectacular fly-over, the Audi R8 LMS GT3 evo II DTM "ABT, R. Feller, No.7" and the Lamborghini Huracán GT3 EVO2 "Luca Engstler, No.19" race head-to-head. The turbo hand controllers make it possible to tackle every challenge on the high-speed track, while precise timing through the loops gives a decisive advantage. With the authentic vehicles in 1:43 scale, racers experience intense motorsport action and feel the thrill as they engage in adrenaline-packed duels.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62596 DTM Speed Giants, 8,9m, 220x98cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62597 GT Powerplay
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera GO 62597 GT Powerplay, 4,9m, 158 x 68cm
Thrills for True Racing Fans! The Carrera GO!!! set "GT Powerplay" takes players into a fast-paced racing adventure full of thrilling duels. On the 4.9-meter track, high-speed straights and rapid corners are conquered, while the looping provides exciting challenges. At the heart of the action are two exceptional GT icons: the Ford Mustang GT3 and the Ferrari 296 GT3. Both cars are renowned for their involvement in prestigious racing series such as IMSA and the GT World Challenge. Players steer the highly detailed machines precisely along the track, experience overtaking manoeuvres up close, and feel the thrill as every millisecond counts. Thanks to the turbo buttons on the hand controller, top speeds are reached, making every moment an unforgettable experience.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62597 GT Powerplay, 4,9m, 158 x 68cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62601 Street Legends
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera GO 62601 Street Legends. 4,9m, 158 x 68cm
The Thrilling Showdown of American Muscle Cars! With the Carrera GO!!! "Street Legends" set, two of the most iconic muscle cars in history take aim at the racetrack. On the 4.9-meter track, the Ford Mustang '67 Stars 'n Stripes and the Chevrolet Camaro Stars 'n Stripes go head-to-head in an exciting duel. The authentic vehicles make any racing fan's heart race and deliver an intense neck-and-neck competition, where every corner and straight is fiercely contested until the very last second. Track elements such as loops and tight corners demand the full concentration and lightning-fast reflexes of the drivers. With the hand controllers and the turbo button, every race becomes a thrilling challenge that transforms the living room into an exciting racing arena - always in pursuit of the best time.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62601 Street Legends. 4,9m, 158 x 68cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62602 Tuning Zone
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera GO 62602 Tuning Zone, 5,3m, 180 x 75cm
Hypercars in Futuristic Carrera Design The Carrera GO!!! set "Tuning Zone" combines exciting races with creative possibilities. The 1:43 scale hypercars impress with their futuristic design, reminiscent of the aesthetics of modern concept cars. Their dynamic shape and stylish details make them real eye-catchers and a highlight in the Carrera world. A special feature is the interchangeable parts, such as rear wings and rims in different colours, allowing for individual customisation. The 5.3-meter track offers plenty of variety and excitement with elements like loops, an intersection, and a fly-over. Precise control and lightning-fast reactions are essential as the hypercars rev up to top speed.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62602 Tuning Zone, 5,3m, 180 x 75cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62603 Champion's Racing
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera GO 62603 Champion's Racing, 4,3m, 183 x 80cm
The Ultimate Duel of Formula 1 Elite In the Carrera GO!!! "Champion's Racing" set, it's about more than just speed – two legends of Formula 1 face off. On the 4.3-meter track, the Oracle Red Bull Racing RB21 "M. Verstappen, No.1" and the Ferrari SF-25 "L. Hamilton, No.44" engage in thrilling duels that push both the fans and the drivers to their limits. The track demands precise manoeuvres and lightning-fast reactions. With the turbo hand controllers, the racers extract the maximum from their machines, speeding at top velocity along the high-speed straights. Every moment on this track is a true Formula 1 experience, with one question on everyone’s mind: Who stays cool and holds the lead?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62603 Champion's Racing, 4,3m, 183 x 80cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62604 Super Formula
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera GO 62604 Super Formula, 5,3m, 180 x 75cm
With the Carrera GO!!! Set "Super Formula," Max Verstappen in the Oracle Red Bull Racing RB21 "M. Verstappen, No.1" and Lando Norris in the McLaren Formula 1 Team MCL39 "L. Norris, No.4" engage in thrilling duels. On the 5.3-meter-long track featuring high-speed straights, spectacular corners, and a looping, young drivers experience the feeling of being part of the Formula 1 world. The intricately designed vehicles create real racing excitement, while tight head-to-head duels and exciting overtakes raise the adrenaline level. World champion superiority meets the fighting spirit of an emerging talent - this set brings speed, action, and pure competitive spirit to the track. Perfect for all those who love the thrill of Formula 1!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62604 Super Formula, 5,3m, 180 x 75cm

item.NAME: Carrera GO 62605 Speed Zone
item.DESCRIPTION: Carrera GO 62605 Speed Zone, 6.3m, 175 x 122cm In the Carrera GO!!! Set Speed Zone, two of the biggest icons in motorsport face off: Max Verstappen in the Oracle Red Bull Racing RB21 "M. Verstappen, No.1" and Lewis Hamilton in the Ferrari SF-25 "L. Hamilton, No.44". On the spectacular 6.3-meter-long track, the racers showcase their skills – with high-speed straights, sharp corners, and a looping, the raceway delivers adrenaline-charged action. Intricately designed vehicles and diverse track elements bring the thrilling atmosphere of Formula 1 straight into your home. Now it’s time to hit the gas and prove who is the fastest on the track!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera GO 62605 Speed Zone, 6.3m, 175 x 122cm

item.NAME: Carrera Speed Arena - 16002 Disney Cars
item.DESCRIPTION:
Carrera Speed Arena - 16002 Disney Cars, 2,77m, 100 x 46cm
Racing Fun Like in the Movie - with Lightning McQueen and Cruz Ramirez With the new Carrera Speed Arena in Disney Pixar Cars design, children preschool age and up can experience the adventures of their favorite characters from the popular Cars movies up close. In a handy carrying case and with no setup required, the set is ready to go anywhere - whether at home, on vacation, or at a friend's house. Simply unfold, grab the ergonomic hand controllers, and off you go: Lightning McQueen and Cruz Ramirez race across the track just like in the movie, delivering exciting duels. The authentic vehicle designs and the sturdy, compact track bring the world of Radiator Springs to life - perfect for thrilling races and imaginative adventures. The built-in lap counter ensures exciting head-to-head races, while the set, thanks to battery operation or USB-C connection, is always ready for action anywhere. With Lightning and Cruz, children can recreate their favorite scenes from the Cars movies or invent new adventures on the track. For little racers and big Cars fans: The Disney Pixar Cars Speed Arena brings movie magic and racing fun together - anytime, anywhere!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Carrera Speed Arena - 16002 Disney Cars, 2,77m, 100 x 46cm

item.NAME: GameSir Super Nova Nightfall Blue
item.DESCRIPTION:
Super Nova redefines gaming comfort and precision with ultra-quiet and responsive controls. With quiet ABXY buttons and advanced GameSir™ Hall Effect sensing joysticks, it ensures smooth and precise feedback while minimizing disruptions. Whether you're playing on PC, Switch, Android, or iOS, Super Nova's three-mode connectivity and full customization options make it the perfect choice for gamers seeking a flexible and immersive experience. From its ergonomic design to customizable RGB lighting, it's designed for those who demand both performance and style.
Key Features:
1. Three-mode connectivity for multi-platform compatibility Super Nova offers versatile connectivity and works seamlessly with PC, Switch, Android, and iOS devices through Bluetooth, wired, and wireless connections. Players can effortlessly switch between connection modes using a convenient mode switch, ensuring a smooth and flexible gaming experience across different platforms.
2. GameSirTM Hall Effect sensing joysticks, ultra drift-resistant GameSir™ Hall Effect sensing joysticks provide lasting durability up to 5 million cycles, offering precise and responsive feedback. Anti-friction glide rings ensure ultra-smooth stick guidance, reducing stick grinding and extending usage time.
3. Precisely tuned Hall Effect triggers with trigger stops GameSir's precisely tuned Hall Effect analog triggers offer unmatched smoothness and response. With trigger stops, players can switch triggers to short-pull position. After switching, pressing the trigger button three times all the way down will automatically calibrate the triggers. Additionally, players can activate fine trigger mode using the M+LT/RT button combination (triggers must be in long-pull position). Whether you need precise linear control or perfect response, Super Nova gives you the competitive edge you need.
4. 1000Hz polling rate supports both wired and wireless dongle connection Enjoy an ultra-responsive gaming experience with 1000Hz polling rate. This ensures your inputs will be registered almost instantly, minimizing latency and maximizing your performance during competitive gameplay.
5. Dual asymmetric motors and 6-axis gyroscope for immersive gaming Super Nova features dual asymmetric rumble motors providing both powerful and subtle vibrations, making every minor collision and shot feel like they're happening right in your hands. The built-in 6-axis gyroscope along with one-press wake function is highly compatible with Switch devices, providing precise motion control for an immersive gaming experience.
6. Full customization Super Nova offers two back buttons with support for individual button mapping and macro recording, giving players the flexibility to customize controls for enhanced gameplay. These buttons provide quick access to essential commands right at your fingertips. Additionally, Super Nova features customizable RGB light strips and a detachable center faceplate, allowing you to customize your gaming setup to reflect your style. For even more customization, the ABXY layout can be physically switched, offering the freedom to choose the setup that best matches your gaming style.
7. Comfortable gaming experience Super Nova is designed to provide a comfortable gaming experience. Its rubberized, laser-engraved textured grips and membrane buttons ensure soft and secure grip, ideal for long gaming sessions. The quiet ABXY buttons further enhance immersion by minimizing keystroke noise, allowing you to focus on the game without distractions.
8. Smart charging dock with auto start-stop Super Nova features a 1000mAh battery and includes a smart charging dock with auto start-stop. Simply lift the controller to start playing, and when you're done, place it back on the dock to effortlessly recharge. With this seamless charging, you'll be ready for your next gaming session without interruption.
9. Software support By downloading the GameSir and GameSir Connect apps, players can perform firmware updates, adjust stick and trigger dead zones, customize vibration intensity, and test buttons among other features. Some functions can also be accessed through on-the-fly key combinations, ensuring seamless setup.

Připoj se ke kouzelným bytostem ve světě, kde jsou legendy a skutečná kouzla opravdová. Tajemná vílí královna slíbila, že odhalí zázračné tajemství, ovšem za jedné podmínky – musíš uhodnout její jméno! Tak vezmi svůj kouzelný prášek a připrav se na výpravu!
Logická hra pro celou rodinu Získávej cenné rady od Růžové víly a Najdi další víly, neboť každá z nich skrývá část tajemství Cestuj napříč kouzelnou zemí, hraj hry a skládej získané dílky, abys odhalil královnino tajemství Použij nápovědu od vílí královny, ale buď opatrný, protože každá z nich tě stojí špetku kouzelného prachu
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Used goods.

item.NAME: PS4 Stray
item.DESCRIPTION:
A lost cat must unravel an ancient mystery and escape from a long-forgotten city.
Stray is a third-person cat adventure set in the detailed, neon-lit alleys of a decaying cyber-city and the grim environment of its dirty underworld. Roam around everywhere, defend against unforeseen threats, and solve the mysteries of this unwelcoming place inhabited only by unsuspecting droids and dangerous creatures.
See the world through the eyes of a stray cat and interact with the environment in a playful way. Be as stealthy, agile, silly, and occasionally as annoying as possible to the strange inhabitants of this mysterious world.
Along the journey, the cat befriends a small flying drone known as B-12. Together with its help, they will try to find a way to leave this desolate place.
Stray is a game created at BlueTwelve Studio, a small team from the south of France that consists mainly of cats and a few humans.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action adventure for PlayStation 4
