item.NAME: LEGO 71048 Minifigures - Series 27.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Minifigures - Series 27. Let yourself be surprised and discover the contents of the mysterious package where you'll find your hero. Collect iconic character minifigures. Which character will be in your package?
Boys and girls aged 5 and up can look forward to exciting adventures with 1 of 12 collectible figures from the LEGO® Minifigures set, hidden in surprise packages. These detailed figures can be added to your collection, displayed, or used for fun storytelling. Each package contains 1 random LEGO minifigure and you can collect all 12: Wolf Pack Master, Pirate Helmsman, Steampunk Inventor, Pterodactyl Costume Fan, Ghost, Jetpack Racer, Cat Lover, Longboard Rider, Little Astronomer, Cupid, Hamster Costume Fan, and Plush Toy Collector. Each of the 12 LEGO® minifigures comes in a sealed surprise box and most have at least 1 authentic accessory. This gift inspires children to tell stories and enjoy countless hours of solo or group play.
With LEGO® Minifigures, you can create various stories and actions. Great fun awaits you! Open the box and reveal your figure. One minifigure awaits you in the package.
LEGO® Minifigures offers an amazing world of heroes. It allows children to create their own stories and adventures. The building set develops children's creativity, motor skills, and imagination.
Features:
includes one minifigure minifigure offers an amazing world of superheroes allows children to create their own story high-quality material and precision of individual pieces building with pieces trains patience, building develops fine motor skills develops creativity and supports imagination LEGO® bricks meet the highest safety standards

Age: 5+

item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: LEGO Minifigures - Series 27.

item.NAME: UMAX VisionBook 11WT Tab
item.DESCRIPTION:
Elegant metal touchscreen tablet with detachable keyboard
Notebook performance, tablet portability, long battery life, touch screen and familiar Windows environment - that's the VisionBook 11WT Tab, which is perfect for all your favorite everyday activities. VisionBook 11WT Tab meets the requirements for so-called Windows modern devices. Umax continues the trend of offering the latest trends in Windows 11 mobile computing at reasonable costs. The heart of the tablet is the new Intel Twin Lake N150 processor and fast 12GB LPDDR5 memory along with a fast 256GB SSD drive. It is equipped with a 10.95" IPS display with a resolution of 1920 x 1200 with excellent image quality for work and entertainment. In addition, the tablet has modern Type-C ports for charging and connecting external devices. The tablet can be connected to a monitor or TV thanks to the HDMI output. You will also appreciate the fast Wifi 6, which allows stable and swift work on the internet.
Different ways of use
You can use the VisionBook 11WT Tab not only as a classic touch tablet, but also as a notebook with the connected keyboard, which will make your work easier and support your own creativity. The 11WT Tab is simply a modern universal portable device that you will appreciate on the go and at home when browsing the internet, playing videos and in office applications.
Intel Twin Lake N150 processor
​The Intel processor N150 is a quad-core mobile processor from the Twin Lake series, designed for laptops, tablets, and mini PCs. The Twin Lake architecture is essentially identical to Alder Lake-N and was introduced in the second half of 2024. Number of cores and frequency: N150 has four efficient (Gracemont) cores without Hyper-Threading support, with a maximum frequency of up to 3.6 GHz. ​ Graphics processor: The integrated Intel UHD Graphics chip offers 24 computing units with a frequency of up to 1 GHz. It supports decoding of modern video codecs such as AV1, and video playback up to 4K resolution at 60 frames per second with HDR.
Windows 11 Pro in English
Windows 11 Pro is the latest operating system from Microsoft. It brings a redesigned environment, some new features, higher stability, and a higher level of security.
New MacOS-style Start button
Microsoft has come up with a redesigned start menu and taskbar menus. Windows 11 has centered controls on the bottom bar by default and more resembles the competing MacOS. This can be switched to the standard look that we are used to from Windows 10, where the Start button and other control buttons are aligned to the left.
Window and screen management
The system for managing windows and desktops has been redesigned. The organization of work windows is facilitated by preset templates that allow you to quickly arrange windows according to your wishes. Virtual desktops allow you to set different backgrounds, making it easier to orient yourself on which desktop you are currently located.
Widgets
Widgets are now accessible from the main bar. These are still quite unfinished. They allow connecting only a few widgets offered by Microsoft. Moreover, they live their own lives and are not connected to other applications.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Unique 2-in-1 touchscreen tablet with detachable keyboard, 12GB RAM and Windows 11 Pro

item.NAME: PS5 Just Dance 2022
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Product Description
Grab your friends and family because it's time to turn up the volume and let loose! Just Dance 2022, the #1 Music Video Game Brand of All Time with over 79 million units sold, returns this fall with 40 new songs and worlds.
Join a community of more than 138 million players worldwide and dance your way to the top!
From chart-topping hits to great family-friendly classics, dance to 40 new tracks including:
Ciara "Level Up" Imagine Dragons "Believer" Todrick Hall "Nails Hair Hips Heels" Beyonce "Run The World (Girls)" Katy Perry "Last Friday Night (T.G.I.F)" Anuel AA, Daddy Yankee, Karol G ft. Ozuna, J Balvin "China" Meghan Trainor– "Funk"
Your favorite Just Dance modes are back this year! Just Dance can accommodate every dance mood, what's yours?
Need a fun way to exercise? Start your own routine with Sweat Mode and stay motivated by tracking calories burned and time spent dancing. Track and improve your performance with detailed recaps and compare your scores with friends. Dancing is better together! Team up with your friends in Co-op mode and combine scores to rule the dance floor! Want a mode for the little ones? Kids Mode is tailored to the needs of youngest players. Enjoy 8 kid-friendly songs and choreographies for their fun dance experience. Feel like you'll never have enough songs to dance to? Get access to Just Dance Unlimited2 subscription-based streaming service and (re)dance to more than 700 songs and counting! Every copy of the game comes with one month access! In the mood for a quick session? Use the quick play button to launch a random playlist customized to your own taste.
Dance all year long with Just Dance 2022!
Participate in themed seasonal events with temporarily free songs and themed playlists. Dance until you drop with Just Dance Unlimited2!
Get inspired by personal recommendations and save your favorites!
Dance as much as you can: Just Dance will recommend content based on your dancing habits and preferences. Choose a perfectly curated playlist and discover songs that will soon become your favorites. Customize your gaming experience: select your favorite tracks from the ever-growing Just Dance catalog and create your own playlists!
Join the World Dance Floor and show the world what you're made of!
Challenge fellow Just Dancers from around the world during permanent tournaments. Enjoy Happy Hours to sample Just Dance Unlimited2 and keep the party going!
Don't have a console? Join the fun with Google Stadia!
Experience Just Dance directly from Chrome browser, no console needed! The Stadia platform enables gaming on various screens on laptops, computers, and selected phones and tablets.
No additional accessories needed to join the fun! Just use your smartphone with the Just Dance Controller app!
Just Dance 2022 is compatible with:
Joy-Con controllers on Switch PlayStation Camera on PS4 Kinect on Xbox One
Just Dance 2022 is not compatible with:
HD camera for PS5 Any camera on Xbox Series X

item.NAME: GameSir G8+ Galileo Bluetooth Mobile Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Key features:
1. Console controller stage: Console-sized sticks and buttons for exceptional comfort
Enhance your mobile gaming experience with console-sized GameSir G8 Galileo sticks and buttons that provide unparalleled comfort for extended gaming sessions. It's like having a console controller in the palm of your hand, offering unparalleled control of every game you play. Whether you're navigating treacherous terrain or capturing precise shots, the G8 Galileo will ensure professional precision and maximum comfort.
2. Accurate and Durable: Elevate Your Game with GameSir™ Hall Technology
GameSir Hall-effect pickup levers provide 360° seamless precision control, offering the precision and durability that mobile gamers demand. You can get an enhanced gaming experience in a variety of games. Anti-friction slip rings provide super-smooth lever control, reducing wear and extending service life. Precision-tuned analog triggers with Hall effect technology offer unparalleled fluidity and responsiveness, giving you a competitive edge in any game. For FPS and action gamers, there's even a quick switch to Hair Trigger mode by holding down the M+LT/RT buttons. Whether you need precise linear control or maximum response, the G8 driver will give you the competitive edge you need.
3. Universal compatibility: Extendable controller and ample space on the back
Purposely designed for universal compatibility, the GameSir G8+ features a retractable bridge and enough rear space to be compatible with a wide range of phone models ranging in length from 110-215 mm / 4.33-8.46 inches. This controller stands out for being ultimately compatible with Switch and tablets, allowing you to play on all the devices you desire.
4. Replaceable magnetic components
Upgrade your GameSir G8+ to match your unique style with interchangeable components - magnetic bezel, lever caps and front button covers. By changing components, gamers can customize their preferred and favorite gameplay style, including joysticks with different heights, changing the layout of the front buttons, and customizing the appearance of the controller.
5. Realistic vibration: asymmetric motors
The G8+ controller features dual motors that provide both powerful and subtle vibrations, improving tactile feedback for an immersive gaming experience. With asymmetrical motors in the triggers, gamers can feel the precise feedback of shots and impacts, bringing realism to every moment.
6. Motion control: Built-in 6-axis gyroscope
The G8+ controller, which supports gyroscope function in Switch devices, allows one-touch wake-up and offers high compatibility with Switch. Enjoy improved motion-sensing controls that make gameplay more accurate and immersive.
7. Button Design: E-sport level providing comfortable haptic feedback
With membrane buttons with adjustable layout and customizable values, the G8+ Galileo allows gamers to customize control settings to suit their preferences. Equipped with a touch switch, D-pad, and LB and RB buttons, the controller provides a tactile yet muted feel that ensures every press is clear and responsive. The G8+ Galileo Wireless Controller also supports the Turbo function and includes two macro buttons on the back with a remapping function.
8. Express your individuality: laser-etched textured handles and buttons made of high-density fluorescent ink
Our laser-etched textured handles ensure a secure and comfortable grip, while the high-density fluorescent ink buttons add a vibrant, engaging touch to your gaming experience. It's not just about gaming; It's about expressing yourself and being different.
9. Software Customization: Customize the controller to your needs
By downloading the GameSir app, gamers can perform firmware updates, adjust stick and trigger dead zones, adjust vibration intensity, and test buttons, among other things. Some features can also be accessed using hot-key combinations, ensuring seamless editing.

GameSir Tarantula Pro: The revolutionary game controller for demanding gamers
GameSir Tarantula Pro reacts with lightning speed, just like a tarantula hunting its prey. With innovative design and advanced features, this controller is ready to take your gaming experience to a whole new level.
Innovative design and technology
Extra buttons on the front arranged in three lines RGB light strip and coloured front buttons for a distinctive look New Mag-ResTM TMR Sticks combining the benefits of a potentiometer and Hall effect

Three connection modes: Bluetooth, 2.4GHz wireless and wired Compatibility with Switch, PC, iOS, Android and Steam Smooth gaming experience with minimal latency across platforms
Precise controls for professional performance
GameSir Mag-ResTM TMR sticks for precise performance and low power consumption Hall Effect analogue triggers with quick switch to Hair Trigger mode HD Rumble for realistic haptic feedback
Advanced Features for Nintendo Switch
Built-in 6-axis gyroscope for precise motion control NFC function to work with Nintendo devices One-touch wake-up capability for Switch
Customisation for every player
9 mappable buttons for a personalized gaming style Adjustable RGB lighting including saturation, animation speed and colors Gear wheel mechanism to change the layout of the front buttons between different gaming platforms Back button latch for convenient control and prevention of unwanted input Ability to remap buttons on the fly using key combinations
These enhancements allow gamers to fully customize the controller to their gaming habits and preferences, ensuring an optimal gaming experience across platforms.
Software Support and Updates
GameSir Connect app for firmware updates Dead zone editing for levers and triggers Adjust vibration intensity and test buttons Access some functions using key combinations on the fly
GameSir Tarantula Pro is more than just a controller - it's a comprehensive gaming tool designed for maximum performance, comfort and customizability. Whether you're a casual gamer or a seasoned pro, this controller gives you the precision, responsiveness and style you need to achieve gaming excellence. Get ready for a new era of gaming with the GameSir Tarantula Pro!

item.TECH_SUPPORT:
Connection Instructions
Connecting to Windows
Cable connection
Use the included USB-C cable to connect the controller to your computer. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit continuously.
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 2, 3 and 4 start flashing, then release the buttons. Open the list of Bluetooth devices on your computer, find the device named "Wireless Controller" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is solid.
Connecting via receiver
Plug the receiver into the USB port of the device; the receiver indicator will flash. Press and hold the buttons on the remote for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 1, 2, 4 and 5 start flashing, then release the buttons and wait for the remote to connect to the receiver. Connection is successful when the indicators on both the controller and the receiver are lit continuously.
Connecting to Nintendo Switch
Bluetooth connection
From the Switch main menu, go to Controllers - Change grip/sequence and wait on this screen. Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the channel indicators start flashing horizontally, then release the buttons and wait for the connection. Connection is successful when the channel indicator lights up continuously.
Connecting to an Android device
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the controller buttons for 2 seconds until the channel 1 and 5 indicators start flashing, then release the button. Open the Bluetooth device list on your phone, find the device named "GameSir-Tarantula Pro" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit solid.
Connecting to an iOS device
Bluetooth connection
Press and hold the buttons on the controller for 2 seconds until the indicators for channels 2, 3 and 4 start flashing, then release the buttons. Open the Bluetooth device list on your phone, find the device named "DUOLSHOK 4 Wireless Controller" and click connect. Connection is successful when the channel indicator is lit solid.
Note: You can change the color of the Home indicator in the phone settings: Settings - General - Game Controller.
* If the connection is not successful, press and hold the controller pairing button for 2 seconds to re-enter pairing mode.

item.NAME: GameSir X2 Pro Xbox for Android Midnight (type-C)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Popis produktu
Užijte si hry naplno s ovladačem GameSir X2 Pro - mobilním herním ovladačem s puncem kvality Xboxu. X2 Pro je speciálně navržen pro cloudové hraní her na Xbox na chytrých telefonech se systémem Android, má analogové spouštěče s Hall Effectem, nárazníky s mikrospínači Kailh, 3D joysticky Alps, 2 mapovatelná zadní tlačítka a texturované gumové úchyty. Vezměte si AAA tituly do přenosného hraní. X2 Pro zdokonaluje váš zážitek z mobilního hraní nad rámec konzole tím, že ho umožňuje kdekoli, kdykoli a komukoli.
Klíčové vlastnosti: 1. Oficiálně licencováno společností Xbox pro chytré telefony se systémem Android.
2. Obsahuje 1 měsíc Xbox Game Pass Ultimate zdarma: S X2 Pro získáte 1 měsíc služby Xbox Game Pass Ultimate ZDARMA. Ponořte se přímo do více než 100 vysoce kvalitních her pro Xbox právě teď.
* Platí pouze pro nové členy služby Xbox Game Pass Ultimate. Je vyžadována kreditní karta. Pokud akci nezrušíte, bude vám po skončení propagačního období účtována aktuální běžná cena členství. Limit: 1 na osobu/účet.
3. Hrajte ty nejlepší počítačové a konzolové hry z cloudu: Využijte X2 Pro a užívejte si skvělé PC a konzolové hry dostupnějším, ale stále konkurenceschopným způsobem, aniž byste museli pořizovat špičkový počítač nebo konzoli. Podpora téměř všech populárních cloudových herních služeb, jako je Xbox Cloud Gaming (Beta) s Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, Stadia, NVIDIA GeForce Now a Amazon Luna.
4. Vzdálené hraní na Xboxu a PC kdekoli: Hrajte na dálku na Xboxu a PC pomocí X2 Pro na požadovaném místě v místnosti nebo mimo domov. Podporuje téměř všechny znamé streamovací služby jako jsou Xbox Remote Play, Steam Link, Rainway a Moonlight.
5. Hrajte libovolné hry pro systém Android s podporou ovladače: Připojte telefon k zařízení X2 Pro a rovnou se pusťte do všech her s podporou ovladače od Diablo Immortal po Fortnite, aniž byste se museli trápit s neohrabaným ovládáním na dotykovém displeji.
6. Ovládání na úrovni konzole:
A. Analogové spouštěče s Hallovým efektem: Zažijte plynulé a dokonalé ovládání zrychlení a brzdění ve hře Forza Horizon 5 s analogovými spouštěmi Hall Effect s přesností na 0,1 mm - vše máte dokonale pod kontrolou na dosah ruky.
B. 3D joysticky Alps: X2 Pro je vybaven joysticky Alps 3D, které vám umožní plynulé a přesné ovládání v rozsahu 360°. Kromě toho poskytují klikací tlačítka L3/R3 další možnosti vstupu pro hraní, takže si můžete vychutnat lepší herní zážitek.
C. Nárazníky Kailh Microswitch: X2 Pro je navržen s nárazníky Kailh Microswitch a poskytuje citlivou a hmatovou zpětnou vazbu se sníženou vzdáleností ovládání pouze 0,6 mm, což je přibližně o 40 % méně, než u běžného membránového ovladače.
D. Ihned připojitelná zadní tlačítka: X2 Pro je navržen pro mobilní hraní na profesionální úrovni a je vybaven 2 přídavnými zadními tlačítky, takže můžete své cenné akce ve hře mapovat za chodu, a to i uprostřed hry. Naprogramujte a používejte okamžitě, není potřeba žádný software.
7. Přímé připojení typu C, zanedbatelná vstupní latence: Díky přímému připojení k telefonu přes port Type-C zajišťuje X2 Pro zanedbatelné vstupní zpoždění bez zpoždění bezdrátového signálu.
8. Přizpůsobte se svému hernímu stylu: X2 Pro nabízí možnosti přizpůsobení od vyměnitelných tlačítek ABXY až po krytky joysticku. Různí hráči si jej proto mohou přizpůsobit svému hernímu stylu v různých hrách a hrát co nejlépe.
A. 2 rozložení ABXY: Pro uspokojení různých herních stylů hráčů jsme speciálně použili magnetickou a odnímatelnou konstrukci tlačítek ABXY, takže hráči mohou jednoduchým tahem měnit rozložení mezi standardním rozložením ABXY pro Xbox a Switch (je třeba také vybrat příslušné rozložení v aplikaci GameSir).
B. 2 sady krytek joysticků: X2 Pro se dodává se 2 sadami krytek joysticků - konkávní a konvexní - které odpovídají vašemu hernímu stylu a pohodlí.
9. Schopnosti. Péče. Obsah: X2 Pro se zaměřuje nejen na schopnosti, ale také na péči, aby vaše spokojenost byla zajištěna.
A. Rozšiřitelný: V souladu se stejnou rozšiřitelnou a stabilní konstrukcí řady X2 se X2 Pro hodí pro většinu telefonů se systémem Android, pokud mají délku 110-179 mm.
B. Pohodlné: Díky tomu, že jsou navrženy pro delší hraní, můžete zjistit, že texturované gumové úchyty jsou příliš pohodlné na to, abyste je mohli odložit.
C. Flexibilní: Vhodné pro použití v terénu - díky otočnému portu Type-C není připojení k telefonu tuhé, ale pružnější. Stačí naklonit, připojit do USB typu C, snadno a bez starostí.
D. Zapamatovatelné: Díky funkci snímání jedním kliknutím vám X2 Pro umožňuje snadný přístup k vašim cenným herním akcím.
E. Přenosné: V jednom pouzdře můžete X2 Pro zabalit se základním herním příslušenstvím, ať už jde o bezdrátová sluchátka nebo powerbanku, a používat jej jako domácí dekoraci při hraní doma nebo jako ochranné pouzdro na cestách.
10. Průchozí nabíjení: X2 Pro je navrženo tak, abyste si mohli vychutnat nezastavitelný herní zážitek, a nabízí průchozí nabíjení pro hraní během nabíjení.
Poznámky:
V případě potřeby je možné použít i jiné zařízení, než je zařízení X2, které je součástí balení: Pouze některé telefony se systémem Android podporují průchozí nabíjení. Níže je uveden stručný seznam kompatibilních a nekompatibilních telefonů. Upozorňujeme, že seznam není kompletní vzhledem k množství telefonů na trhu a naší omezené možnosti testovat všechny telefony. Jiné telefony mohou, ale nemusí fungovat pro průchozí nabíjení na zařízení X2 Pro. Kompatibilní s průchozím nabíjením: Black Shark 2, Black Shark 3, Google Pixel4 XL, HONOR V30 Pro, HUAWEI Mate 40 Pro, HUAWEI P40, HUAWEI P40 Pro, Realme GT2 Pro, Samsung Note10, Samsung S20, Smartisan Nut 3 , Sony Xperia 1, vivo iQOO, vivo iQOO 3, Xiaomi Mi 9, Xiaomi Mi Mix 3, Xiaomi MIX 4 atd. Nekompatibilní: HONOR 10, HUAWEI nova 9 Pro, HUAWEI P50 Pro, OnePlus 10 Pro, OnePlus 6, OnePlus 7T, Oppo Reno, Realme X2 Pro, REDMAGIC 7 Pro , Redmi K30 Pro atd.

item.NAME: PS5/PC Wireless Fighting Commander OCTA Pro
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI Wireless Fighting Commander OCTA Pro for PS5/PC
Take your fighting games to the next level with the HORI Wireless Fighting Commander OCTA Pro for PlayStation 5 and PC. This premium fightpad combines wireless freedom with professional features that both casual players and tournament fighters will appreciate.
Professional Equipment for Victory
Precise Control - Octagonal analog stick for accurate movements and 6-button layout optimized for fighting games Interchangeable D-pad - Three different D-pad styles to customize to your gaming style Programmable Back Buttons - Individual settings for faster reactions and more complex combinations Quality Microswitches - All buttons are equipped with responsive switches for immediate feedback LOCK Function - Protection against accidental button presses during tournament matches
Premium Wireless Experience
Wireless Technology - USB-C receiver with a range of up to 10 meters for complete freedom of movement Dual Mode - Option to connect wirelessly or via cable (3m USB-C cable included) Cable Lock - Special feature to prevent accidental disconnection during intense battles Battery Life - Approximately 10 hours of gameplay on a single charge
Complete Equipment for Modern Gaming
Touchpad - Full support for all PS5 functions Audio Features - 3.5mm headphone jack with quick mute button Analog Slider - Comfortable navigation in game menus and lobbies Tactile Shoulder Buttons - Precise timing for special attacks Adjustable Sensitivity - Customize response according to your preferences using the companion app
Compatibility
PlayStation 5 (wireless and wired) Windows 11/10 PC (wireless and wired) PlayStation 4 (wired mode only)
Package Contents: Wireless Fighting Commander OCTA Pro, USB-C receiver, 3m USB-C cable, interchangeable D-pads, user manual
Note: Officially licensed by Sony. When playing on PlayStation 4 consoles, please use wired mode.

item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Get the Xbox gaming advantage that the GameSir G7 HE brings. With Hall Effect levers and triggers, this controller delivers exceptional durability and precise control. The front E-Sport buttons with micro switches provide comfort and satisfying feedback that makes every press different and clear. Experience realistic and subtle vibrations with four Rumble motors that let you feel every bump and dive deep into your game. Two color options, white and black, are also available.
Key Features:
Universal Compatibility: Compatible with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One X|S, Windows 10/11 and Steam. G7 HE allows players to seamlessly switch between different platforms and games. GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks: GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks provide a durable lifespan of up to 5 million cycles, precise and responsive feedback, plus wear-resistant rings for drift-proof performance. Magnetic Hall Effect Triggers: Utilizing precision-tuned technology from the G7 HE driver, Hall Effect analog triggers provide consistent travel and depth. Whether you're accelerating or braking in racing games, these triggers provide reliable, smooth and precise control. For FPS and action games requiring responsive feedback, players can also switch the trigger mode to "Hair trigger" by holding down the M+LT/RT buttons for 2 seconds. Front buttons with 3 million press life: The front buttons feature a tactile but padded micro switch and can reach a lifetime of up to 3 million presses. Each stroke provides responsive and clickable feedback with a crisp e-sport feel that enhances gaming fun. Hyperrealistic Rumble Motors: Two distinct Rumble Motors in the grips for strong and subtle vibrations. Two asymmetrical motors inside the triggers bring feedback to your fingertips. Experience precise feedback on drops, shots and impacts. Magnetic interchangeable faceplate: Customize your unique Xbox controller and stand out instantly. The magnetic feature ensures the faceplate can be swapped out for another, enhancing the immersive gaming experience. The paintable front panel allows gamers to paint and customize the G7 HE without having to disassemble the controller. Enjoy expressing yourself through customization. 3.5mm headphone jack and microphone mute button: The 3.5mm audio jack makes it easy to connect a headset for immersive sound and clear communication. Independent mute button provides instant microphone muting for privacy and convenience during online interactions. 2 Adjustable Rear Buttons: Widely support remapping functionality for nearly every button on the controller, adding additional control options to your gaming experience.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
GameSir G7 HE for Xbox offers precise control with Hall Effect technology, E-sport buttons, realistic vibrations and universal compatibility for the ultimate gaming experience.

item.NAME: GameSir Super Nova Whipped Pink
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Super Nova redefines gaming comfort and precision with ultra-quiet and responsive controls. With quiet ABXY buttons and advanced GameSir™ Hall Effect sensing joysticks, it ensures smooth and precise feedback while minimizing disruptions. Whether you're playing on PC, Switch, Android, or iOS, Super Nova's three-mode connectivity and full customization options make it the perfect choice for gamers seeking a flexible and immersive experience. From its ergonomic design to customizable RGB lighting, it's designed for those who demand both performance and style.
Key Features:
1. Three-mode connectivity for multi-platform compatibility Super Nova offers versatile connectivity and works seamlessly with PC, Switch, Android, and iOS devices through Bluetooth, wired, and wireless connections. Players can effortlessly switch between connection modes using a convenient mode switch, ensuring a smooth and flexible gaming experience across different platforms.
2. GameSirTM Hall Effect sensing joysticks, ultra drift-resistant GameSir™ Hall Effect sensing joysticks provide lasting durability up to 5 million cycles, offering precise and responsive feedback. Anti-friction glide rings ensure ultra-smooth stick guidance, reducing stick grinding and extending usage time.
3. Precisely tuned Hall Effect triggers with trigger stops GameSir's precisely tuned Hall Effect analog triggers offer unmatched smoothness and response. With trigger stops, players can switch triggers to short-pull position. After switching, pressing the trigger button three times all the way down will automatically calibrate the triggers. Additionally, players can activate fine trigger mode using the M+LT/RT button combination (triggers must be in long-pull position). Whether you need precise linear control or perfect response, Super Nova gives you the competitive edge you need.
4. 1000Hz polling rate supports both wired and wireless dongle connection Enjoy an ultra-responsive gaming experience with 1000Hz polling rate. This ensures your inputs will be registered almost instantly, minimizing latency and maximizing your performance during competitive gameplay.
5. Dual asymmetric motors and 6-axis gyroscope for immersive gaming Super Nova features dual asymmetric rumble motors providing both powerful and subtle vibrations, making every minor collision and shot feel like they're happening right in your hands. The built-in 6-axis gyroscope along with one-press wake function is highly compatible with Switch devices, providing precise motion control for an immersive gaming experience.
6. Full customization Super Nova offers two back buttons with support for individual button mapping and macro recording, giving players the flexibility to customize controls for enhanced gameplay. These buttons provide quick access to essential commands right at your fingertips. Additionally, Super Nova features customizable RGB light strips and a detachable center faceplate, allowing you to customize your gaming setup to reflect your style. For even more customization, the ABXY layout can be physically switched, offering the freedom to choose the setup that best matches your gaming style.
7. Comfortable gaming experience Super Nova is designed to provide a comfortable gaming experience. Its rubberized, laser-engraved textured grips and membrane buttons ensure soft and secure grip, ideal for long gaming sessions. The quiet ABXY buttons further enhance immersion by minimizing keystroke noise, allowing you to focus on the game without distractions.
8. Smart charging dock with auto start-stop Super Nova features a 1000mAh battery and includes a smart charging dock with auto start-stop. Simply lift the controller to start playing, and when you're done, place it back on the dock to effortlessly recharge. With this seamless charging, you'll be ready for your next gaming session without interruption.
9. Software support By downloading the GameSir and GameSir Connect apps, players can perform firmware updates, adjust stick and trigger dead zones, customize vibration intensity, and test buttons among other features. Some functions can also be accessed through on-the-fly key combinations, ensuring seamless setup.

item.NAME: GO 64035 Nintendo Mario Kart - Yoshi
item.DESCRIPTION:
GO 64035 Nintendo Mario Kart - Yoshi
Yoshi in a racing car from Mario Kart™ Carrera GO!!! Original Nintendo License Scale 1:43 From 6 years
Yoshi steps on the power on your race track Alongside his friend Mario, Yoshi experiences great adventures and races against his opponents. This little dragon feels comfortable behind the wheel of his car and shows that he has just what it takes to become a real racing driver. Will Yoshi be the first to finish on your Carrera race track?
Fun-filled action guaranteed This little dragon arrives at your home in a cool green racing car and is ready to go. Thanks to an original Nintendo license, this slot car on a scale of 1:43 has been faithfully crafted true to the original and equipped with extra large wheels. Thanks to these wheels, the car hardly loses its grip and masters even difficult corners with no effort. One thing is for sure: Together, you can win every race!

item.NAME: PS5/PC NOLVA Mechanical All-Button Arcade Control.
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI NOLVA Mechanical All-Button Arcade Controller for PS5/PC
Introducing the HORI NOLVA Mechanical All-Button Controller for PlayStation 5 and Windows 11/10 – the first all-button controller from HORI!
This professional arcade controller brings a revolution to the world of fighting games thanks to its innovative design without a joystick. Customize your button layout using three custom buttons with interchangeable mechanical switches. The controller combines solid construction with a lightweight and compact design that is ideal for both home gaming and traveling to tournaments.
Key Features:
Customizable buttons - Complete configuration of functions using the companion app Interchangeable mechanical switches - Three hot-swappable buttons for individual response settings Button safety lock - Protection against accidental presses during tournaments Detachable cable with lock - Security against accidental disconnection during intense gaming Touch pad - Full support for all PlayStation 5 functions 3.5mm headphone jack - Option to connect audio devices directly to the controller Anti-slip base - Stable position even during the most demanding gaming moments
Compatibility:
PlayStation 5 (full support) Windows 11/10 PC PlayStation 4 (only with wired connection using USB-C to USB-A data cable, sold separately)
Package contents: HORI NOLVA Mechanical All-Button Arcade Controller, detachable USB cable, user manual
Officially licensed by Sony. Please note that this product is not authorized for sale in the United States or its territories.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: The first professional all-button arcade controller ideal for tournament fighting games.

PS5 Terminator 2D: NO FATE - Day One Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
PS5 Terminator 2D: NO FATE - Day One Edition
Terminator 2D: NO FATE is an action 2D platformer that combines iconic scenes from Terminator 2: Judgment Day with original scenarios and multiple possible endings. The game brings an authentic arcade experience with detailed pixel graphics and dynamic gameplay, reminiscent of classic titles from the 80s and 90s. Immerse yourself in the world of Terminator like never before!
Exclusive Day One Edition Content
Terminator 2D: NO FATE base game for PlayStation®5 Reversible cover "Unknown Future" cloth poster Collectible metal arcade token (25 mm) Full-color manual Premium collector's box
Key Features
Action 2D Platformer - Enter a classic arcade experience that pays homage to the Terminator universe with authentic arcade gameplay, music, and visuals created from the ground up. Three Playable Characters - Take on the roles of Sarah Connor, John Connor, and T-800 in diverse missions. Rich Branching Story - The game combines iconic scenes from the film with original scenarios and offers multiple possible endings. Varied Gameplay - Shoot, sneak, and escape the blades of T-1000 in diverse levels and lead the Resistance as John Connor in key Future War missions. Epic Battles - Face the full might of Cyberdyne and Skynet, fight against various types of enemies, and confront thrilling boss battles. Retro Pixel Graphics - Experience the world of Terminator 2: Judgment Day like never before with detailed pixel graphics of your favorite characters and scenes. Cinematic Soundtrack - Enjoy a cinematic soundtrack featuring reworked music from the legendary film as well as brand new tracks. Multiple Game Modes - Try different game modes: Story Mode, Arcade Mode, Infinite Mode, Boss Rush, Mother of the Future, and Level Training!
Get ready for an unforgettable experience with PS5 Terminator 2D: NO FATE - Day One Edition and experience the legendary story in a unique 2D arcade form!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Platform game for PlayStation 5
item.TECHSPECS:
Release date: September 5, 2025
Language support
Voice-over: English
Subtitles: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish (Spain), Portuguese (Brazil), Russian, Polish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

item.NAME: PS5 Blades of Fire Day 1 Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
PS5 Blades of Fire Day 1 Edition
Experience an epic adventure in Blades of Fire, the latest action title from award-winning studio MercurySteam! Become Aran de Lira, a brave warrior of the royal guard, and face fearsome enemies in a world full of mysteries, dangers, and destiny. Forge your own legend and embark on a quest that will test your courage and tactics in a unique combat system.
Key Features:
Divine Metal - Fight against Queen Nerea's curse, which transforms steel into stone, and survive thanks to the rare divine metal used by the enemy army. Forging - Find ancient scrolls, perfect your forging skills, and create a unique weapon according to your combat style. The choice of materials and weapon category will affect their properties such as weight, sharpness, or durability. Diverse Weapons - Choose from 7 weapon categories and more than 30 unique forging scrolls. Experiment with endless combinations and find the weapon that perfectly fits your style. Tactical Combat - Engage in strategic battles where you can target specific parts of the enemy's body. The right weapon and attack will determine victory in combat. With a Faithful Companion - Adso, Aran's wise and devoted companion, will not only help you analyze enemies and record insights in the chronicle but also provide valuable advice during battles. Diverse World of Enemies - Face more than 50 types of enemies, including monsters, undead, and elite soldiers of the royal guard. Each has its unique attack style and equipment. Epic Environments - Explore dramatic sceneries, from majestic castles through palace labyrinths to other mysterious locations, filled with unexpected obstacles and secrets.
PS5 Blades of Fire Day 1 Edition is a must-have for fans of action adventures who are looking for a game with a deep story, challenging combat, and the ability to create their own weapons. Join Aran de Lira on his journey and forge your own legend!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Action adventure for PlayStation 5
item.TECHSPECS:
Day 1 Edition Content
The Day 1 Edition of Blades of Fire includes the base game plus exclusive bonus content in the form of the Adventure Pack, which includes:
Iron Paladin Armor - exclusive appearance for the main character Aran Steel Lord Armor - another unique appearance for Aran Hyssop Hammer Head - special weapon part to expand your forging arsenal Additional forging materials - get a head start with extra materials for forging your first weapons
This limited Day 1 Edition is ideal for players who want to start their adventure with an advantage and obtain exclusive content that will not be commonly available in the standard version of the game later.

item.NAME: GameSir VX2 AimSwitch Combo Mouse + Keyboard V2.0
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
GameSir VX2 AimSwitch herní kombo podsvícené bezdrátové mechanické klávesnice a špičkové herní myši.
Kompatibilní s konzolemi Xbox One/Series X|S; Playstation 4 a s PC
Bezdrátová technologie Agility X 2,4 GHz druhé generace (2nd Gen.)
GameSir vyvinul robustní bezdrátové řešení pro řešení základních problémů latence, stability a konektivity. Konečným výsledkem je bezdrátová technologie Agility X 2,4 GHz, profesionální bezdrátové řešení, které poskytuje okamžité bezdrátové připojení s ultra nízkou latencí 1 ms. Nová generace je 8 krát rychlejší než ta předchozí.
Mechanický červené spínače 36 TTC
Podsvícená bezdrátová mechanická herní klávesnice GameSir VX2 AimSwitch je vybavena mechanickými červenými spínači 36 TTC, které vydrží až 50 milionů stisknutí. Klávesnice je také vybavena funkcí anti-ghosting až pro 7 současných stisknutí kláves.
Špičková ultralehká herní myš GM500 s prvotřídním senzorem
GameSir GM500 je drátová odlehčená myš s dutým designem odolným vůči potu a včetně odvětrávání. Obsahuje mikrospínač Kailh s životností 20 milionů kliknutí a PMW33600 optický senzor s maximem 12000DPI. Jsou k dispozici nastavitelné 3 režimy osvětelení jasu.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Used goods.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
The next evolution of Nintendo Switch is here!
Bring games to life with a larger 1080p screen – or connect the console to a TV and play in up to 4K resolution. Nintendo Switch 2 offers support for HDR, VRR, and frame rates of 120 frames per second.
The Joy-Con 2 controllers now snap into place using magnetic connectors. Each controller can even be used as a mouse in compatible games.
Play brand new games – such as Mario Kart World – only on Nintendo Switch 2. Additionally, you can play compatible titles from the Nintendo Switch console.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Say "hello" to the GameChat feature. With the press of a button, you can start chatting with friends anytime. Talk to them while showing them what you're playing. And for an even more personal experience, connect a camera to your Nintendo Switch 2 or another compatible USB-C camera (sold separately).
GameShare
Applies only to local wireless play: Share your games in person. Using the GameShare service on Nintendo Switch 2, you can share compatible games with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2. Everyone can play the game, even if they don't own a copy.
New dock
Use the included dock to connect Nintendo Switch 2 to your TV and enjoy 4K resolution for even greater detail.
Smooth mouse control
The optical sensor on the side of each Joy-Con 2 controller allows for mouse control on various surfaces such as a table or even your lap.
Both Joy-Con 2 controllers can be used simultaneously for mouse control, opening up new gameplay possibilities – for example, use both hands to control two mouse controllers at the same time.
Larger screen, same thickness
Enjoy gaming even more with a 7.9-inch display that allows you to experience smooth gameplay anytime, anywhere. Play with greater detail and brightness thanks to the high-resolution LCD display, HDR support, and up to 120 frames per second.
New stand with freely adjustable viewing angle
Place your Nintendo Switch console anywhere you want in tabletop mode thanks to a larger and more stable stand. The adjustment of up to 150 degrees offers the freedom to choose a comfortable angle for your gaming. This improved stand will be perfect for multiplayer gaming!
The top of the console now includes a USB-C port, complementing the one already on the bottom of the console. Connect the included power adapter and play in tabletop mode while the console charges.
Connecting Joy-Con 2 controllers... in an instant
Meet the new Joy-Con 2 controllers, which connect and disconnect easily. Thanks to strong magnets, the controllers are firmly attached to the console. Just press the release button on the back, and the magnetic lock will disconnect in a flash.
Show off your gaming face
Connect a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), and you can video chat and see other players' faces while playing. Up to four people can video chat at once.
3 different play modes
Nintendo Switch 2 can transform according to your gaming style. Just like previous Nintendo Switch consoles, you can enjoy games anytime, anywhere in TV, tabletop, or handheld mode.
Play Nintendo Switch 2 games and compatible Nintendo Switch titles
In addition to Nintendo Switch 2 games, you can also play compatible physical and digital titles that were released for Nintendo Switch on this console. Some Nintendo Switch games may not be fully supported or supported at all on Nintendo Switch 2.
Nintendo Switch Online members can continue to use the service on Nintendo Switch 2.
Package includes:
Nintendo Switch 2 console Joy-Con 2 (L) / (R) Two Joy-Con 2 straps Nintendo Switch 2 dock Joy-Con 2 grip Power adapter for Nintendo Switch 2 Ultra High-Speed HDMI™ cable Nintendo Switch 2 user manual
Nintendo Switch 2 will be available from June 5, 2025. A bundle with Mario Kart World will also be available.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch 2 Console

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch 2 + Mario Kart World
item.DESCRIPTION:
The next evolution of Nintendo Switch is here!
Bring games to life with a larger 1080p screen – or connect the console to a TV and play in up to 4K resolution. Nintendo Switch 2 offers support for HDR, VRR and frame rates of 120 frames per second.
The Joy-Con 2 controllers now snap into place using magnetic connectors. Each controller can even be used as a mouse in compatible games.
Play brand new games – such as Mario Kart World – only on Nintendo Switch 2. Additionally, you can play compatible titles from the Nintendo Switch console.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Say "hello" to the GameChat feature. With the press of a button, you can start chatting with friends anytime. Talk to them while showing them what you're playing. And for an even more personal experience, connect a camera to your Nintendo Switch 2 or another compatible USB-C camera (sold separately).
GameShare
Applies only to local wireless play: Share your games in person. Using the GameShare service on Nintendo Switch 2, you can share compatible games with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2. Everyone can play the game, even if they don't own a copy.
New dock
Use the included dock to connect Nintendo Switch 2 to your TV and enjoy 4K resolution for even greater detail.
Smooth mouse control
The optical sensor on the side of each Joy-Con 2 controller allows for mouse control on various surfaces such as a table or even your lap.
Both Joy-Con 2 controllers can be used simultaneously for mouse control, opening up new gameplay possibilities – for example, use both hands to control two mouse controllers at the same time.
Larger screen, same thickness
Enjoy gaming even more with a 7.9-inch display that allows you to experience smooth gameplay anytime, anywhere. Play with greater detail and brightness thanks to the high-resolution LCD display, HDR support, and up to 120 frames per second.
New stand with freely adjustable viewing angle
Place your Nintendo Switch console anywhere you want in tabletop mode thanks to a larger and more stable stand. The adjustment of up to 150 degrees offers the freedom to choose a comfortable angle for your gaming. This improved stand will be perfect for multiplayer gaming!
The top of the console now includes a USB-C port, complementing the one already on the bottom of the console. Connect the included power adapter and play in tabletop mode while the console charges.
Connecting Joy-Con 2 controllers... in an instant
Meet the new Joy-Con 2 controllers, which connect and disconnect easily. Thanks to strong magnets, the controllers are firmly attached to the console. Just press the release button on the back, and the magnetic lock will disconnect in a flash.
Show off your gaming face
Connect a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), and you can video chat and see other players' faces while playing. Up to four people can video chat at once.
3 different play modes
Nintendo Switch 2 can transform according to your gaming style. Just like previous Nintendo Switch consoles, you can enjoy games anytime, anywhere in TV, tabletop, or handheld mode.
Play Nintendo Switch 2 games and compatible Nintendo Switch titles
In addition to Nintendo Switch 2 games, you can also play compatible physical and digital titles that were released for Nintendo Switch on this console. Some Nintendo Switch games may not be fully supported or supported at all on Nintendo Switch 2.
Nintendo Switch Online members can continue to use the service on Nintendo Switch 2.
Package includes:
Nintendo Switch 2 console Joy-Con 2 (L) / (R) Two Joy-Con 2 straps Nintendo Switch 2 dock Joy-Con 2 grip Power adapter for Nintendo Switch 2 Ultra High-Speed HDMI™ cable Nintendo Switch 2 user manual
Nintendo Switch 2 will be available from June 5, 2025. A bundle with Mario Kart World will also be available.
Start your engines and race through an expansive world! The racetrack is absolutely everywhere!
Vast world of tracks
Drive through plains, cities, water areas, volcanoes, and many other locations. Here, everything is connected!
Go off the track
Racing isn't just about the road. Drive off the track and race from a distance too!
Modes:
Grand Prix
Compete for the highest number of points on four connected tracks. Try to secure first place among 24 racers! The race includes the spaces between tracks!
Knockout Tour
Drive through several tracks at once, but beware, there won't be time for pit stops!
Free Roam
So where to next? It's up to you! Choose your next direction in this new game mode. Explore areas that catch your eye or take a photo at picturesque locations.
Play together
Have fun with friends, whether they're with you or somewhere else!
Up to 4 players can race on a single console. You can control the game through button or motion controls. Connect your Joy-Con 2 controller to the Joy-Con 2 wheel accessory (sold separately) and get the feeling of real racing. You can also play using wirelessly connected Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controllers.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Turn on GameChat and enjoy having your friends right beside you – even if they're on the other side of the world!
Talk using the console's built-in microphone or share your screen in real-time. If you connect a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), you can meet face-to-face through video chat.
Whether you're participating in a race or just browsing through the game world, you'll feel like you're driving together!
Play as if you're really driving!
Insert the Joy-Con 2 controller and enjoy proper fun with motion controls! Joy-Con 2 connects and disconnects easily thanks to magnetic connections.
Bring everyone together from anywhere
Show the world your gaming face in GameChat video chat with the Nintendo Switch 2 camera!
The Nintendo Switch 2 + Mario Kart World bundle will be available from June 5, 2025.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch 2 + Mario Kart World

item.NAME: Joy-Con 2 Pair Light Blue/Light Red
item.DESCRIPTION:
The updated Joy-Con 2 controllers have easy-to-use motion controls and HD rumble 2, along with the new C Button for easy GameChat** access and all-new mouse controls in compatible games.
This set includes both a left and right Joy-Con 2 controller, along with a pair of Joy-Con 2 straps, perfect for local multiplayer with a friend in compatible games.
Only for use with Nintendo Switch 2.
The Nintendo Switch 2 console comes with one Joy-Con 2 (L) and one Joy-Con 2 (R), and two Joy-Con 2 straps.
Joy-Con 2 (L) and Joy-Con 2 (R) are also each sold separately.
Joy-Con 2 controllers will be available on June 5th 2025.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Accessories for Nintendo Switch 2

item.NAME: Joy-Con 2 Strap Pair Light Blue/Light Red
Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Take your gaming to the next level with the Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controller
This controller includes a C Button for opening the GameChat menu at any time, GL/GR Buttons that you can freely map to any buttons you choose, an audio jack for headphones and headsets, among other features.
Includes USB charging cable.
Features include:
HD rumble 2 Motion controls Built-in amiibo functionality* Capture Button C Button for GameChat Mappable GL/GR Buttons Audio jack – 4 pole stereo 3.5mm mini plug (CTIA standard)
Only for use with Nintendo Switch 2.
*amiibo sold separately.
Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controller will be available on June 5th 2025.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch 2 Carrying Case & Screen Protector
NS2 microSD Express card 256 GB Samsung
NS2 microSD Express card 256 GB Sandisk
NS2 Bravely Default: Flying Fairy HD Remaster
item.DESCRIPTION:
Follow four Warriors of Light on a journey to restore the elemental crystals in the HD remaster of the Nintendo 3DS RPG masterpiece, BRAVELY DEFAULT. Experience an RPG that brings new depth to classic, turn-based battles with the introduction of the “Brave & Default” system – featuring an array of options to customise your characters with over 20 unique jobs. The game also includes quality of life updates and two new minigames that leverage the dual mouse controls of Nintendo Switch 2.
BRAVELY DEFAULT FLYING FAIRY HD Remaster is launching on June 5th 2025 on Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch 2 game

item.NAME: NS2 Donkey Kong Bananza
item.DESCRIPTION:
Donkey Kong and his groundbreaking adventure!
The big guy is back – Donkey Kong rushes to Nintendo Switch 2 with a completely new adventure!
Donkey Kong needs your help in the depths of the Underground World. The deeper you go, the more amazing places you'll discover!
Up and down, left and right
There will be no shortage of things for DK to light up with his powerful punches and smash to dust. Fight your way through this truly destructive adventure!
These villains are up to something!
This mysterious group – known as VoidCo – has set their sights on something very valuable...
But no one should mess with Mr. DK's favorite food!
Check out the golden bananas!
Golden bananas?! Word has spread across the island that this delicious treasure has been discovered. But then something terrible happened!
Who are VoidCo and what do they want?
During this chaos, VoidCo stole all the banana bunches. Donkey Kong must now venture deep underground to get them back!
DK finds a new buddy!
Together they'll be hot on the trail of this mysterious VoidCo company...
Will Donkey Kong get back all of his beloved bananas? You'll find out on June 5, 2025, when Donkey Kong Bananza releases on Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch 2

item.NAME: NS2 Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment
NS2 Kirby and the Forgotten Land+Star-Crossed WLD
item.DESCRIPTION:
Kirby's adventure continues on Nintendo Switch!
Nintendo Switch 2 Edition will offer:
A brand new Star-Crossed World story Enhanced graphics and frame rate The Nintendo Switch game Kirby and the Forgotten Land
Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World can only be played on Nintendo Switch 2 console.
If you already own Kirby and the Forgotten Land for Nintendo Switch, you only need to purchase the Upgrade Pack to play on Nintendo Switch 2.
Kirby embarks on a magical adventure!
Explore 3D levels full of jumping in this mysterious world, rescue Waddle Dees, and face off against the fierce Beast Pack. Hopefully, you'll work up a big appetite during this adventure!
Uncover the mystery of the meteorite!
After the world is struck by a powerful meteorite, Kirby must use his amazing abilities, including several new Mouthful Modes, to complete levels in this unexplored territory.
Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World will be released on August 28 on Nintendo Switch 2.

item.NAME: NS2 Street Fighter 6 Years 1-2 Fighters Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience the next evolution of Street Fighter in Street Fighter 6 with three distinct game modes, new gameplay features, and enhanced visuals. Fight your way to the top with new game modes exclusive to Nintendo Switch 2 like Local Wireless One on One and Avatar Matches. Enjoy new party modes utilising Joy-Con 2 controllers like Gyro Battle and Calorie Contest.
Street Fighter 6 Years 1-2 Fighter Edition is launching on June 5th 2025 on Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch 2 game

item.NAME: NS2 Super Mario Party Jamboree + Jamboree TV
item.DESCRIPTION:
Super-charged celebration for Nintendo Switch 2
Super Mario Party Jamboree + Jamboree TV Nintendo Switch 2 Edition will offer:
Jamboree TV, enhanced graphics and frame rate Super Mario Party Jamboree
Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV can only be played on Nintendo Switch 2.
If you already own Super Mario Party Jamboree for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the Upgrade Pack to play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
Super Mario Party Jamboree charges up Nintendo Switch 2!
Camera ready!
Connect the Nintendo Switch 2 camera or another compatible USB-C camera to your Nintendo Switch 2 console and get everyone involved in the game.
Immerse yourself in the game with CameraPlay
The CameraPlay feature brings players' faces into the action during mini-games and when viewing the game board. Plus, it can capture players' movements and allow full-body motion control in selected mini-games!
Compatible only in selected modes. Camera mini-games in Bowser Live require a compatible USB-C camera.
Smooth mouse control
By placing the Joy-Con 2 controller on its side, it can be used as a mouse in compatible modes. Slide and click without any problems!
Additionally, thanks to the HD rumble 2 function, you'll feel even more realistic feedback through the controller.
Shout into the microphone!
Using the built-in microphone of the Nintendo Switch 2 console, you can control the action by clapping or using your voice in selected modes.
You're a contestant in Jamboree TV!
Jamboree TV is a new way of playing based on audience participation! Mario and his friends will tackle various challenges here. Let the games begin!
Even MORE mini-games!
Enjoy 20 new mini-games with support for mouse control in Joy-Con 2, HD rumble 2, and the built-in microphone of the console. Some mini-games can be played by connecting a compatible USB-C camera.
Some mini-games cannot be played in Jamboree TV mode. To play the original game, select Super Mario Party Jamboree on the title screen.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Using the GameChat feature, you can play as if everyone were in the same room, regardless of distance.
If you connect a compatible USB-C camera, some modes even allow you to insert your face into the game along with fun special effects!
GameShare with friends
If you already own a Nintendo Switch 2 and Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV, you can share part of the game with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 using the GameShare service.
The party has never looked better!
Nintendo Switch 2 Edition supports resolution up to WQHD (1440p) in TV mode and Full HD (1080p) resolution in handheld and tabletop modes. Enjoy the world of Mario Party with greater detail and smoothness!
Super Mario Party Jamboree + Jamboree TV releases on July 24, 2025 for Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch 2

item.NAME: NS2 The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
item.DESCRIPTION:
Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Nintendo Switch 2 Edition features:
Enhanced resolution, improved textures and HDR support Smoother frame rates Faster load times Additional save slot Compatible with ZELDA NOTES via the Nintendo Switch App for compatible smart device​​
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is playable only on Nintendo Switch 2. If you already own The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the Upgrade Pack to play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
No kingdom. No memories. After a 100-year slumber, Link wakes up alone in a world he no longer remembers. Now the legendary hero must explore a vast and dangerous land and regain his memories before Hyrule is lost forever.
Explore an even more breathtaking Hyrule on Nintendo Switch 2
With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.
Faster loading times
With quicker loading times, you can travel around Hyrule faster than ever.
Additional save slot
With two save files, you can start a brand new adventure or continue a previous one with your existing save data.
Nintendo Switch 2 Edition cannot be transferred to The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild on Nintendo Switch.
Get even more out of your adventure with ZELDA NOTES
Find your way with voiced navigation and insights from characters like Princess Zelda, as well as additional features to support your adventures in Hyrule.
A compatible smart device is required. Internet connection fees may apply. The current Nintendo Switch Online app will be renamed to the Nintendo Switch App in late May 2025. A Nintendo Switch Online membership is not required to use ZELDA NOTES.
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition will be available on June 5th 2025 for Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Nintendo Switch 2 game

Can you harness the power of Link’s new abilities to fight back against the malevolent forces that threaten the kingdom?
Explore the land, sky, and depths of Hyrule like never before on Nintendo Switch 2
With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Riju (Tears of the Kingdom)
item.DESCRIPTION:
amiibo Zelda – Riju (Tears of the Kingdom)
Enhance your collection with the Riju amiibo, the brave and charismatic leader of the Gerudo tribe, straight from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. This detailed and precisely crafted figure is perfect for both Zelda world enthusiasts and amiibo collectors.
Usable on Nintendo Switch, the Riju amiibo allows you to unlock exclusive content in Tears of the Kingdom, such as rare materials, special weapons, and unique cosmetic items associated with this character. It is also compatible with other games from the Zelda series and with many other Nintendo titles.
Main features:
Official Nintendo amiibo from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series Unlocks exclusive in-game bonuses: items, materials, and aesthetic content High-quality execution and details faithful to the original design Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch OLED, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite Release date: June 5, 2025
This amiibo figure unlocks special features in a total of 5 games. In The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, you'll receive a unique paraglider appearance, materials, and rare items. It is also compatible with games such as The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening, Style Savvy: Styling Star, Conga Master Party! and Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, where it unlocks a Mii racing suit with Legend of Zelda motifs.
Don't miss this exceptional figure that will delight every fan of The Legend of Zelda series and enhance your gaming experience with exclusive content!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: amiibo figure from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Sidon (Tears of the Kingdom)
item.DESCRIPTION:
amiibo Zelda - Sidon (Tears of the Kingdom)
Prince Sidon of the Zora tribe returns in Tears of the Kingdom with his trademark courage and optimism. The Sidon amiibo captures him in his royal armor, proudly wielding his trident. Known for his strong bond with Link, scanning this figure can unlock game items related to Zora traditions or water combat enhancements.
Usable on Nintendo Switch, the Sidon amiibo allows you to unlock exclusive rewards in Tears of the Kingdom, including rare materials, useful items, and cosmetic content inspired by the Zora people. It is also compatible with other titles from the Zelda series and Nintendo games supporting NFC technology.
Key Features:
Official Nintendo amiibo from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series Unlocks exclusive game bonuses: materials, weapons, and aesthetic content Highly detailed craftsmanship, ideal for collectors and fans of the saga Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch OLED, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite Release date: June 5, 2025
This amiibo figure unlocks special features in several games from The Legend of Zelda series and other compatible Nintendo titles.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: amiibo figure from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Tulin (Tears of the Kingdom)
item.DESCRIPTION:
amiibo Zelda - Tulin (Tears of the Kingdom)
Tulin from the Rito tribe has grown from his childhood years in Breath of the Wild into a talented young archer in Tears of the Kingdom. The Tulin amiibo captures him with his characteristic bow, ready for action. Son of the famous archer Teba, Tulin has inherited his father's abilities and now helps Link in his adventures. Scanning this figure can unlock items associated with archery or flight abilities.
Usable on Nintendo Switch, the Tulin amiibo allows you to unlock exclusive rewards in Tears of the Kingdom, including rare materials, archery weapons, and cosmetic content inspired by the Rito people. It is also compatible with other titles from the Zelda series and Nintendo games supporting NFC technology.
Key Features:
Official Nintendo amiibo from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series Unlocks exclusive game bonuses: materials, weapons, and aesthetic content Highly detailed craftsmanship, ideal for collectors and fans of the saga Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch OLED, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite Release date: June 5, 2025
This amiibo figure unlocks special features in several games from The Legend of Zelda series and other compatible Nintendo titles.

item.NAME: amiibo Zelda - Yunobo (Tears of the Kingdom)
item.DESCRIPTION:
amiibo Zelda - Yunobo (Tears of the Kingdom)
Yunobo, a brave warrior from the Goron tribe, is one of the key characters in The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. This intricately crafted amiibo figure captures Yunobo in his characteristic battle pose, ready to protect his allies and fight against enemies.
When scanning this amiibo figure in compatible games, you will receive game bonuses of rare materials and cosmetic content. The figure is designed for all consoles supporting NFC technology, including the new Nintendo Switch 2.
Key Features:
Official Nintendo amiibo from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom series Unlocks exclusive game bonuses: materials, weapons, and aesthetic content Highly detailed craftsmanship, ideal for collectors and fans of the saga Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch OLED, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite Release date: June 5, 2025
This amiibo figure unlocks special features in several games from The Legend of Zelda series and other compatible Nintendo titles.

item.NAME: Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is unpacked, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Wake up to the world of games!
Awakening
Choose a game, a scene from it, set the time and let Alarmo take care of the rest! The next morning you'll wake up at a specific time to the sounds and music from that game.
No more tossing and turning
Alarmo has a motion sensor that responds to movement. It will play sounds if you stretch your arms or continue to roll over. The alarm will quiet down if you get up from bed.
Motion sensing features only work when Alarmo is not in Button mode.
Getting out of bed
Once you get up from bed, the alarm will stop playing music without you having to touch it.
Make waking up fun
Choose from 35 different alarms selected from five Nintendo games. Each alarm has a unique sound, visual appearance and creates a different feeling when waking up. The screen appearance also changes according to the chosen game.
Customize your alarm and let it track how you sleep
Check your night records, how much time you spent in bed, how much you moved during sleep, or find out how long it took you to actually get out of bed.
Software update requires internet connection.
Turn on sounds for faster falling asleep that will help you calm down using relaxing music and sounds. These will start playing when you go to bed at the set time.
Choose between Firm mode, where the alarm gradually increases while you're in bed, or Gentle mode. This offers more consistent waking up. If you prefer how a classic alarm works, then choose Button mode.
Note: Alarmo does not include AC adapter, it must be purchased separately.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Unpacked goods.
Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo
item.TECH_SUPPORT:

item.NAME: GameSir G7-SE Wired Controller (XBOX & PC) Orange
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Anti-Drift Hall-Effect Sticks: Using non-contact magnetic sensors to ensure that the sticks never wear out during their lifetime, the GameSir G7 SE prevents stick drift and ensures reliable and durable stick performance for Xbox and PC gaming. Precision-tuned Hall-effect analog triggers: With precision-tuned Hall-effect triggers for a consistent and smooth pull, prepare for the race with confidence and enjoy a seamless gaming experience like never before. 2 Rear Quick Latch Buttons: Toggle the quick latches to enable or disable the rear buttons. Seamlessly adapt your playstyle across different games. Magnetic replaceable front cover: Make gaming more meaningful. A paintwork-friendly magnetic front cover allows you to easily customize and change the look of G7 SE for an even more engaging experience. Fully software customizable: Fully customize your gaming experience with GameSir Nexus software. Map buttons, improve the diagonal of the D-pad, adjust stick and trigger zones, configure vibrations, etc. Experience exclusive impulse triggers for all games. Quickly switch profiles on the fly: Quickly switch profiles on the fly for different games with simple button combinations. Versatile: GameSir G7 SE works with Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, and Windows 10/11 to deliver the smoothest, most immersive gaming experience with less latency and no worries about running out of battery.

special. Safe. Peak. Special magnetic front cover, which is gentle on painting. Secure quick latches. Excellent anti-drift levers with Hall effect. All on the special GameSir G7 SE – for the first time, Hall Effect sticks are brought to the Xbox controller

item.NAME: GameSir X5 Lite Black
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir X5 Lite Black - Lightweight Mobile Game Controller
GameSir X5 Lite is the perfect mobile controller designed for gamers of all levels. Weighing just 135.4g and featuring advanced Hall effect joysticks, it takes mobile gaming to a new level. Thanks to direct wired connection via Type-C port, you'll experience games without any delay - exactly as they should be played.
Key Benefits:
Instant connection without latency - Stable wired connection with virtually zero delay Premium Hall effect joysticks - Extreme precision in 360° range and long lifespan Ergonomic design - Textured grips for comfortable long-term gaming Pass-through charging support - Play continuously even while charging your device Turbo function - Customizable automatic button press repetition
Wide Compatibility
The X5 Lite controller adapts to virtually any modern smartphone with a width between 105-213 mm. Compatible with devices:
iPhone 15/16 series iPad mini Most Android phones and tablets with USB-C
Professional Gaming Performance
Enjoy not only precise control thanks to Hall effect joysticks, but also:
Softly dampened membrane triggers - Comfortable and quiet response with every press Customizable Turbo function - Automate repeated actions for A/B/X/Y/LB/RB/LT/RT buttons Complete customization - Personalize your controller using the GameSir app
Enhance your gaming experience today! GameSir X5 Lite transforms your phone into a full-fledged gaming console with professional controls that both beginners and experienced gamers will appreciate.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Ultra-lightweight game controller with Hall Effect joysticks, direct USB-C connection, and pass-through charging for iPhone and Android.

If swallowed or inhaled, seek medical attention immediately. ⚠️ Keep away from fire and high temperatures. ⚠️ Do not expose to direct sunlight. ⚠️ Do not use or store in humid or heavily dusty environments. ⚠️ Prevent drops and strong impacts – the controller may be damaged. ⚠️ Do not expose the USB-C port to direct contact – static electricity can damage the device. ⚠️ Do not bend the cable excessively or pull on it. ⚠️ When cleaning, use only a dry soft cloth. Do not use chemicals (e.g., gasoline or thinners). ⚠️ Do not open, modify, or attempt to repair the device – this may void the warranty or cause damage. ⚠️ Use only for game control in accordance with the product's intended purpose. ⚠️ Use only with original or quality power accessories. item.NAME: GameSir Nova Lite 2 Midnight Gray
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir Nova Lite 2 Midnight Gray - Professional multiplatform wireless controller
GameSir Nova Lite 2 brings a professional gaming experience to your hands. This multiplatform controller in elegant "Midnight Gray" finish combines premium technologies including Hall Effect sticks and triggers with practical programmable back buttons. The specially tuned mechanical circular D-pad by professional player XiaoHai ensures perfect precision that will satisfy even demanding fighting game fans.
Exceptional gaming features:
Three connection modes - Seamless gaming on Switch, PC, Android, and iOS (Bluetooth, wireless dongle, cable) Zero latency - 1000Hz polling rate ensures immediate response without delay Precise control - Hall Effect sticks and triggers eliminate drift and guarantee long-term accuracy Two programmable back buttons - For faster reactions and custom gaming style Adjustable trigger stops - Switch between short and long travel for different game genres
Professional details:
Nova Lite 2 offers a range of features designed for real gamers:
Mechanical D-pad - Specially tuned by professional XiaoHai for perfect precision in fighting games Realistic vibration - Two asymmetric vibration motors deliver an immersive gaming experience Anti-slip grips - Laser-textured surface for perfect grip even during intense gaming Charging dock compatibility - Convenient charging of the built-in 600mAh battery (dock sold separately)
Full customization:
Using GameSir Connect (PC) or GameSir (mobile) apps, you can:
Adjust stick and trigger dead zones Set vibration intensity Update firmware Program complex macros for back buttons Test functionality of all controls
Take your gaming to the next level with GameSir Nova Lite 2!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Ultimate wireless multiplatform controller with two back buttons

⚠️ Important Notices and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Contains small parts – Not suitable for children under 3 years. If swallowed or inhaled, seek medical attention immediately. ⚠️ Keep away from fire and high temperatures. ⚠️ Do not expose to direct sunlight. ⚠️ Do not use or store in humid or heavily dusty environments. ⚠️ Prevent drops and strong impacts – the controller may be damaged. ⚠️ The controller contains a lithium-ion battery – do not immerse in water, puncture, or expose to temperatures above 45°C. ⚠️ When charging, use only the supplied USB-C cable and a quality adapter. ⚠️ Do not leave the controller unattended while charging. Do not use a damaged charging cable. ⚠️ The controller's wireless signal may interfere with electronic and medical devices – keep a minimum distance of 20 cm from pacemakers. ⚠️ When cleaning, use only a dry soft cloth. Do not use chemicals (e.g., gasoline or thinners). ⚠️ Do not open, modify, or attempt to repair the device – this may void the warranty or cause damage. ⚠️ If fluid leaks from the battery or the controller overheats, stop using the device immediately. ⚠️ During extended gameplay (more than 30 minutes), take breaks to prevent fatigue and overexertion. ♻️ At the end of the device's life, dispose of it at an e-waste collection point.
