item.NAME: PS5 WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers Day 1 Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
PS5 WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers Day 1 Edition
WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers is a soulslike action RPG set in the land of Shu during the dark and tumultuous late Ming Dynasty, plagued by warring factions and a mysterious illness that spawns monstrous creatures.
Become Wuchang – a skilled pirate warrior suffering from amnesia, who must navigate the uncertainties of her mysterious past while confronting a horrific disease known as Ornithropy. Explore the depths of Shu, upgrade your arsenal, and master new skills acquired from fallen enemies.
Develop your combat style by sacrificing precious Red Mercury and develop new techniques learned on your thrilling journey. Enhance your arsenal with powerful enchantments, allowing you a unique approach to combat and strategy tailored to your style.
Battle hideous monsters, harness ancient legends, and confront the darkness that threatens to engulf the remnants of humanity. Your hunt for the truth will lead you to forgotten temples, overgrown ruins, and shadowy paths fraught with danger. As you piece together the fragments of Wuchang's lost memory, your decisions will lead you to one of several endings – based on the choices you make, secrets you uncover, and allies you choose to trust.
Immerse yourself in a rich narrative, dynamic combat system, and breathtaking visuals that combine to create an unforgettable adventure in a world filled with chaos and death. Will you uncover the truth about Wuchang's curse and bring peace to Shu, or will you succumb to the encroaching horror? The fate of the land is in your hands.
Key Features:
Precision Combat Powered by Celestial Might Unleash devastating combos by seamlessly linking melee attacks, magic, and special techniques. WUCHANG'S unique "Celestial Might" system allows you to react to threats in real-time, making every encounter a test of timing, positioning, and skill. Tactical and powerful combat will make you feel invincible – if you earn it.
Boss Battles That Push You to Your Limits Each boss is a terrifying embodiment of myth and menace. Expect unique move sets, pressure mechanics, and visual designs that will stay with you long after the fight. Victory is not given – it must be earned through mastery. Join those who have overcome the impossible and claim a triumph that will not be forgotten.
Your Build. Your Path. Your Legend. Equip yourself with a diverse range of outfits, weapons, accessories, and spells to customize your playstyle. Use the Impetus Repository to allocate skill points to enhance attributes and unlock powerful abilities. Defeat mighty bosses and absorb their iconic powers – expand your loadout and become a warrior whose style is defined by strategy, choices, and mastery.
Inner Demon System: Power at a Price The Inner Demon mark grows with every kill and death – increasing your attack, but also your vulnerability. If you cross the threshold, the demon will materialize – a merciless mirror of your power. Defeat it, or lose everything you've gained. Every fight has weight. Every mistake can return in full force.
An Interconnected World Full of Secrets Journey through a beautifully grim landscape inspired by Ming Dynasty China. Forgotten temples, cursed villages, and dark ruins form an interconnected world full of hidden secrets and shortcuts. Voiced characters, high-definition visuals, and atmospheric sound bring the world to life. Your story is shaped by your decisions, revealing new layers with every step.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Soulslike action RPG for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORIPAD Turbo (Black)
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORIPAD Turbo for Nintendo Switch™ 2 (Black)
Immerse yourself in next-generation gaming action with the HORIPAD Turbo for Nintendo Switch™ 2 controller. This precisely engineered and robust wired controller from the renowned company HORI is designed for gamers who demand maximum performance, comfort, and customisation. Whether you're playing on the latest Nintendo Switch 2, the classic Nintendo Switch, or the Nintendo Switch – OLED model, this controller will give you a competitive edge.
Thanks to its ergonomic design and lightweight profile, the HORIPAD Turbo fits perfectly in your hand and ensures comfort even during long gaming marathons. The wired connection guarantees lightning-fast response without any latency, which is crucial for tournament play and fast-paced action titles where every millisecond counts.
Key Features and Benefits:
Wide Compatibility: Fully compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch – OLED model consoles. Programmable Rear Buttons: Gain an edge over your opponents with two programmable rear buttons. Using the intuitive integrated Assign mode, you can map the functions of other buttons to these buttons and customise your controls precisely to your gaming style and the needs of a specific game. Turbo Function: Dominate the battlefield with the adjustable Turbo function. This feature allows for automatic rapid repetition of a button press, ideal for shooters, fighting games, or any game requiring rapid button mashing. Save your fingers and increase your efficiency! Option to set different Turbo speeds (e.g., 5/10/20 presses per second - exact values may vary based on final specifications). Precise Analog Sticks and D-pad: Enjoy precise control thanks to high-quality analog sticks and a responsive D-pad, designed for maximum accuracy. New C-Button: The controller is equipped with an additional C-button that expands your options (the exact function of the C-button is in the controller's manual). Ergonomic Design: Designed for maximum comfort, with textured grips for a firm hold and optimal button placement. Robust Construction: Made from high-quality materials for long life and durability even during intensive use. Officially Licensed by Nintendo®: Guarantee of quality, compatibility, and seamless operation with your Nintendo Switch system. Cable lentgh : 3 m Vibration : no Interface : USB-A Compatible NSW2 / NSW1 / NSW OLED
Package Contents:
HORIPAD Turbo Controller for Nintendo Switch™ 2 User Manual
Get ready for a new level of gaming with the HORIPAD Turbo controller, which combines the proven quality of the HORI brand with innovative features for the most demanding gamers!

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORI USB Camera Black
item.DESCRIPTION:
SWITCH 2 HORI USB Camera (Black)
Stay connected and share your gaming experiences with the HORI USB Camera for Nintendo Switch™ 2! This compact and elegant camera allows you to easily use video chat with friends and family or enhance your gameplay with new interactive features supported in compatible games. Capture every moment, wherever you play.
The camera is designed with maximum flexibility in mind. The detachable camera unit features a flexible gooseneck that allows for ideal angle adjustment. For your privacy, a practical sliding lens cover is integrated.
Versatile Usage Options:
Standalone Use: Connect the camera to the included base, link it to the Nintendo Switch 2 dock, and place it in an ideal spot for video chat or using game features in TV mode. TV Mounting: Using the adjustable clip on the bottom of the base, easily attach the camera to the top edge of your TV for a stable image. Direct Console Connection: For gaming on the go, you can connect the camera unit directly to the top of the Nintendo Switch 2 console in portable (handheld) mode.
Package Contents:
Camera Unit Base with Mounting Clip USB-C to USB-C Cable 3.5mm Right-Angle Stereo Adapter (for headphone connection)
*To use online chat features, an internet connection, Nintendo Account, and active Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) may be required.
Officially Licensed by Nintendo®.
Key Features:
USB video camera designed for Nintendo Switch 2 Compatible with TV mode, tabletop mode, and portable (handheld) mode Flexible gooseneck for optimal angle adjustment Integrated lens cover for privacy protection Includes USB-C connection cable and 3.5mm audio adapter Officially Licensed by Nintendo®

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORI Dual USB PlayStand
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI Dual USB PlayStand for Nintendo Switch™ 2
Connect with friends and family and enjoy multiplayer fun to the fullest with the HORI Dual USB PlayStand for Nintendo Switch™ 2! This innovative stand is designed to enhance your gaming experience in tabletop mode by providing a stable platform, options for connecting additional peripherals, and simultaneous console charging.
Key Features and Benefits:
Dual USB Ports for Enhanced Connectivity: Thanks to two built-in USB-A ports, you can easily connect up to two wired devices, such as your favourite HORI wired controllers, keyboards, or other compatible USB accessories. Double your gaming fun without compromise! Play and Charge Simultaneously: The integrated USB-C port allows you to connect your original Nintendo Switch power adapter (not included). This means you can play your favourite games for hours without worrying about a dead battery, while the console is securely placed in the stand. Optimised Viewing Angle: The stand is designed to hold your Nintendo Switch 2 console at an ideal viewing angle for comfortable tabletop mode gaming. Some HORI PlayStand models often offer multiple adjustable angles for maximum flexibility (exact specifications for this model may vary). Compact and Portable Design: HORI PlayStands are typically designed to be lightweight and easily foldable flat, making them an ideal travel companion. Easily pack it into a backpack or bag and enjoy gaming anywhere. Stable and Secure Support: The robust construction ensures your Nintendo Switch 2 console will be held firmly and securely in place during intense gaming sessions. Improved Organisation: Keep your gaming space tidy by connecting peripherals directly to the stand. Officially Licensed by Nintendo®: Guarantee of quality, full compatibility, and safe use with your Nintendo Switch 2 console.
Package Contents (expected):
HORI Dual USB PlayStand for Nintendo Switch™ 2 User Manual
Important Notes:
Nintendo Switch Power Adapter (AC adapter) is not included. Nintendo Switch 2 console and connected USB devices (e.g., controllers) are not included.
With the HORI Dual USB PlayStand for Nintendo Switch™ 2, transform any place into a multiplayer gaming station!

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORI Card Case 24
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI Game Card Case 24 is an essential accessory for every Nintendo Switch 2 owner who wants to keep their game library always at hand and safe. This sturdy and durable case holds and organizes up to 24 game cards for Nintendo Switch 2 and the original Nintendo Switch.
Thanks to its compact and lightweight design, the case easily fits into any bag or pocket, making it an ideal travel companion. Precisely molded slots ensure that the cards stay firmly in place and are protected from scratches and shocks. You can easily insert and remove cards whenever you need them.

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORI Ultimate Anti-Glare Screen Filter
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI Ultimate Anti-Glare Screen Filter for Nintendo Switch™ 2
Indulge in the most immersive gaming experience while protecting the valuable screen of your new Nintendo Switch™ 2 console with the premium HORI Ultimate Anti-Glare Screen Filter. This filter is precision-engineered to perfectly fit your console's screen, providing not only protection but also significantly improved readability in any lighting conditions.
Key features and benefits:
Significant reduction of glare and reflections: Thanks to advanced anti-reflective technology, this filter effectively minimises annoying glare from the sun or artificial lighting. Your games will stand out in their full glory with vibrant colours and sharp details, without distracting reflections. Premium screen protection: Protect the Nintendo Switch™ 2 display from everyday wear and tear, fingerprints, and minor scratches. The filter forms a durable barrier that helps keep the screen in perfect condition. Grease-repellent surface and easy cleaning: A special surface treatment is resistant to grease and fingerprint build-up. This makes cleaning the screen a breeze – just a light wipe and the display will be sparkling clean again. Patented HORI 3-step application: Forget frustrating, bubble-filled installations! Thanks to HORI's proven and simple 3-step application system, you'll attach the filter to the screen accurately and flawlessly on the first try. For best results, ensure the screen is perfectly clean and free of dust particles before application. Precise fit for Nintendo Switch™ 2: The filter is custom-made to the specific dimensions of the Nintendo Switch™ 2 console screen, ensuring full coverage and seamless compatibility without obstructing sensors or the camera. Maintained touch sensitivity: The high-quality filter material ensures that the touch screen's sensitivity remains fully preserved for smooth and precise control. Officially Licensed by Nintendo®: This product meets the high standards of quality and compatibility set by Nintendo®, giving you peace of mind for safe and reliable use.
Why choose the HORI Ultimate Anti-Glare Screen Filter?
Uninterrupted gaming experience: Play comfortably anywhere, even in direct light, without distracting glare. Long-term protection for your investment: Keep your console's screen like new. Crystal-clear image: Enjoy games as they were intended, with enhanced visibility. Easy maintenance: Less time spent cleaning, more time gaming.
Invest in the protection and enhancement of your gaming experience with the HORI Ultimate Anti-Glare Screen Filter for Nintendo Switch™ 2!

The filter effectively reduces the amount of blue light emitted from the display, which helps reduce eye strain and can contribute to a better sleep cycle, especially during evening gaming sessions. Why choose the HORI Premium Screen Protective Filter?
Maximum Protection: Protect your investment from scratches and damage. Enhanced Gaming Comfort: Reduce eye strain thanks to blue light reduction. Perfect Image: Maintain the original display quality without distortion. Easy and Flawless Installation: Apply the filter like a pro.

item.NAME: PS5 Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap
item.DESCRIPTION:
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap combines chaotic third-person combat with devious trap-laying strategy.
Physical editions will include:
Game Disc: PS5 or Xbox X/S disc with the latest content and improvements from Robot Entertainment. Artbook: A carefully crafted booklet mapping the game's creation, including early designs, sketches, and behind-the-scenes insights. Supporter DLC Pack: A downloadable DLC code that includes 7 amazing skins for heroes and weapons, giving players a completely new look for War Mages. Original Soundtrack: Experience the power of battle rhythms with a downloadable soundtrack code composed by Phil Boucher, full of thunderous guitars and pounding drums.
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap is the fifth installment in the acclaimed Orcs Must Die! series. This latest addition to the world of orc carnage offers a much deeper progression system where players gradually become stronger War Mages in each battle and enjoy endless replayability, whether playing solo or in up to four-player cooperation. Players are challenged to lay traps, upgrade defenses, and use their heroes' unique weapons and abilities to prevent orcs from reaching the portal – the gateway and powerful source of magic. The game originally launched on January 28, 2025 on Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox Series X/S and will arrive digitally on PlayStation 5 on July 29, 2025. Players who purchase physical console editions will receive the most current version with additional content and gameplay improvements that were added post-launch – including new levels, enemies, traps, storylines, skins, and the return of beloved heroes Max and Gabby.
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap – Key Features:
Slaughter alone or in a team – Enjoy the game solo or in cooperation with up to four players – each option offers unique challenges and rewards. The game automatically adjusts to the number of players, so every match is balanced and exciting. Fantastically powerful heroes – Choose your role among new War Mages, each with their own weapons, abilities, traps, and personality. Heroes are designed for different playstyles and can fight independently or as a perfectly complementary team. Every playthrough is different – Facing waves of orcs and hideous monsters intensifies thanks to random buffs and debuffs that affect the hero, traps, weapons, stats, and even the levels themselves. Weather or time of day changes enemy behavior and your defensive options. Buffs and debuffs gradually stack up – decide whether to continue forward or return to the castle to strengthen your hero, equipment, and defenses before a brutal battle with an orc general. Epic combat – Experience an enhanced combat system where combinations of heroic abilities and ingenious traps lead to complete orc devastation. Look forward to swift third-person combat, physics mayhem, and absurd ragdoll effects. Watch as your traps catapult, crush, slice, and burn orcs in unforgettable style. Classic Orcs Must Die! atmosphere – Deathtrap maintains the beloved humor, personality, and flair of the series. From witty orc quips through exaggerated effects to a properly loaded soundtrack full of guitars and drums – every second will pump you with adrenaline.
ABOUT ORCS MUST DIE! DEATHTRAP Step into the role of a powerful War Mage and defend the rift against a disgusting monster invasion. Prepare for chaos of absolute orc destruction! Castle gates open to new series elements, including: four-player cooperative mode, sophisticated progression systems, rogue-lite building options, more diverse levels and huge outdoor fantasy environments – all with an enhanced third-person combat system, crazy physics, and even more insane ways to send orcs to eternal hunting grounds.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap is the fifth installment in the acclaimed Orcs Must Die! series.

item.NAME: XSX Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap
item.DESCRIPTION:
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap combines chaotic third-person combat with devious trap-laying strategy.
Physical editions will include:
Game Disc: PS5 or Xbox X/S disc with the latest content and improvements from Robot Entertainment. Artbook: A carefully crafted booklet mapping the game's creation, including early designs, sketches, and behind-the-scenes insights. Supporter DLC Pack: A downloadable DLC code that includes 7 amazing skins for heroes and weapons, giving players a completely new look for War Mages. Original Soundtrack: Experience the power of battle rhythms with a downloadable soundtrack code composed by Phil Boucher, full of thunderous guitars and pounding drums.
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap is the fifth installment in the acclaimed Orcs Must Die! series. This latest addition to the world of orc carnage offers a much deeper progression system where players gradually become stronger War Mages in each battle and enjoy endless replayability, whether playing solo or in up to four-player cooperation. Players are challenged to lay traps, upgrade defenses, and use their heroes' unique weapons and abilities to prevent orcs from reaching the portal – the gateway and powerful source of magic. The game originally launched on January 28, 2025 on Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox Series X/S and will arrive digitally on PlayStation 5 on July 29, 2025. Players who purchase physical console editions will receive the most current version with additional content and gameplay improvements that were added post-launch – including new levels, enemies, traps, storylines, skins, and the return of beloved heroes Max and Gabby.
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap – Key Features:
Slaughter alone or in a team – Enjoy the game solo or in cooperation with up to four players – each option offers unique challenges and rewards. The game automatically adjusts to the number of players, so every match is balanced and exciting. Fantastically powerful heroes – Choose your role among new War Mages, each with their own weapons, abilities, traps, and personality. Heroes are designed for different playstyles and can fight independently or as a perfectly complementary team. Every playthrough is different – Facing waves of orcs and hideous monsters intensifies thanks to random buffs and debuffs that affect the hero, traps, weapons, stats, and even the levels themselves. Weather or time of day changes enemy behavior and your defensive options. Buffs and debuffs gradually stack up – decide whether to continue forward or return to the castle to strengthen your hero, equipment, and defenses before a brutal battle with an orc general. Epic combat – Experience an enhanced combat system where combinations of heroic abilities and ingenious traps lead to complete orc devastation. Look forward to swift third-person combat, physics mayhem, and absurd ragdoll effects. Watch as your traps catapult, crush, slice, and burn orcs in unforgettable style. Classic Orcs Must Die! atmosphere – Deathtrap maintains the beloved humor, personality, and flair of the series. From witty orc quips through exaggerated effects to a properly loaded soundtrack full of guitars and drums – every second will pump you with adrenaline.
ABOUT ORCS MUST DIE! DEATHTRAP Step into the role of a powerful War Mage and defend the rift against a disgusting monster invasion. Prepare for chaos of absolute orc destruction! Castle gates open to new series elements, including: four-player cooperative mode, sophisticated progression systems, rogue-lite building options, more diverse levels and huge outdoor fantasy environments – all with an enhanced third-person combat system, crazy physics, and even more insane ways to send orcs to eternal hunting grounds.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap is the fifth installment in the acclaimed Orcs Must Die! series.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch 2 Carrying Case All in One
Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Wake up to the world of games!
Awakening
Choose a game, a scene from it, set the time and let Alarmo take care of the rest! The next morning you'll wake up at a specific time to the sounds and music from that game.
No more tossing and turning
Alarmo has a motion sensor that responds to movement. It will play sounds if you stretch your arms or continue to roll over. The alarm will quiet down if you get up from bed.
Motion sensing features only work when Alarmo is not in Button mode.
Getting out of bed
Once you get up from bed, the alarm will stop playing music without you having to touch it.
Make waking up fun
Choose from 35 different alarms selected from five Nintendo games. Each alarm has a unique sound, visual appearance and creates a different feeling when waking up. The screen appearance also changes according to the chosen game.
Customize your alarm and let it track how you sleep
Check your night records, how much time you spent in bed, how much you moved during sleep, or find out how long it took you to actually get out of bed.
Software update requires internet connection.
Turn on sounds for faster falling asleep that will help you calm down using relaxing music and sounds. These will start playing when you go to bed at the set time.
Choose between Firm mode, where the alarm gradually increases while you're in bed, or Gentle mode. This offers more consistent waking up. If you prefer how a classic alarm works, then choose Button mode.
Note: Alarmo does not include AC adapter, it must be purchased separately.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Used goods.
Nintendo Sound Clock Alarmo

item.NAME: NS2 The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition features:
Enhanced resolution, improved textures and HDR support Smoother frame rates Faster load times Additional save slot Compatible with ZELDA NOTES via the Nintendo Switch App for compatible smart devices
The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is playable only on Nintendo Switch 2. If you already own The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the Upgrade Pack to play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
In this sequel to The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, you’ll decide your own path through the sprawling landscapes of Hyrule and the mysterious islands floating in the vast skies above. Can you harness the power of Link’s new abilities to fight back against the malevolent forces that threaten the kingdom?
Explore the land, sky, and depths of Hyrule like never before on Nintendo Switch 2
With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.
Faster loading times
With quicker loading times, you can travel around Hyrule faster than ever.
Additional save slot
With two save files, you can start a brand new adventure or continue a previous one with your existing save data.
Nintendo Switch 2 Edition cannot be transferred to The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom on Nintendo Switch.
Get even more out of your adventure with ZELDA NOTES
Find your way with voiced navigation and insights from characters like Princess Zelda, as well as additional features to support your adventures in Hyrule.
A compatible smart device is required. Internet connection fees may apply. The current Nintendo Switch Online app will be renamed to the Nintendo Switch App in late May 2025. A Nintendo Switch Online membership is not required to use ZELDA NOTES.
The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition will be available on June 5th 2025 for Nintendo Switch 2.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Nintendo Switch 2 game

item.NAME: NS2 No Sleep For Kaname Date - From AI:TSF Aiba
item.DESCRIPTION:
Internet idol Iris has been abducted by aliens?! Trapped on a mysterious UFO and forced to play a strange escape game, she knows there's only one person she can rely on – Kaname Date, a Psyncer! Take on the role of Date, investigate strange locations, and delve into suspects' dreams using Psync technology to uncover clues. Can you solve the mystery of The Third Eye Game?
Key Features:
Investigation: Use the special functions in Date's left eye to gather evidence and find Iris! You can look forward to both familiar and brand-new characters. Somnium: Explore the eccentric dream worlds of suspects and uncover hidden memories and important clues. Escape: Solve thrilling puzzles in a locked environment. When logic isn't enough, your intuition might show you the way out. Exclusive Bonus: Includes two exclusive holographic stickers (7.62 cm)! Languages: English and Japanese voice-over. Text in English, Japanese, Simplified and Traditional Chinese.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A detective adventure for Nintendo Switch 2 where dreams mix with reality and every piece of evidence can be the key to progress.

item.NAME: SWITCH Mario Strikers: Battle League Football
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Na tomto hřišti se může stát úplně cokoliv!
Nejnovější hra ze série Mario Strikers se řítí na Nintendo Switch! Připravte se na variaci fotbalu jménem Strike, při které stojí na každé straně pět hráčů a během které má hlavní slovo ofenzíva!
Driblování, přihrávání, odebírání balónů, sbírání předmětů a speciální střelba, to vše na váš čeká! Pokud si všimnete předmětu přímo na hřišti, uzměte si ho pro sebe, nabijte ho a zatímco vaši soupeři nebudou dávat pozor, vy můžete vypustit Hyper Strike. Jedná se o speciální střelu, která se počítá za dva góly!
V rámci svého mančaftu můžete upravovat vybavení hráčů, které nemění jen jejich vzhled, ale i jejich statistiky jako rychlost, sílu a přesnost přihrávek.
Až osm hráčů (čtyři na každé straně) se mohou utkat v zápasech na jedné konzoli Nintendo Switch*. Kromě samostatných zápasů bude hra podporovat i online zápolení v rámci režimu Strikers Club**. Ten spojí 20 hráčů a nechá je se utkat o post nejlepšího fotbalového klubu na světě.
Zápasy v Mario Strikers: Battle League Football vykopneme 10. června na konzoli Nintendo Switch.
*Multiplayer vyžaduje jeden kompatibilní ovladač pro každého hráče. Dodatečné ovladače (prodávané samostatně) mohou být vyžadovány.
**Internetové připojení je vyžadováno pro online hraní. Pro využití online služeb je nutné si vytvořit Nintendo účet a přijmout příslušná ujednání. Nintendo Account Privacy Policy je uplatňováno. Některé online služby nemusejí být dostupné ve všech zemí. Online hraní vyžaduje placené online členství. Zjistit o něm více můžete zde.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Used goods.

item.NAME: PS5 Stray
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
A lost cat must unravel an ancient mystery and escape from a long-forgotten city.
Stray is a third-person cat adventure set in the detailed, neon-lit alleys of a decaying cyber-city and the grim environment of its dirty underworld. Roam around everywhere, defend against unforeseen threats, and solve the mysteries of this unwelcoming place inhabited only by unsuspecting droids and dangerous creatures.
See the world through the eyes of a stray cat and interact with the environment in a playful way. Be as stealthy, agile, silly, and occasionally as annoying as possible to the strange inhabitants of this mysterious world.
Along the journey, the cat befriends a small flying drone known as B-12. Together with its help, they will try to find a way to leave this desolate place.
Stray is a game created at BlueTwelve Studio, a small team from the south of France that consists mainly of cats and a few humans.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Action adventure for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: GameSir G7 PRO Mech White
item.DESCRIPTION:
GameSir G7 Pro (White)
Professional performance with precise, drift-free sticks and instant response.
Introducing the GameSir G7 Pro – an evolution of the acclaimed G7 series that redefines performance. This controller not only retains the exceptional features of its predecessor but also introduces key enhancements for the most demanding gamers. As the first Xbox controller equipped with unique TMR sticks, combined with Hall Effect triggers, it guarantees absolute precision and zero drift. It also adds extra mini bumpers, improved low-latency response, and extends compatibility beyond Xbox and PC with its triple-mode connectivity. It's a true next-gen upgrade for gamers who want to win.
Key Features:
Triple-Mode Connectivity: Play without limits – wired connection for Xbox Series X|S and Xbox One, 2.4G wireless for PC and Steam, and Bluetooth for Android, iOS, and Nintendo Switch. GameSir™ Mag-Res™ TMR Sticks: A unique technology combining precision and low power consumption with drift resistance for stable and long-lasting performance. Hall Effect Analog Triggers: Ensure smooth and precise response, with the option to activate Hair Trigger mode for instant reactions in FPS games. Four Extra Buttons: Two mini bumpers (R5/L5) and two fully programmable rear buttons (R4/L4) with a lock feature to prevent accidental presses. Pro-Level Elements: Optical microswitches in the ABXY buttons and a precise mechanical D-pad for maximum speed, accuracy, and durability. 1000Hz Polling Rate: Extremely low latency (1 ms) via both wired and 2.4G connections on PC ensures instant response. Four Vibration Motors: Two in the grips and two in the triggers transmit every impact and explosion directly to your hands for an immersive haptic feedback. Full Customization: A swappable three-piece magnetic faceplate, two types of D-pads, and advanced GameSir Nexus software for detailed configuration of macros, stick curves, and vibrations. Practical Charging Dock: Included in the package, it allows for easy charging and storage of the controller and its USB receiver.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A professional multi-platform gamepad with drift-free Hall Effect sticks. Connect to Xbox, PC, Switch, Android, and iOS and play without compromise.

⚠️ Important Notices and Information

⚠️ Contains small parts (swappable D-pad, USB receiver) – Not suitable for children under 3 years. Choking hazard. ⚠️ The controller contains a rechargeable Li-ion battery. Do not expose to fire or extreme temperatures, do not puncture, and protect from damage. ⚠️ Use only the supplied charging dock and USB-C cable for charging. Do not charge unattended. ⚠️ The wireless signal (Bluetooth, 2.4GHz) may interfere with sensitive electronic and medical devices. Keep a safe distance from pacemakers. ⚠️ The long USB cable may pose a strangulation or tripping hazard. Keep out of reach of small children. ⚠️ Protect the controller, dock, and connectors from water, excessive humidity, and dust. ⚠️ Take regular breaks during long gaming sessions to prevent fatigue and repetitive strain injury. ⚠️ Do not open or attempt to repair the device. Entrust repairs to an authorized service center. ⚠️ Use only a dry, soft cloth for cleaning. Do not use chemical cleaners. ♻️ At the end of its life, dispose of the device and battery for ecological recycling at an e-waste collection point.

item.NAME: UMAX VisionBook 10T LTE
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Powerful 10.1" tablet with 4GB RAM, Full HD display, GPS, LTE and Android 12
VisionBook 10T LTE is a powerful and affordable tablet for everyday use at home and on the go with LTE technology support. The sleek design with a metal back cover is complemented by a high-quality and large 10.1" IPS Full HD display (1920x1200), powerful octa-core Unicos Tiger T610 processor, quality 5MP camera with autofocus, and powerful graphics for gaming and multimedia playback. The RAM capacity is 4GB and the basic storage space is 64GB. If you want to use the tablet for making calls or surfing the web anywhere on the go, insert a SIM card into the tablet's slot and you can immediately connect to the internet or make phone calls. It also includes a GPS receiver, so the tablet can serve well as a navigation device on the road.
Google GMS certification
The new VisionBook 10T LTE offers a certified Android 12 operating system. The Google GMS certificate allows unlimited installation of thousands of applications or games from the Google Play store. With the new Android 12 system, you can use the latest Google services for free.
4G LTE technology
LTE stands for Long Term Evolution. This technology builds on the current 3G network and brings improvements in several aspects. The most crucial one is, of course, the increase in speed in both directions - downloading and uploading. LTE is capable of developing a theoretical maximum speed of up to 172.8 Mb/s for download and 57.6 Mb/s for upload with a 20 MHz channel width. In practice, the speed is, of course, noticeably lower, as it is shared among many other users, and operators often use a smaller channel width.
Android 12 operating system
Google presents the new version as a smarter and simpler version that adapts to users, mainly thanks to artificial intelligence support. Transparent control of apps and their permissions nicely in one place with setting options (for example, in what situations a specific app has access to your location). Security updates will now be automatically distributed through Google Play. The new system also extends battery life by limiting apps you don't use as often. It includes sophisticated parental controls with the ability to track device location. Tracking time spent on the phone with the option to set daily limits for individual categories.

item.NAME: PS Portal ViviDeep Screen Protector
item.DESCRIPTION:
HORI ViviDeep Screen Filter for PlayStation Portal™
Maximize your gaming experience with the HORI ViviDeep Screen Filter for PlayStation Portal™. This premium filter is designed to protect your screen while enhancing its visibility. With advanced technology, it reduces glare and reflections, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the game without distractions. The special oleophobic coating ensures easy cleaning of fingerprints and dirt, keeping your screen always clean and bright.
Installation is quick and easy thanks to the three-step process: simply remove the protective film, apply the filter, and secure it using the provided tabs. A cleaning cloth is also included for perfect care of your screen. This product is officially licensed by Sony, ensuring the highest quality and compatibility.
Key Features:
Premium protective film for PlayStation Portal™ Glare and reflection reduction for a better gaming experience Easy-to-clean surface with oleophobic coating Simple three-step application Officially licensed by Sony
Protect your investment and enjoy gaming to the fullest with the HORI ViviDeep Screen Filter for PlayStation Portal™. Order today and experience the difference!

item.NAME: NS2 Mario Kart World
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Start your engines and race through an expansive world! The racetrack is absolutely everywhere!
Vast world of tracks
Drive through plains, cities, water areas, volcanoes, and many other locations. Here, everything is connected!
Go off the track
Racing isn't just about the road. Drive off the track and race from a distance too!
Modes:
Grand Prix
Compete for the highest number of points on four connected tracks. Try to secure first place among 24 racers! The race includes the spaces between tracks!
Knockout Tour
Drive through several tracks at once, but beware, there won't be time for pit stops!
Free Roam
So where to next? It's up to you! Choose your next direction in this new game mode. Explore areas that catch your eye or take a photo at picturesque locations.
Play together
Have fun with friends, whether they're with you or somewhere else!
Up to 4 players can race on a single console. You can control the game through button or motion controls. Connect your Joy-Con 2 controller to the Joy-Con 2 wheel accessory (sold separately) and get the feeling of real racing. You can also play using wirelessly connected Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controllers.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Turn on GameChat and enjoy having your friends right beside you – even if they're on the other side of the world!
Talk using the console's built-in microphone or share your screen in real-time. If you connect a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), you can meet face-to-face through video chat.
Whether you're participating in a race or just browsing through the game world, you'll feel like you're driving together!
Play as if you're really driving!
Insert the Joy-Con 2 controller and enjoy proper fun with motion controls! Joy-Con 2 connects and disconnects easily thanks to magnetic connections.
Bring everyone together from anywhere
Show the world your gaming face in GameChat video chat with the Nintendo Switch 2 camera!
Mario Kart World launches on June 5, 2025. A bundle with the Nintendo Switch 2 console will also be available.

item.NAME: SWITCH Wireless HORIPAD (Teal)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Get rid of cables and disposable batteries once and for all! The wireless HORIPAD controller for Nintendo Switch brings you the best from Hori. Its built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery and Bluetooth wireless technology give you complete freedom with a range of up to 10 meters and over 15 hours of playtime on a single charge. Lightweight yet sturdy, the HORIPAD is fully equipped with an accelerometer and gyroscope for motion control – the ideal choice for all Switch players. Charges via included USB-C cable. Officially licensed by Nintendo.
Officially licensed by Nintendo Wireless Bluetooth controller for Switch Built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery Charging via USB Type-C (cable included) Up to 15 hours of gameplay on a single charge Ergonomic design fits perfectly in your hands Motion control functionality Does not support NFC, infrared control, or HD rumble Compatible with Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Wireless controller officially licensed for Nintendo Switch and Switch 2

item.NAME: GameSir G7 PRO Wuchang edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
A natural professional, now wireless. GameSir introduces its first wireless controller for Xbox. In official collaboration with Wuchang: Fallen Feathers, this wireless version of the G7 Pro brings all the features of the original model – advanced TMR sticks, Hall Effect analog triggers with microswitch stops, four programmable buttons, and more. Now with full support for 2.4G wireless connection for Xbox consoles – combining the flexibility of wired and wireless gaming. The design reflects Wuchang's journey through chaos and destiny – her determination and inner strength. Take the controller in hand, step into the shadows, face the darkness, and reclaim your destiny.
Key Features:
Official GameSir x WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers collaboration The design draws directly from the spirit of the game and reflects Wuchang's battle with destiny. The front panel and charging dock bear the symbolism of her ability [Heavenly Power]. The panel features an ethereal silhouette of the heroine, and the grips resemble the dragon scale armor from the [Draconic Rebirth] costume, complemented by layered UV textures for an even stronger impression. This controller is not just a tool – it is your companion on the journey into the unknown. Officially licensed wireless controller for Xbox GameSir's first wireless controller for Xbox offers 2.4G connection and an instant console wake-up function with a single button press – for a lightning-fast start and stable gameplay. Three connection modes – 2.4G wireless & wired for Xbox/PC, Bluetooth 5.3 for Android Easily switch between platforms with the physical mode switch. Choose between 2.4G & wired connection for Xbox/PC or Bluetooth 5.3 for Android. The included cable has a safety lock for stable connection. GameSir Mag-Res™ TMR sticks – smooth control and extreme durability TMR sticks combine the precision of classic sticks with the durability of Hall Effect technology, providing a higher and more stable polling rate. The result? Absolutely smooth and fast movement without drift. Hall Effect triggers with microswitch stops Smooth and precise analog control with the option to switch to clicky stops according to preference. Activate Hair Trigger mode by holding M + LT/RT. For maximum control and speed. Built-in gyro with mapping (PC only) Allows mapping movement to sticks, buttons, or mouse – for even more intuitive control. Four programmable buttons Two top (R5/L5) and two back (R4/L4) – set up your own controls. 1000Hz polling rate on PC (wired & 2.4G) Extremely fast response for maximum performance in competitive gaming. Optical ABXY + mechanical D-pad Tactical precision and reliability – every press is sharp and precise. Replaceable 3-piece front panel + extra D-pads Maximum personalization – also compatible with panels from the G7 series. Note: G7 Pro panels are not backward compatible with G7, G7 SE, and G7 HE. Four vibration motors for realistic feedback Two in the grip, two in the triggers – feel every shot and impact as if it were real. Smart charging dock with auto start/stop function Includes a 1200mAh battery for long gaming sessions without interruption. The dock also has a slot for the receiver for easy storage or range extension. 3.5mm audio – via cable and 2.4G Compatible with headphones – both wireless and wired, for maximum convenience. Full customization in the GameSir Nexus app Set up the controller to your liking – from gyro to stick curves to button mapping.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A natural professional, now wireless. The first GameSir wireless controller for Xbox.
item.TECHSPECS:
TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:
Supported platforms: Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, PC, Android Connection: 2.4G wireless / wired for Xbox and PC; Bluetooth 5.3 for Android Sticks: GameSir Mag-Res™ TMR Triggers: Analog Hall Effect triggers with microswitch stops ABXY buttons: Optical microswitches D-pad: Mechanical microswitch Vibration motors: 4 (in each grip and trigger) Extra programmable buttons: 4 (back R4/L4 and top mini bumpers R5/L5) Back button locks: Yes 3.5mm audio jack: Yes, supported via cable and 2.4G Motion control: Yes (PC only) Battery: 1200 mAh Charging time: 2.5 h (5V⎓1A, tested in GameSir Lab) Battery life: Approximately 10 hours of regular gaming (tested in GameSir Lab) Charging dock: Included Software: GameSir Nexus Front panel: 3-piece magnetic, replaceable Accessory content: Charging dock ×1, Receiver ×1, D-pads ×2, Cable holder ×1, 3m USB-C cable ×1
PACKAGE CONTENTS:
Controller ×1 Charging dock ×1 Receiver ×1 D-pads ×2 Cable holder ×1 3m USB-C cable ×1 Xbox Game Pass Ultimate card (1 month) ×1 GameSir sticker ×1 Thank you card and after-sales service card ×1 User manual ×1

item.NAME: PS5 Frostpunk 2 - Icebreaker Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
PS5 Frostpunk 2 – Icebreaker Edition
Summary: Experience an intense urban survival strategy game. Frostpunk 2 for PlayStation 5 takes place 30 years after an apocalyptic snowstorm turned Earth into a frozen wasteland. The new threat is human nature itself – an insatiable hunger for power that endangers the last remnants of civilization.
Key Features of Frostpunk 2 (PS5):
Sequel to the acclaimed game Frostpunk, set 30 years after the original story Build your city while managing multiple settlements simultaneously Choose between a dystopian or utopian vision for society Explore the frozen world of Frostland and advance your technology
Optimized for PlayStation 5 consoles:
Not just a PC port – developed from the ground up with consoles in mind UI and UX specifically designed for gamepad control Radial menus and intuitive cursor for smooth gameplay Extensive testing ensures balance between accessibility and strategic depth
Long-term support and expansions:
At least 3 years of post-launch support 3 major paid DLCs + regular free content updates Fast DLC release for consoles keeps the community united across platforms
Box Contents – Icebreaker Edition:
Frostpunk 2 base game for PS5 on disc in a box Digital artbook and novella – accessed via code on included leaflet (Bandcamp) Exclusive pop-up New London diorama integrated into the o-sleeve packaging
Official Frostpunk 2 – PS5 Trailer:
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Survival Strategy Game for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: PS5 Frostpunk 2 - Whiteout Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
OVERVIEW Discover a survival city-building game set 30 years after the apocalyptic snowstorm that turned Earth into a frozen wasteland. In Frostpunk 2, a new deadly threat emerges – human nature and its insatiable lust for power.
KEY FEATURES
The story takes place 30 years after the events of Frostpunk 1 Build a city and manage multiple settlements Create a dystopian or utopian society Explore the frozen world of Frostland and upgrade your city
Console development from day one
Frostpunk 2 was developed with console players in mind – not just a standard “PC port.” UI/UX was designed specifically for gamepad control, including radial menus and an optimized cursor for smooth controller gameplay. Gameplay was thoroughly tested on consoles to balance accessibility with deep strategy – and it works brilliantly. Players should experience it as a native console title, not a PC-first strategy port.
Frostpunk 2 will be a live platform supported for at least 3 years.
Includes 3 major paid expansions and several free content updates Console players will receive DLC shortly after the PC release, keeping the community engaged across platforms This ensures the game stays relevant long after launch
Frostpunk 2 – Whiteout Edition
Box contents:
All items from the Icebreaker Edition Code for Deluxe Edition upgrade (includes access to the first 3 DLCs and an exclusive in-game item) Metal keychain Layered shadowbox diorama 2 postcards 1 of 2 available embroidered faction patches (randomly assigned) Sticker set All packed in a premium presentation box
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Survival strategy for PlayStation 5

item.NAME: SWITCH 2 HORIPAD Turbo (Eevee)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enjoy gaming with the HORIPAD Turbo Eevee Cottage Core controller for Nintendo Switch™ 2. This durable wired controller offers programmable rear buttons, a C-button, precise analog sticks, Turbo function, and more. Assign button functions as you like and customize your gaming experience! The wired connection ensures lightning-fast response, while the ergonomic shape and lightweight design provide comfort even during extended play. The controller features a cute Eevee design from Pokémon. Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch – OLED Model. Officially licensed by Nintendo® and The Pokémon Company International.
Wired controller for Nintendo Switch 2 Includes C-button, programmable rear buttons, and Turbo function Free button function assignment with assign mode Design featuring Eevee from Pokémon Officially licensed by Nintendo® and The Pokémon Company International

item.NAME: NS2 Kirby Air Riders
item.DESCRIPTION:
Ready, set, fight!
Charge up, speed up, and spin into action against your opponents in Kirby Air Riders! This fast-paced vehicle action game for Nintendo Switch 2 features Kirby and his entire crew.
Riders, get ready!
Choose your rider, select your vehicle, and get ready to race! Compete against other opponents in wild arena battles or fast-paced races on land and in the air. Use the Boost Charge button to brake and handle turns better while trying to reach maximum speed. Fill up the Boost Charge gauge by drifting through turns and then release it for an explosive acceleration!
A wide range of riders will be available: Kirby, Meta Knight, King Dedede, and Magolor from Kirby’s Adventure Wii. You can choose from machines like the Warp Star, Wheelie Bike, Chariot, and many others. Each vehicle handles differently, and each rider has their own stats and special abilities – they can also take on the Copy Abilities of their enemies, giving them an edge in battle.
Engage in diverse arena battles in City Trial mode
Ride through the city of Skyah in City Trial mode. This battle is designed for up to 16 players, both online and locally. Explore Skyah to find better vehicles, collect power-ups, and survive unpredictable terrain events, from falling meteors to battles with powerful bosses.
After five minutes from the start, you and your opponents will compete in one of a variety of different stadium competitions, each with its own goal. These include drag races, battle arenas, skydiving, and more, so it's good to be prepared for anything!
Race to the finish line in Air Ride
If you prefer straightforward racing, try Air Ride – a frantic sprint where you face off against five other riders online or locally. Attack opponents or stay close behind them to collect stars. Alternatively, use the boosts they provide to defeat enemies and secure first place right at the finish line!
Nintendo Music
Selected music from Kirby Air Riders – including the main theme – is now available in the Nintendo Music app for smart devices.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Game for Nintendo Switch 2

item.NAME: Racing Wheel Attachment Set for Switch 2 (Mario)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Race through the tracks of Mario Kart World with the HORI Mario Kart Racing Wheel Attachment (Mario) wheel holder. Simply insert your Nintendo Switch™ 2 Joy-Con™ 2 or Nintendo Switch™ Joy-Con™ controller (sold separately) into the wheel holder and enjoy the lightweight construction and textured grips. The responsive shoulder buttons provide easy control and even better immersion in the game. Officially licensed by Nintendo®.
Large wheel with L/R buttons Compatible with all Nintendo Switch systems, Joy-Con and Joy-Con 2 Textured grips for control and comfort Responsive shoulder buttons Officially licensed by Nintendo®
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lightweight wheel with textured grip and responsive L/R buttons for maximum control in Mario Kart.
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
⚠️ Important Notices and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Compatibility: Use only with compatible Nintendo Switch™ Joy-Con™ or Nintendo Switch™ 2 Joy-Con™ 2 controllers. Controllers are sold separately. ⚠️ Inserting the controller: Be careful when inserting and removing the Joy-Con controller into/from the holder. Do not use excessive force to avoid damaging the controller or the holder. ⚠️ Mechanical stress: Do not expose the racing wheel holder to excessive pressure, bending, twisting, or drops. Plastic parts may be damaged. ⚠️ Use: Hold the holder firmly with both hands by the textured grips. During intense gameplay, make sure the holder does not slip out of your hands. ⚠️ Shoulder buttons: Handle the L/R shoulder buttons with care. Do not press them with excessive force. ⚠️ Moisture and heat: Protect from moisture, water, and direct sunlight. Do not store in extremely hot or cold environments. ⚠️ Cleaning: Remove the Joy-Con controller from the holder before cleaning. Use only a dry or slightly damp soft cloth. Do not use chemical cleaners or solvents. ⚠️ Children: Suitable for children aged 6 and up. Younger children should use the holder under adult supervision. ⚠️ Repairs: Do not disassemble or attempt to repair the holder. If damaged, contact the retailer or an authorized service center. ⚠️ Disposal: Do not throw into fire – burning plastics may release harmful substances. ♻️ Eco disposal: At the end of its lifespan, hand the product over for plastic recycling or to a collection yard.
Manufacturer:

item.NAME: SWITCH Metroid Prime Remastered
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is unpacked, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Nastal čas znovu nasadit oblek!
Staňte se ještě jednou lovkyní Samus Aran v Metroid Prime Remastered! Toto dobrodružství z pohledu první osoby nyní vychází v přepracované podobě pro Nintendo Switch.
Znovuzrozená klasika
Klidná a schopná Samus se o samotě vydává na misi... kde však zdaleka nebude sama.
Ujměte se jí a proveďte ji klikatými cestami a propojenými prostředími nebezpečné planety. Využívejte schopnosti jako jsou Morph Ball či Grapple Beam a dosáhněte těžko dosažitelná místa, která vám umožní další cestu vpřed.
S přepracovanou grafikou, ozvučením, odemykatelnou galerií i vylepšeným ovládáním dosáhla premiéra Samus ve 3D podobě ještě lepší podoby. Využijte nové dvoupáčkové ovládání, intuitivní zaměřování pohybem či si hru můžete ozkoušet s původním ovládáním. Kdyby vám nevyhovovalo ani jedno, lze obě možnosti nakombinovat do hybridní pohyby – volba je jen na vás!
Prozkoumejte cizí prostředí v podobě hrozivé izolované planety Tallon IV
Cestujte skrz různorodé biomy a odhalte podstatu zlověstných experimentů vesmírných pirátů. Sbírejte informací o toxické látce, jež zanechala celou planetu v troskách.
Od tichých a klidných Phendranských závějí až po magmatické gejzíry Magmoorských jeskyní, tato nepřátelská planeta vám nabídne na jednu stranu krásné, na tu druhou zase drsné krajiny a zákoutí.
Vydejte se vstříc dalšímu úkolu nebo se na chvilku zastavte a oskenujte okolní prostředí, což vám umožní se více dozvědět o příšerách a historii planety Tallon IV.
Vylepšete svůj arzenál a postavte se mimozemským příšerám
Použijte Arm Cannon Samus a postavte se bytostem z jiného světa posílené o vesmírné piráty a Metroidy, kteří spotřebovávají energii.
Navštěvujte znovu dříve nepřístupná místa, a při řešení hádanek a hledání vylepšení zase věnujte pozornost svému okolí.
K likvidaci mimozemských hrozeb číhajících za každým rohem budete vícero schopností – ledový paprsek, rakety či několik hledí.
Fyzická verze Metroid Prime Remastered vyjde 3. března.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Unpacked goods.

item.NAME: GameSir Nova Lite 2 Champions edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Meet the ultimate wireless controller GameSir Nova 2 Lite, equipped with a mechanical circular D-pad specially tuned by XiaoHai. With ultra-low latency buttons and sticks and a 1000Hz polling rate, you will enjoy smooth, fast, and completely lag-free gaming. Two-stage trigger stops allow customization for every type of game. Additionally, it is compatible with a charging dock for even greater convenience. The special Champion edition offers a stunning combination of black and gold with XiaoHai's signature on the right side of the controller. Whether you're starting out or want to take your skills to the next level, Nova 2 Lite is the perfect entry choice for fighting game fans – combining precision, performance, and affordability in a sleek package.
Key Features:
Tri-mode connectivity for multiplatform compatibility Support for Switch, PC, Android, and iOS via Bluetooth, cable, and wireless dongle.
GameSir™ Hall Effect sticks – anti-drift and extreme durability Hall Effect sticks with smooth centering, anti-friction rings, and long lifespan.
Hall Effect triggers with precise tuning and trigger stops Smoothness, sensitivity, and the option to choose between short and long press. Supports hair trigger mode.
Mechanical circular D-pad – specially tuned by XiaoHai Quick responses and precision in all directions.
1000Hz polling rate for cable and dongle Lightning-fast input processing without delay.
Ultra-low latency buttons and sticks Instant response and precise control.
Two asymmetrical vibration motors Strong and subtle vibrations for maximum immersion.
Two back buttons with macro recording support Full control flexibility.
Smart charging dock with auto start-stop support 600mAh battery, compatible with the Super Nova charging dock.
Full personalization via GameSir Connect (PC) and GameSir app (mobile) Firmware, dead zones, vibrations, button testing, and more features.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: GameSir Nova 2 Lite – champion precision, performance, and style in an entry-level wireless controller.

Do not charge unattended. ⚠️ Wireless signal (Bluetooth, 2.4GHz) may interfere with sensitive electronic and medical devices. Keep out of reach of small children. ⚠️ Protect the controller, dock, and connectors from water, excessive moisture, and dust. ⚠️ Take regular breaks during extended gaming sessions to prevent fatigue and repetitive strain injuries. ⚠️ Do not open or attempt to repair the device. Entrust repairs to authorized service centers. ⚠️ Use only a dry, soft cloth for cleaning. Do not use chemical cleaners. ♻️ At the end of its life, dispose of the device and battery at an electronic waste collection point for ecological disposal.

item.NAME: SWITCH Super Mario Galaxy 1 + Super Mario Galaxy 2
Nintendo Switch Lite Coral + ACNH bundle
Nintendo Switch Lite Turquoise + ACNH bundle
Nintendo Switch Lite Yellow + ACNH bundle
NS2 Hades II - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
NS2 Super Mario Bros. Wonder+Meetup in Bellabel p.
NS2 Yoshi and the Mysterious Book
SWITCH Tomodachi Life Living the Dream
amiibo Kirby & Warp Star (Kirby Air Riders)
amiibo Bandana Waddle Dee & Winged Star (Kirby AR)
Nintendo Switch 2
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
The next evolution of Nintendo Switch is here!
Bring games to life with a larger 1080p screen – or connect the console to a TV and play in up to 4K resolution. Nintendo Switch 2 offers support for HDR, VRR, and frame rates of 120 frames per second.
The Joy-Con 2 controllers now snap into place using magnetic connectors. Each controller can even be used as a mouse in compatible games.
Play brand new games – such as Mario Kart World – only on Nintendo Switch 2. Additionally, you can play compatible titles from the Nintendo Switch console.
All together, anytime, anywhere
Say "hello" to the GameChat feature. With the press of a button, you can start chatting with friends anytime. Talk to them while showing them what you're playing. And for an even more personal experience, connect a camera to your Nintendo Switch 2 or another compatible USB-C camera (sold separately).
GameShare
Applies only to local wireless play: Share your games in person. Using the GameShare service on Nintendo Switch 2, you can share compatible games with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2. Everyone can play the game, even if they don't own a copy.
New dock
Use the included dock to connect Nintendo Switch 2 to your TV and enjoy 4K resolution for even greater detail.
Smooth mouse control
The optical sensor on the side of each Joy-Con 2 controller allows for mouse control on various surfaces such as a table or even your lap.
Both Joy-Con 2 controllers can be used simultaneously for mouse control, opening up new gameplay possibilities – for example, use both hands to control two mouse controllers at the same time.
Larger screen, same thickness
Enjoy gaming even more with a 7.9-inch display that allows you to experience smooth gameplay anytime, anywhere. Play with greater detail and brightness thanks to the high-resolution LCD display, HDR support, and up to 120 frames per second.
New stand with freely adjustable viewing angle
Place your Nintendo Switch console anywhere you want in tabletop mode thanks to a larger and more stable stand. The adjustment of up to 150 degrees offers the freedom to choose a comfortable angle for your gaming. This improved stand will be perfect for multiplayer gaming!
The top of the console now includes a USB-C port, complementing the one already on the bottom of the console. Connect the included power adapter and play in tabletop mode while the console charges.
Connecting Joy-Con 2 controllers... in an instant
Meet the new Joy-Con 2 controllers, which connect and disconnect easily. Thanks to strong magnets, the controllers are firmly attached to the console. Just press the release button on the back, and the magnetic lock will disconnect in a flash.
Show off your gaming face
Connect a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), and you can video chat and see other players' faces while playing. Up to four people can video chat at once.
3 different play modes
Nintendo Switch 2 can transform according to your gaming style. Just like previous Nintendo Switch consoles, you can enjoy games anytime, anywhere in TV, tabletop, or handheld mode.
Play Nintendo Switch 2 games and compatible Nintendo Switch titles
In addition to Nintendo Switch 2 games, you can also play compatible physical and digital titles that were released for Nintendo Switch on this console. Some Nintendo Switch games may not be fully supported or supported at all on Nintendo Switch 2.
Nintendo Switch Online members can continue to use the service on Nintendo Switch 2.
Package includes:
Nintendo Switch 2 console Joy-Con 2 (L) / (R) Two Joy-Con 2 straps Nintendo Switch 2 dock Joy-Con 2 grip Power adapter for Nintendo Switch 2 Ultra High-Speed HDMI™ cable Nintendo Switch 2 user manual
Nintendo Switch 2 will be available from June 5, 2025. A bundle with Mario Kart World will also be available.

Jedna z nejoblibenějších her dorazila na Nintendo Switch
Putujte náhodně generovanými světy a budujte úchvatné stavby od nejjednodušších domků až po ty nejvelkolepější hrady. Hrajte v kreativním módu (Creative Mode), kde máte k dispozici neomezený počet zdrojů, nebo se prokopejte do hlubin země v módu přežití (Survival Mode), kde si budete muset vyrobit vlastní zbraně a brnění, abyste se ubránili nebezpečným mobům.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Unpacked goods.

item.NAME: PS5 Goodnight Universe
item.DESCRIPTION:
From the creators of Before Your Eyes. You are Isaac, a six-month-old baby who begins to develop mysterious psychic abilities. What you desire most is love and acceptance from your family – but a secretive tech corporation wants you for themselves. The game offers a deep emotional experience where every decision can change the course of the story.
This physical edition includes a Bandcamp code that unlocks the game soundtrack and a digital artbook that takes you behind the scenes – from initial concepts and sketches to the final assets used in the game. Discover the fascinating creation process and immerse yourself in Isaac's world.
The game offers a branching narrative with choices that have a butterfly effect – your decisions subtly shape scenes and lead to different endings. Every choice matters and can influence Isaac's fate.
“Goodnight Universe” is the winner of the Tribeca Games Award 2024, confirming its quality and innovative approach to storytelling.
This physical edition includes a Bandcamp code that unlocks the game soundtrack and a digital artbook that takes you behind the scenes – from early concepts and sketches to the final assets used in the game. Gain deeper insight into the creative process and enjoy a unique gaming experience.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A single-player adventure where you play as a six-month-old baby who begins to develop mysterious psychic abilities.

This physical edition includes a Bandcamp code that unlocks the game soundtrack and a digital artbook that takes you behind the scenes – from early concepts and sketches to the final assets used in the game. Gain deeper insight into the creative process and enjoy a unique gaming experience.
On the Nintendo Switch 2 platform, the game utilizes advanced features such as face and expression tracking, bringing a new dimension of interaction and immersion into the story. With the console's enhanced performance, enjoy a smooth gaming experience at 1080p at 120 Hz in handheld mode and 4K at 60 Hz in docked mode.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A single-player adventure where you play as a six-month-old baby who begins to develop mysterious psychic abilities.

item.NAME: PS4 The Walking Dead: The Telltale Definit. Series
item.DESCRIPTION:
The Walking Dead: The Telltale Definitive Series includes all 4 seasons, the 400 Days expansion, and the The Walking Dead: Michonne miniseries – totaling over 50 hours of gameplay across 23 unique episodes.
With enhanced graphics, behind-the-scenes bonus content, and faithfully restored classic menus, this is the definitive way to relive Clementine's story and discover how her journey ends.
Graphic Enhancements: The "Graphic Black" art style brings enhanced visuals from Season 4 to all previous parts of the series. Behind-the-Scenes Bonuses: An exclusive look at the game's development – developers, voice actors, and the creative team reveal how they brought Clementine's story to life. Digital Bonuses: A music player with over 40 tracks, an art gallery, a 3D model viewer with voice lines, and new 3D menus that retain the original look and music from past seasons.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A narrative adventure with decisions that shape destiny – face the apocalypse in the world of The Walking Dead.

item.NAME: UMAX U-Box N15 Plus
item.DESCRIPTION:
Powerful, Compact and Energy-Efficient Mini PC
We have designed a new compact Mini PC Umax U-Box N15 Plus equipped with the new powerful Intel N150 Twin Lake processor. Thanks to the installed 8GB LPDDR5 memory and large replaceable 256GB SSD storage in the M.2 slot, it finds its use not only as a home and office computer, but also as a powerful multimedia center. It is equipped with two HDMI outputs and a DP output, and features 3 x USB 3.0 ports for connecting external devices. For work in a computer network, it offers two GBit LAN ports and dual AC WiFi. The U-Box N15 Plus comes standard with fast and easily replaceable SSD storage, which has a significant impact on the smooth operation of the system. You'll appreciate the included VESA mount, which allows you to hang the computer anywhere.
Excellent Connectivity in Minimal Design
The Umax U-Box N15 Plus features a patented silent cooling design, allowing you to use the Mini PC 24/7. Energy-efficient components guarantee very low power consumption of max. 20W compared to regular computers and laptops with consumption up to 200W. The ingenious and compact design of the computer doesn't compromise on excellent connectivity, so you'll find a surprisingly large number of ports for network connection and for connecting external devices.
Latest Quad-Core Intel N150 Twin Lake Processor
The Intel N150 processor is a quad-core mobile processor from the Twin Lake series, designed for notebooks, tablets and mini PCs. The Twin Lake architecture is essentially identical to Alder Lake-N and was introduced in the second half of 2024.
Core Count and Frequency: The N150 features four efficient (Gracemont) cores without Hyper-Threading support, with a maximum frequency of up to 3.6 GHz.
Graphics Processor: The integrated Intel UHD Graphics chip offers 24 execution units with a frequency of up to 1 GHz. It supports decoding of modern video codecs such as AV1, and video playback up to 4K resolution at 60 frames per second with HDR.
Windows 11 Pro in Czech
Windows 11 Pro is the latest operating system from Microsoft. It brings a redesigned environment, some new features, higher stability and a higher level of security.
New MacOS-Style Start Button
Microsoft has introduced a redesigned start menu and taskbar menus. Windows 11 has controls centered on the bottom bar by default and more closely resembles the competing MacOS. This can be switched to the standard look we're used to from Windows 10, where the Start button and other control buttons are aligned to the left.
Window and Screen Management
The system for managing windows and desktops has been redesigned. Preset templates make organizing work windows easier, allowing you to quickly arrange windows as desired. Virtual desktops allow you to set different backgrounds, making it easier to orient yourself on which desktop you're currently on.
Widgets
Widgets are now accessible from the main bar. These are still relatively unfinished. They only allow you to add a few widgets offered by Microsoft. Additionally, they live their own life and are not integrated with other applications.
MS Teams Integration
The new redesigned version of Teams is now available directly from the taskbar.

⚠️ Operating temperature: 10° to 35°C, storage temperature: -25° to 45°C, humidity: 0% to 90% (non-condensing) ⚠️ Place on a stable work surface with sufficient air access under and around the computer ⚠️ Do not block ventilation openings – the device has active cooling ⚠️ Handle with care – contains sensitive electronic components ⚠️ Do not use if damaged by dropping, fire, puncture, excessive pressure or contact with liquids ⚠️ Keep away from liquids (beverages, oils, cosmetics, water in sinks, bathtubs, showers) ⚠️ Protect from moisture, condensation and atmospheric precipitation (rain, snow, fog) ⚠️ Use only the included power adapter (12V 2A) – other adapters may cause fire, injury or death ⚠️ Do not use the power adapter in a humid environment or with wet hands ⚠️ Radio components may interfere with medical devices (pacemakers, defibrillators) – maintain a safe distance ⚠️ Take breaks during repetitive activities (typing, gaming) – musculoskeletal pain may occur ⚠️ Some components may pose a choking hazard – keep out of reach of small children ⚠️ Not intended for use in critical situations where failure could cause death or serious harm ⚠️ Do not use in environments with explosion hazards (flammable substances, vapors, dust, metals) ⚠️ Disassembly and repairs may only be performed by authorized service ♻️ At the end of its lifespan, dispose of at an electronic waste collection point

item.NAME: UMAX U-One 24AT Pro
item.DESCRIPTION:
Silent, Powerful, and Energy-Efficient All-in-One Computer with Windows 11 Pro
We have designed for you a modern all-in-one computer that, thanks to its compact dimensions, low weight, high performance, and excellent connectivity, will find its use as a home or office computer. It fits on any desk and adds a touch of distinction to any space. And importantly, its operation is extremely energy-efficient and silent thanks to the use of modern technologies. You'll be impressed by the beautiful large 23.8" display with IPS quality and Full HD resolution. It is equipped with all important ports for connecting external devices. For network connectivity, it offers GBit LAN and dual AC WiFi. To expand storage capacity, the U-One 24AT Pro offers both an M.2 SSD slot and a 2.5" HDD/SSD SATA slot. Memory can be expanded up to 16GB thanks to the SO-DIMM slot.
Intel Twin Lake N150 Processor
The Intel N150 processor is a quad-core mobile processor from the Twin Lake series, designed for notebooks, tablets, and mini PCs. The Twin Lake architecture is essentially identical to Alder Lake-N and was introduced in the second half of 2024.
Core Count and Frequency: The N150 features four efficient (Gracemont) cores without Hyper-Threading support, with a maximum frequency of up to 3.6 GHz.
Graphics Processor: The integrated Intel UHD Graphics chip offers 24 execution units with a frequency of up to 1 GHz. It supports decoding of modern video codecs such as AV1, and video playback up to 4K resolution at 60 frames per second with HDR.
Excellent Connectivity and Expandability
The U-One 24AT Pro includes a powerful dual wireless AC WiFi adapter for lightning-fast and flawless streaming. What's more, the computer also includes a Gigabit Ethernet adapter for those who prefer a wired connection. It features a range of USB ports, audio input and output, and notably a SO-DIMM slot for memory expansion. Storage capacity can also be expanded either by adding a 2.5" SSD drive or by replacing the 256 GB M.2 SSD drive with a larger one.
Silent Fanless Operation The Umax U-One 24AT Pro features a patented fanless cooling design, allowing you to use the computer 24/7. Energy-efficient components guarantee very low power consumption compared to standard computers and laptops with consumption over 200W.
Windows 11 Pro in Czech
Windows 11 Pro is the latest operating system from Microsoft. It brings a redesigned environment, some new features, higher stability, and a higher level of security.
New MacOS-Style Start Button Microsoft has introduced a redesigned start menu and taskbar menus. Windows 11 has controls centered on the bottom bar by default and more closely resembles the competing MacOS. This can be switched to the standard look we're used to from Windows 10, where the Start button and other control buttons are aligned to the left.
Window and Screen Management The system for managing windows and desktops has been redesigned. Preset templates make organizing work windows easier, allowing you to quickly arrange windows as desired. Virtual desktops allow you to set different backgrounds, making it easier to orient yourself on which desktop you're currently on.
Widgets Widgets are now accessible from the main bar. These are still relatively unfinished. They only allow you to add a few widgets offered by Microsoft. Additionally, they live their own life and are not integrated with other applications.
MS Teams Integration A new redesigned version of Teams is now available directly from the taskbar.
