item.NAME: Nintendo Switch console with neon blue&red Joy-Con
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Nintendo Switch is a breakthrough home gaming console. It can not only be connected to a TV at home but also instantly transformed into a handheld with a 6.2-inch screen. For the first time in history, players can enjoy a full console experience anytime, anywhere! The screen features a capacitive touch display usable in supported games. Battery life can range up to six hours depending on the game and conditions in which the console is used. Outside the docking station, the console can also be charged using a standard USB Type-C connector!
A New Dimension of Control
The versatile Joy-Cons offer numerous surprising gaming experiences. Two Joy-Cons can be used one in each hand or together as one gaming controller using the Joy-Con grip. They can also be attached to the console in handheld mode or shared with a friend to enjoy multiplayer fun for two in supported titles. Each Joy-Con has its own full set of buttons and can be used as an independent controller while also being equipped with an accelerometer and gyroscopic motion sensor, enabling independent right and left motion control.
The left Joy-Con features a Capture button that allows players to take instant screenshots of their gameplay with one click and share them with friends through social networks. The right Joy-Con contains an NFC point for interaction with amiibo figures as well as an IR motion camera capable of detecting distance, shapes, and movement of nearby objects in games specially designed for these features.
Local Multiplayer Like Never Before
Nintendo Switch also ensures that staying connected with other players is easy. Up to 8 consoles can be connected for local multiplayer. Players can prop up their consoles using the built-in stand, share Joy-Cons with others, and enjoy multiplayer fun even away from home.
Everything You Need in One Package
In the Nintendo Switch console package, you'll find everything needed to start playing right away. The package includes the following hardware:
Nintendo Switch console Nintendo Switch dock Left Joy-Con Right Joy-Con Joy-Con grip accessory Two Joy-Con wrist straps Nintendo Switch AC adapter HDMI cable
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Used goods.
Nintendo Switch Console with Accessories

item.NAME: Boffin III Bricks
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Kids can use their imagination to combine Boffin with ordinary building bricks and make endless combinations of construction and circuitry. With patent-pending, Bric-2-snap technology, kids can wire up their brick builds with Boffin lights, sounds, moving parts and 3-D circuits to invent almost anything and make it go!
Kids love to create and invent from what they have at home. Instead of just building a structure, now kids can learn how to build the circuit that makes the lights on a skyscraper illuminate or that makes the gears on a drawbridge move! Boffin’s team of engineers has come up with a great way for kids to Learn By Doing and be creative with their everyday, building bricks. There’s no limit to what kids can create with Boffin BRIC: STRUCTURES!
Includes:
- 20 Boffin component parts - 75 Bric-2-Snap adapters - Over 140 fully compatible building bricks - Full-color, easy-to-read project manual 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support)
Boffin makes learning electronics easy and fun! Just follow the colorful pictures in our manual and build exciting projects. All parts are mounted on plastic modules and snap together with ease. Enjoy hours of educational fun while learning about electronics. Boffin are endorsed by educators worldwide and used in schools, libraries, museums, STEM programs and at home. No tools required. Uses "AA" batteries, unless otherwise indicated.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Electronical kit with 20 projects and 200 parts focused on building a House

item.NAME: GameSir G7 PRO Zenless Zone Zero
item.DESCRIPTION:
In collaboration with Zenless Zone Zero, GameSir presents the wireless version of the G7 Pro controller for Xbox. This model is equipped with advanced TMR sticks, Hall Effect analog triggers with clickable Micro Switch stops, and four programmable buttons for instant response and maximum precision. Now with full 2.4G wireless support for Xbox consoles, it offers flexibility in both wired and wireless modes. Its translucent design featuring Bangboo and Phaethon elements from New Eridu makes this controller the perfect companion for any adventure.
Key Features:
1. Official GameSir × Zenless Zone Zero Collaboration In collaboration with HoYoverse, GameSir presents a wireless controller for Xbox, designed for perfect control in action. It offers lightning-fast response, precise execution, and unmatched dominance. The combination of Bangboo and Phaethon design elements with a translucent surface ensures an original look and functionality – your ideal partner for exploring New Eridu and your ultimate weapon in battle.
2. Officially Licensed Wireless Controller for Xbox As an officially licensed wireless controller for Xbox, it supports 2.4G wireless connection and a one-button console wake-up function, ensuring quick and reliable gaming with instant start-up.
3. Tri-mode Connection – 2.4G Wireless and Wired for Xbox and PC; Bluetooth 5.3 for Android The G7 Pro Zenless Zone Zero version supports seamless switching between Xbox, PC, and Android. Thanks to a physical mode switch, you can easily choose between 2.4G wireless, wired, or Bluetooth 5.3 connection.
4. GameSir Mag-Res™ TMR Sticks – Smoothness and Extreme Durability The new generation of GameSir Mag-Res™ TMR sticks combines the precision and low consumption of classic potentiometer sticks with the durability of Hall Effect technology. This offers a higher and more stable polling rate, smoother movement, instant response, and drift resistance – for uncompromised gaming.
5. Hall Effect Analog Triggers with Clickable Micro Switch Stops GameSir's Hall Effect triggers provide exceptionally smooth operation and linear input for precise control. With clickable Micro Switch stops, players can switch according to their preferences. The Hair Trigger mode, activated by holding M + LT/RT buttons, offers instant reaction whenever you need a lightning-fast strike.
6. Built-in Gyroscope with Mapping Function (PC Only) On PC, the built-in gyroscope allows mapping movement to sticks, buttons, or mouse, opening new possibilities for precise and intuitive control.
7. Four Programmable Buttons for Maximum Customization The controller offers four extra programmable buttons – two mini bumpers (R5/L5) and two lockable rear buttons (R4/L4) – for custom settings and the exact control you need.
8. 1000 Hz Polling Rate on PC (Wired and 2.4G) Enjoy extremely fast response with a 1000 Hz polling rate when connected to a PC – whether wired or wirelessly via 2.4G. Every input is recorded instantly, with minimal delay for the highest level of competitive gaming.
9. Optical Micro Switch ABXY and Mechanical Micro Switch D-pad The ABXY buttons use optical Micro Switches for esports precision, while the D-pad is equipped with a mechanical switch for maximum sensitivity and long lifespan. Every press is sure, fast, and precise – even during the most intense moments of the game.
10. Three-piece Magnetic Interchangeable Faceplate and Extra D-pads Customize your controller with a three-piece magnetic faceplate and two spare D-pads (included). Compatible with faceplates from the previous G7 series, expanding personalization options. Note: Faceplates from the G7 series are compatible with G7 Pro, but the G7 Pro faceplate cannot be used on other models (G7, G7 SE, G7 HE).
11. Four Vibration Motors for Realistic Haptic Feedback The controller includes four vibration motors – in the grip parts and triggers – for realistic and immersive vibrations. Every explosion, impact, or shot is felt exactly as it happens on the screen.
12. Smart Charging Dock with Auto Start/Stop System The package includes a smart charging dock with an automatic start/stop system and a built-in 1200 mAh battery for long hours of gaming. Just place the controller – charging starts automatically, and lifting it continues the game immediately. The dock also offers storage space for the receiver and the option to extend the cable for practical use.
13. 3.5 mm Audio Output, Supported in Wired and 2.4G Mode The G7 Pro Zenless Zone Zero Edition model supports 3.5 mm audio output in both wired and wireless modes, ensuring a comfortable and immersive gaming experience.
14. Full Customization via GameSir Nexus App Compatibility with the GameSir Nexus App allows detailed adjustments – including gyroscope settings, stick curves, or button mapping to mouse functions. Full control, maximum customization, and a gaming experience tailored to you.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Professional controller with fast response, precise control, and stylish design
item.TECHSPECS: Compatible Platforms: Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, PC, Android Connection: 2.4G wireless/wired for Xbox and PC; Bluetooth 5.3 for Android Sticks: GameSir Mag-Res™ TMR Triggers: Hall Effect analog with Micro Switch stops ABXY: Optical Micro Switch D-pad: Mechanical Micro Switch Vibration Motors: 4 (in each grip and trigger) Extra Programmable Buttons: 4 (rear R4/L4 and mini bumpers R5/L5) Rear Button Locks: Yes 3.5mm Audio Jack: Yes, supported wired and 2.4G Motion Control: Yes (PC only) Battery: 1200mAh Charging Time: 2.5 h (5V⎓1A) Battery Life: approx. 10 hours of regular gaming Charging Dock: Included Software: GameSir Nexus Faceplate: Three-piece, magnetically interchangeable Included in Package: Spare faceplate ×1, charging dock ×1, receiver ×1, D-pad ×2, 3m Type-C cable ×1, interchangeable sticks ×8, silicone stick covers ×4, travel case ×1
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
⚠️ Important Warnings and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Contains small parts – Not suitable for children under 3 years. Seek medical help immediately if swallowed or inhaled. ⚠️ Keep away from fire and high temperatures. ⚠️ Do not expose to direct sunlight. ⚠️ Do not use or store in humid or heavily dusty environments. ⚠️ Avoid drops and strong impacts – may damage the controller. ⚠️ The controller contains a lithium-ion battery – do not immerse in water, puncture, or expose to temperatures above 45°C. ⚠️ Use only the supplied USB-C cable and a quality adapter for charging. ⚠️ Do not leave the controller unattended while charging. Do not use a damaged charging cable. ⚠️ The controller's wireless signal may interfere with electronic and medical devices – keep a distance of at least 20 cm from pacemakers. ⚠️ Use only a dry, soft cloth for cleaning. Do not use chemicals (e.g., gasoline or thinners). ⚠️ Do not open, modify, or attempt to repair the device – may void warranty or cause damage. ⚠️ If the battery starts leaking or the controller overheats, stop using the device immediately. ⚠️ Take breaks during long gaming sessions (more than 30 minutes) to prevent fatigue and strain. ♻️ Dispose of the device at an electronic waste collection point at the end of its life.

Bright racing fun for outdoor fans This buggy is the eye-catcher on every slope: The eye-catching design in lime green and yellow of the Carrera RC Lime Buggy stands out everywhere. item.NAME: SWITCH Laysara: Summit Kingdom
item.DESCRIPTION:
Includes Czech localization!
Build and develop settlements in high mountains on Nintendo Switch! Carefully plan production chains and satisfy the needs of your society composed of three castes. Meanwhile, face mountain threats such as sudden weather changes and avalanches. Do you have what it takes to create a suitable place to live for your people?
Laysara: Summit Kingdom is a challenging city builder in which you must build a new home for your inhabitants after the valleys became uninhabitable. The game is releasing on Nintendo Switch with full version 1.0 and includes all quality of life improvements from the PC Early Access version. In campaign or sandbox mode, you will establish a series of cities, each on a different mountain with its own specifics. All your cities coexist in symbiosis and create a trade network that you can customize to your needs by returning to already built settlements and modifying them. The Kingdom of Laysara must be rebuilt!
GAME MODES FOR NINTENDO SWITCH
The Nintendo Switch version offers five different ways to play: a 15-mission campaign, challenge mode, and free build mode (sandbox). Each mode provides a unique gaming experience tailored to your playstyle – from structured story missions to unlimited creative building.
BUILD ON THE MOUNTAIN
Each mountain represents a completely new challenge. Mountains differ in shape, distribution of vegetation levels, availability of resources, and weather conditions. Sometimes you will have large areas suitable for agriculture, especially in lower, forested areas. Other times you will have to rely on animal husbandry and mining valuable resources dangerously close to summit glaciers. If you desperately need some unavailable resource, you can always trade with other cities.
FACE AVALANCHES AND NATURAL DISASTERS
One of the constant dangers you will face are massive snow avalanches and monsoons. They cannot be stopped, but you can take necessary measures and be prepared. Afforestation of key areas creates natural barriers against avalanches, building special barriers allows you to redirect masses of snow, and controlled artificial triggering of an avalanche allows you to face it in a less destructive form. Create a thorough and reliable strategy, and you might be able to use the power of snow to your advantage. If you underestimate this danger, your city will be buried under tons of ice and snow!
CREATE A TRANSPORT NETWORK
What could be difficult about transporting resources from one place to another? Well, if goods must be transported to the opposite side of a mountain massif, several hundred meters higher, across canyons, chasms, rivers, and steep cliffs, it's quite a challenge. Creating a complex and well-thought-out transport network consisting of roads, bridges, and tunnels will be essential to ensure reliable supply chains. As the city's population grows, so will the demand for resources, so look for opportunities to further optimize and improve the transport network – whether through better road surfaces, advanced construction for vertical transport, or deploying indispensable yaks to help.
BUILD A CELESTIAL TEMPLE
If your city survives all mountain pitfalls, build efficient production chains and satisfy the needs of your inhabitants. Then only one thing remains: conquer the mountain peak! It won't be easy – first you will have to conquer the summit and then secure safe routes up for your carriers so they can transport enormous amounts of building materials there. However, beware of the weather at high altitudes, which is deadly unpredictable there. But the result is worth it – building a celestial temple is the ultimate act of human courage (and your logistical skills!) over the elements.
KEY FEATURES FOR NINTENDO SWITCH
Full version 1.0 with all improvements from PC Early Access 15-mission campaign, challenge mode, and free build mode Unique maps with varied terrain, vegetation, and weather conditions Complex avalanche and natural disaster management system Sophisticated trade and transport networks between settlements Pure city builder focused on economy and survival without combat elements Czech localization
Final note: the game is a city builder in its purest form. Emphasis is placed on economy, resource management, and the struggle for survival in harsh terrain and weather conditions. Therefore, the game does not contain any combat elements.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Laysara: Summit Kingdom is a challenging city builder in which you must build a new home for your inhabitants after the valleys became uninhabitable.

item.NAME: amiibo Meta Knight & Shadow Star
item.DESCRIPTION:
Original amiibo figure from the Kirby Air Riders series featuring Meta Knight and his Shadow Star machine. It offers detailed craftsmanship and NFC support for compatible Nintendo games.
When used in Kirby Air Riders, it allows you to unlock game content and create a computer-controlled racer that can be gradually upgraded.
Official Nintendo product Kirby Air Riders series Character: Meta Knight + Shadow Star machine Amiibo (NFC) support
Ideal for Kirby fans, amiibo collectors, and players looking for additional game content.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Meta Knight & Shadow Star amiibo (Kirby Air Riders)

item.NAME: NS2 Animal Crossing: New Horizons - NS2 Edition
PS4 The Legend of Heroes: Trails beyond Horizon D.
item.DESCRIPTION:
What is The Legend of Heroes: Trails beyond the Horizon Deluxe Edition?
Van Arkride and the members of Arkride Solutions are back – and this time, the future of the entire continent of Zemuria is at stake! People are anxiously watching the preparations for humanity’s first space mission. A sudden invitation from the Marduk Company to participate in a high-tech training test brings Van Arkride, the Ashen Chevalier Rean Schwarzer, and Father Kevin Graham together on a journey that leads to the very core of Zemuria’s mysteries.
Their paths may diverge, but one question remains: What lies beyond the horizon? The epic Calvardian saga continues in Trails beyond the Horizon – the 20th anniversary installment of the legendary Trails series!
The Deluxe Edition includes:
Base Game Digital Soundtrack Mini Artbook
Key Features
All roads lead here: Fates across Zemuria intertwine with stakes higher than ever – the Trails series enters its final act! Next-level gameplay: New mechanics like Shard Commands, Awakening, and the time-freezing Z.O.C. bring unprecedented possibilities in combat and exploration! Dream teams: Join forces with allies from Calvard and beyond to stop Ouroboros’s plans in Grim Garden – a dungeon you can customize to your playstyle!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: The Legend of Heroes: Trails beyond the Horizon Deluxe Edition is an action RPG set in a world full of mystery, courage, and destiny.

item.NAME: SWITCH The Legend of Heroes:Trails bey. Horizon D.
item.DESCRIPTION:
What is The Legend of Heroes: Trails beyond the Horizon – Deluxe Edition (Nintendo Switch)?
Van Arkride and the members of Arkride Solutions are back – and this time, the future of the entire continent of Zemuria is at stake! Join them on the classic Nintendo Switch console and experience an epic adventure in the 20th anniversary installment of the Trails series.
The game is available on a traditional physical cartridge, which will be appreciated by collectors and players with limited internet access. Despite the technical limitations of the original hardware, it offers a smooth experience in both handheld and TV modes.
The Deluxe Edition includes:
Base Game Digital Soundtrack Mini Artbook
Key Features of the Nintendo Switch Version:
Fully physical version on cartridge Optimized for 720p resolution in handheld mode Compatible with all Switch models (including OLED) Standard Joy-Con controls Perfect for gaming on the go
Key Game Highlights:
All roads lead here: Fates across Zemuria intertwine with higher stakes than ever – the Trails series enters its final act! Next-level gameplay: New mechanics like Shard Commands, Awakening, and Z.O.C. offer unprecedented possibilities in combat and exploration! Dream teams: Join forces with allies from Calvard and beyond to stop Ouroboros’s plans in Grim Garden – a dungeon you can customize to your playstyle!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: The Legend of Heroes: Trails beyond the Horizon Deluxe Edition is an action RPG set in a world full of mystery, courage, and destiny.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controller Resident Evil RE
GO/GO+/D143 - 61646 High banked curve 2/45 (4pcs)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Steep corner 2/45° as a sophisticated track element for your Carrera race track DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For extending your race track on a scale of 1:43 Package contents: 4 pieces incl. supports
A must for every Carrera race track: The steep corner In order to make driving on your Carrera race track even more fun, a few tricky sections such as narrow sections, jumps and the like should not be missing. A steep corner is also indispensable for every race track. This not only makes a powerful visual impression, but also provides even more driving fun and variety. With the steep corner on a scale of 1:43 you can extend your Carrera GO!!!, GO!!! Plus or DIGITAL 143 race tracks perfectly. Not only does this result in a larger distance, but you can also prove your skills and finesse when driving with the slot car. You think you'll make it through the steep corner at full throttle? Find out where the right point for maximum speed is and pass your opponents with ease. The steep corner consists of four tracks, including supports. The tracks have a length of 226 mm and a width of 166 mm. Package contents: 4 pieces including supports.

item.NAME: XONE/XSX/PC Wireless Racing Wheel Overdrive
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enjoy racing games to the fullest with the HORI Wireless Racing Wheel Overdrive Designed for Xbox Series X|S. This full-size wheel offers responsive pedals and paddle shifters for an authentic driving experience. The wireless receiver allows connection up to 10 meters away, and the rechargeable battery provides up to 20 hours of playtime for maximum freedom during long sessions. Easily switch between 270° and 180° rotation and fine-tune dead zones, pedal sensitivity, and up to 4 custom button profiles via the companion app.
Key Features:
Wireless 28cm wheel with pedals for Xbox Series X|S and Xbox One. Wireless receiver with a range of up to 10 m and a battery life of up to 20 hours. Customizable rotation angle (270°/180°), dead zone, pedal sensitivity, and up to 4 button profiles via PC application (requires wired connection). Includes a 2m USB cable for charging and wired play. Officially licensed by Microsoft®.
Package Contents: wheel, pedals, clamp, screw, USB-A to USB-C cable, and instruction manual. Compatible with Xbox Series X|S and Xbox One.
Important Notice:
This product does not have vibration or force feedback. The wheel does not work wirelessly on PC. Use the included USB-A to USB-C cable for playing and charging on the Xbox console and for connecting the application on PC.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Full-size wireless racing wheel with pedals, designed for Xbox and PC
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
⚠️ Important Notices and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Use only recommended batteries (if required) or the supplied power adapter. Never mix old and new batteries or different types of batteries. ⚠️ Maintain a minimum distance from other electronic devices that could cause interference. Do not use near medical devices (e.g., pacemakers). ⚠️ The wheel and pedals contain moving parts. Ensure that fingers, hair, or loose clothing do not get caught in the mechanism, especially during calibration or use. ⚠️ Protect from moisture, direct sunlight, and extreme temperatures. Do not place near radiators or other heat sources. ⚠️ Always disconnect the wheel from power and the console before cleaning. Use only a dry or slightly damp cloth. Do not use chemical cleaning agents. ⚠️ Do not disassemble the wheel or pedals or attempt to repair them. All repairs must be performed by an authorized service center. ⚠️ Keep out of reach of small children. Cables may pose a strangulation hazard. ♻️ At the end of its lifespan, hand over the product (including batteries, if supplied) to an ecological collection point for disposal as electronic waste (WEEE).

item.NAME: GameSir G8+ MFI for iPhone15 & Android (type C)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Experience mobile gaming at a console controller level with the **GameSir G8+ MFi** – a premium wired controller with a Type-C connector designed for iPhone, iPad, and Android. Official MFi certification guarantees seamless compatibility and reliable performance. The minimalist grey-white design perfectly blends style with functionality, elevating your gaming experience.
Officially MFi Certified Controller
Play without interruption on your iPhone and iPad. As an Apple-certified accessory, the GameSir G8+ MFi ensures reliable performance, stable connection, and full compatibility across iOS devices for a true plug-and-play experience.
Ultra-Wide Extendable Design 125–215 mm Designed with an adjustable stretch range from 125 mm to 215 mm, the G8+ MFi accommodates a wide range of devices, including the iPad mini and larger smartphones, ensuring a secure and comfortable fit for any use.
Console-Level Controller Quality The console-level ergonomic design and laser-textured grips provide exceptional comfort and stability. They allow players to maintain full control even during long gaming sessions. Enjoy the true feel of console control on mobile.
Anti-Stick-Drift Solution: GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks Equipped with GameSir™ Hall Effect joysticks, the G8+ MFi provides precise control and smooth 360° directional inputs. Thanks to non-contact magnetic sensors, the joysticks are resistant to wear, eliminate stick drift, and offer a lifespan of up to 5 million cycles.
Precisely Tuned Hall Effect Analog Triggers The Hall Effect triggers provide exceptionally smooth response. Players can also activate "hair trigger" mode by pressing M+LT/RT. Whether you need precise linear control or instant reaction, they provide a competitive advantage.
Plug-and-Play The movable Type-C connector ensures a secure and low-latency connection and supports pass-through charging for uninterrupted gaming. Replaceable silicone pads provide additional device protection.
Free Customizability Thanks to the magnetic detachable faceplate, the G8+ MFi allows players to easily swap the ABXY button layout or analog sticks for the ideal configuration. Create your own controller according to your gaming style.
Two Reprogrammable Back Buttons Two easily accessible back buttons support single-function reprogramming, allowing for simplified controls and quick action execution.
Asymmetric Motors for Immersive Vibration Dual motors located in the grips provide both strong and subtle vibration effects, enhancing haptic feedback for a more realistic gaming experience. Players can feel collisions, shots, and impacts with greater accuracy.
Button Design The ABXY buttons have a lifespan of 2 million presses, providing consistent and fast response. The mechanical D-pad ensures precise inputs for accurate movement and combos in fighting games.
Software Customization Support By downloading the GameSir app, players can perform firmware updates, adjust joystick and trigger dead zones, customize vibration intensity, test buttons, and more. Some functions can also be controlled directly via button combinations during gameplay.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Premium gaming controller for iPhone/Android with MFi certification and an elegant grey-white design.
item.TECHSPECS: Compatible Platforms: iPhone, iPad, and Android Compatible Phone Length: 125–215 mm / 4.92–8.46 inches Connection: Built-in wired Type-C connection Joysticks: GameSir™ Hall Effect Joysticks Triggers: Hall Effect Analog Triggers Vibration: Dual Asymmetric Motors (in each grip) ABXY Buttons: Membrane, 2 million press lifespan ABXY Layout: Physically interchangeable D-pad: Tactile Switch Grips: Laser-Engraved Textured Grips Back Buttons: Two Back Buttons Battery: Not required Audio: 3.5mm Headphone Jack Supported Software: GameSir App
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
⚠️ Important Notices and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Use only with compatible devices (iPhone 15 and later, Android with USB-C and OTG support). Before connecting, ensure the USB-C connector is clean and dry. ⚠️ Be careful not to damage the USB-C connector on the phone when inserting and removing the phone into/from the controller. Do not use excessive force. ⚠️ Protect from moisture, rain, and direct sunlight. Do not use in extremely hot or cold environments. ⚠️ Do not expose to excessive pressure, bending, or dropping, especially when a phone is attached. ⚠️ Disconnect the controller from the phone before cleaning. Use only a dry, soft cloth. Do not use chemical solvents. ⚠️ Do not disassemble the controller or attempt to repair it. All repairs must be performed by an authorized service technician. ⚠️ Keep out of reach of small children. ♻️ At the end of its lifespan, hand over the product to an environmentally friendly collection point for disposal as electrical and electronic waste (WEEE).

item.NAME: PS5 Invincible VS
item.DESCRIPTION:
Invincible VS™ is an uncompromising 3v3 tag team tournament fighter that lets players become superheroes in the bloodiest battle in the universe. The first major game from the award-winning Invincible universe features beloved heroes like Mark Grayson (Invincible), Thula, Atom Eve, Bulletproof, and more yet to be announced — with an original story from the creators of the hit adult animated series. Various game modes, Super and Ultimate finishers, bone-crushing combos, and brutal heroic action await you, where every devastating blow leaves players feeling… Invincible.
Key Features
Brutal Superhero 3v3 Tag Action – Master an explosion of superhero abilities and switch between three unique heroes to unleash devastating bone-crushing combos. Each fighter brings their own superpowers allowing for clever defensive counters that punish opponents and leave arenas in bloody chaos. Original Story from the Series Creators – Experience a brand-new single-player story from the creative team behind the popular animated series, full of the authentic chaos, destruction, and emotion that fans love. Dynamic Game Modes – Raise the stakes in every fight and experience unrivaled brutal action across various modes. Enjoy the cinematic Single Player, climb the leaderboards in competitive and casual Versus, unlock storylines in Arcade, and hone combos in Training. Arenas Full of Destruction and Transitions – Fight in extremely destructive arenas that react to fighters' movements or send opponents to a completely new battlefield mid-fight thanks to Destination arenas. Invincible VS will offer 8 base arenas and 4 variants with day/night environments. Super and Ultimate Attacks – Turn the tide of battle with brutal Super and Ultimate attacks that deal massive damage, leaving opponents bloodied and matches on the edge.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A brutal 3v3 superhero fighting game from the Invincible universe, full of bloody combos, devastating abilities, and cinematic action.

item.NAME: Nintendo Switch console with grey Joy-Con
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product is used but functional The product may show signs of normal use from testing or review.
Nintendo Switch je průlomová domácí herní konzole. Je ji totiž nejen možné připojit doma k televizi, ale taktéž okamžitě transformovat na handheld s 6.2 palcovou obrazovkou. Poprvé v historii si tak hráči mohou užívat plnohodnotný konzolový zážitek kdykoliv a kdekoliv! Obrazovka má kapacitní dotykový displej využitelný v podporovaných hrách. Výdrž baterie se může pohybovat v rozmezí až šesti hodin v závislosti na dané hře a podmínkách, ve kterých je konzole používána. Mimo dokovací stanici je pak možné konzoli nabíjet také za pomoci standardního USB konektoru typu C!
Nová dimenze ovládání
Všestranné Joy-Cony nabídnou množství překvapivých herních zážitků. Dva Joy-Cony je možné používat každý v jedné ruce či dohromady jako jeden herní ovladač za pomoci Joy-Con gripu. Je také možné je připojit na konzoli v rámci handheld módu nebo se podělit s kamarádem a v podporovaných titulech si tak užít multiplayerovou zábavu pro dva. Každý Joy-Con má vlastní plnou sadu tlačítek a může být tedy používán jako samostatný ovladač a zároveň je vybaven akcelerometrem a gyroskopickým pohybovým senzorem, což umožňuje nezávislé pravé a levé pohybové ovládání.
Levý Joy-Con dále obsahuje Capture tlačítko, které hráčům umožní jedním kliknutím pořizovat okamžité screenshoty jejich hraní a dělit se o ně s přáteli prostřednictvím sociálních sítí. Pravý Joy-Con zase obsahuje NFC bod pro interakci s amiibo figurkami stejně jako IR pohybovou kameru schopnou detekovat vzdálenost, tvary a pohyb blízkých objektů v pro tyto funkce speciálně navržených hrách. Například tato funkce dokáže určit, jak daleko je hráčova ruka a jaký formuje tvar.
Oba Joy-Cony dále představují pokročilou funkci HD rumble, která v kompatibilních hrách umožní hráčům pocítit daleko realističtější vibrační odezvu než kdy dřív. Tento efekt je natolik detailní, že hráči mohou například cítit vibrace jednotlivých kostek ledu uvnitř sklenice, kterou bude zrovna Joy-Con simulovat. Díky funkci HD rumble budou moct hráči pocítit novou úroveň realističnosti, nedosažitelné za pomoci pouhého zraku a sluchu!
Lokální multiplayer jako nikdy dřív
Nintendo Switch se zároveň stará o to, aby bylo snadné zůstat propojený s ostatními hráči. Až 8 konzolí tak může být propojených v rámci lokálního multiplayeru. Hráči si mohou odložit své konzole za pomoci zabudovaného stojánku, podělit se s ostatními o Joy-Cony a užívat si multiplayerovou zábavu i mimo pohodlí domova. Konzole také bude podporovat online Wi-Fi multiplayer.
Vše potřebné v jednom balení
V balení konzole Nintendo Switch najdete vše potřebné pro to, abyste se hned mohli pustit do hraní. Celkem tedy balení obsahuje následující hardware:
konzoli Nintendo Switch dokovací stanici pro Nintendo Switch levý Joy-Con pravý Joy-Con Joy-Con grip příslušenství dvojici Joy-Con pásků na ruku Nintendo Switch AC adaptér HDMI kabel
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: DISCOUNT: Used goods.

item.NAME: SWITCH Terminator 2D: NO FATE - Collector Edition
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Nintendo Switch Terminator 2D: NO FATE - Collector Edition
Terminator 2D: NO FATE is an action 2D platformer that combines iconic scenes from Terminator 2: Judgment Day with original scenarios and multiple possible endings. The game brings an authentic arcade experience with detailed pixel graphics and dynamic gameplay, reminiscent of classic titles from the 80s and 90s. Become a part of the legendary Terminator universe in this unique collection!
Exclusive Collector's Edition Content
Collector's metal box (silver) SteelBook® Art book Flipbook Premium metal paperweight Cloth poster "Fiery Visions" All items from the Day One Edition:
Terminator 2D: NO FATE base game for Nintendo Switch Reversible cover Cloth poster "Unknown Future" Collectible metal arcade token (25 mm) Full-color manual Premium collector's box
Key Features
Action 2D Platformer - Enter a classic arcade experience that pays homage to the Terminator universe with authentic arcade gameplay, music, and visuals created from the ground up. Three Playable Characters - Take on the roles of Sarah Connor, John Connor, and T-800 in diverse missions. Rich Branching Story - The game combines iconic scenes from the film with original scenarios and offers multiple possible endings. Varied Gameplay - Shoot, sneak, and escape the blades of T-1000 in diverse levels and lead the Resistance as John Connor in key Future War missions. Epic Battles - Face the full might of Cyberdyne and Skynet, fight against various types of enemies, and confront thrilling boss battles. Retro Pixel Graphics - Experience the world of Terminator 2: Judgment Day like never before with detailed pixel graphics of your favorite characters and scenes. Cinematic Soundtrack - Enjoy a cinematic soundtrack featuring reworked music from the legendary film as well as brand new tracks. Multiple Game Modes - Try different game modes: Story Mode, Arcade Mode, Infinite Mode, Boss Rush, Mother of the Future, and Level Training!
Get this exclusive collector's edition of Terminator 2D: NO FATE and gain the most complete experience of the Terminator world with a variety of unique collectible items!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
Platformer for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: Joy-Con 2 Pair Light Purple/Light Green
item.DESCRIPTION:
Includes two Joy-Con 2 straps.
This set includes the left and right Joy-Con 2 controllers along with a pair of Joy-Con 2 straps, which are ideal for local multiplayer with friends in compatible games.
The enhanced Joy-Con 2 controllers support easy-to-use motion controls and HD rumble 2, along with a new C button for easy access to GameChat* and brand-new pointer controls in compatible games.
Take your gaming to the next level with amiibo on your Nintendo Switch 2 console! Touch an amiibo to the NFC touchpoint on the right Joy-Con 2 controller, or to the NFC touchpoint on the Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controller accessory.
This accessory can only be used with the Nintendo Switch 2 console.
The Nintendo Switch 2 console comes with one Joy-Con 2 (L) controller and one Joy-Con 2 (R) controller, and two Joy-Con 2 straps.
To use online services, you must create a Nintendo Account and accept the related agreement. The Nintendo Account Privacy Policy applies. An internet connection and paid Nintendo Switch Online membership are required. A phone number must be registered to use the GameChat feature. Children must obtain consent from a parent or legal guardian via the Nintendo Switch Parental Controls app to use the GameChat feature. Some online services may not be available in all countries.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Accessory for Nintendo Switch 2

item.NAME: PS5 Disciples: Domination Deluxe ed.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Rule through chaos! Fifteen years after Avyanna freed Nevendaar from the tyrannical grip of the gods, Disciples: Domination returns you to a realm hanging in the balance. In this dark fantasy strategy RPG with turn-based combat, take your place on Queen Avyanna's throne – and try to hold together a crumbling kingdom.
The fire of doubt burns within her with a consuming flame, ignited by the crushing weight of the throne in Yllian and fueled by twisted dreams of becoming one of the monsters she once defied – and destroyed. Paralyzed by fear and haunted by her own power, Avyanna's reign begins to crack. Allies vanish and abandon her. An unknown force spreads discord and madness throughout her realm.
The choice is yours – shape the future, for salvation or ruin. As you pursue the truths behind endless conflicts, dark magic, and hidden conspiracies infecting your rotting realm, you will face betrayal, strife, and shadowy schemes. Uncover the long-lost Mountain Clans, witness the rise of an ancient cult, and confront a corrupted oracle whose visions have awakened bitter grudges as old enemies rise.
It will take all your courage to save Nevendaar. Are you brave enough to face – and accept – its darkest truths?
Dark and Mature Story: In Disciples: Domination, you continue Avyanna's journey in a grim tale of power, war, and sacrifice. Every decision carves her path – shaping her fate and the future of Nevendaar. Rule Supreme: From your capital city, Yllian, you rule your realm and army. Consult your companions for guidance, as your choices shape faction reputation, influencing how others react to your rule and the entire world around you. Enhanced Turn-Based Combat: Lead your army in tactical, grid-based battles with faster pacing, dynamic events, and richer interaction. New skills, faction abilities, and unit synergies deepen your strategic options along with a unique strengths and weaknesses system. Choose Your Companions: Unlock and select trusted companions to reflect your playstyle – utilizing their combat abilities and unique world skills to aid you on your journey to save Nevendaar. Hold Your World Together: Recruit and upgrade units from five distinct factions. Build powerful squads by combining unique skills and abilities and train them to defeat enemies in turn-based encounters. Real-Time World Exploration: Travel through the dark, living world of Nevendaar in real time. Discover new regions, meet compelling characters, face terrifying enemies, and immerse yourself in rewarding quests as the story unfolds. Return of the Mountain Clans: The Dwarves are back – and they may not be your allies. Will they stand by your side, or ignite a new fire you'll be forced to extinguish?
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A dark fantasy RPG with turn-based combat where you rule a crumbling kingdom.

item.NAME: Powkong Piranha Screen Cast & charging station
item.DESCRIPTION:
Magnetic Joy-Con Dock – Comfort and Style in One: This dock for Nintendo Switch 2 is designed to provide maximum comfort and stylish presentation. With four magnetic ports for Joy-Con and fast charging function, you can conveniently charge all controllers at once.
Customizable Construction: The adjustable "leaf" structure allows you to display the console at your preferred angle, whether gaming or displaying.
Complete Ports for Every Need: The dock includes a Type-C port compatible with Switch and Switch 2, an HDMI port for stable 4K video output, a USB-A port for device connection or charging, and a bottom Type-C port supporting PD power for safe and fast charging.
Indicators and Visual Feedback: Four charging indicators clearly show the status of your controllers, and one vibration LED automatically lights up during casting.
Stability and Protection: The weighted base with anti-slip pad ensures stability and impact resistance, while the built-in active cooling system reduces overheating of the Switch 2.
Premium Design: The dock is precisely shaped with premium texture, ideal for display or as a gift. The anti-slip pad (Ø102.6 mm, 2 mm thickness, 25 g) is equipped with a strong adhesive layer for secure grip.
Portable and Practical: This elegant dock combines functionality, style, and protection, making your gaming comfortable and worry-free. Ideal for every gamer who appreciates fast charging, stability, and modern design.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Magnetic Switch 2 dock with fast-charging ports for Joy-Con, adjustable viewing angle, 4K HDMI and USB-A/Type-C PD ports, indicators, anti-slip base, active cooling, and premium design.
item.TECHSPECS:
Type: Dock for Nintendo Switch 2
Joy-Con Ports: 4 × magnetic, fast charging
Ports: 1 × Type-C (Switch/Switch 2), 1 × HDMI (4K video), 1 × USB-A, 1 × bottom Type-C (PD power)
Indicators: 4 × charging LED, 1 × vibration LED
Cooling: Built-in active cooling system
Base: Weighted, with anti-slip pad (Ø102.6 mm, 2 mm thickness, 25 g)
Material: Precisely shaped, premium texture
Adjustable Construction: Yes, leaf structure
Functions: Joy-Con charging, stable display, overheating reduction

item.NAME: Powkong Cube dock set charge station + Vine cable
item.DESCRIPTION:
4K 60Hz, Ultimate Color: Supports 4K 60Hz and 1080p 120Hz. Not only do we provide you with vivid and engaging visuals, but we offer you more options than other docks that don't support 1080p 120Hz!
VRR and HDR Support: VRR (Variable Refresh Rate) technology adjusts the refresh rate and frame rate for image harmonization, while HDR (High Dynamic Range) provides colorful and brilliant gameplay.
HDCP and HDMI 2.1 Support: HDCP protocol plays videos with greater encryption (e.g., YouTube videos), HDMI 2.1 is 2× more powerful than HDMI 1.4.
USB-C PD Charging: Safe charging block, charge and play simultaneously. Ensures your gaming device stays powered for uninterrupted entertainment.
Compact Design: 84% smaller than the original Switch 2 dock. Portable and fun.
Three Optional Adapters: Not limited by region.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Switch dock 4K 60Hz/1080p 120Hz with VRR and HDR, HDCP and HDMI 2.1 support, USB-C PD charging, compact design (84% smaller) and three optional regional adapters.

item.NAME: FUNLAB Luminex Pro Wireless Switch Dock - Dave Ed.
item.DESCRIPTION:
Dive into style and performance with the FUNLAB Luminex – Dave the Diver Edition controller, which brings underwater adventure right into your hands. This limited edition controller inspired by the world of Dave the Diver combines cutting-edge gaming technology with a striking oceanic design that catches the eye at first glance. It offers precise Hall-effect analog joysticks, a pair of rear macro buttons for advanced control, and an interchangeable D-pad that adapts to your gaming style. Responsive triggers, ergonomic shape, and anti-slip "shark-skin" grip ensure maximum control in every situation. Dynamic Firefly EX RGB backlighting and an intelligently illuminated charging dock transform your gaming setup into a unique experience. FUNLAB Luminex Dave the Diver Edition is not just a controller — it's a tribute to adventure, style, and playfulness.
Key Features
Buttons: Conductive rubber, non-mechanical D-pad: Interchangeable circular and cross Triggers: Non-linear Analog Joysticks: Hall-effect joysticks Backlight Colors: Seven (red, purple, turquoise, orange, blue, pink, yellow) Backlight Modes: Firefly EX (smooth, dynamic light effect – 11 lighting modes, customizable RGB colors) Connection Method: Bluetooth Charging Port: USB-C Additional Features: One-button wake-up, 6-axis motion sensing, adjustable vibration, 4 rear macro buttons, backlight control button, TURBO rapid-fire button Grip: High-precision anti-slip texture Software Control: Keyliner app via Bluetooth Battery Capacity: 950 mAh Number of LEDs: 54 RGB LEDs Charging Dock: Base with USB-C port and integrated backlighting
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Premium wireless controller with Hall-effect joysticks, interchangeable D-pad and dynamic RGB backlighting.

item.NAME: FUNLAB Pro Switch Controller Case - Dave Ed.
item.DESCRIPTION:
FUNLAB Controller Case – Dave the Diver Collaboration Edition
The FUNLAB – Dave the Diver Collaboration Edition case is designed specifically for the original Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller and offers a perfect fit for safe storage and travel.
The durable EVA hard shell with impact protection effectively protects the controller from drops, pressure, and scratches. The inner soft, anti-scratch lining and precise shaping ensure that the controller stays firmly in place without risk of damage. The integrated mesh pocket allows you to store the charging cable or thumbstick caps and prevent contact with the controller.
The compact and lightweight design is ideal for travel, while the smooth dual zippers ensure quick and convenient access. The simple all-black look appears elegant and easily fits into any gaming setup.
The case is optimized exclusively for the official Nintendo Switch Pro Controller and is not compatible with third-party controllers or extended grips.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Durable protective case made of EVA material, designed precisely for the original Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller.

item.NAME: FUNLAB Switch Game Card Holder with 16 Card Slots
item.DESCRIPTION:
Dave needs reliable gear for his diving expeditions – and you need a reliable case for your game cards! This limited edition combines the world of Dave the Diver with a practical design that protects your cards from all hazards.
High Storage Capacity: Compact case with large capacity holds up to 16 Nintendo Switch game cards and 16 microSD cards at the same time. Solid Protection: Cartoon Dave motif and precise construction give the case a dimensional and premium look. It is water-resistant, shock-proof, dust-proof, and scratch-resistant. Perfect Card Fit: Soft silicone with precise 1:1 scale holds cards firmly in place without movement. Minimalist Magnetic Closure: Automatic magnetic closure simply snaps shut, reinforced magnet prevents accidental card spillage. Ergonomic Finger Arc: Special cutout allows easy and comfortable card removal.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Durable Switch game case with 16-game capacity and magnetic closure.

Protective case made of Oxford fabric: Durable material protects against impacts, scratches, and damage during travel. Soft lining and display protection: Inner soft lining and central protective flap protect the screen from pressure and friction. item.NAME: FUNLAB Firefly Pro Switch Wrls Controller - ZA
item.DESCRIPTION:
FUNLAB Firefly Switch/Switch 2 Pro Controller – Z
The new generation of wireless gaming is here. Firefly Z is designed for Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, Switch OLED, Switch Lite and cross-platform gaming on PC, Android and iOS. The futuristic RGB honeycomb design (7 colors, 4 modes) combines style with professional features: programmable rear buttons, adjustable Turbo (5/15/25 shots/s), 6-axis gyro control, 4 levels of HD vibration.
With a 950 mAh battery and 12.5 h of gameplay via Bluetooth 5.0 (10 m), the ergonomic controller provides a low-latency and immersive gaming experience for games like Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom or Super Mario Odyssey.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FUNLAB Firefly Z – RGB wireless controller for Switch, Switch 2 and PC with professional features and 12.5h battery.

item.NAME: FUNLAB NS2 Screen Protector(3pcs+Film App Tool)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Highly durable screen protection provides effective protection against scratches and everyday damage without losing image clarity. Thanks to the ultra-thin 0.33 mm thickness, high light transmittance, and oleophobic plasma coating, the glass maintains the natural brightness of the display and comfortable touch control, while the U-shape bending capability ensures perfect adhesion.
Custom-fit screen protection: Precisely dimensioned tempered glass (194.8 × 106.8 mm) for full edge-to-edge screen coverage.
9H hardness from high-aluminum glass: Premium tempered glass with high aluminum content provides excellent scratch and impact resistance for everyday protection.
Ultra-thin and high clarity: Only 0.33 mm thickness with 91% ± 1% light transmittance, preserves original display brightness and touch sensitivity.
Oleophobic plasma coating: Advanced coating repels fingerprints, oil, and smudges for a clean and smooth touch experience.
Flexible precise adhesion: Can be bent into U-shape for enhanced durability and seamless adhesion without cracking.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: FUNLAB tempered glass screen protector for Nintendo Switch 2 with 9H hardness, oleophobic coating, and 91% light transmittance. Package contains 3 pieces and application tool.

Product Dimensions: 194.8 × 106.8 mm

Coating: Plasma oleophobic coating
Flexibility: Bendable into U-shape

item.NAME: GameSir X5s ZZZ Wireless Mobile Controller White
item.DESCRIPTION:
Meet the GameSir X5s – Zenless Zone Zero Edition, a lightweight and portable controller ready for gaming anytime and anywhere. It retains the slim design of the X5 Lite model but takes it further with tri-mode connectivity, ensuring broad compatibility with Switch 2, Switch consoles, mobile devices, and PC.
This model was created in official collaboration with HoYoverse studio and features design elements of Bangboo and Phaethon, making it the ideal companion for adventures in New Eridu. The controller weighs only 174 g and the package also includes a durable protective PP case, ideal for travel.
GameSir™ Hall Effect joysticks and analog triggers provide maximum precision without drift and long lifespan. HD vibration, 6-axis gyroscope, swappable ABXY layout, Turbo function, and advanced settings in the GameSir app ensure a top-tier gaming experience for every player.
Available colors: Phantom Black / Veil White.
Key Features
Official GameSir × Zenless Zone Zero collaboration Tri-mode connection: Bluetooth / USB-C / 2.4 GHz Ultra-lightweight design (174 g) including travel case GameSir™ Hall Effect joysticks – precise and drift-free Hall Effect analog triggers with Hair Trigger mode Dual HD vibration motors Native 6-axis motion control on Switch Physically swappable ABXY button layout Turbo function for main buttons and triggers Compatibility with FX5 / FX5 Lite cooling modules (optional) Full software customization in the GameSir app
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Lightweight tri-mode controller created in collaboration with Zenless Zone Zero.
item.TECHSPECS:
Compatible Platforms: Switch, Switch 2, Android, iOS, PC
Supported Device Length: 105–213 mm
Connection: Bluetooth / USB-C / 2.4 GHz (*dongle not included)
Joysticks: GameSir™ Hall Effect
Triggers: Hall Effect analog
Motion Control: Yes, 6-axis gyroscope
Vibration: Dual HD vibration motors
ABXY Buttons: Membrane, physically swappable
D-pad: Membrane
Turbo: A / B / X / Y / LB / RB / LT / RT
Grip: Laser-engraved anti-slip texture
Software: GameSir App
Battery: 840 mAh total (420 mAh on each side)
Charging: USB-C
Colors: Phantom Black / Veil White
item.TECH_SUPPORT:
⚠️ Important Notices and Information
Safety Warnings and Instructions:
⚠️ Compatibility: The controller is designed for use with compatible mobile devices running Android or iOS that support Bluetooth wireless connection. Please verify your device's compatibility before use. ⚠️ Wireless Operation: This product uses wireless technology. Do not use it near medical devices (e.g., pacemakers) or equipment sensitive to electromagnetic interference. ⚠️ Battery: The controller contains a built-in rechargeable lithium battery. Charge it only using the recommended charging cable and a power source with 5V output. Do not cover the device while charging. ⚠️ Temperature and Battery: Do not expose the controller or battery to high temperatures, direct sunlight, fire, or water. There is a risk of fire or electrolyte leakage. ⚠️ Device Handling: Exercise extra caution when connecting or disconnecting your mobile phone. Do not use excessive force to avoid damaging the connectors or the controller's structure. ⚠️ Mechanical Stress: Do not expose the product to drops, impacts, bending, or excessive pressure, especially when a mobile device is attached. ⚠️ Moisture: Protect from water, moisture, and rain. The product is not waterproof. ⚠️ Cleaning: Turn off and disconnect the controller before cleaning. Use only a dry or slightly damp soft cloth. Do not use chemical or abrasive cleaning agents. ⚠️ No Repairs: Do not disassemble or modify the device. All repairs must be performed by an authorized service technician. ⚠️ Children: Keep out of reach of small children. Small parts may pose a choking hazard. ⚠️ Prolonged Use: Take regular breaks during prolonged gaming to prevent fatigue of hands, wrists, and eyes. ♻️ Disposal: At the end of the product's lifespan, dispose of the product including the built-in battery at an electronic waste collection point (WEEE). Do not dispose of it in household waste.
Manufacturer:

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario BW - Elephant Mario
amiibo Super Mario BW - Captain Toad
amiibo Super Mario BW - Poplin & Prince Florian
GameSir Pocket Taco - Bluetooth Mobile Controller
item.DESCRIPTION:
Return to the classics right from your pocket. GameSir Pocket Taco is a vertical mobile controller designed for fans of retro and arcade games. Thanks to its compact dimensions, low weight, and easy portability, you can enjoy classic gaming experiences anytime and anywhere. Just insert your phone into the holder and dive into nostalgic gaming moments.
Key Features
Vertical Handheld Mobile Gaming: Pocket Taco brings vertical gaming to mobile devices thanks to a secure clamping mechanism. Enjoy a classic retro and arcade gaming experience anywhere. Bluetooth Connectivity: Seamless Bluetooth connection ensures smooth gameplay on Android and other compatible devices. Portable and Lightweight: The compact design and weight of just 62.2 g are ideal for gaming on the go. A PP storage box is also included for safe transport. Smart Power On/Off: Automatically turns on when unfolded and turns off when closed. Built-in Keyboard Mode: Supports switching to keyboard mode with the possibility of button remapping. Phone Protection: Soft silicone pads protect the phone against scratches. Long Battery Life: The built-in 600 mAh battery ensures long hours of gaming. Responsive Button Design: ABXY membrane buttons and D-pad along with tactile switches on triggers and bumpers provide precise control. Play-and-Charge Support: The open bottom design allows connecting a charger to the phone during gameplay. Customization via GameSir App: Remapping options, D-pad diagonal locking, G-Touch, V-Touch, and other settings.
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Compact vertical mobile controller with retro style, Bluetooth connectivity, and long battery life.

item.NAME: Boffin II My Home
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Your home, your power, know how it works! Electricity is everywhere – even in your home. Whether you live in a city skyscraper or a house in the country, our homes are powered by electricity. It’s not magic, it’s science, and it’s easy to learn. Build a house or city tower with real, working, 3-D circuits, just like the ones you use every day. With seven colorful base grids to make your structure your own, learn how electricity travels and powers your home.
- How does the electric company get power to your house? - How does power travel inside your walls? - What happens when you turn on a light? - What happens when the power goes out? - What are fuses and circuit breakers and how do they work?
Whether an engineer, artist, or businessperson, get empowered for your future and learn how the electricity in your world works! Electronics is easy and fun with MyHome!
Features: - Seven colored base grids to make your structure your own! - Learn about circuitry, security systems, dimmer switches, automatic lights, alarms, motion detectors, fan speeds, appliance motors, generators, and much more! 1x manual (complete download at https://boffin.cz/en/support) - Approximately 60 parts and 25 projects.

item.NAME: NS2 The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Nintendo Switch 2 Edition features:
Enhanced resolution, improved textures and HDR support Smoother frame rates Faster load times Additional save slot Compatible with ZELDA NOTES via the Nintendo Switch App for compatible smart device​​
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is playable only on Nintendo Switch 2. If you already own The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the Upgrade Pack to play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
No kingdom. No memories. After a 100-year slumber, Link wakes up alone in a world he no longer remembers. Now the legendary hero must explore a vast and dangerous land and regain his memories before Hyrule is lost forever.
Explore an even more breathtaking Hyrule on Nintendo Switch 2
With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.
Faster loading times
With quicker loading times, you can travel around Hyrule faster than ever.
Additional save slot
With two save files, you can start a brand new adventure or continue a previous one with your existing save data.
Nintendo Switch 2 Edition cannot be transferred to The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild on Nintendo Switch.
Get even more out of your adventure with ZELDA NOTES
Find your way with voiced navigation and insights from characters like Princess Zelda, as well as additional features to support your adventures in Hyrule.
A compatible smart device is required. Internet connection fees may apply. The current Nintendo Switch Online app will be renamed to the Nintendo Switch App in late May 2025. A Nintendo Switch Online membership is not required to use ZELDA NOTES.
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition will be available on June 5th 2025 for Nintendo Switch 2.

item.NAME: UMAX VisionBook 13Wr Flex
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Elegant metal 13.3" notebook with touchscreen and 360° rotating display
The convertible Umax VisionBook 13Wr Flex notebook with a 13.3" touchscreen offers a modern metal design, very good performance thanks to the Intel processor, excellent connectivity and perfectly adapts to your lifestyle and needs. You can use this versatile device for work and entertainment. The notebook surprises with its low profile, low weight, and thanks to aluminum materials, it is sufficiently durable for everyday use at home and on the go.
High-resolution touchscreen display with IPS technology
The VisionBook 13Wr Flex offers a 13.3" multi-touch IPS display with Full HD high resolution, which guarantees a great image with wide viewing angles thanks to the IPS technology used. The ultra-thin design is complemented by exceptionally thin bezels around the high-quality display. The notebook is fully optimized for creative work in combination with the modern Windows 10 operating system.
Great travel companion with backlit keyboard
With the multi-mode VisionBook 13Wr Flex notebook, you'll always be maximally productive. You can use it on the go thanks to its thin and light design and long battery life. Even on the road, you can use it not only as a classic notebook but also as a tablet after rotating the display. You'll also appreciate the well-designed large backlit keyboard with US/CZ/SK layout.
Additional M.2 SATA SSD slot
On the bottom of the device, there is an additional M.2 SATA SSD slot (2242/2280), where you can install a fast SSD additional storage to increase the device's capacity.
Powerful Intel Celeron N4020 (Gemini Lake Refresh)
The heart of the computer is a quad-core Intel Celeron N4020 processor from the Gemini Lake Refresh family, which is manufactured using a 14nm process and is complemented by 9th generation Intel graphics known from Skylake processors. The DDR4 type RAM has a size of 4GB, the storage offers 128GB, and together with the processor, it ensures smooth and energy-efficient operation of the computer. As a multimedia device, it can handle 4K resolution and all video formats.
Windows 10 Pro in Czech
Windows 10 Pro is a fast and familiar system. The Start menu and search panel allow you to find anything quickly. You can easily organize, edit, and share photos and videos. Microsoft Edge allows you to surf the internet faster. If you have a small business and require extended functionality, Windows 10 Pro is perfect for you. The security features integrated into Windows 10 Pro, including firewall and protection against internet attacks, give you confidence that you'll be protected against viruses, malware, and ransomware. Windows 10 Pro offers simple and flexible management, so you can get more work done.

item.NAME: 162052X 2,4GHz Turnator
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Remote-controlled RC vehicle with 360° radius of motion Action Flip over stunt car Scale: 1:16 From 6 years
An impressive acrobat: The Turnator This daredevil movement artist pulls in admiring glances from its audience. Thanks to its 360° flip-action function, it not only moves forwards and backwards, but also flips over and rotates in circles at an incredible speed. In terms of looks, the Acrobat impresses with its red design
Not of this world! that's how the Carrera RC Turnator appears with its extraordinary construction, which enables spectacular stunts and absolutely incomparable driving fun! This remote-controlled car inspires all right from the start! Its huge wheels – which can be driven in opposite directions – and a full throttle speed of just over 12 mph make spectacular manoeuvres possible. With the 360° flip-action function, it does amazing flips at breakneck speed – and is ready for the next round of madness at the same time. Or you can let the RC car spin in circles at breakneck speed until everyone gets dizzy. The differential gear and the high-performance control with 2.4 GHz technology for the parallel operation of up to 16 vehicles guarantee driving fun far beyond conventional dimensions! The Li-Ion battery with 7.4 V - 900 mAH provides up to 20 minutes of power with only roughly 80 minutes charging time. Ready to run means that you receive everything you need to enjoy the driving pleasure of a lifetime straight away. Who wants to be the centre of attention? The Carrera RC Turnator is ready for action!

Carrera GO 62563 GT Super Challenge, 6,3m, 175x122cm
GT Super Challenge
GO!!!
Original GT licence
1:43-scale
Age 6 years & up
Drive Valentino Rossi's ride around the loop
The Carrera GO!!! 'GT Super Challenge' set sees you challenge friends and family in scaled-down replicas of these well-known GT racers. Lounge motordromes of the world welcome red-hot action to this 6.3-meter racetrack! The set includes control handsets that allow you to regulate car speed and show off racing skills. The Audi R8 LMS GT3 evo II, driven by nine-time Grand Prix motorcycle racing World Champion Valentino Rossi, takes on the Lamborghini Huracán GT3 'No. 8'.
Speed unlimited
The set includes a lap counter to guarantee race fairness and a boundless range of new challenges. As well as straights and bends, features such as a junction, fly-over and a nerve-frazzling loop guarantee an unbeatable mix of racing fun.

item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
Extension part – bridge for Carrera race tracks on a scale of 1:43 DIGITAL 143, GO!!! Plus, GO!!! For decorating the race track Package contents: 4 bridge parts with cross struts
Hitting new heights with the bridge set The beauty of the Carrera world is not only its exciting races, but also the lovingly designed diorama that characterise it. The model landscape around the race track is given a new lease of life with spectator stands, trees and meadows, lighting and various track accessories. If your race track is not just on one level, sooner or later you will surely need a bridge to connect your tracks. This bridge set consists of four bridge sections which together form a red suspension bridge. The shape and colour are reminiscent of one of the longest suspension bridges in the world: the Golden Gate Bridge in California. The bridge on a scale of 1:43 can be attached to race tracks of the same scale: Carrera DIGITAL 143, Carrera GO!!! and Carrera GO!!!! PLUS.

item.DESCRIPTION:

Carrera FIRST 2.9m long car track with Spidey and Spin cars, for children from 3 years old, battery operated, includes straights, turns, gate for more fun driving, drivers and Spiderman themed decorations.
Track length: 2.9 m Dimensions when assembled: 114 x 88 cm
Fun for little Spidey fans! Peter Parker, Spidey for short, joins his friend Miles Morales - aka Spino - from the 'Spidey and his Super Friends' series and really hits the gas on the 2.9 metre long track. The battery-powered Carrera FIRST racing circuit presents young racers with big challenges - including straights, corners, track narrowing - and lots of fun! The flip features an eye-catching Spidey design on a bright blue track. Decorative elements featuring themes from the series round out the play experience.
Package contents:
1x Spidey car 1x Spin car straight lines curlers 2x gates for more fun driving around 1x power part 2x speed controller Supports, guards, instructions Includes batteries (4x C)
FIRST - the first car track for children from 3 years old
track scale 1:50 car scale 1:50 analogue car track system battery-operated track (4x C batteries) drive time up to 6 hours all cars have contact brushes for better track grip all cars have magnet the clamp system makes the track easy to assemble and disassemble precise and stable track design, including height-adjustable supports detailed, pad-printed cars original Disney-Pixar Cars, Paw Patrol, Mickey Mouse, Nintendo, Peppa Pig licenses high quality workmanship sets include power part, 2x speed controller, 2x car, mantinels, track clutches, Czech instructions suitable for children from 3 years old
CARRERA means race in Spanish and we can guarantee you one thing. As soon as you unpack the box with the Carrera logo, your racing blood will start to run at top speed, no matter what track or car you're racing. This feeling has been experienced by thousands of fans since 1963, when the Carrera brand saw its first race track. Over the following forty-plus years, Carrera has worked its way to the very top of the field in race tracks, cars and accessories. Today it offers top quality products that are designed not only for children but also for adults for whom car racing has become a hobby for life.

item.NAME: PS5 Koira
item.DESCRIPTION:
Koira is a touching narrative adventure about forming a bond with a small puppy in a mysterious, handcrafted forest. You play as a lost forest spirit who meets an injured puppy, and together you embark on a journey through a beautiful but dangerous environment in search of safety and home.
You will solve environmental puzzles, avoid threats, and strengthen your relationship through gentle interactions and shared moments. Koira tells its story without words – through animation, music, and atmosphere – creating a powerful emotional experience.
With its minimalist art style, expressive animations, and evocative soundtrack, Koira offers a quiet yet deeply moving journey about trust, friendship, and finding light in the darkness.
Key Features
Emotive narrative adventure focused on friendship Exploration of a mysterious, handcrafted forest Environmental puzzles and overcoming dangers Building a relationship with a small puppy Storytelling through animation, music, and atmosphere Minimalist visual style
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A touching adventure about friendship between a lost forest spirit and a small puppy.

item.NAME: PS5 Mythwrecked: Ambrosia Island
item.DESCRIPTION:
Mythwrecked: Ambrosia Island is a narrative-driven exploration game set on a vibrant island inhabited by forgotten Greek gods. After being shipwrecked, you take on the role of Alex, a traveler who must explore the island, uncover its secrets, and help the gods remember who they once were.
Through exploration, light puzzles, and heartfelt conversations, you will restore relationships, bring back hope, and gradually bring Ambrosia Island back to life. The game combines calm gameplay with emotive storytelling and offers a warm and soothing experience focused on friendship, discovery, and personal growth.
With its colorful art style, gentle pacing, and emphasis on characters, Mythwrecked is the ideal choice for lovers of cozy adventures and compelling stories.
Key Features
Cozy narrative adventure with exploration and light puzzles Meet Greek gods who have lost their memory Explore an open island at your own pace Character-driven storytelling and meaningful interactions Beautiful colorful visual style and relaxing atmosphere Emphasis on friendship, discovery, and emotions
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: A narrative adventure on an island full of forgotten Greek gods.

item.NAME: SWITCH Pokémon Sword
item.DESCRIPTION:
Product has damaged packaging, goods are functional and undamaged You can claim the goods within 2 years of purchase.
A new generation of Pokémon comes to Nintendo Switch
Begin your Pokémon trainer adventure by choosing one of three new Pokémon partners: Grookey, Scorbunny, or Sobble. The Galar region awaits, where you need to stop the troublemakers from Team Yell and uncover the mystery behind the legendary Pokémon Zacian and Zamazenta! Explore the Wild Area – a vast landscape where you can freely control the camera. Connect locally or online with three other players in new multiplayer Max Raid battles, where players together face huge super-powerful Pokémon known as Dynamax Pokémon.
Certain Pokémon can achieve Gigantamax form and gain new appearances and powerful G-Max abilities. But the fun doesn't end with perfecting battle skills – visit shops in town and choose new clothes or get a new hairstyle. Be exactly the trainer you want to be. During your adventure, you'll meet not only completely new Pokémon but also familiar ones in new Galarian forms! To make leveling up your Pokémon easier, assign them to complete Poké Jobs. For fun, there's the Pokémon Camp where you can play with your Pokémon!
Catch Pokémon, trade them, and battle with them on your adventure in the Galar region Choose from three new Pokémon partners and meet brand new Pokémon Uncover the mystery of legendary Pokémon Zacian and Zamazenta! Players can freely control the camera in the vast Wild Area Team up with other trainers in Max Raid battles! Battle against wild Dynamax Pokémon in Max Raid battles and try to catch them!
Poké Ball Plus
Take advantage of the Poké Ball Plus controller features (sold separately). Take your Pokémon for a walk in the real world! If you spend enough time with your favorite Pokémon, something amazing will happen!
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT:
DISCOUNT: Damaged packaging goods.
RPG Game for Nintendo Switch

item.NAME: NS2 Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition
SWITCH 2 Wireless HORIPAD Turbo (Black)
item.DESCRIPTION:
Enjoy wireless gaming with the HORI Wireless HORIPAD Turbo for Nintendo Switch 2 (Black)! This translucent ergonomic controller looks robust and offers a wide range of features, including precise and durable TMR sticks for smooth and reliable analog movement. By pressing the HORI button, you can easily access Turbo and Assign functions or switch between two custom button profiles. Programmable rear buttons allow you to assign selected functions for easy access. The gyroscope and accelerometer detect controller rotation and movement in compatible games for an even greater experience. A button lock function is also included, helping to prevent accidental inputs during intense gaming sessions and tournaments. Wireless range up to 10 m and battery life up to 10 hours (connection and charging time may vary; USB-C charging cable included). Does not include HD Rumble 2 or vibration feedback. Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch – OLED Model, and Nintendo Switch Lite.
Wireless controller with up to 10 m range for Nintendo Switch 2 Rechargeable battery with up to 10 hours of gameplay on a single charge Precise and durable TMR sticks, gyroscope, and accelerometer HORI button for Turbo, Assign functions, and switching between button profiles Officially licensed by Nintendo®
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: Wireless controller for Nintendo Switch 2 with TMR sticks, Turbo function, and up to 10 hours of battery life.

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario Galaxy - Mario & Luma
item.DESCRIPTION:
amiibo Super Mario Galaxy – Mario & Luma
The collectible Mario & Luma amiibo figure brings the legendary hero from the Super Mario Galaxy series. Mario is depicted in a dynamic pose during his space adventure, accompanied by the star creature Luma, the iconic companion of this beloved galaxy series. Thanks to its detailed craftsmanship and themed base, it is an attractive piece for Nintendo fans and amiibo figure collectors alike.
By placing the figure on the NFC reader of a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 console, you can unlock various bonuses in compatible games. In games from the Super Mario Galaxy series, for example, you will receive an extra life in the form of a 1-Up Mushroom, which will help you during your exploration of the galaxies.
The figure is released in 2026 as part of the return of the popular Super Mario Galaxy series. It will also delight fans in connection with the upcoming animated film The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, which will expand the universe of this iconic game series.
Key Features
Official amiibo figure by Nintendo Mario character with star creature Luma Series: Super Mario Galaxy Interactive amiibo functionality (NFC) Bonuses in compatible games Collectible figure with detailed craftsmanship
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: amiibo Super Mario Galaxy - Mario & Luma

item.NAME: amiibo Super Mario Galaxy - Rosalina & Lumas
item.DESCRIPTION:
Rosalina & Lumas amiibo (Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2)
The collectible Rosalina & Lumas amiibo figure brings the beloved guardian of the galaxy from Super Mario Galaxy and Super Mario Galaxy 2. The figure captures Rosalina reading her magical book, accompanied by the adorable star creatures Lumas. Thanks to its detailed craftsmanship, rich base, and larger size than standard amiibo, it is an attractive piece for every fan of the Mario universe and Nintendo figure collectors.
By placing the figure on the NFC reader of a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 console, you can unlock various bonuses in compatible games. In games from the Super Mario Galaxy series, for example, you will receive an extra life in the form of a 1-Up Mushroom.
This amiibo figure is released in 2026 and marks the return of the popular Super Mario galaxy series. It will also delight Rosalina fans in connection with the upcoming animated film The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, which will expand the universe of this beloved game series.
Key Features
Official amiibo figure by Nintendo Rosalina character with Lumas Series: Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 Interactive amiibo functionality (NFC) Bonuses in compatible games Collectible figure with detailed craftsmanship
item.DESCRIPTION_SHORT: amiibo Super Mario Galaxy - Rosalina & Lumas
